title: A Projected Stochastic Gradient Method for Finite-Sum Problems with Linear Equality Constraints
summary: A stochastic gradient method for finite-sum minimization subject to deterministic linear constraints is proposed and analyzed. The procedure presented adapts the projected gradient method on convex set to the use of both a stochastic gradient and a possibly inexact projection map. Under standard assumptions in the field of stochastic gradient methods, we provide theoretical results in agreement with the theory for unconstrained problems. Numerical results are presented to show the practical behavior of the procedure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并分析了一种用于求解带确定性线性约束的有限和最小化问题的随机梯度方法，该方法将投影梯度法扩展到使用随机梯度和可能不精确的投影映射，并在标准假设下提供了与无约束问题理论一致的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有的随机梯度方法主要针对无约束问题，而实际应用中常遇到带线性约束的有限和最小化问题，需要一种能够处理此类约束的随机优化方法。
AI.method: 将投影梯度法扩展到凸集上的随机梯度场景，同时允许使用不精确的投影映射；在标准随机梯度假设下进行理论分析。
AI.result: 在标准假设下，给出了与无约束随机梯度方法理论一致的理论结果；数值实验展示了方法的实际表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法在理论上与无约束情形吻合，且数值实验验证了其有效性。

title: Static Output Feedback Stabilization of Linear Systems with Multiple Delays
summary: This work proposes a new procedure for the stabilization of time-delay systems using Static Output Feedback (SOF) control. A previous convex optimization approach to SOF for Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs) is extended to time-delay systems through the use of a proposed state-space representation. This approach is based on solving two convex optimization problems, which are extensions of Linear Matrix Inequalities (LMIs) to infinite-dimensional systems. The first problem is stabilization under state feedback control; the second problem takes advantage of the Projection Lemma, which is extended here from matrices to Partial Integral (PI) operators. Finally, the results are compared with other SOF solutions for systems with delay found in the literature, showing a significant reduction in conservatism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于静态输出反馈(SOF)的时滞系统镇定新方法，通过将针对常微分方程(ODE)的凸优化方法扩展至时滞系统，利用偏积分(PI)算子和投影引理的推广，求解两个凸优化问题（状态反馈镇定和SOF镇定），显著降低了保守性。
AI.motivation: 现有针对时滞系统的SOF控制方法保守性较高，需要一种更通用的凸优化框架来降低保守性。
AI.method: 1) 提出适用于时滞系统的状态空间表示，将ODE的SOF凸优化方法扩展至时滞系统；2) 将线性矩阵不等式(LMI)扩展至无穷维系统，求解两个凸优化问题：状态反馈镇定和基于投影引理的SOF镇定；3) 将投影引理从矩阵推广至偏积分(PI)算子。
AI.result: 与文献中其他SOF时滞系统镇定方法相比，该方法显著降低了保守性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于PI算子和投影引理扩展的凸优化方法能有效实现时滞系统的SOF镇定，且保守性优于现有方法。

title: Black-Box Followers, White-Box Leaders: Partial Zeroth-Order Methods for MPECs
summary: We study mathematical programs with equilibrium constraints, in which a leader knows their own cost function, but lacks a model of the followers' response. Instead, the leader can only query this response at specific points. While this setting precludes the use of gradient-based methods, existing zeroth-order approaches treat the composed objective entirely as a black box, deploying zeroth-order tools across both the leader and follower. Such approaches are inefficient, as they discard information the leader already possesses about their own cost function. In this work we instead propose to deploy zeroth-order tools only where they are truly needed: to handle the unknown, non-smooth followers' response. Specifically, we first propose PZOS, an algorithm that combines exact partial gradients of the leader's cost with zeroth-order Jacobian estimates of the followers' response in a chain-rule-inspired manner, and establish that it achieves a strictly lower variance bound than the black-box baseline. Second, we introduce the partial Goldstein subdifferential, a stationarity notion tailored to this composite structure, and prove convergence of our algorithm to both standard and partial Goldstein stationary points. Finally, we validate our method on two application domains -- toll optimization in routing games and defense-attack investment in security games -- demonstrating consistent improvements over black-box baselines in convergence speed, objective value, and estimator variance, with robust performance even under few queries per iteration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PZOS算法，通过将精确领导者的梯度与零阶方法估计的追随者响应相结合，解决领导者不知道追随者响应模型但可查询的均衡约束数学规划问题，在方差界、收敛性和实际性能上均优于传统黑箱基线方法。
AI.motivation: 在均衡约束数学规划中，领导者知道自身成本函数但缺乏追随者响应模型，只能通过查询获取响应。现有零阶方法将整个复合目标视为黑箱处理，丢弃了领导者已知的自身成本信息，导致效率低下。本文旨在仅对真正未知的部分（追随者的非光滑响应）使用零阶工具，提高优化效率。
AI.method: 提出PZOS算法：1) 对领导者成本使用精确偏梯度；2) 对追随者响应使用零阶雅可比估计；3) 以链式法则方式结合两者。同时提出部分Goldstein次微分作为针对该复合结构的驻点概念，并分析算法收敛性。
AI.result: PZOS算法在方差界上严格低于黑箱基线；在路由博弈的通行费优化和安全博弈的防御-攻击投资两个应用领域，PZOS在收敛速度、目标值和估计器方差上均一致优于黑箱基线方法，且在每次迭代查询数较少时仍保持鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过仅对未知的追随者响应部分使用零阶方法，可以有效利用已知的领导者成本信息，在理论和实践上均优于完全黑箱方法，为缺乏模型信息的双层优化问题提供了更高效的求解方案。

title: New Bounds for Exact Penalized Cardinality-Constrained Optimization with Pseudonormality Conditions
summary: Cardinality-constrained optimization (CCO) is a popular topic in sparse learning and signal recovery, yet remains challenging due to the inherent nonconvexity and discontinuity of cardinality constraints. This paper investigates the exact penalty theory for CCO problems with general equality and inequality constraints. In particular, we extend the pseudonormality condition to the cardinality-constrained framework and establish the local exact penalization without imposing Lipschitz continuity on the objective function. We further analyze both the projected subgradient method and its stochastic variant with convergence guarantees for the derived exact penalty formulation. Compared with the existing results, we give some more precise bounds of the iterate sequence and the objective function value.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带有一般等式和不等式约束的基数约束优化问题的精确罚理论，将伪正态性条件扩展到基数约束框架，建立了无需目标函数Lipschitz连续的局部精确惩罚，并分析了投影次梯度方法及其随机变体的收敛性，给出了比现有结果更精确的迭代序列和目标函数值边界。
AI.motivation: 基数约束优化在稀疏学习和信号恢复中应用广泛，但由于基数约束固有的非凸性和不连续性，求解极具挑战。现有方法在精确惩罚理论上对一般约束（等式和不等式）的处理尚不充分，且对目标函数Lipschitz连续的假设限制了适用范围。
AI.method: 将伪正态性条件扩展到基数约束框架，建立局部精确惩罚理论（无需Lipschitz连续性）；在此基础上分析投影次梯度方法及其随机变体的收敛性，推导更精确的迭代序列和目标函数值边界。
AI.result: 在基数约束框架下成功建立了基于伪正态性条件的局部精确惩罚理论，去除了目标函数Lipschitz连续的假设；给出了比现有结果更精确的迭代序列和函数值收敛边界。
AI.conclusion: 本文为一般约束的基数约束优化问题提供了更完善的精确惩罚理论基础，放宽了前提假设，并提升了算法收敛性分析的精度，对稀疏学习和信号恢复等领域的相关算法设计具有指导意义。

title: Dimension-Uniform Discretization Analysis of Preconditioned Annealed Langevin Dynamics for Multimodal Gaussian Mixtures
summary: Obtaining stable diffusion-based samplers in high- and infinite-dimensional settings is challenging because errors can accumulate across high-frequency coordinates and make the dynamics unstable under refinement of the finite-dimensional approximation of the underlying function-space problem. Discretization is a typical source of such errors, and preconditioning with a suitable spectral decay is one way to control their accumulation. In this paper, we study this problem for preconditioned annealed Langevin dynamics (ALD) applied to Gaussian mixtures. We first show that Euler-Maruyama (EM) discretization, by treating the stiff linear part of the annealed score with a forward Euler step, imposes a stability constraint coupling the preconditioner with the annealed covariance scale. Together with the conditions ensuring dimension-uniform control of the annealed dynamics, this constraint forces the initial smoothed law to remain uniformly close to the target across dimensions. We then consider an exponential-integrator scheme that integrates the stiff linear part of the annealed score exactly. Under explicit spectral summability conditions coupling the smoothing covariance, the component covariance spectra, and the preconditioner, we prove a dimension-uniform Kullback-Leibler (KL) bound for this scheme. This bound can be made arbitrarily small, uniformly in dimension, by allowing enough time for annealing and then refining the time mesh accordingly. Importantly, these conditions allow regimes in which the KL divergence between the target and the initial smoothed law diverges with dimension, showing that the restrictions imposed by EM are scheme-dependent rather than intrinsic to ALD.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了高维和无限维高斯混合模型中预条件退火朗之万动力学（ALD）的数值离散化问题。欧拉-丸山（EM）格式因处理刚性线性部分时产生稳定性约束，迫使初始光滑分布均匀接近目标；而指数积分器格式通过对刚性部分精确积分，在显式谱可和条件下实现了维度一致的KL界，且该界可通过增加退火时间和细化时间网格任意缩小，表明EM的限制是格式相关的而非ALD固有的。
AI.motivation: 高维和无限维空间中基于扩散的采样器（如预条件ALD）因高频坐标误差累积而难以稳定，离散化是误差的主要来源。已有方法（如预条件）虽能控制误差，但其在高斯混合模型中的理论保证尚不清晰。
AI.method: 对比两种数值格式：1) 欧拉-丸山（EM）格式，对退火分数的刚性线性部分使用前向欧拉步；2) 指数积分器格式，精确积分刚性线性部分。基于谱衰减和退火协方差尺度建立理论分析框架，推导维度一致的KL界。
AI.result: EM格式产生耦合预条件与退火协方差的稳定性约束，迫使初始光滑分布在所有维度上均匀接近目标。指数积分器在谱可和条件下达到维度一致的KL界，且该界可通过增加退火时间和细化网格任意缩小。
AI.conclusion: EM格式的限制是数值格式选择造成的，而非ALD算法本身固有的。指数积分器能在允许目标与初始光滑分布KL散度随维度发散（即更实际）的条件下仍保持收敛性。

title: Systematic Optimization of Real-Time Diffusion Model Inference on Apple M3 Ultra
summary: While real-time image generation using diffusion models has advanced rapidly on NVIDIA GPUs, systematic optimization research on non-CUDA platforms such as Apple Silicon remains extremely limited. In this study, we conducted comprehensive optimization experiments across 10 phases targeting the Apple M3 Ultra (60-core GPU, 512 GB unified memory) with the goal of achieving real-time camera img2img transformation. We explored a wide range of techniques including CoreML conversion, quantization, Token Merging, Neural Engine utilization, compact model exploration, frame interpolation, kNN search-based synthesis, pix2pix-turbo, optical flow frame skipping, and knowledge distillation, quantitatively evaluating the effectiveness of each approach. Ultimately, by combining CoreML conversion of the distillation-specialized model SDXS-512 with a 3-thread camera pipeline, we achieved real-time camera img2img transformation at 22.7 FPS at 512x512 resolution. The primary contribution of this work is the systematic demonstration that optimization insights established for CUDA are not necessarily effective on Apple Silicon's unified memory architecture. We reveal an optimization landscape fundamentally different from that of NVIDIA GPUs -- including the absence of speedup from quantization, the ineffectiveness of parallel inference, and the unsuitability of the Neural Engine for large-scale models -- and provide practical guidelines for diffusion model inference on Apple Silicon.

AI.tldr: 本研究在Apple M3 Ultra上进行了10个阶段的系统优化实验，最终通过结合CoreML转换的SDXS-512模型和3线程相机流水线，在512x512分辨率下实现了22.7 FPS的实时相机img2img转换，并揭示Apple Silicon统一内存架构与CUDA平台截然不同的优化特性。
AI.motivation: 非CUDA平台（如Apple Silicon）上的扩散模型系统优化研究极度缺乏，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在Apple M3 Ultra上进行了10个阶段的全面优化实验，探索了CoreML转换、量化、Token Merging、Neural Engine利用、紧凑模型、帧插值、kNN搜索合成、pix2pix-turbo、光流跳帧、知识蒸馏等技术，最终结合CoreML转换蒸馏专用模型SDXS-512与3线程相机流水线。
AI.result: 在512x512分辨率下实现了22.7 FPS的实时相机img2img转换。
AI.conclusion: CUDA平台上的优化经验在Apple Silicon统一内存架构上未必有效，揭示了包括量化无加速、并行推理无效、Neural Engine不适合大规模模型等截然不同的优化特性，并提供了实用指南。

title: AgentWall: A Runtime Safety Layer for Local AI Agents
comment: 16 pages, 2 figures, open-source implementation at https://github.com/agentwall/Agentwall
summary: The safety of autonomous AI agents is increasingly recognized as a critical open problem. As agents transition from passive text generators to active actors capable of executing shell commands, modifying files, calling APIs, and browsing the web, the consequences of unsafe or adversarially manipulated behavior become immediate and tangible. Existing AI safety work has focused primarily on model alignment and input filtering, but these approaches do not address what happens at the moment an agent's intent becomes a real action on a real machine. This gap is especially acute in local environments, where developers run agents against their own filesystems, credentials, and infrastructure with little runtime control. This paper introduces AgentWall, a runtime safety and observability layer for local AI agents. AgentWall intercepts every proposed agent action before it reaches the host environment, evaluates it against an explicit declarative policy, requires human approval for sensitive operations, and records a complete execution trail for audit and replay. It is implemented as a policy-enforcing MCP proxy and native OpenClaw plugin, working across Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, and OpenClaw with a single install command. We present the design, architecture, threat model, and policy model of AgentWall, and demonstrate 92.9% policy enforcement accuracy with sub-millisecond overhead across 14 benchmark tests. AgentWall is open-source at https://github.com/agentwall/Agentwall.

AI.tldr: AgentWall 是一个为本地AI智能体设计的运行时安全与可观测层，通过拦截所有智能体操作、执行声明式策略、要求人工审批敏感操作并记录完整执行轨迹，实现了92.9%的策略执行准确率和亚毫秒级开销。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全工作聚焦于模型对齐和输入过滤，但未能解决智能体意图转化为真实机器操作时的安全问题，尤其是在本地环境中开发者对智能体的运行时控制几乎为零。
AI.method: AgentWall 作为策略执行的MCP代理和OpenClaw原生插件实现，拦截每个提议的智能体操作，在到达主机环境前进行评估，依据显式声明式策略进行判断，要求人工审批敏感操作，并记录完整的执行轨迹用于审计和回放。
AI.result: 在14个基准测试中实现了92.9%的策略执行准确率和亚毫秒级开销，支持Claude Desktop、Cursor、Windsurf、Claude Code和OpenClaw等多个平台。
AI.conclusion: AgentWall 以极低开销有效弥补了现有AI安全方案在本地运行时层面的缺口，为自主AI智能体提供了实用的安全与可观测保障，且已开源。

title: A Proximal Gradient Framework for Composite Multiobjective Optimization on Riemannian Manifolds
summary: This paper proposes a Riemannian Multiobjective Proximal Gradient Method (RMPGM) for composite optimization problems on manifolds. Unlike scalarization-based approaches, the proposed framework directly handles vector-valued objectives and establishes global convergence to Pareto stationary points, together with an $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$ convergence rate. We further develop two variants to enhance practicality and performance: an inexact RMPGM that allows controlled inexactness in solving subproblems, and a trust-region RMPGM that adaptively adjusts the penalty parameter and achieves an $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2}) $iteration complexity. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed methods are consistently outperform subgradient-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种黎曼多目标近端梯度方法（RMPGM），用于流形上的复合优化问题。该方法直接处理向量值目标，无需标量化，并建立了全局收敛到Pareto平稳点的理论保证，收敛率为O(1/k)。进一步开发了两种变体：不精确RMPGM和信赖域RMPGM，后者达到了O(ε^{-2})的迭代复杂度。数值实验表明该方法优于基于次梯度的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有流形上的多目标优化方法多依赖标量化技术，难以直接处理向量值目标，且缺乏高效的基于梯度的求解框架。
AI.method: 提出了黎曼多目标近端梯度方法（RMPGM），直接处理流形上的复合多目标优化问题。在此基础上开发了不精确变体（允许子问题求解的受控不精确性）和信赖域变体（自适应调整惩罚参数）。
AI.result: 建立了全局收敛到Pareto平稳点的理论保证，收敛率为O(1/k)；信赖域变体达到O(ε^{-2})迭代复杂度；数值实验一致优于基于次梯度的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的RMPGM框架及其变体为流形上的多目标优化提供了高效且理论上保证的求解方案，在无需标量化的前提下实现了快速的全局收敛。

title: StAD: Stein Amortized Divergence for Fast Likelihoods with Diffusion and Flow
summary: Diffusion and flow-based models are ubiquitously used for generative modelling and density estimation. They admit a deterministic probability flow ordinary differential equation (PF-ODE), analogous to continuous normalizing flows (CNFs), which describes the transport of the probability mass. Obtaining the likelihood from these models is of interest to many workflows, especially Bayesian analysis, and requires solving the trace of the Jacobian to compute the divergence of the learned PF-ODE, which is either $\mathcal{O}(D^2)$ to compute exactly or $\mathcal{O}(D)$ with a noisy estimate. We introduce StAD, a new distillation method to predict and learn the divergence of the PF-ODE using the Langevin-Stein operator without ever computing the Jacobian. We show that our method is competitive with the Hutchinson and Hutch++ on CIFAR-10, ImageNet and other density estimation tasks, consistently improving the variance and speed of the likelihood predictions compared to the Hutchinson. We additionally show our method will generalize to a varied class of generative models, and show that under some regularity conditions these learned vector fields can be made to satisfy the Stein class.

AI.tldr: 本文提出StAD蒸馏方法，利用Langevin-Stein算子预测概率流ODE的散度，无需计算Jacobian，在密度估计任务中降低了似然预测的方差并提升了速度。
AI.motivation: 扩散/流模型通过PF-ODE进行密度估计时，计算似然需要求解Jacobian的迹（散度），精确计算复杂度为O(D²)，噪声估计虽为O(D)但方差大，影响贝叶斯分析等应用。
AI.method: 提出StAD蒸馏方法，利用Langevin-Stein算子直接预测和学习PF-ODE的散度，完全绕过Jacobian计算；并在一定正则条件下使学习到的向量场满足Stein类。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、ImageNet及其他密度估计任务上，StAD与Hutchinson及Hutch++方法相比，持续降低了似然预测的方差并提升了速度，且能泛化到多种生成模型。
AI.conclusion: StAD是一种高效且低方差的似然估计方法，避免了Jacobian计算，具有较好的泛化能力和理论保证。

title: Mirror Descent-Type Algorithms for the Variational Inequality Problem with Functional Constraints
summary: Variational inequalities play a key role in machine learning research, such as generative adversarial networks, reinforcement learning, adversarial training, and generative models. This paper is devoted to the constrained variational inequality problems with functional constraints (inequality-type constraints). We propose some mirror descent-type algorithms that switch between productive and non-productive steps depending on the values of the functional constraints at iterations, with many different step size rules and stopping criteria. We analyze the proposed algorithms and prove their optimal convergence rate to achieve a solution with desired accuracy, for problems with bounded and monotone operators and Lipschitz convex functional constraints. In addition, we propose a modification of the proposed algorithms by considering each functional constraint in the calculation when we have a productive step, as well as the first constraint that violates the feasibility. This modification can save the running time of algorithms when we have many functional constraints. In addition, we provide an analysis of the proposed algorithms for $δ$-monotone operators, allowing us to apply the proposed algorithms, as a special case, to constrained minimization problems when we do not have access to the exact information about the subgradient of the objective function. Numerical experiments that illustrate the work and performance of the proposed algorithms are also given.

AI.tldr: 本文针对带有不等式型函数约束的变分不等式问题，提出了多种基于镜像下降法的算法，支持多种步长规则和停止准则，在单调有界算子与Lipschitz凸约束下达到最优收敛率，并通过考虑函数约束的违反情况优化计算效率，同时扩展到了δ-单调算子场景。
AI.motivation: 变分不等式在机器学习（如GAN、强化学习、对抗训练等）中至关重要，但现有工作对带有函数约束（不等式型约束）的约束变分不等式问题研究不足，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出镜像下降型算法，根据迭代点处函数约束的值在生产性步骤与非生产性步骤之间切换；设计了多种步长规则和停止准则；对于多约束情况，提出改进版：在生产步骤中考虑所有约束，否则仅检查第一个违反的约束以节省时间；并扩展分析到δ-单调算子场景。
AI.result: 证明了算法在单调有界算子和Lipschitz凸函数约束下达到最优收敛率；改进版算法在多约束场景下显著节省运行时间；扩展分析表明算法适用于目标函数次梯度信息不精确的约束最小化问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为带有函数约束的变分不等式问题提供了高效且理论上最优的求解方案，并通过数值实验验证了性能。

title: ANNEAL: Adapting LLM Agents via Governed Symbolic Patch Learning
summary: LLM-based agents can recover from individual execution errors, yet they repeatedly fail on the same fault when the underlying process knowledge--operator schemas, preconditions, and constraints--remains unrepaired. Existing self-evolving approaches address this gap by updating prompts, memory, or model weights, but none directly repair the symbolic structures that encode how tasks are executed, and few provide the governance guarantees required for safe deployment. We introduce ANNEAL, a neuro-symbolic agent that converts recurring failures into governed symbolic edits of a process knowledge graph without modifying foundation model weights. Its core mechanism, Failure-Driven Knowledge Acquisition (FDKA), localizes the responsible operator, synthesizes a typed patch through constrained LLM generation, and validates the proposal via multi-dimensional scoring, symbolic guardrails, and canary testing before commit. Every accepted edit carries full provenance and deterministic rollback capability. Across four domains and 27 multi-seed runs, ANNEAL is the only evaluated system that commits persistent structural repairs--strong baselines such as ReAct and Reflexion achieve high episodic recovery yet retain 72-100% holdout failure rates on recurring faults, whereas ANNEAL reduces these to 0% in the tested recurring-failure settings. Ablation confirms that removing FDKA eliminates all structural repairs and drops success rate by up to 26.7 percentage points. These results suggest that governed symbolic repair offers a complementary paradigm to weight-level and prompt-level adaptation for persistent fault elimination.

AI.tldr: ANNEAL是一种神经符号代理，通过故障驱动知识获取（FDKA）机制将重复性执行失败转化为受治理的符号化过程知识图谱编辑，在不修改基础模型权重的情况下实现持久性结构修复，在四领域27次实验中将重复故障率降至0%，而ReAct、Reflexion等基线方法仍保持72-100%的重复故障率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理虽能从单次执行错误中恢复，但无法修复导致重复失败的根本性过程知识缺陷（如操作符模式、前提条件和约束）；现有自进化方法通过更新提示、记忆或模型权重弥补这一差距，但未能直接修复编码任务执行的符号结构，且缺乏安全部署所需的治理保障。
AI.method: ANNEAL采用神经符号架构，核心机制为Failure-Driven Knowledge Acquisition (FDKA)：首先定位失败负责的操作符，通过约束LLM生成合成类型化补丁，然后经多维评分、符号护栏和canary测试验证提案，最终提交的每次编辑附带完整溯源和确定性回滚能力。
AI.result: 在四个领域、27次多种子运行中，ANNEAL是唯一实现持久结构修复的系统；基线方法（ReAct、Reflexion）虽具有高 episodic recovery 但保留72-100%的重复故障率，而ANNEAL将重复故障率降至0%；消融实验表明移除FDKA将消除所有结构修复并使成功率下降最多26.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 受治理的符号化修复为持久故障消除提供了与权重级和提示级适配互补的新范式，表明通过显式符号结构治理可以有效弥补纯神经方法的根本性缺陷。

title: Data-Driven Linear Quadratic Control Using Output-Feedback via Non-Minimal Realization
summary: In this paper, we investigate a continuous-time linear quadratic control problem for systems with unknown matrices, where only input-output data are available. We propose an output-feedback learning framework based on a canonical nonminimal realization constructed through Kreisselmeier's adaptive filter. The filter admits an observer interpretation, which leads to an augmented system that preserves the input-output response of the realization and provides accessible state trajectories. We show that the optimal gain of this augmented system explicitly recovers the optimal gain associated with the canonical non-minimal realization, and hence achieves the optimal state-feedback solution of the original plant. Exploiting this relation and the known structure of the augmented input matrix, we develop a data-driven value iteration algorithm within the adaptive dynamic programming framework. The resulting controller is implementable from input-output data, and its performance is validated via simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对系统矩阵未知、仅可获取输入输出数据的连续时间线性二次型控制问题，提出了一种基于Kreisselmeier自适应滤波器的输出反馈学习框架，通过非最小实现构造增广系统，并开发了数据驱动的值迭代算法，最终实现了从输入输出数据直接设计最优控制器。
AI.motivation: 在实际系统中，系统矩阵往往未知且状态变量不可直接测量，传统LQR控制需要完整的状态信息和系统模型，这限制了其在工程中的应用。因此需要开发一种仅依赖输入输出数据的最优控制方法。
AI.method: 1）基于Kreisselmeier自适应滤波器构造规范非最小实现；2）将滤波器解释为观测器，构建保持输入输出响应的增广系统；3）证明增广系统的最优增益可恢复原始系统的最优状态反馈解；4）利用增广输入矩阵的已知结构，在自适应动态规划框架下开发数据驱动的值迭代算法。
AI.result: 所提出的控制器仅需输入输出数据即可实现，并通过仿真验证了其性能有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Kreisselmeier自适应滤波器的非最小实现框架能够有效地将输入输出数据转化为可用的状态轨迹，结合值迭代算法实现了无模型场景下的最优LQR控制，为实际工程中系统模型未知的情况提供了可行方案。

title: Isotonic Survival Regression: Calibrated Survival Distributions from Deep Cox Models
summary: Time-to-event data is widespread across the life sciences and engineering, but it is typically encountered together with censoring, which complicates the application of standard machine learning methods. Deep Cox models have emerged as a popular method for analyzing time-to-event data because they gracefully handle censoring and can be used with unstructured data such as clinical text reports, genomic sequences, and pathology images. However, their predicted survival probabilities are often poorly calibrated, thus limiting their practical utility. In this paper, we propose a novel post hoc calibration method for Deep Cox models that uses isotonic regression to refine predicted survival probabilities without affecting discriminative power. We establish favorable theoretical guarantees, including a double-robustness property and asymptotic calibration. Experiments on synthetic and real-world clinical data demonstrate the empirical effectiveness of our method.

AI.tldr: 针对Deep Cox模型预测生存概率校准不良的问题，本文提出了一种基于保序回归的事后校准方法，在不影响判别能力的前提下改善校准效果，并提供了双重稳健性和渐近校准的理论保证。
AI.motivation: Deep Cox模型虽能处理删失数据和异构数据，但其预测的生存概率校准不良，限制了实际应用价值。现有方法缺乏对生存概率校准的理论保证和有效的事后校准手段。
AI.method: 提出一种事后校准方法，利用保序回归（isotonic regression）对Deep Cox模型预测的生存概率进行精细化校准，且不改变模型的判别能力。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实临床数据上验证了方法的有效性，并证明了双重稳健性（double-robustness）和渐近校准（asymptotic calibration）等理论性质。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的保序回归事后校准方法能有效改善Deep Cox模型的生存概率校准度，同时保持判别性能，具有扎实的理论保障和实证效果。

title: Reducing Credit Assignment Variance via Counterfactual Reasoning Paths
summary: Reinforcement learning for multi-step reasoning with large language models (LLMs) often relies on sparse terminal rewards, leading to poor credit assignment conditions where the final feedback is evenly propagated across all intermediate decisions. This results in high gradient variance, unstable training, and numerous ineffective updates, ultimately causing the model to fail and preventing sustained improvement. We introduce a counterfactual comparison-based credit assignment framework, which samples multiple reasoning trajectories under the same input. By treating their differences as an implicit approximation of alternative decisions, we construct an implicit process-level advantage estimator that transforms sparse terminal rewards into step-sensitive learning signals. Based on this, we propose Implicit Behavior Policy Optimization (IBPO), which significantly improves training stability and performance upper bounds on mathematical and code reasoning benchmarks, pointing to a promising direction for unlocking the performance potential of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 针对大语言模型多步推理中稀疏终端奖励导致的信用分配问题，提出基于反事实比较的隐式过程级优势估计框架IBPO，将稀疏奖励转化为步骤敏感的学习信号，显著提升数学和代码推理任务的训练稳定性与性能上限。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在多步推理中依赖稀疏终端奖励，导致信用分配困难——最终反馈均匀传播到所有中间决策，造成高梯度方差、训练不稳定和大量无效更新，模型无法持续提升。
AI.method: 提出反事实比较的信用分配框架，在同一输入下采样多条推理轨迹，通过轨迹间差异隐式近似替代决策，构建隐式过程级优势估计器，将稀疏终端奖励转化为步骤敏感的学习信号，在此基础上提出隐式行为策略优化（IBPO）。
AI.result: 在数学和代码推理基准上显著提升训练稳定性和性能上限。
AI.conclusion: IBPO为释放大语言模型性能潜力提供了有前景的方向。

title: From Prompts to Protocols: An AI Agent for Laboratory Automation
summary: Automating science laboratories enables faster, safer, more accurate, and more reproducible execution of protocols, accelerating the discovery and testing of new materials, drugs, and more. However, setting up and running autonomous labs requires coordinating numerous instruments and robots, forcing scientists to write code, manage configuration files, and navigate complex software infrastructure. We present an AI agent architecture that integrates large language models with laboratory orchestration, enabling scientists to interactively create and monitor automated lab protocols using natural language. Integrated into the Experiment Orchestration System (EOS), the AI agent operates under an agentic loop with automated validation and error correction, and supports the complete experimental lifecycle: creating protocols, running and monitoring both protocols and closed-loop optimization campaigns, and analyzing results. A visual graph editor renders protocols as interactive node-based diagrams synchronized with the AI agent's protocol representation, enabling seamless alternation between AI-assisted and manual protocol construction. Evaluated on three simulated automated labs spanning chemistry, biology, and materials science, the AI agent achieves a 97% first-attempt protocol generation success rate and an order of magnitude reduction in required interface actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成大语言模型与实验室编排的AI智能体架构，使科学家能够通过自然语言交互式创建和监控自动化实验协议。该架构在实验编排系统（EOS）中运行，采用带自动验证和纠错的智能体循环，支持完整的实验生命周期。在化学、生物学和材料科学三个模拟自动化实验室中评估，AI智能体首次协议生成成功率达97%，所需界面操作减少一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 自动化科学实验室能加速新材料、药物等的发现和测试，但设置和运行自主实验室需要协调大量仪器和机器人，迫使科学家编写代码、管理配置文件并导航复杂的软件基础设施，这成为阻碍科学家高效利用自动化实验室的主要障碍。
AI.method: 提出一种集成大语言模型与实验室编排的AI智能体架构：1) 在实验编排系统（EOS）中运行，采用带自动验证和纠错的智能体循环；2) 支持完整实验生命周期（创建协议、运行和监控协议及闭环优化活动、分析结果）；3) 配备可视化图形编辑器，以交互式节点图形式呈现协议，并与AI智能体的协议表示同步，支持AI辅助与手动构建的无缝切换。
AI.result: 在化学、生物学和材料科学三个模拟自动化实验室的评估中，AI智能体首次协议生成成功率达到97%，所需界面操作减少一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 提出的AI智能体架构有效降低了科学家使用自动化实验室的门槛，通过自然语言交互和智能体循环实现了高效、可靠的实验协议生成与管理，在多个科学领域均表现出色。

title: A Diagnostic Framework for Implementation Risk in Bilevel Decision Problems: The Ambiguity Premium and the Robustness--Efficiency Frontier
summary:
Hierarchical decision problems are often modeled as bilevel programs in which a leader commits to a policy and a follower responds optimally. When the follower's optimal response is nonunique, or when only near-optimal follower behavior can be verified, the same leader decision may induce a range of upper-level outcomes. This paper develops a diagnostic framework for quantifying that exposure. For a leader decision $x$, we evaluate the optimistic and pessimistic upper-level values over the $ε$-optimal follower response set $S_ε(x)$ and use their difference, \[
  Δ_ε(x):=ψ_ε^p(x)-ψ_ε^o(x), \] as an ambiguity premium. The premium itself is classical in the optimistic--pessimistic bilevel distinction; the contribution here is to make it operational as an implementation-risk diagnostic. We establish a diameter bound $Δ_ε(x)\le L_F(x)\,\mathrm{diam}(S_ε(x))$ and an $\mathcal{O}(\sqrtε)$ estimate under quadratic lower-level growth. We then organize existing bilevel--GNEP reformulations by their computational roles and propose a screening workflow that reports, for each candidate policy, nominal value, ambiguity exposure, and a first-order residual. Two stylized case studies -- a parallel-link Stackelberg pricing problem and a convex generation-planning model with diversification constraints -- show how the resulting robustness--efficiency frontier can identify policies that are nominally attractive but sensitive to near-optimal follower responses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个诊断框架，通过乐观-悲观双层级值之差 Δε(x) 量化领导者决策在ε-最优跟随者响应下的暴露风险，建立了直径界和O(√ε)估计，并设计筛选工作流以生成鲁棒性-效率前沿。
AI.motivation: 双层级决策中，若跟随者最优响应不唯一或仅可验证近最优行为，同一领导者决策可能产生一系列上层结果，现有方法缺乏量化这种暴露风险的操作性诊断工具。
AI.method: 定义乐观值 ψε^o(x) 和悲观值 ψε^p(x) 在 ε-最优跟随者响应集 Sε(x) 上，以其差值 Δε(x) 作为模糊性溢价；建立直径界 Δε(x) ≤ L_F(x)·diam(Sε(x)) 及二次下层增长下的 O(√ε) 估计；将双层级-GNEP重新表述按计算角色组织，提出含名义值、模糊暴露和一阶残差的筛选工作流。
AI.result: 在平行链路Stackelberg定价问题和含多样化约束的凸发电规划问题两个案例中，鲁棒性-效率前沿成功识别出名义上吸引人但对近最优跟随者响应敏感的候选策略。
AI.conclusion: Δε(x) 作为实施风险诊断指标是可行的，该框架可将传统乐观-悲观双层级区分操作化，为政策制定者提供风险暴露的量化工具。

title: Prediction-Intervention Games and Invariant Sets
summary: We consider the following two-player game: using observational data, the leader chooses a prediction function for a response variable $Y$ from given covariates. The follower then reacts with an intervention on some covariates in the underlying structural causal model to maximize their own objective. The leader knows the intervention targets, but may have limited knowledge of the follower's objective. We call this setup a prediction-intervention game, a special case of a Stackelberg game. Finding an optimal strategy for the leader is generally difficult. To avoid severe performance loss, the leader may base their prediction on the causal parents of $Y$, or more generally on an invariant subset of covariates. We prove, for two common classes of follower objectives, that predictors based on the stable blanket, a specific invariant subset, are always better or as good as those based on the causal parents. We further upper bound the leader's post-intervention risk by a worst-case risk over allowed interventions and strengthen existing distribution generalization results to analyze this bound: we give sufficient conditions under which stable-blanket predictors are worst-case optimal, and show by examples that these conditions cannot in general be dropped. Finally, we discuss practical strategies for settings with known and unknown graph, and test them on simulated and real-world data.

AI.tldr: 本文研究预测-干预博弈中领导者的最优策略，证明基于稳定毯（stable blanket）的预测器在两类常见追随者目标下优于因果父节点预测器，并给出了最坏情况风险的上界与最优性条件。
AI.motivation: 在预测-干预博弈中，领导者利用观测数据选择预测函数，追随者随后对某些协变量进行干预以最大化自身目标。领导者虽知晓干预目标，但对追随者目标的了解可能有限，寻找最优策略通常很困难，因此需要探索能避免严重性能损失的稳健预测策略。
AI.method: 将问题建模为Stackelberg博弈（预测-干预博弈），证明基于因果父节点或不变子集（稳定毯）的预测器具有优势；对两类常见追随者目标，证明稳定毯预测器始终优于或等价于因果父节点预测器；通过最坏情况风险上界分析并给出稳定毯预测器最优的充分条件；在已知/未知图结构下提出实用策略并进行仿真与真实数据实验。
AI.result: 稳定毯预测器在两类常见追随者目标下始终优于或等价于基于因果父节点的预测器；给出了稳定毯预测器在最坏情况下风险最优的充分条件，并证明这些条件一般情况下不可或缺；在模拟和真实数据上验证了所提策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在预测-干预博弈中，基于稳定毯的预测策略能有效应对领导者对追随者目标认知有限的问题，提供比因果父节点更优或等价的性能保证，并为分布泛化问题提供了新的理论分析框架。

title: SignMuon: Communication-Efficient Distributed Muon Optimization
summary:
Distributed training of large neural networks is bottlenecked by full-precision gradient communication and by coordinatewise optimizers that ignore the matrix structure of weight tensors. We propose Sign-Muon, a 1-bit, matrix-aware optimizer that combines majority-vote sign aggregation from signSGD with the polar-step framework of Muon. Each worker forms a Muon-style direction by taking the polar factor of its momentum via a Newton--Schulz iteration, transmits only the entrywise signs, and aggregates by majority vote; an optional local polar step further enforces orthogonality at no extra communication cost.
  Under spectral-norm smoothness and bounded-variance stochastic gradients, the spectral-norm normalized sign step yields an $\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{T})$ nonconvex rate for an $\ell_1$-based stationarity measure. With unimodal symmetric noise, majority vote across $M$ workers cuts the stochastic term by $1/\sqrt{M}$, matching signSGD. In the $α$-$β$ model, distributed Sign-Muon needs only one integer sum-allreduce per iteration; all orthogonalization is local, giving a $32\times$ bandwidth reduction over float32 ($4\times$ for int8).
  Across 330 CIFAR-10/ResNet-50 configurations Sign-Muon attains the best validation accuracy (92.15\%); its 4-GPU majority-vote variant reaches 92.02\% with 37\% less training time at matched effective batch. On nanoGPT, Sign-Muon achieves lower perplexity and better anytime performance than other sign-based baselines, with favorable weak-scaling up to 16 GPUs.

AI.tldr: Sign-Muon是一种1比特、矩阵感知的分布式优化器，结合了signSGD的多数投票符号聚合与Muon的极坐标步骤框架，在CIFAR-10/ResNet-50和nanoGPT上取得了优异性能，相比float32实现了32倍带宽缩减。
AI.motivation: 大规模神经网络分布式训练受限于全精度梯度通信以及忽略权重张量矩阵结构的逐坐标优化器，亟需通信高效且能利用矩阵结构的优化方法。
AI.method: 每个工作节点通过Newton-Schulz迭代计算动量的极因子得到Muon风格方向，仅传输逐元素符号并通过多数投票聚合；可选的局部极坐标步骤在不增加通信开销下进一步强制正交性。在谱范数平滑和有界方差随机梯度假设下，谱范数归一化的符号步骤对基于ℓ1的平稳性度量达到O(1/√T)非凸收敛率。
AI.result: 在330个CIFAR-10/ResNet-50配置中取得最佳验证准确率92.15%；4-GPU多数投票变体在匹配有效batch下训练时间减少37%达到92.02%。在nanoGPT上优于其他符号基线，弱扩展性至16GPU。相比float32实现32倍带宽缩减（int8为4倍）。每次迭代仅需一次整数sum-allreduce。
AI.conclusion: Sign-Muon通过1比特通信和矩阵感知优化成功实现了通信高效与收敛性能的兼顾，在大规模分布式训练中具有显著优势。

title: Skim: Speculative Execution for Fast and Efficient Web Agents
summary: Skim is a speculative execution framework for web agents that exploits the predictable structure of purpose-built websites. Today's web-agent expense is not intrinsic to the tasks but a property of how agents are composed: frontier-model inference, browser rendering, and ReAct-style planning are applied to every step of every task regardless of complexity. Skim's key observation is that websites enforce stable URL patterns, answer formats, and task-to-trajectory mappings across queries of the same type, so most queries can bypass these heavyweight components entirely. An offline profiler captures these patterns once per site. At runtime, Skim matches each query to a template, synthesizes the destination URL, and extracts the answer with a small model. A lightweight verifier gates each fast-path output against the query and schema; rare misspeculations cascade to the full agent, warm-started by the fast path's final URL to preserve upstream trajectory progress. Across standard web-agent benchmarks paired with three backboneagents (WebVoyager, AgentOccam, BrowserUse), Skim reduces median per-task cost by 1.9x and latency by 33.4% with no accuracy loss.

AI.tldr: Skim是一个面向Web代理的推测执行框架，利用目的性网站的预测性结构，通过离线分析和运行时模板匹配绕过昂贵的推理、渲染和规划组件，在保持准确率不变的情况下将中位数任务成本降低1.9倍，延迟降低33.4%。
AI.motivation: 当前Web代理的高昂开销并非任务本身固有的，而是代理组合方式的产物——前沿模型推理、浏览器渲染和ReAct风格的规划被应用于每一步每一个任务，无论其复杂度如何。这种"一刀切"的架构导致了大量不必要的计算资源浪费。
AI.method: Skim通过两个阶段实现加速：(1) 离线阶段，利用分析器捕获每个站点的稳定URL模式、答案格式和任务到轨迹的映射；(2) 运行时阶段，将查询匹配到模板，合成目标URL，并利用小模型提取答案。轻量级验证器对快速路径输出进行查询和模式校验，罕见的错误推测会回退到完整代理，并由快速路径的最终URL进行热启动以保留上游轨迹进展。
AI.result: 在标准Web代理基准测试上，结合三种骨干代理（WebVoyager、AgentOccam、BrowserUse），Skim将中位数每任务成本降低1.9倍，延迟降低33.4%，且未造成精度损失。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用目的性网站的固有结构规律，大量同类查询可以绕过昂贵的通用组件，实现高效推测执行，这证明了当前Web代理中存在的结构性冗余是可以被系统性消除的。

title: Stochastic Optimization and Data Science
summary: This paper aims to motivate stochastic optimization problems from a statistical perspective and a statistical learning perspective, where the goal is to maximize the log-likelihood or minimize the population risk. We briefly describe the two main approaches: offline (Monte Carlo / Sample Average Approximation) and online (Stochastic Approximation) approaches -- to solve the expectation minimization problems.

AI.tldr: 本文从统计和统计学习视角出发，旨在最大化对数似然或最小化总体风险，简要介绍了解决期望最小化问题的两种主要方法：离线方法（蒙特卡洛/样本平均近似）和在线方法（随机逼近）。
AI.motivation: 从统计和统计学习视角激励随机优化问题，明确优化目标为最大化对数似然或最小化总体风险。
AI.method: 介绍了两种主要方法：离线方法（蒙特卡洛/样本平均近似）和在线方法（随机逼近）来解决期望最小化问题。
AI.result: 给出两种解决期望最小化问题的主要方法框架。
AI.conclusion: 从统计和统计学习角度系统归纳了随机优化问题的求解路径。

title: HYVINT: Intensity-Driven Hypergraph Generation with Variational Representations
summary: Hypergraphs provide a principled framework for modeling polyadic interactions, with applications in recommendation systems, social networks, and molecular modeling. Hypergraph generation remains challenging because incidence structures are discrete, sparse, and governed by heterogeneous higher-order interactions. Existing generators often rely on implicit latent spaces or continuous incidence decoders, which provide limited mechanistic interpretation of how node-hyperedge incidences arise. To address these limitations, we propose HYVINT, an intensity-driven hypergraph generative framework. Our key innovations are twofold: (i) we develop an intensity-driven incidence formation mechanism for hypergraphs that links latent interaction strength to binary incidence, and (ii) we derive a tractable lower-bound variational estimator for learning latent representations. We provide generation error bounds with asymptotic convergence rates and empirically show that HYVINT achieves strong fidelity while maintaining substantial novelty and diversity on synthetic and real-world hypergraphs.

AI.tldr: HYVINT是一个基于强度驱动的超图生成框架，通过将潜在交互强度与二元关联联系起来，并推导可处理的变分下界估计器来学习潜在表示，在合成和真实超图上实现了高保真度、新颖性和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有超图生成方法依赖隐式潜在空间或连续关联解码器，缺乏对节点-超边关联如何产生的机制性解释，且难以处理超图的离散性、稀疏性和异质高阶交互特性。
AI.method: 提出HYVINT框架：(i) 构建强度驱动的关联形成机制，将潜在交互强度映射到二元关联；(ii) 推导可处理的变分下界估计器用于学习潜在表示；并提供生成误差界及渐近收敛率。
AI.result: 在合成和真实超图上，HYVINT在保持高保真度的同时实现了显著的新颖性和多样性，并提供了理论上的生成误差界与收敛率保证。
AI.conclusion: HYVINT通过强度驱动的可解释生成机制和变分推断，有效解决了超图生成中的离散稀疏和高阶交互挑战，为超图生成提供了兼具理论保证和经验性能的解决方案。

title: When Actions Disappear: Adversarial Action Removal in Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
summary: We study adversarial action masking in self-play reinforcement learning: an attacker selectively removes legal actions from a victim's action set. Unlike observation or action perturbations, removal eliminates decision options before the agent acts. Across poker games scaling from 6 to 5,531 information states and two non-poker domains, learned masking causes substantially more damage than random masking and learned perturbation baselines. The attack persists across Q-learning, PPO, NFSP, neural NFSP, and DQN victims; transfers across agents; is amplified by self-play; and shows no recovery under extended masked training. Mechanistically, the adversary targets high-value decision points, captured by reach-weighted contingent action capacity (CAC$_w$) and a value-weighted refinement CAC$_v$. These results identify action availability as a distinct robustness surface in self-play RL.

AI.tldr: 研究了自对弈强化学习中的对抗性动作屏蔽：攻击者通过选择性移除受害者动作集中的合法动作，造成比随机屏蔽或扰动基线更严重的损害，且该攻击具有跨算法迁移性、自对弈放大性和不可恢复性，揭示了动作可用性作为自对弈RL中一个独立鲁棒性维度。
AI.motivation: 探索自对弈强化学习中一种新的攻击形式——对抗性动作屏蔽（选择性移除合法动作），并验证其危害性、迁移性及不可恢复性，揭示动作可用性作为独立鲁棒性维度的重要性。
AI.method: 在6至5,531个信息状态的扑克游戏及两个非扑克域中，采用自对弈强化学习训练攻击者学习选择性移除受害者合法动作；对比随机屏蔽和对抗性扰动基线；测试跨Q-learning、PPO、NFSP、神经NFSP、DQN等受害者算法的迁移性；通过自对弈放大攻击效果；引入reach-weighted contingent action capacity (CAC$_w$)和value-weighted refinement CAC$_v$两种机制性指标分析攻击模式。
AI.result: 学习型动作屏蔽比随机屏蔽和对抗性扰动基线造成显著更大的损害；攻击跨多种强化学习算法有效且可迁移；自对弈会放大攻击效果；即使在延长屏蔽训练下受害者也无法恢复；攻击者倾向于针对高价值决策点，该行为可由CAC$_w$和CAC$_v$量化刻画。
AI.conclusion: 动作可用性是自对弈强化学习中一个独立且重要的鲁棒性维度，现有对抗性训练方法可能无法有效防御此类攻击。

title: Scalable Uncertainty Reasoning in Knowledge Graphs
comment: 14 pages. Preprint of a paper accepted at the ESWC 2026 PhD Symposium
summary: Knowledge Graphs are pivotal for semantic data integration. The real-world data they model is often inherently uncertain. Within knowledge graphs, uncertainty manifests in three distinct levels: imprecise attribute values, probabilistic triple existence, and incomplete schema knowledge. However, current Semantic Web standards lack native support for reasoning over such uncertainty, and naïve extensions often incur computational intractability. In this thesis, I aim to develop a modular framework that addresses each level through tailored techniques: (1) defining probabilistic literals and a corresponding query algebra for continuous attributes; (2) a compilation-based framework transforming SPARQL provenance into tractable probabilistic circuits for uncertain triples; and (3) topology-aware geometric embeddings for statistical schema reasoning. The central hypothesis is that specialized reasoning mechanisms, namely algebraic, logical, and geometric approaches, can reconcile semantic precision with computational tractability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个模块化框架，通过代数、逻辑和几何三种专门推理机制，分别处理知识图谱中属性值不精确、三元组存在概率性以及模式知识不完整三个层面的不确定性，旨在实现语义精度与计算可处理性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现实世界知识图谱中的数据 inherently uncertain（固有不确定性），表现为三个不同层面：属性值不精确、三元组存在概率性、模式知识不完整。当前语义网标准缺乏对这类不确定性的原生推理支持，而简单的扩展方法往往带来计算上的难解性。
AI.method: (1) 为连续属性定义概率文字及对应的查询代数；(2) 基于编译的框架，将SPARQL溯源信息转化为可处理的概率电路，用于处理不确定三元组；(3) 采用拓扑感知的几何嵌入进行统计模式推理。
AI.result: 通过代数、逻辑和几何三种专门推理机制，实现语义精度与计算可处理性的协调。
AI.conclusion: 专门化的推理机制（代数、逻辑、几何）能够在保持语义精度的同时，实现计算上的可处理性，为知识图谱中的不确定性推理提供了一种模块化的解决方案。

title: Clipped Stochastic Gradient Tracking For Locally Smooth Functions
summary: Most stochastic gradient tracking (GT) methods adopt pre-scheduled stepsize rules, while a few recent works studied adaptive stepsizes that attempt to respond to the problem's local landscape. These methods are typically built upon the problem's global smoothness constant in both analysis and implementation, even for the adaptive ones. On the one hand, for many problems the local smoothness constant may vary drastically across the domain, and sometimes even unbounded, using the global upper bound of the local constants is too conservative. On the other hand, drastic stepsize changes can cause difficulties in the analysis of convergence and consensus of distributed algorithms, making the direct use of local smoothness constants risky and theoretically challenging. In this paper, we propose a \emph{Relative Uniform Continuity} (RUC) regularity condition for the local smoothness constant as a function of sets. The RUC condition covers most common growth functions for local smoothness constant, ranging from constant and logarithmic to polynomial and even exponential. For RUC-regular distributed optimization problems with finite-sum structure, we derive a clipped gradient tracking method with staggered variance reduction, which only relies on the local smoothness of objective functions, and an $\mathcal{O}(\sum_in_i^{1.5}+n_i^{0.5}ε^{-1})$ complexity has been established for our algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出相对一致连续（RUC）正则性条件来刻画局部光滑常数，并基于此设计了一种带交错方差缩减的裁剪梯度跟踪方法，实现了$\mathcal{O}(\sum_i n_i^{1.5}+n_i^{0.5}\varepsilon^{-1})$的复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有随机梯度跟踪方法通常依赖全局光滑常数，而局部光滑常数在域内可能剧烈变化甚至无界，使用全局上界过于保守。同时，步长剧烈变化会给分布式算法的收敛与一致性分析带来困难，直接使用局部光滑常数存在风险与理论挑战。
AI.method: 提出相对一致连续（RUC）正则性条件来刻画局部光滑常数作为集合函数的性质，该条件涵盖常数、对数、多项式乃至指数增长函数。基于RUC条件，设计了带交错方差缩减的裁剪梯度跟踪方法，仅依赖目标函数的局部光滑性。
AI.result: 建立了$\mathcal{O}(\sum_i n_i^{1.5}+n_i^{0.5}\varepsilon^{-1})$的复杂度保证。
AI.conclusion: RUC条件为处理局部光滑常数变化提供了理论框架，所提方法在分布式优化中实现了有效的自适应步长策略。

title: A Fourier perspective on the learning dynamics of neural networks: from sample complexities to mechanistic insights
summary: Neural networks trained with gradient-based methods exhibit a strong simplicity bias: they learn simpler statistical features of their data before moving to more complex features. Previous analyses of this phenomenon have largely focused on settings with (quasi-)isotropic inputs. In this work, we study the simplicity bias from a Fourier perspective, which allows us to include two key features of natural images in the analysis: approximate translation-invariance and power-law spectra. We first show experimentally that simple neural networks trained on image classification tasks first rely on amplitude information -- related to pair-wise correlations between pixels -- before exploiting phase information, which encodes edges and higher-order correlations. In view of this, we introduce a synthetic data model for translation-invariant inputs that allows precise control over amplitudes and phases while remaining tractable. We rigorously establish that for isotropic and high-dimensional inputs, classification based on phase information alone is a genuinely hard task: online stochastic gradient descent (SGD) cannot distinguish the structured inputs from noise within $n \ll N^3$ steps, but needs at least $n \gg N^3 \log^2{N}$ steps. In contrast, we show both experimentally and theoretically that power-law spectra can dramatically accelerate the speed of learning phase information, even if the spectra do not help with classification. Simulations with two-layer networks trained on textures and with deep convolutional networks on ImageNet and CIFAR100 confirm this non-trivial interaction between amplitudes and phases, providing mechanistic insights into how deep neural networks can learn natural image distributions efficiently.

AI.tldr: 本文从傅里叶视角研究神经网络在图像分类中的简单性偏差，发现网络先学习振幅信息（像素间相关性），后学习相位信息（边缘和高阶相关性）。通过引入平移不变输入的合成数据模型，理论证明高维各向同性输入下SGD需O(N³ log²N)步才能学习相位信息，而幂律谱可显著加速该过程。实验验证了该机制在纹理、ImageNet和CIFAR100上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有简单性偏差分析多集中于（准）各向同性输入，忽略了自然图像的关键特征（近似平移不变性和幂律谱）。本文旨在从傅里叶视角出发，纳入这些特征，深入理解神经网络学习自然图像分布的效率机制。
AI.method: 实验观察：在图像分类任务中比较网络对振幅信息（像素间相关性）和相位信息（边缘与高阶相关性）的学习顺序。理论建模：构建平移不变输入的合成数据模型，精确控制振幅与相位；利用在线SGD分析相位信息学习的样本复杂度。实验验证：在纹理、ImageNet和CIFAR100上进行两层网络与深度卷积网络模拟。
AI.result: 各向同性高维输入下，纯相位分类任务困难：SGD在n≪N³步内无法区分结构与噪声，需n≫N³ log²N步。幂律谱可显著加速相位信息的学习速度，即使谱本身无助于分类。实验证实振幅与相位之间存在非平凡交互作用，该机制可解释深度网络高效学习自然图像分布的原因。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络先学习振幅信息后学习相位信息，自然图像的幂律谱特性可加速相位学习，为理解深度网络学习自然图像分布的效率提供了机理层面的解释。

title: A Structural Threshold in Decision Capacity Governs Collapse in Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
summary: We show that a threshold in decision capacity determines whether self-play reinforcement learning agents collapse under asymmetric rule perturbations. Across poker variants, matrix games, a dice game, and multiple learning algorithms, eliminating all positive-reach contingent decisions causes rapid convergence to a deterministic exploitation attractor, a fixed point at near-maximal loss. Preserving even a single positive-reach contingent decision point prevents this collapse. A frozen baseline and fixed-opponent control confirm that the mechanism is co-adaptation under constraint, not the perturbation itself. The phenomenon is timing-invariant, fully reversible upon action restoration, and intensifies under function approximation. These results establish a sharp threshold at zero reach-weighted contingent action capacity, with severity scaling continuously via reach-weighted capacity in the tested domains.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在非对称规则扰动下，自我对弈强化学习智能体是否崩溃取决于决策容量阈值：消除所有正路径可达的权变决策点会导致智能体迅速收敛到确定性剥削吸引子（接近最大损失的固定点），而保留一个正路径可达的权变决策点即可防止崩溃。该现象是约束下的共适应机制，具有时序不变性、动作恢复可逆性，且随函数逼近而加剧。
AI.motivation: 探究自我对弈强化学习智能体在面对非对称规则扰动时是否会发生崩溃，以及决定崩溃与否的关键因素。
AI.method: 在多种扑克变体、矩阵博弈、骰子游戏中使用多种学习算法，通过消除所有正路径可达的权变决策点（即设置决策容量阈值为零）进行实验，并设置冻结基线和固定对手对照实验。
AI.result: 消除所有正路径可达的权变决策点导致智能体快速收敛到确定性剥削吸引子（接近最大损失的固定点），保留一个权变决策点即可防止崩溃。现象具有时序不变性、可逆性，函数逼近下加剧，且严重程度随路径加权容量连续缩放。
AI.conclusion: 存在一个明确的阈值（零路径加权权变动作容量）决定自我对弈强化学习智能体是否崩溃，崩溃的本质是约束下的共适应机制而非扰动本身。

title: Counterparty Modeling is Not Strategy: The Limits of LLM Negotiators
summary: Negotiation requires more than inferring what the other side wants: it requires using that information to make advantageous offers and counteroffers over multiple turns. We study whether large language model (LLM) agents do this in a controlled multi-attribute bargaining environment. We find that current LLM agents can model a counterparty's preferences, but do not reliably turn that knowledge into strategic bargaining. When given negotiating partner preference information, agents model it accurately and early in their reasoning traces, yet this does not reliably improve outcomes for the informed side. Turn-level analyses show why: agents often respond to what they believe the counterparty values, but do not consistently pair those moves with gains on their own high-value attributes. Sellers are more accommodating overall, and in asymmetric-information conditions, the informed side often makes the more weakly compensated concessions. Because agents fail to leverage this underlying utility structure for strategic advantage, their final agreements are heavily dictated by surface-level opening anchors rather than actual utility weights. Finally, requiring agents to explicitly state concession-for-reciprocity trades before making an offer makes individual turns look more strategic, but ultimately fails to improve the efficiency of the final agreements.

AI.tldr: 当前LLM智能体能够建模对手偏好，但无法将这种知识转化为有效的多轮谈判策略：它们不会持续利用效用结构进行战略性让步与交换，最终协议质量受制于表面锚定效应，且明确要求策略性表述也无法改善最终协议效率。
AI.motivation: 谈判不仅需要推断对方需求，更需要在多轮交互中利用这些信息做出有利的报价和还价。作者希望检验LLM智能体是否能在可控的多属性议价环境中做到这一点。
AI.method: 在一个可控的多属性议价环境中，向LLM智能体提供对手偏好信息，分析其建模能力、策略使用、让步模式以及在不对称信息条件下的表现。同时测试要求智能体在出价前明确陈述"让步换互惠"策略的效果。
AI.result: (1) LLM能准确建模对手偏好，但无法可靠地将知识转化为策略性议价；(2) 智能体知道对手看重什么，却不能将其与自身高价值属性的获益配对；(3) 卖方总体更迁就，信息优势方反而做出补偿更弱的让步；(4) 最终协议受表面锚定支配而非实际效用权重；(5) 要求明确陈述策略性交易可使单轮行为看起来更具策略性，但无法改善最终协议效率。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体在谈判中缺乏真正的策略性推理能力——它们能理解效用结构，却无法利用这一结构为自己争取优势，最终协议的质量仍被表面因素主导。

title: A preconditioned augmented Lagrangian method for solving semidefinite programming problems
summary: In this work, we propose a preconditioned augmented Lagrangian method (ALM) for solving semidefinite programming (SDP) problems. The preconditioner is implemented via a weighted penalty function in the ALM subproblem, with the weight matrix derived from the projection operator onto the tangent space of the feasible region. This simple yet effective modification significantly accelerates ALM, particularly for ill-conditioned SDPs. By combining the preconditioned ALM with our previously developed feasible method SDPF, we develop SDPF+, an SDP solver capable of handling convex problems with possibly nonlinear objective functions. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of SDPF+, showing that it can generally outperform other solvers on large-scale SDPs whose optimal solutions exhibit low-rank structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种预条件增广拉格朗日方法（ALM）用于求解半定规划（SDP）问题，通过引入基于可行域切空间投影算子的加权罚函数作为预条件子，显著加速了ALM在病态SDP上的收敛。结合预条件ALM与可行方法SDPF，开发了SDPF+求解器，能处理含非线性目标的凸问题。数值实验表明，SDPF+在低秩最优解的大规模SDP上普遍优于其他求解器。
AI.motivation: 现有增广拉格朗日方法在求解病态半定规划问题时收敛缓慢，亟需一种有效的预条件技术来加速收敛，同时希望扩展至可处理非线性目标函数的凸优化问题。
AI.method: 在ALM子问题中引入基于可行域切空间投影算子的加权罚函数作为预条件子（即权重矩阵），并将该预条件ALM与已有的可行方法SDPF相结合，构建SDPF+求解器。
AI.result: 大量数值实验表明，SDPF+在低秩最优解的大规模SDP问题上效率高且鲁棒性强，整体性能优于其他求解器。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的预条件ALM是一种简单而有效的加速手段，SDPF+在大规模低秩SDP问题上具有显著优势。

title: CAST: Causal Anchored Simplex Transport for Distribution-Valued Time Series
summary: Many decision-facing stochastic systems are observed through aggregate distributions rather than scalar trajectories: queue occupancies, mobility shares, public-health mixtures, generation-source shares, ecological compositions, and air-quality severity profiles all live on the probability simplex and evolve over time. We study causal (online) forecasting for these distribution-valued time series and argue that the transition operator itself should be structured around the simplex. We introduce CAST (Causal Anchored Simplex Transport), a successor-local operator that (i) retrieves empirical successors from causal context, (ii) stabilizes them with a persistence anchor, and (iii) applies a bounded local stochastic transport on ordered supports; every stage preserves the simplex by construction. We identify a structural failure mode, latent transition-kernel aliasing, where similar observed distributions evolve differently under different contextual regimes, and prove that any forecaster depending only on an aliased summary incurs an irreducible weighted Jensen-Shannon excess-risk lower bound, while the CAST hypothesis class contains the regime-aware Bayes successor; for ordered supports an additional Pinsker separation holds whenever the transported successor lies outside the no-transport anchor hull. On eleven public and simulated benchmarks spanning ecology, energy, diet, mortality, employment, air quality, severe weather, mobility, and G/G/1, G_t/G/1 queue occupancy, CAST attains the best average rank on both one-step KL (1.27) and autoregressive rollout JSD (1.91), winning 8/11 sections on each metric against a broad statistical, compositional, recurrent, convolutional, and Transformer baseline set, and top-2 on all 11 sections for offline KL. Component ablations and a controlled synthetic aliasing experiment corroborate the theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAST（因果锚定单纯形传输）方法，用于概率单纯形上的分布值时间序列的因果在线预测。该方法通过因果上下文中检索经验后继、使用持久性锚点稳定、以及在有序支持上进行有界局部随机传输三个步骤，保证每一步都保留单纯形结构。论文揭示了潜在转移核混叠的结构性失败模式，证明了仅依赖混叠摘要的预测器存在不可约的加权Jensen-Shannon超额风险下界，而CAST假设类包含状态感知的贝叶斯后继。在11个涵盖生态、能源、饮食、死亡率、就业、空气质量、恶劣天气、移动性和队列占用的基准上，CAST在一步KL散度（1.27）和自回归 rollout JSD（1.91）上均达到最佳平均排名，在8/11个部分上赢得两项指标。
AI.motivation: 许多决策相关的随机系统通过聚合分布而非标量轨迹被观测（如队列占用、移动性份额、公共卫生混合等），这些分布值时间序列存在于概率单纯形上并随时间演化。现有方法未能充分考虑单纯形结构约束，导致预测性能受限。此外，存在潜在转移核混叠问题，即相似观测分布在不同上下文下演化不同，而依赖混叠摘要的预测器存在不可约的下界。
AI.method: CAST（因果锚定单纯形传输）算子包含三个步骤：(i) 从因果上下文中检索经验后继分布；(ii) 使用持久性锚点稳定这些后继；(iii) 在有序支持上应用有界局部随机传输。每一步都通过构造保证保留单纯形结构。论文还提供了理论分析，包括转移核混叠的下界证明和Pinsker分离条件。
AI.result: 在11个公共和模拟基准（涵盖生态、能源、饮食、死亡率、就业、空气质量、恶劣天气、移动性、G/G/1和G_t/G/1队列占用）上，CAST在一步KL散度上取得最佳平均排名1.27，在自回归rollout JSD上取得1.91，分别在8/11个部分上赢得两项指标。在所有11个部分的离线KL指标上均位列前两名。消融实验和受控合成混叠实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: CAST方法通过显式建模单纯形结构和因果上下文，有效解决了分布值时间序列的在线预测问题，在理论上证明了其优越性（包含贝叶斯后继假设类），并在广泛的基准测试中取得了显著优于多种基线方法（包括统计方法、组成方法、循环网络、卷积网络和Transformer）的性能。

title: Investigating Action Encodings in Recurrent Neural Networks in Reinforcement Learning
comment: Published in TMLR in 2023, https: // openreview. net/ forum? id= K6g4MbAC1r .Transactions on Machine Learning Research (2023)
summary: Building and maintaining state to learn policies and value functions is critical for deploying reinforcement learning (RL) agents in the real world. Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) have become a key point of interest for the state-building problem, and several large-scale reinforcement learning agents incorporate recurrent networks. While RNNs have become a mainstay in many RL applications, many key design choices and implementation details responsible for performance improvements are often not reported. In this work, we discuss one axis on which RNN architectures can be (and have been) modified for use in RL. Specifically, we look at how action information can be incorporated into the state update function of a recurrent cell. We discuss several choices in using action information and empirically evaluate the resulting architectures on a set of illustrative domains. Finally, we discuss future work in developing recurrent cells and discuss challenges specific to the RL setting.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在强化学习（RL）中如何将动作信息整合到循环神经网络（RNN）的状态更新函数中，系统比较了不同设计选择，并强调了这一常被忽视的工程细节对RL智能体性能的影响。
AI.motivation: RNN在RL中广泛用于状态构建和策略学习，但许多关键设计选择（如动作信息的整合方式）未被充分报告。本文旨在系统讨论这一被忽视的轴，为RL中RNN的设计提供指导。
AI.method: 本文分析了在RNN循环单元的状态更新函数中整合动作信息的多种设计选择（如何时、以何种方式注入动作），并在多个示例领域上对不同架构进行经验性评估。
AI.result: 不同的动作信息整合方式对RL智能体的性能有显著影响，具体结果取决于任务领域。某些设计选择在特定场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 动作信息在RNN状态更新中的整合方式是RL中RNN设计的重要但常被忽视的维度，未来需要开发更适合RL特性的循环单元，并关注RL场景下的特有挑战。

title: PRISMat: Policy-Driven, Permutation-Invariant Autoregressive Material Generation
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, Under Review at Neurips 2026
summary: Rapid identification of candidate materials with target properties has become a key task in materials science. Machine learning has emerged as an alternative to physics-based simulation, offering a faster and cheaper way to filter materials based on their stability and other target properties, reducing the number of candidates that reach the costly synthesis stage. Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have been applied to this role, but these models are parameter-heavy and computationally expensive both during training and at inference time, making them unsuitable for high-throughput tasks. This inefficiency stems from both the large over-parameterization of language models and the difficulty of framing material generation as a sequence learning problem. In this paper, we present PRISMat, a cost-effective, permutation-invariant model, which addresses these limitations. We show that PRISMat, despite taking less time for inference, is able to outperform LLMs in generating crystal slabs conditioned on critical materials' surface properties. In targeted material discovery, we achieve mean absolute errors of 0.188 eV/A$^2$ and 2.79 eV for cleavage energy and work function tasks, respectively, reducing the error of the next best model by 4$\times$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效、排列不变的PRISMat模型，用于材料表面性质预测和靶向材料发现，在解理能（0.188 eV/Å²）和功函数（2.79 eV）任务上均取得了比现有最佳模型低4倍误差的成绩，且推理速度更快。
AI.motivation: 传统物理模拟和现有基于大语言模型（LLM）的材料筛选方法存在计算成本高、参数冗余、推理效率低的问题，难以满足高通量材料筛选的需求。
AI.method: 提出PRISMat模型，采用排列不变（permutation-invariant）设计，避免将材料生成建模为序列学习问题，从而减少参数量和计算开销。
AI.result: 在靶向材料发现中，解理能任务MAE为0.188 eV/Å²，功函数任务MAE为2.79 eV，比次优模型误差降低4倍，且推理时间更短。
AI.conclusion: PRISMat证明了轻量化、排列不变的模型在高通量材料表面性质预测中比LLM更高效、更准确，为低成本材料筛选提供了新方向。

title: QPLEX Decision Processes: Formulation via Nonlinear Markov Chains and Optimization via Policy Gradients
summary: We introduce a QPLEX Decision Process (QDP) as a model for dynamic control of queueing systems with non-stationary arrivals, general service distributions, and service-level chance constraints. QDPs integrate QPLEX, a computational modeling methodology for transient analysis of stochastic systems, into a nonlinear Markov decision framework. Since QPLEX approximations use nonlinear transition probabilities with orders-of-magnitude smaller state spaces, QDPs circumvent the curse of dimensionality associated with general service times. Via forward and backward iterative schemes, we can rapidly compute gradients deterministically on the much smaller state space, eliminating sampling variance. We further address optimization through natural-gradient-inspired methods with block-diagonal Fisher approximations. To illustrate the QDP methodology, we formulate a single-station dynamic pricing problem with non-stationary demand as a QDP. When the reward structure uses waiting and terminal costs, our approach can find near-optimal policies in seconds on a single CPU; when the reward structure uses penalties for deviating from service-level chance constraints, the optimization landscape is substantially more challenging yet our approach can find a high-quality, practical policy in approximately a minute on a single CPU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QPLEX决策过程(QDP)，将QPLEX计算建模方法集成到非线性马尔可夫决策框架中，用于具有非平稳到达、一般服务分布和服务水平机会约束的排队系统的动态控制。QDP通过大幅缩小的状态空间和确定性梯度计算，规避了维数灾难和采样方差问题，并采用自然梯度启发式方法进行优化。实验表明，该方法能快速找到近优策略。
AI.motivation: 现有排队系统动态控制方法在处理非平稳到达、一般服务分布和服务水平机会约束时面临维数灾难问题，传统方法难以高效求解。作者旨在开发一种能够规避这些计算瓶颈的新模型。
AI.method: 将QPLEX计算建模方法（一种用于随机系统瞬态分析的近似方法）集成到非线性马尔可夫决策框架中形成QDP；利用QPLEX的非线性转移概率实现状态空间数量级的缩小；通过前向和后向迭代方案在缩小的状态空间上确定性计算梯度消除采样方差；采用块对角Fisher近似下的自然梯度启发式方法进行优化。
AI.result: 在具有等待成本和终端成本的单站点动态定价问题上，该方法可在单CPU上数秒内找到近优策略；在服务水平机会约束偏离惩罚结构下，优化更具挑战性，但该方法仍可在约一分钟内找到高质量实用策略。
AI.conclusion: QDP模型能够有效解决排队系统动态控制中的维数灾难问题，在保持计算效率的同时实现高质量策略求解，适用于实际排队系统的实时决策需求。

title: Diffusion-Based Stochastic Operator Networks for Uncertainty Quantification in Stochastic Partial Differential Equations
summary: We introduce a novel framework for uncertainty quantification of solution operators associated with stochastic partial differential equations (SPDEs). Although SPDEs play a central role in modeling complex physical systems under uncertainty, their practical use typically requires specifying the magnitude and structure of model uncertainties that are often unknown and difficult to infer from noisy measurements. To address this challenge, we develop a stochastic operator-learning framework that learns directly from noisy data and outputs both a mean solution field and a quantification of uncertainty. The proposed method, namely the Stochastic Operator Network (SON), is constructed by combining the structure of the Deep Operator Network (DeepONet) with Stochastic Neural Networks (SNNs) to model stochasticity and enable probabilistic prediction. The training procedure is carried out by minimizing a Hamiltonian-type loss and optimizing the resulting objective using the Stochastic Maximum Principle. Numerical experiments on benchmark SPDEs under multiple uncertainty sources demonstrate the accuracy and robustness of the proposed method in capturing solution structure and quantifying predictive uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为随机算子网络（SON）的框架，结合DeepONet和随机神经网络，用于从含噪数据中学习SPDE的解算子，并同时提供均值解场和不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: SPDE在建模不确定物理系统中至关重要，但其实际应用需要指定模型不确定性的幅度和结构，而这些往往未知且难以从含噪观测中推断。
AI.method: 将Deep Operator Network (DeepONet)与随机神经网络(SNNs)相结合构建SON；通过最小化Hamiltonian型损失进行训练，并利用随机最大值原理优化目标函数。
AI.result: 在多个不确定性源下的基准SPDE数值实验表明，该方法在捕捉解结构和量化预测不确定性方面具有准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SON能够直接从含噪数据学习，同时输出均值解场和不确定性量化，有效解决了SPDE中模型不确定性难以指定的问题。

title: Forecasting Medium-Horizon Alzheimer's Disease Progression: Residual Gap-Aware Transformers for 24-Month CDR-SB Change from ADNI Clinical and Biomarker Histories
comment: Preprint; includes appendix, 4 figures, and 6 tables
summary: Medium-horizon Alzheimer's disease progression prediction is difficult because future clinical scores can remain tied to baseline severity, while biomarker histories are irregular and incompletely observed. We develop an anchor-based analysis of 24-month Clinical Dementia Rating Sum of Boxes (CDR-SB) change using harmonized Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) tables. Each labeled sample is anchored at a mild cognitive impairment visit, uses only clinical and biomarker history observed at or before that anchor, and defines the response as CDR-SB at the future visit closest to 24 months within an 18--30 month window minus anchor CDR-SB. The analytic cohort contains 2,600 labeled anchors from 858 participants and 7,276 longitudinal rows. We propose a residual gap-aware transformer that combines a mixed-effects statistical reference with transformer-based residual learning from pre-anchor clinical and biomarker histories. The model uses participant-level random intercepts in the mixed-effects reference, observation-level triplet tokenization for irregular histories, and a learned nonnegative time-gap penalty inside self-attention. We compare the proposed model with a Bayesian-information-criterion-selected linear mixed-effects baseline, GRU-D, and STraTS under repeated participant-level train--test splits. Across five participant-level random seeds, the proposed model achieves the best mean test performance across all reported metrics, reducing MSE by 13.1% and increasing prediction--observation correlation by 26.4% relative to the mixed-effects baseline. It also improves over both GRU-D and STraTS in mean error and correlation. These results show that statistical anchoring and gap-aware residual learning provide a useful structure for medium-horizon Alzheimer's disease progression prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于锚点的残差间隙感知Transformer模型，用于中等时域的阿尔茨海默病进展预测。该模型结合混合效应统计参考与Transformer残差学习，利用不规则的临床和生物标志物历史数据预测24个月后的CDR-SB变化，在ADNI数据集上相比基线模型MSE降低13.1%，相关性提升26.4%。
AI.motivation: 中等时域的阿尔茨海默病进展预测具有挑战性，因为未来临床评分仍与基线严重程度相关，而生物标志物历史数据不规则且观测不完整。现有方法难以有效利用这些不完整的历史信息进行准确的长期预测。
AI.method: 提出残差间隙感知Transformer：1）以轻度认知 impairment 访视为锚点，定义18-30个月窗口内的CDR-SB变化为目标；2）混合效应统计参考模型包含参与者级随机截距；3）Transformer部分采用观测级三元组令牌化处理不规则历史，并在自注意力中引入可学习的非负时间间隙惩罚；4）在ADNI数据集上构建2,600个标注锚点（858名参与者，7,276条纵向记录）。
AI.result: 在五次参与者级随机种子划分下，相比BIC选择的线性混合效应基线，MSE降低13.1%，预测-观测相关性提升26.4%；相比GRU-D和STraTS，在平均误差和相关性上均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 统计锚定和间隙感知残差学习为中等时域的阿尔茨海默病进展预测提供了有效的结构框架，证明了结合混合效应模型与Transformer的优势。

title: TTE-Flash: Accelerating Reasoning-based Multimodal Representations via Think-Then-Embed Tokens
summary: Recent research has demonstrated that Universal Multimodal Embedding (UME) benefits significantly from Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. In this paradigm, a generative model produces explicit reasoning traces for a multimodal query, with the final representation extracted from an <eos> embedding token attending to both the query and the reasoning. Despite its effectiveness, the computational overhead of generating explicit CoT traces is often prohibitive. In this work, we propose replacing explicit CoT with latent think tokens, which are interpreted as latent variables that can produce explicit CoT traces as observed variables. By optimizing think tokens using CoT generation loss and subsequent embedding tokens using contrastive loss, we produce high-performance, reasoning-aware representations at a constant inference cost. Our study investigates two key architectural designs: 1) how think and embeddings tokens should be extracted from the same LLM backbone. 2) how the tokens should be trained as two dependent tasks. We introduce TTE-Flash-2B, a reasoning-aware multimodal representation model that outperforms its explicit-CoT counterpart on the MMEB-v2 benchmark, while producing latent think tokens that are interpretable both textually and visually. Furthermore, zero-shot evaluation across 15 video datasets reveals scaling behavior as the number of think tokens increases, and motivating a pilot study of adaptive think budget allocation based on task requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用潜在思考令牌（latent think tokens）替代显式思维链（CoT）推理，在保持推理感知能力的同时降低计算开销。通过CoT生成损失和对比损失联合优化，实现了恒定推理成本的高性能多模态嵌入模型TTE-Flash-2B，在MMEB-v2基准上超越显式CoT对应模型，且潜在思考令牌具有文本和视觉可解释性。
AI.motivation: 显式CoT推理虽然能提升通用多模态嵌入（UME）的性能，但其生成显式推理轨迹的计算开销过高，难以在实际部署中广泛应用。
AI.method: 1) 用潜在思考令牌替代显式CoT推理轨迹，将思考令牌视为隐变量，显式CoT轨迹视为观测变量；2) 通过CoT生成损失优化思考令牌，通过对比损失优化嵌入令牌；3) 研究了两种关键架构设计：思考令牌与嵌入令牌如何从同一LLM骨干网络中提取，以及两者如何作为依赖任务进行联合训练。
AI.result: TTE-Flash-2B在MMEB-v2基准上超越显式CoT对应模型；在15个视频数据集上的零样本评估显示，随着思考令牌数量增加呈现扩展行为；初步验证了基于任务需求的自适应思考预算分配策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 潜在思考令牌能够以恒定推理成本实现推理感知的多模态表示，且具有可解释性；思考令牌数量与性能之间存在扩展规律，为自适应计算资源分配提供了新的研究方向。

title: High-dimensional Limit of SGD for Diagonal Linear Networks
summary: Understanding the behavior of stochastic gradient methods is a central problem in modern machine learning. Recent work has highlighted diagonal linear networks as a simplified yet expressive setting for analyzing the optimization and generalization properties of neural models. In this work, we show that in the high-dimensional regime, stochastic gradient descent on diagonal linear networks is well-approximated by continuous dynamics governed by a stochastic differential equation (SDE), which explicitly decouples the drift from the gradient noise. We further derive a deterministic partial differential equation whose solution propagates the relevant state of the iterates and characterizes the time evolution of a broad class of observable statistics, including the risk, curvature, and other metrics for optimality. Finally, we show that, under a suitable parametrization, the stochastic dynamics are globally well posed and converge exponentially fast to zero risk with high probability, yielding a fully explicit non-asymptotic description of their long-time behavior. Numerical simulations corroborate our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文在高维机制下证明了对角线性网络上的随机梯度下降可由随机微分方程（SDE）良好近似，该方程将漂移与梯度噪声显式解耦；进一步推导出确定性偏微分方程（PDE）传播迭代状态并刻画风险、曲率等可观测量统计量的时间演化；在适当参数化下，随机动力学全局适定且以高概率指数收敛至零风险，给出了长期行为的显式非渐近描述。
AI.motivation: 理解随机梯度方法的动力学行为是现代机器学习的核心问题，而对角线性网络为分析神经模型的优化与泛化性质提供了一个简化但富有表达力的设定。
AI.method: 通过随机微分方程（SDE）近似高维机制下的随机梯度下降动力学，将漂移与梯度噪声解耦；进一步推导确定性偏微分方程（PDE）传播迭代状态，分析风险、曲率等可观测统计量的时间演化；在适当参数化下分析全局适定性与指数收敛性。
AI.result: 随机动力学全局适定，且在高概率下指数收敛至零风险，得到长期行为的完全显式非渐近描述；数值模拟验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文为对角线性网络上随机梯度下降的动力学提供了严格的理论刻画，揭示了漂移与噪声的分离机制，并建立了从SDE近似到PDE传播再到指数收敛的完整分析框架。

title: Multi-task Linear Regression without Eigenvalue Lower Bounds: Adaptivity, Robustness and Safety
summary: We study the multi-task linear regression problem in the presence of contaminated tasks. We address the setting where the unknown parameters of a majority of tasks are close in the $\ell_2$-norm, while a fraction of tasks are arbitrary outliers. Existing theoretical frameworks for this problem rely heavily on the assumption that the empirical second moment of each task has a minimum eigenvalue bounded away from zero (order $Ω(1)$). Crucially, this assumption fails in many high-dimensional scenarios, rendering prior guarantees vacuous. To overcome this limitation, we propose an estimator based on matrix-weighted norm regularization. We also introduce a relative balancedness condition, quantified by a balancedness constant, that compares each task's second moment with the average inlier geometry and relaxes the need for taskwise second-moment lower bounds. In favorable regimes with moderate balancedness, our prediction MSE bounds match the rate of Duan and Wang (2023) under substantially weaker spectral assumptions; the resulting task-overall MSE is minimax optimal up to logarithmic factors. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our estimator enjoys a safety guarantee: when the relevant balancedness constant is large or infinite, or when tasks are unrelated, the method performs no worse than independent task learning. Consequently, our methodology achieves simultaneous adaptivity to task similarity, robustness to outliers, and safety outside favorable transfer regimes.

AI.tldr: 针对多任务线性回归中存在污染任务的问题，提出基于矩阵加权范数正则化的估计器，放宽了传统方法对任务二阶矩特征值下界的严格假设，引入相对平衡条件，在更弱的谱假设下达到与现有最优方法相当的预测MSE界，并具备安全性保证。
AI.motivation: 现有理论框架严重依赖每个任务经验二阶矩的最小特征值远离零（Ω(1)阶）的假设，该假设在高维场景下常常不成立，导致先前的理论保证失效。需要克服这一局限性。
AI.method: 提出基于矩阵加权范数正则化（matrix-weighted norm regularization）的估计器；引入相对平衡条件（relative balancedness condition），通过平衡常数（balancedness constant）比较每个任务的二阶矩与平均内隐几何结构，放松了对任务级二阶矩下界的要求。
AI.result: 在适度平衡的有利场景下，预测MSE界在显著更弱的谱假设下达到与Duan and Wang (2023)相同的速率；任务整体MSE在log因子意义下达到极小极大最优。当平衡常数较大或无限、或任务无关时，方法不劣于独立任务学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了对任务相似性的自适应、对异常值的鲁棒性以及在不利迁移场景下的安全性——即同时具备适应性、鲁棒性和安全性三方面优势。

title: AdaGraph: A Graph-Native Clustering Algorithm That Overcomes the Curse of Dimensionality and Enables Scientific Discovery
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Full paper in preparation for KDD 2027
summary: We present AdaGraph, a graph-native clustering algorithm born from the Structure-Centric Machine Learning (SC-ML) paradigm -- a new field of unsupervised learning that replaces geometry-centric (distance-based) computation with structure-centric (topology-based) computation, fundamentally dissolving the curse of dimensionality. AdaGraph operates entirely within the kNN graph topology, a representation that retains meaningful relational structure in arbitrarily high dimensions where Euclidean distance metrics become uninformative. AdaGraph requires no a priori specification of the number of clusters k, handles noise natively, and scales via the SLCD (Sample-Learn-Calibrate-Deploy) prototype-deployment framework. As its unsupervised tuning objective, AdaGraph pairs with Graph-SCOPE, the topology-based cluster validity index introduced as a separate SC-ML contribution. On 10 synthetic benchmarks spanning d=10 to d=5000, Graph-SCOPE achieves mean ARI=0.900 and correctly selects k on 9/10 datasets -- outperforming Silhouette, Davies-Bouldin, and Calinski-Harabasz -- while maintaining Kendall tau >= 0.92 with ground-truth cluster quality across all dimensionalities (Silhouette: tau ~= 0.46). We validate AdaGraph across three scientific domains: (1) gene co-expression discovery in hepatocellular carcinoma (GSE14520, 10,000 genes, 488 patients, no dimensionality reduction), where AdaGraph identifies condition-specific gene modules that WGCNA, ICA, NMF, and Spectral Biclustering fail to resolve; (2) natural language text clustering, where AdaGraph achieves ARI=0.751 on 20NG-6cat versus HDBSCAN's 0.464 (62% relative improvement); (3) materials science clustering of superconductors (145-dimensional Magpie features), perovskites, and JARVIS-DFT materials, where AdaGraph achieves the highest Graph-SCOPE on all three datasets.

AI.tldr: AdaGraph是一种基于kNN图拓扑的原生图聚类算法，无需预设聚类数，通过结构中心（拓扑）计算替代距离中心（几何）计算，从根本上消除维度灾难。在10个合成基准（d=10到5000）上Graph-SCOPE平均ARI=0.900，在三个科学领域（基因共表达、文本聚类、材料科学）均显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法在高维空间中因欧氏距离失效而面临维度灾难，且需要预设聚类数k、对噪声敏感。作者提出结构中心机器学习（SC-ML）范式，用拓扑计算替代几何计算，从根本上解决高维聚类问题。
AI.method: AdaGraph完全在kNN图拓扑内运行，保留高维空间中仍具意义的关联结构，无需预先指定聚类数k，原生处理噪声，通过SLCD（样本-学习-校准-部署）原型部署框架实现可扩展性。配合Graph-SCOPE（基于拓扑的聚类效度指标）作为无监督调优目标。
AI.result: 在d=10到5000的10个合成基准上，Graph-SCOPE平均ARI=0.900，正确选择k在9/10数据集上，Kendall tau≥0.92（Silhouette仅~0.46）。在肝细胞癌基因共表达（GSE14520）中识别出WGCNA等方法无法解析的模块；20NG-6cat文本聚类ARI=0.751（HDBSCAN仅0.464，相对提升62%）；材料科学三个数据集均取得最高Graph-SCOPE。
AI.conclusion: AdaGraph和Graph-SCOPE验证了结构中心机器学习范式在高维无监督学习中的有效性，在基因、文本、材料等多领域展现出超越传统方法的性能，为高维聚类提供了新的理论框架和实用工具。

title: Sustainable Intelligence for the Wild: Democratizing Ecological Monitoring via Knowledge-Adaptive Edge Expert Agents
summary: Rapid biodiversity loss underscore the urgency of effective monitoring, yet manual surveys remain resource-intensive. While on-device AI offers a scalable alternative, its performance in the wild is often challenged by environmental variability. Current methods rely heavily on cloud resource, which requires continuous uploading of field data for model retraining. This approach is unsuitable for remote deployments because it consumes limited power and network connectivity. To address these constraints, this research proposes a shift from model adaptation to knowledge adaptation. We introduce an architecture that separates visual perception from reasoning, combining a visual encoder with a dynamic knowledge base. We uses an explicit knowledge base to replace implicitly encoding expert knowledge into model parameters. This method also supports knowledge sustainability by preserving expert insights in a structured form. Through cross-disciplinary collaboration with biologists and Indigenous communities, this work advances ethical AI co-development, fostering responsible and culturally informed ecosystem management.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种将视觉感知与推理分离的架构，通过动态知识库替代模型参数隐式编码专家知识，实现知识自适应而非模型自适应，以解决边缘设备上生物多样性监测的持续学习问题。
AI.motivation: 当前生物多样性监测依赖云端重训练的模型自适应方法，在远程部署场景中受限于有限功耗和网络连接，亟需一种无需持续上传数据即可适应环境变化的边缘AI方案。
AI.method: 将视觉编码器与动态知识库解耦，用显式结构化知识库替代模型参数中隐式编码的专家知识，实现从模型自适应到知识自适应的范式转变。
AI.result: 该方法支持知识可持续性，以结构化形式保留专家见解，并通过与生物学家和原住民社区的跨学科合作推进伦理AI共同开发。
AI.conclusion: 知识自适应范式为远程生态监测中的持续学习问题提供了可行方案，同时促进了负责任且具有文化包容性的生态系统管理。

title: Scalable Bi-causal Optimal Transport via KL Relaxation and Policy Gradients
summary: Bi-causal optimal transport (OT) is a natural framework for comparing and coupling stochastic processes under nonanticipative information constraints, with important applications in robust finance, sequential uncertainty quantification, and multistage stochastic optimization. In particular, a learned bi-causal coupling naturally serves as a simulator for generating joint sample paths that respect both prescribed marginal laws and the underlying information flow. Its practical use, however, is limited by the computational difficulty of enforcing bi-causal coupling constraints over path space, especially for continuous distributions and long horizons. We develop a scalable stochastic-optimization framework for computing bi-causal OT couplings under general marginals. Our approach introduces a Kullback--Leibler (KL)-penalized relaxation that replaces hard marginal constraints with tractable divergence penalties while preserving the recursive structure of the problem. We establish dynamic programming principles for both the original and relaxed formulations, prove that the relaxed problem converges to the original bi-causal OT problem as the penalty grows, and derive explicit policy-gradient representations for the relaxed objective. Building on these results, we propose a practical policy-gradient algorithm with unbiased mini-batch estimators, variance reduction, and nonasymptotic regret guarantees. Numerical experiments show that the method accurately captures marginal laws and temporal dependence, and performs well in applications including robust subhedging and time series statistical downscaling. These results provide a scalable computational approach to bi-causal OT and broaden its applicability in settings where nonanticipative information constraints are essential.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于KL散度惩罚的随机优化框架，用于计算双因果最优传输耦合，通过策略梯度算法实现了可扩展的计算方法，并在鲁棒金融和时间序列降尺度等应用中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 双因果最优传输在实际应用中因难以在路径空间上强制满足双因果耦合约束而计算困难，尤其对于连续分布和长时域问题，现有方法难以扩展。
AI.method: 引入KL惩罚松弛替代硬边际约束，保持问题递归结构；证明松弛问题收敛到原问题；推导策略梯度表示；提出带无偏小批量估计、方差缩减和非渐近遗憾保证的策略梯度算法。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法能准确捕捉边际分布和时间依赖关系，在鲁棒子对冲和时间序列统计降尺度等应用中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为双因果OT提供了可扩展的计算方法，拓宽了其在非预测信息约束关键场景中的适用性。

title: Sample efficient inductive matrix completion with noise and inexact side information
summary: Low-rank matrix completion is a widely studied problem with many variants. Inductive matrix completion (IMC) incorporates row and column side information to significantly narrow the search space. Prior work falls into two regimes: methods that exploit this structure to achieve reduced sample complexity but only in noiseless settings, and methods that handle noise but require sample complexity matching the ambient matrix dimension, forfeiting the sample efficiency that side information should provide. In this paper, we close this gap by studying noisy IMC with a nonconvex projected gradient descent algorithm with spectral initialization. Our main technical contribution is establishing a regularity condition for the IMC loss function that holds at the reduced sample complexity determined by the effective problem size, scaling with the side information dimension a rather than the ambient dimension n. This directly yields linear convergence and an estimation error that both depend only on the effective problem size rather than the ambient matrix dimension. We further extend our analysis to the inexact side information setting, demonstrating that the reduced sample complexity is maintained and the estimation error is order-optimal with respect to the inexactness of the side information. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments on the MovieLens dataset validate our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带噪声的归纳矩阵补全（IMC）问题，提出了一种基于非凸投影梯度下降和谱初始化的算法，在有效问题规模（与侧信息维度a相关）而非环境维度n下建立了正则性条件，实现了线性收敛和最优估计误差，并拓展到不精确侧信息场景，理论和实验均验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有IMC方法存在两极化：无噪声场景下能利用侧信息降低样本复杂度，但有噪声场景下所需样本复杂度与环境矩阵维度相当，丧失了侧信息带来的样本效率。本文旨在弥合这一鸿沟，研究带噪声IMC在利用侧信息降低样本复杂度方面的理论保证。
AI.method: 采用非凸投影梯度下降算法，结合谱初始化；核心贡献是在IMC损失函数上建立了正则性条件，该条件在有效问题规模（依赖侧信息维度a而非环境维度n）下成立。
AI.result: 算法达到线性收敛速率，估计误差仅与有效问题规模相关而非环境维度；拓展到不精确侧信息场景后，仍保持降低的样本复杂度，且估计误差关于侧信息不精确性达到阶次最优。
AI.conclusion: 本文从理论上证明了带噪声IMC可通过非凸优化方法在降低的样本复杂度下实现线性收敛和最优估计，填补了噪声场景下IMC样本效率的理论空白，并在MovieLens等数据集上验证了实际效果。

title: Language Game: Talking to Non-Human Systems
summary: Language carries thought and coordination among humans but rarely reaches further along the spectrum of diverse intelligence. Yet non-neural systems -- from gene regulatory networks and microbial consortia to fungi -- are increasingly recognized as substrates of computation, decision-making and memory, making dialogue with non-human intelligence newly conceivable. Today such dialogue is attempted only by proxy: a large language model speaks on the system's behalf, so any intelligence on display originates from the model while the system itself remains silent. Here we ask whether the system can speak in its own voice. Following Wittgenstein, who located meaning in use, we treat communication as a game played with the system. Its internal dynamics are frozen as the nonlinear core of a reinforcement-learning policy, with only linear input and output interfaces trained. Through use and reward, the system's states and responses acquire meaning within the game, so playing becomes speaking.
