Because different architectures playing the same game optimize the same reward, their behaviors can all be read as pursuit of that reward; the game serves as a lingua franca across otherwise irreconcilable representations. Given a human prompt, a language model routes it to the game whose semantics best match it and designs an environmental state for which the desired action is the rational response, letting the system reply through its own behavior. Applied across diverse gene regulatory networks and reinforcement-learning tasks, the framework yields fluent dialogue without altering any system parameter, shows that well-trained agents of disparate origin converge on similar behavior, and reveals that specific GRN properties make a system easier or harder to talk with -- an inductive bias of the reservoir itself. Our framework opens a new route to conversing with any dynamical system on its own terms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种框架，通过将非神经系统的内部动态冻结为强化学习策略的非线性核心，仅训练线性输入输出接口，使得基因调控网络等非神经动力学系统能够通过自身行为与人类进行对话，而无需修改系统内部参数。
AI.motivation: 非神经系统（如基因调控网络、微生物群落、真菌）已被证实具备计算、决策和记忆能力，但当前的"对话"方式仅是通过大语言模型代理，系统本身并未真正参与。作者希望让系统用自己的声音说话，实现与非人类智能的直接对话。
AI.method: 基于维特根斯坦"意义即使用"的语言哲学，将沟通视为与系统进行的游戏。系统内部动力学被冻结为强化学习策略的非线性核心，仅训练线性输入输出接口。通过使用和奖励，系统的状态和响应在游戏中获得意义。面对人类提示时，语言模型将其路由到语义最匹配的游戏，并设计一个环境状态，使期望动作成为系统的理性响应，让系统通过自身行为作答。
AI.result: 在多种基因调控网络和强化学习任务上的实验表明：该框架能在不修改系统参数的情况下实现流畅对话；来自不同来源的训练良好的智能体趋向于涌现相似行为；特定的GRN属性会使得系统更易或更难与之对话，即储层的归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 该框架开辟了一条以动力学系统自身方式与之对话的新路径，使得任何动力学系统都能以自己的术语参与交流，跨越了神经与非神经智能之间的沟通鸿沟。

title: LinAlg-Bench: A Forensic Benchmark Revealing Structural Failure Modes in LLM Mathematical Reasoning
comment: 42 pages, 3 figures, 12 tables. NeurIPS 2026 Evaluations and Datasets Track submission. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/LinAlgBench/linalg-bench
summary: We introduce LinAlg-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark evaluating 10 frontier large language models on structured linear algebra computation across a strict dimensional gradient of 3x3, 4x4, and 5x5 matrices. Spanning 9 task types and 660 SymPy-certified problems, the benchmark exhaustively evaluates 6,600 model outputs. Beyond binary accuracy, LinAlg-Bench introduces a three-stage automated forensic pipeline classifying 1,156 failures into ten primary error tags with fine-grained subtypes, revealing that LLM mathematical failure is not random but structurally constrained by algorithm type and matrix dimension. Our central finding is a sharp behavioral threshold at 4x4 scale: below it, models fail through execution errors -- sign tracking failures, arithmetic drift, and parity errors; above it, failure transitions to computational abandonment, with models fabricating responses through tool roleplay, constraint-consistent confabulation, and structured hallucination rather than attempting computation. This fabrication-to-abandonment transition is near-universal across all model tiers and architectures, suggesting a working memory limit rather than a knowledge gap, supported by three scale-emergent error types absent at 3x3 but present at 4x4 and 5x5. We further show that solution strategy rigidity is a near-perfect predictor of 5x5 determinant accuracy, document constraint-aware confabulation as a novel structured hallucination failure mode, and release all data, model outputs, error labels, and judge pipeline publicly.

AI.tldr: LinAlg-Bench是一个针对结构化线性代数计算的诊断基准，评估了10个前沿大语言模型在3x3、4x4、5x5矩阵维度梯度上的表现，包含9种任务类型和660个SymPy验证的问题。通过三阶段自动化取证流程，分析了1,156个失败案例并归类为10种主要错误标签。核心发现是模型在4x4尺度存在行为阈值：低于该阈值时失败源于执行错误（符号追踪失败、算术漂移、奇偶错误）；高于该阈值时失败转向计算放弃（工具角色扮演、约束一致的虚构、结构化幻觉）。该转变几乎在所有模型层级和架构中普遍存在，表明这是工作记忆限制而非知识差距。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM数学推理评估多关注自然语言应用题或简单算术，缺乏对结构化线性代数计算在严格维度梯度下的系统性诊断，且缺乏对失败模式的细粒度分类和归因分析。
AI.method: 构建包含9种任务类型、660个SymPy验证问题的基准，在3x3/4x4/5x5维度梯度上评估10个前沿LLM，产出6,600个模型输出。引入三阶段自动化取证流程，将1,156个失败分类为10种主要错误标签及其细分子类型，分析错误随维度和算法类型的变化规律。
AI.result: 发现模型在4x4尺度存在明显的失败模式转换阈值：低于阈值时失败主要为执行错误，高于阈值时失败转向计算放弃和结构化虚构。这种转变在所有模型层级和架构中普遍存在。策略刚性是5x5行列式准确度的近乎完美预测器。识别出约束感知的虚构（constraint-aware confabulation）作为一种新的结构化幻觉失败模式。
AI.conclusion: LLM的数学失败并非随机，而是受算法类型和矩阵维度结构约束。4x4处的行为阈值表明存在工作记忆限制而非知识差距。数据、模型输出、错误标签和评估流程已公开发布。

title: Speeding Up Nonsmooth Bayesian MCMC Sampling via Inexact Proximal Unadjusted Langevin Algorithm
summary: We study sampling from posterior distributions with nonsmooth composite potentials, a setting in which proximal-based Langevin methods are theoretically appealing but in practice limited to simple functions with closed-form proximal operators. We introduce iPULA for composite potentials, an inexact proximal unadjusted Langevin algorithm that replaces exact proximal steps with controlled approximations. Our approach leverages the Moreau envelope to smooth the potential, while allowing inexact evaluation of its gradient through inexact proximal computations. We establish non-asymptotic convergence guarantees for iPULA, explicitly characterizing the impact of inexactness on the sampling error and showing that the inexactness preserves convergence rates up to a quantifiable bias. We demonstrate the practical relevance of iPULA on a medical image reconstruction task, where proximal operators cannot be computed exactly. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of iPULA and support our theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出iPULA算法，一种针对非光滑复合势能后验分布采样的不精确近端非调整Langevin算法，通过Moreau包络平滑势能并允许不精确近端计算，在理论上建立了非渐近收敛保证，并在医学图像重建任务中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于近端的Langevin方法在理论上适用于非光滑复合势能的后验采样，但在实践中仅限于具有闭式近端算子的简单函数，缺乏处理复杂近端算子的能力。
AI.method: 提出iPULA（不精确近端非调整Langevin算法），利用Moreau包络平滑原始势能，通过控制不精确近端计算来近似梯度，从而允许处理无法精确计算近端算子的复杂势能。
AI.result: 建立了iPULA的非渐近收敛保证，明确刻画了不精确性对采样误差的影响，证明不精确性在可量化的偏差范围内保持了收敛速率。在医学图像重建任务中，实验验证了算法的有效性和理论结果。
AI.conclusion: iPULA为处理无法精确计算近端算子的非光滑复合势能采样问题提供了一种理论上有保障且实践有效的解决方案。

title: On Gaussian approximation for entropy-regularized Q-learning with function approximation
summary: In this paper, we derive rates of convergence in the high-dimensional central limit theorem for Polyak--Ruppert averaged iterates generated by entropy-regularized asynchronous Q-learning with linear function approximation and a polynomial stepsize $k^{-ω}$, $ω\in (1/2,1)$. Assuming that the sequence of observed triples $(s_k,a_k,s_{k+1})_{k \geq 0}$ forms a uniformly geometrically ergodic Markov chain, and under suitable regularity conditions for the projected soft Bellman equation, we establish a Gaussian approximation bound in the convex distance with rate of order $n^{-1/4}$, up to polylogarithmic factors in $n$, where $n$ is the number of samples used by the algorithm. To obtain this result, we combine a linearization of the soft Bellman recursion with a Gaussian approximation for the leading martingale term. Finally, we derive high-order moment bounds for the algorithm's last iterate, which might be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了带熵正则化的异步Q学习（使用线性函数近似和多项式步长）的Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代在高维中心极限定理中的收敛速率，在马尔可夫链遍历性条件下建立了凸距离下的高斯近似界，收敛阶为$n^{-1/4}$（含多项式对数因子）。
AI.motivation: 为带熵正则化的异步Q学习算法在高维场景下建立中心极限定理的收敛速率理论，弥补该领域缺乏严格高斯近似界的研究空白。
AI.method: 将软Bellman递归线性化，将主导鞅项进行高斯近似，并结合Polyak-Ruppert平均技术处理异步Q学习的迭代过程。
AI.result: 在凸距离度量下，建立了阶为$n^{-1/4}$（忽略对数因子）的高斯近似界；同时推导了算法最后迭代的高阶矩界。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为异步Q学习在高维线性函数近似下的统计推断提供了理论保证，所导出的高阶矩界具有独立的研究价值。

title: Bi-Level Chaotic Fusion Based Graph Convolutional Network for Stock Market Prediction Interval
summary: Financial market forecasting is inherently uncertain, yet most deep learning approaches rely on point predictions that provide only single-value estimates without quantifying uncertainty. Such predictions are insufficient for risk-aware decision-making, as they fail to capture the range of possible outcomes and the associated confidence of forecasts.The problem can be solved using prediction intervals, which allow obtaining an upper and lower bound for the prediction, thus enabling uncertainty representation in the model. Yet, the current methods tend to disregard relationships between assets or cannot simultaneously ensure good calibration and sharpness of the resulting intervals in dynamically changing market regimes. In our work, we propose a spatio-temporal graph-based approach with a bi-level chaotic fusion technique to solve this problem. Our model uses separate nonlinear transformation functions to estimate the interval center and width. Additionally, a volatility-aware gating mechanism is used to make predictions dependent on the regime in which the market operates. Temporal dependencies are considered by embedding graph structures and sequentially modeling them. Training is conducted according to a Lower-Upper Bound Estimation (LUBE) objective. Our experimental results show significant improvements compared to existing baselines (LSTM, GRU, GCN, HGNN) when applied to data from 2016 to 2026 with 43 leading companies in eight sectors of the NSE. It provides the lowest Winkler score (0.0778), tightest prediction intervals (PIAW = 0.1407), and highest coverage (PICP = 96.6%), with all differences statistically significant (p < 0.001) according to the Diebold-Mariano test.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于时空图的双层混沌融合方法，通过图结构建模资产间关系，利用波动感知门控机制适应市场状态变化，按照LUBE目标训练生成预测区间，在NSE 43支股票数据上取得了更优的校准性和锐度（Winkler得分0.0778，PIAW=0.1407，PICP=96.6%）。
AI.motivation: 现有金融预测方法多为点预测，无法量化不确定性；而现有预测区间方法要么忽略资产间关系，要么无法在动态市场变化中同时保证预测区间的良好校准性和锐度。
AI.method: 提出时空图神经网络结合双层混沌融合方法：1）利用独立非线性变换函数分别估计区间中心与宽度；2）引入波动感知门控机制使预测依赖市场状态；3）通过嵌入图结构并顺序建模捕捉时序依赖；4）按照LUBE（Lower-Upper Bound Estimation）目标进行训练。
AI.result: 在2016-2026年NSE 43家领先公司数据上，相比LSTM、GRU、GCN、HGNN等基线，取得了最低Winkler得分（0.0778）、最窄预测区间（PIAW=0.1407）和最高覆盖度（PICP=96.6%），所有差异经Diebold-Mariano检验均统计显著（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的时空图方法能有效实现金融预测的不确定性量化，在动态市场环境下同时保证预测区间的校准性与锐度，为风险感知决策提供了更可靠的预测工具。

title: Enhancing Metacognitive AI: Knowledge-Graph Population with Graph-Theoretic LLM Enrichment
summary: Metacognition-the ability to monitor one's own knowledge state, spot gaps, and autonomously fill them--remains largely absent from modern AI. Here, we present MetaKGEnrich, a fully automated pipeline that endows large language model (LLM) applications with self-directed knowledge repair. The system (i) builds knowledge graphs from a seed query, (ii) detects sparse regions via seven graph metrics, (iii) has GPT-4o generate targeted questions, (iv) retrieves web evidence with Tavily and ingests it into Neo4j, and (v) re-answers the query with GraphRAG for GPT-4 to evaluate improvement. Tested on 30 queries from each of three widely-used datasets: Google Research Natural Questions, MS MARCO, and Hot-potQA. MetaKGEnrich improved answer quality in 80% of HotpotQA questions, 87% of Google Research Natural Questions and 83% of MS MARCO questions, while preserving well-supported regions. This proof of concept demonstrates how topological self-diagnosis plus targeted retrieval can advance AI toward humanlike metacognitive learning.

AI.tldr: MetaKGEnrich是一个全自动管道，通过构建知识图谱、检测稀疏区域、生成问题、检索网络证据并重新回答，使LLM应用具备自我导向的知识修复能力，在三个数据集上显著提升了答案质量（80-87%）。
AI.motivation: 现代AI缺乏元认知能力，即监控自身知识状态、发现知识缺口并自主填补的能力。作者旨在为LLM应用赋予这种自我导向的知识修复能力。
AI.method: MetaKGEnrich管道包含五个步骤：(i) 从种子查询构建知识图谱；(ii) 通过七种图指标检测稀疏区域；(iii) 使用GPT-4o生成针对性问题；(iv) 使用Tavily检索网络证据并导入Neo4j；(v) 使用GraphRAG重新回答查询，并由GPT-4评估改进效果。
AI.result: 在Google Research Natural Questions、MS MARCO和HotpotQA三个数据集上各测试30个查询，MetaKGEnrich在HotpotQA上改进了80%的问题答案质量，在Google Research Natural Questions上改进了87%，在MS MARCO上改进了83%，同时保留了原有支持良好的区域。
AI.conclusion: 该概念验证表明，拓扑结构自我诊断结合定向检索能够推动AI向类似人类的元认知学习方向发展。

title: Retractions by Alternating Projections
summary: Alternating projections and their variants are classical tools for computing points in intersections of sets. Existing analyses for smooth manifolds mainly focus on local convergence rates under transversality or related regularity conditions. In this work, we develop a unified framework for a broad class of (possibly inexact) alternating-projection-type methods on intersections of smooth manifolds. Specifically, under the assumption that two $C^{2,1}$ embedded submanifolds $\mathcal{M}_1, \mathcal{M}_2 \subset \mathbb{R}^n$ intersect cleanly, we show that the associated alternating mapping admits a well-defined local limiting map $ψ$ on the intersection manifold $\mathcal{M}=\mathcal{M}_1\cap \mathcal{M}_2$, and that $ψ$ is a retraction on $\mathcal{M}$. If, in addition, $\mathcal{M}_1$ and $\mathcal{M}_2$ are $C^{3,1}$, then $ψ$ is a second-order retraction. Furthermore, several alternating-projection-type schemes that exhibit quadratic or superlinear local behavior under transversality can be understood as inducing second-order retractions on $\mathcal{M}$. This framework thus provides new retraction-based optimization tools for problems constrained to the intersection manifold.

AI.tldr: 本文针对光滑流形交集上的交替投影类方法，建立了统一的分析框架。在$C^{2,1}$嵌入子流形清洁相交的假设下，证明了交替映射存在定义在交集流形上的局部极限映射$\psi$，且$\psi$是$\mathcal{M}$上的收缩；若流形为$C^{3,1}$，则$\psi$是二阶收缩。该框架揭示了多种交替投影型方法的二阶收缩本质，为交集流形上的优化问题提供了新的基于收缩的工具。
AI.motivation: 现有交替投影方法分析主要针对横截性等正则条件下的局部收敛率，缺乏统一的理论框架来理解各种交替投影变体在光滑流形交集上的行为。
AI.method: 建立了交替映射的局部极限分析框架，证明了在$C^{2,1}$清洁相交条件下极限映射$\psi$为流形上的收缩，在$C^{3,1}$条件下为二阶收缩；并将多种交替投影方案纳入该框架。
AI.result: 证明了交替映射在清洁相交条件下的极限映射$\psi$是$\mathcal{M}$上的收缩（$C^{2,1}$）或二阶收缩（$C^{3,1}$）；多种具有二次或超线性局部行为的交替投影方案可视为在$\mathcal{M}$上诱导二阶收缩。
AI.conclusion: 为交替投影类方法提供了统一的几何视角，揭示了其与流形上收缩优化的深层联系，为交集约束优化问题提供了新的理论工具。

title: Online Conformal Prediction for Non-Exchangeable Panel Data
summary: Panel data, in which multiple units are repeatedly observed over time, arise throughout science and engineering. Quantifying predictive uncertainty in such settings is challenging because conformal prediction, while distribution-free and model-agnostic, classically relies on exchangeability assumptions that fail under temporal dependence and unit heterogeneity. We propose a simple online conformal framework for non-exchangeable panel data. The method exploits a key feature of online panel prediction: when a forecast is required for one unit, contemporaneous outcomes from related units may already be observed and can serve as a calibration panel. At each round, prediction sets are formed using currently observed calibration units together with two adaptive quantities: history-based similarity weights that emphasize calibration units resembling the target, and an adaptive miscoverage level that is updated whenever target feedback is revealed. This two-state design yields a stepwise coverage bound and a long-run coverage guarantee. Empirically, across synthetic and real panel data sets, the method improves coverage on the worst-covered target units through adaptive interval-width allocation rather than uniform inflation. The two states are complementary: similarity weights protect coverage when target feedback is sparse, while the adaptive level further improves coverage as feedback accumulates.

AI.tldr: 针对面板数据中时间依赖性和单元异质性破坏传统共形预测交换性假设的问题，提出了一种基于在线共形框架的非交换面板数据预测方法，利用历史相似性权重和自适应错误覆盖率两个状态设计，实现了逐步覆盖界和长期覆盖保证，并通过自适应区间宽度分配改善了最差覆盖单元的覆盖效果。
AI.motivation: 面板数据广泛存在于科学和工程领域，但传统共形预测依赖交换性假设，而面板数据存在时间依赖性和单元异质性，导致交换性假设不成立，因此需要一种适应非交换面板数据的预测不确定性量化方法。
AI.method: 提出一种在线共形框架，核心在于每一轮预测时利用已观测到的相关单元作为校准面板，结合两个自适应量：基于历史相似性的权重（强调与目标相似的校准单元）和自适应错误覆盖率（根据目标反馈更新），形成预测集。
AI.result: 在合成和真实面板数据集上，该方法通过自适应区间宽度分配而非均匀膨胀，改善了最差覆盖单元的覆盖效果。两个状态互补：相似性权重在目标反馈稀疏时保护覆盖，自适应水平随反馈积累进一步改善覆盖。
AI.conclusion: 该两状态设计实现了逐步覆盖界和长期覆盖保证，为处理非交换面板数据的预测不确定性提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Phase Transitions in Driven Informational Systems: A Two-Field Perspective on Learning Theory and Non-Equilibrium Chemistry
summary:
Phase-transition phenomena in deep learning (grokking, emergent capabilities, and ontological reorganization under context shift) have been studied through several lenses, including representational compression, singular learning theory, and information-theoretic progress measures. Independently, non-equilibrium statistical physics has identified phase transitions in driven chemical reaction networks underlying prebiotic selection, with empirical signatures that are difficult to reproduce within single-field gradient accounts.
  We propose a perspective in which both classes of phenomena admit a common description as driven informational systems: stochastic processes governed by two gradient fields, an entropy production rate Sigma and an information quasi-potential Phi_I := -ln p*, where p* is the stationary density. Within this framework we introduce two candidate order parameters: an adversarial breakdown threshold alpha_dagger and a self-referential coupling threshold kappa_c.
  The joint scaling of (alpha_dagger, kappa_c) defines a candidate universality class with exponents (gamma_1, gamma_2). We outline the geometric structure of this framework, identify falsifiable predictions distinguishing it from single-field alternatives, and show consistency with recent empirical findings (2024--2026) on alignment transitions, adversarial breakdown scaling, and partial introspection in large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度学习中相变现象（如grokking、涌现能力）与非平衡统计物理中驱动化学反应网络的相变可统一描述为驱动信息系统：由熵产生率Σ和信息拟势Φ_I两个梯度场控制的随机过程。引入两个序参量——对抗性击穿阈值α†和自指耦合阈值κ_c，其联合标度定义了一个候选普适类，并与2024-2026年大语言模型的最新实证结果一致。
AI.motivation: 试图建立深度学习相变现象与非平衡统计物理中驱动化学反应网络相变之间的统一理论框架，解释两者在单场梯度模型中难以复现的经验特征。
AI.method: 提出双梯度场（熵产生率Σ和信息拟势Φ_I）驱动的随机过程框架；定义两个序参量α†和κ_c，通过其联合标度刻画普适类指数(γ₁, γ₂)；构建几何结构并推导可证伪预测。
AI.result: 定义了候选普适类及其标度指数(γ₁, γ₂)；生成了区别于单场替代方案的可证伪预测；与2024-2026年关于对齐转变、对抗性击穿标度和LLM部分内省的最新实证发现一致。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习中的相变与非平衡化学网络中的相变共享同一驱动信息系统的统一描述，双梯度场框架能够解释现有单场理论难以覆盖的经验现象，并提供了可检验的预测。

title: Recall Isn't Enough: Bounding Commitments in Personalized Language Systems
summary: Long-context and memory systems usually treat personalization as a recall problem. In practice, many failures occur later, when a system commits: it turns noisy hints into hard constraints, drops rare witnesses, forgets downstream obligations, or answers despite infeasibility. We introduce Contract-Bounded Evidence Activation (CBEA) with Lexicographic Commitment Validation (LCV). CBEA activates a bounded evidence set using typed coverage, tail witnesses, and consequence debt; LCV validates structured commitments before prose and routes infeasible states to repair, abstention, or recontract. Across 360 fixtures and three generation backends, CBEA+LCV reaches zero failures within validator scope at 0.49-0.60 availability over attempted runs. Raw and long-context baselines with the same LCV gate reach zero only at 0.003-0.092. A shadow oracle diagnostic marks the limit: CBEA+LCV recalls 0.012 of uncompiled visible facts, while raw recalls 0.53. The result is a bounded operating point: explicit commitment control and 74-75% lower median input payload, not universal memory dominance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CBEA+LCV方法，通过有界证据激活和结构化承诺验证，在可控范围内实现零失败率（可用性0.49-0.60），但代价是仅召回0.012的可见事实，远低于基线方法的0.53。该方法实现了显式承诺控制和74-75%的输入负载缩减，而非通用记忆优势。
AI.motivation: 长上下文和记忆系统通常将个性化视为回忆问题，但在实际应用中频繁失败：系统将噪声线索转化为硬约束、丢弃罕见证据、遗忘下游义务或在不满足条件时仍给出回答。现有方法缺乏对承诺的显式验证与约束机制。
AI.method: 提出基于契约的有界证据激活（CBEA）和词典化承诺验证（LCV）。CBEA通过类型化覆盖、尾部证据和后果债务激活有界证据集；LCV在生成文本前验证结构化承诺，并将不可行状态路由至修复、弃权或重新契约路径。
AI.result: 在360个测试用例和三个生成后端上，CBEA+LCV在验证器范围内达到零失败率，可用性为0.49-0.60。使用相同LCV门的原始和长上下文基线仅达到0.003-0.092可用性。影子预言机诊断显示，CBEA+LCV仅召回0.012的未编译可见事实，而原始召回0.53。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一个有界操作点：显式承诺控制和74-75%更低的中间输入负载，而非通用记忆优势。这是一种在可靠性、召回率和效率之间进行权衡的工程方案。

title: Stochastic Zeroth-Order Optimization Under Heavy-Tailed Noise
summary:
We study stochastic zeroth-order (ZO) optimization of smooth nonconvex objectives under heavy-tailed sample-gradient noise. This regime is motivated by empirical evidence that gradient noise in modern machine learning can violate the bounded-variance assumptions used in classical ZO theory. While first-order methods have optimal rates under bounded $p$-th moment noise for $p\in(1,2]$, analogous high-probability guarantees for nonconvex ZO methods are much less understood.
  The ZO setting is not a direct corollary of first-order theory. First-order methods observe stochastic gradients, whereas derivative-free methods only query noisy function values and build finite-difference estimates. Thus, weak-$L_p$ control of $\nabla F(x;ξ)-\nabla f(x)$ must first be transferred to scalar directional estimates.
  We propose the Robust Scalar-Clipped Zeroth-Order method (RSC-ZO), a two-point method that clips each scalar directional derivative before aggregation. Under sample-wise smoothness and a weak-$L_p$ tail condition on the sample-gradient noise, RSC-ZO finds an $\varepsilon$-stationary point with high probability using $$ \widetilde{O}\!\left( d^{\frac{p}{2(p-1)}}\varepsilon^{-\frac{3p-2}{p-1}} \right) $$ noisy function evaluations. This matches the optimal first-order $\varepsilon$-dependence. At $p=2$, the bound becomes $\widetilde{O}(d\varepsilon^{-4})$, matching the classical stochastic ZO dimension--accuracy dependence, but with a high-probability guarantee and under a weaker weak-$L_2$ condition that can allow infinite variance. We also analyze a momentum variant and quantify its batch-size/stepsize tradeoff.

AI.tldr: 本文提出鲁棒标量裁剪零阶方法（RSC-ZO），用于解决重尾样本梯度噪声下的非凸随机零阶优化问题。该方法通过裁剪每个标量方向导数后再聚合，在弱L_p噪声条件下达到了与最优一阶方法相同的ε依赖复杂度，并给出了高概率保证。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习中梯度噪声常违反经典零阶理论中的有界方差假设，呈现重尾特性。虽然一阶方法在弱L_p噪声下已有最优速率，但非凸零阶方法的高概率保证尚不明确，且零阶设置不能直接套用一阶理论，因为需要将梯度噪声控制转移到标量方向估计上。
AI.method: 提出RSC-ZO（Robust Scalar-Clipped Zeroth-Order）方法，这是一种两点零阶方法，在聚合前对每个标量方向导数进行裁剪操作。同时分析了动量变体及其批量大小/步长权衡。
AI.result: 在样本平滑性和样本梯度噪声的弱L_p尾条件下，RSC-ZO以高概率找到ε-稳定点，所需噪声函数评估次数为Õ(d^{p/(2(p-1))} ε^{-(3p-2)/(p-1)})。当p=2时复杂度为Õ(d ε^{-4})，匹配经典零阶随机优化的维度-精度依赖，但在更弱的弱L_2条件（允许无限方差）下提供高概率保证。
AI.conclusion: RSC-ZO在高概率意义下达到了与最优一阶方法相同的ε依赖阶，弥合了重尾噪声下零阶与一阶优化理论之间的差距。

title: How does feature learning reshape the function space?
summary: Feature learning is widely regarded as the key mechanism distinguishing neural networks from fixed-kernel methods, yet its impact on the induced function space remains poorly understood. In this work, we precisely characterize how the function space spanned by the features of a two-layer neural network evolves during gradient descent training. We prove that, in the high-dimensional proportional regime, after a large gradient step the post-update feature distribution is well approximated by a target-dependent spiked Gaussian covariance. This induces a data-adaptive kernel that reshapes the function space and modifies its spectral structure. Our analysis reveals that feature learning can be interpreted as a distributional transformation in either parameter space or input space, equivalently as the introduction of a target-dependent kernel. In particular, it selectively amplifies eigenvalues aligned with the target direction and mixes leading eigenfunctions, coupling the top radial mode with a target-aligned quadratic harmonic. Overall, our results provide a precise function-space perspective on early-stage feature learning: rather than just rescaling a fixed kernel, gradient descent induces a data-adaptive deformation that preferentially enhances directions aligned with the signal in the data.

AI.tldr: 本文严格刻画了两层神经网络在梯度下降训练过程中特征函数空间的演化，证明在高维比例极限下，大步长更新后的特征分布近似为依赖于目标信号的尖峰高斯协方差，从而诱导出数据自适应的核函数，实现特征学习——即选择性放大与目标方向对齐的特征值并混合前导本征函数。
AI.motivation: 特征学习被广泛认为是神经网络区别于固定核方法的关键机制，但其对诱导函数空间的影响尚不明确，本文旨在精确刻画这一过程。
AI.method: 采用高维比例极限理论，分析两层神经网络经大步长梯度下降后特征的分布变化，证明后更新特征分布近似为依赖于目标信号的尖峰高斯协方差，从而形成数据自适应核。
AI.result: 特征学习可等价解释为参数空间或输入空间的分布变换，即引入目标相关核；该核选择性放大与目标方向对齐的特征值，并将顶部径向模式与目标对齐的二次谐波耦合起来。
AI.conclusion: 梯度下降并非简单缩放固定核，而是诱导数据自适应形变，优先增强与数据中信号方向对齐的方向，为早期特征学习提供了精确的函数空间视角。

title: Preference Instability in Reward Models: Detection and Mitigation via Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Preference learning in large language models relies on reward models as proxies for human judgment. However, these models frequently exhibit preference instability, producing contradictory preference assignments in response to subtle, meaning-preserving input variations. We analyze this instability at the representation level under three semantic-preserving perturbation types: paraphrasing, pattern injection, and backdoor triggers. We attribute this instability to over-reliance on predictive yet brittle features, which we term unstable features, and isolate them via Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) in a sparse latent space where benign and perturbed inputs activate distinctly separable patterns. Building on this separability, we propose two SAE-based instability mitigation strategies: SAE Feature Steering, which identifies and suppresses anomalously activated features at inference, and SAE Residual Correction, which learns adaptive adjustments over SAE features to restore correct preferences. Our methods substantially reduce incorrect preference assignments on harmlessness and hallucination benchmarks while preserving benign performance and general utility on other tasks, without retraining the reward model. Our code and data are available in \url{https://github.com/shunchang-liu/pisa}.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型语言模型中奖励模型在语义保持扰动下产生的偏好不稳定问题，通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）识别不稳定特征，并提出两种基于SAE的缓解策略（特征引导和残差校正），在不重新训练模型的情况下有效减少了错误偏好分配。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型中的奖励模型作为人类判断的代理，在面对释义、模式注入和后门触发等语义保持扰动时，会产生矛盾的偏好分配，即偏好不稳定问题。这种不稳定源于模型过度依赖预测性强但脆弱的特征（不稳定特征），需要深入分析并解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过SAE在稀疏潜空间中将良性输入和扰动输入的激活模式分离，从而隔离不稳定特征。基于分离性提出两种策略：1) SAE特征引导（SAE Feature Steering）——在推理时识别并抑制异常激活的特征；2) SAE残差校正（SAE Residual Correction）——学习SAE特征上的自适应调整以恢复正确偏好。
AI.result: 在无害性和幻觉基准测试上大幅减少了错误偏好分配，同时保持了良性性能和其他任务上的通用效用，且无需重新训练奖励模型。
AI.conclusion: 偏好不稳定的根源在于奖励模型对不稳定特征的过度依赖，SAE能够有效分离这些特征对应的激活模式，基于SAE的干预策略可以在不牺牲通用性能的前提下显著提升偏好学习的鲁棒性。

title: GRID: Graph Representation of Intelligence Data for Security Text Knowledge Graph Construction
summary: Security knowledge graphs can provide computable external memory for security agents, but constructing them from long-form cyber threat intelligence (CTI) remains difficult: LLMs often lack grounded security-domain knowledge, and end-to-end document-to-graph training is hard to supervise with cheap, stable rewards. We present GRID (Graph Representation of Intelligence Data), an end-to-end framework for security text knowledge graph construction. GRID first builds security-domain supervision from CTI articles by creating traceable article-graph alignments through graph extraction and knowledge-graph-conditioned text revision. It then turns document-to-graph learning into a scripted task bank combining four-option multi-select questions with triple-level regex matching targets, yielding more stable task-specific rewards than repeatedly scoring full graph outputs with an LLM judge. Using this supervision pipeline, we train two Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-based 4B extractors: a primary Task-bank Reward model and a secondary End2End Reward model with LLM-as-judge precision/recall rewards. On 249 CTI articles from GRID, CASIE, CTINexus, MalKG, and SecureNLP, the Task-bank Reward model with the ontology-guided GRID extraction pipeline reaches 84.62% source-averaged precision, 64.91% source-averaged recall, and 68.53% Avg F1, achieving the best source-averaged recall and near-top Avg F1 with lower token usage and deployment cost. The End2End Reward model reaches 76.91% precision, 53.85% recall, and 58.06% Avg F1. Further analyses show that task-bank rewards can be built once offline and reused across later post-training runs, outperforming online End2End LLM-as-judge reward and weaker alternatives such as Choice-only Reward and End2End SFT without RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRID框架，通过构建可追溯的文本-知识图谱对齐和脚本化任务库监督信号，实现了从网络安全威胁情报文本端到端构建知识图谱，在4B规模模型上达到了84.62%精确率和68.53%平均F1，优于端到端LLM裁判方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法中，LLM缺乏安全领域知识，且端到端文档到图谱训练难以用廉价稳定的奖励信号进行监督，导致从长文本威胁情报构建知识图谱困难。
AI.method: GRID框架包含两阶段：1) 构建安全领域监督信号，通过图谱提取和知识图谱条件文本修订创建可追溯的文章-图谱对齐；2) 将文档到图谱学习转化为脚本化任务库，结合四选多选问题和三元组级正则匹配目标，训练两个4B提取器（Task-bank Reward模型和End2End Reward模型）。
AI.result: 在249篇CTI文章上，Task-bank Reward模型达到84.62%精确率、64.91%召回率、68.53%平均F1，实现了最佳源平均召回率和接近最优的平均F1，且token使用和部署成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 任务库奖励可离线构建一次并在后续训练中复用，优于在线端到端LLM裁判奖励及其他较弱替代方案。

title: Fully Discrete High-Order DG Scheme for Waves: Dispersion and Observability
summary: This paper investigates the spectral structure, numerical dispersion, and observability of fully discrete approximations of the one-dimensional wave equation by $P^k$ (local) discontinuous Galerkin methods. Characterizing the coupled space-time numerical dispersion reveals a trapping mechanism that forces the group velocities of both physical and spurious modes to vanish at selected frequencies. We then establish an exponential blow-up of order $\exp(h^{-(1-\varepsilon)})$ for the observability constant under this trapping mechanism. To overcome this divergence for arbitrary $k$, we propose a spectral filtering strategy to restore uniform observability. Theoretical analysis and numerical experiments indicate that higher-order methods may facilitate this recovery by preserving a larger genuine physical frequency band, thereby reducing filtering cost and observation time.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一维波动方程P^k局部间断Galerkin全离散近似的谱结构、数值色散和可观测性。耦合时空数值色散揭示了一种捕获机制，迫使物理和伪模态的群速度在特定频率处消失。我们建立了在该捕获机制下可观测常数呈exp(h^{-(1-ε)})指数爆炸的结论。为克服任意k阶的发散，提出了一种谱滤波策略恢复一致可观测性。理论分析和数值实验表明，高阶方法通过保留更宽的物理频带，有助于降低滤波成本和观测时间。
AI.motivation: 研究一维波动方程全离散近似中的数值色散导致的捕获机制及其对可观测性的影响，并寻求克服可观测常数指数爆炸问题的有效策略。
AI.method: 采用P^k局部间断Galerkin方法进行全离散逼近，通过表征耦合时空数值色散揭示捕获机制，并提出谱滤波策略恢复一致可观测性。
AI.result: 发现捕获机制导致可观测常数呈exp(h^{-(1-ε)})指数爆炸；提出谱滤波策略可恢复一致可观测性；高阶方法能保留更宽的物理频带，降低滤波成本和观测时间。
AI.conclusion: 高阶方法更有利于通过谱滤波策略恢复一致可观测性，能够降低计算成本并缩短观测时间。

title: StatQAT: Statistical Quantizer Optimization for Deep Networks
summary: Quantization is essential for reducing the computational cost and memory usage of deep neural networks, enabling efficient inference on low-precision hardware. Despite the growing adoption of uniform and floating-point quantization schemes, selecting optimal quantization parameters remains a key challenge, particularly for diverse data distributions encountered during training and inference. This work presents a novel statistical error analysis framework for uniform and floating-point quantization, providing theoretical insight into error behavior across quantization configurations. Building on this analysis, we propose iterative quantizers designed for arbitrary data distributions and analytic quantizers tailored for Gaussian-like weight distributions. These methods enable efficient, low-error quantization suitable for both activations and weights. We incorporate our quantizers into quantization-aware training and evaluate them across integer and floating-point formats. Experiments demonstrate improved accuracy and stability, highlighting the effectiveness of our approach for training low-precision neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的统计误差分析框架，用于统一和浮点量化，并基于此设计了迭代量化器（适用于任意数据分布）和分析量化器（适用于高斯型权重分布），将其集成到量化感知训练中，在整数和浮点格式下均实现了更高的精度和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 尽管统一量化和浮点量化方案日益普及，但在训练和推理过程中，针对多样化的数据分布选择最优量化参数仍然是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 1. 提出统一的统计误差分析框架，从理论上揭示不同量化配置下的误差行为。2. 基于分析结果，设计了针对任意数据分布的迭代量化器和针对高斯型权重分布的分析量化器。
AI.result: 将所提量化器集成到量化感知训练中，在整数和浮点格式下均取得了更高的准确率和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效地支持了低精度神经网络的训练，在精度和稳定性方面优于现有方案。

title: Orth-Dion: Eliminating Geometric Mismatch in Distributed Low-Rank Spectral Optimization
summary: Low-rank gradient compression reduces communication in distributed training by representing updates with rank-$r$ factors. Dion is a recent method that approximates Muon, a spectral optimizer that orthogonalizes momentum, using one step of power iteration followed by column normalization (rescaling each column of the right factor to unit length). This makes it compatible with fully sharded data parallel training, but it converges more slowly than full-rank spectral methods. We show that this gap is geometric: column normalization does not yield the rank-$r$ polar factor that Muon implicitly targets, so the resulting direction violates the dual-norm constraint of the low-rank spectral geometry, and the rate picks up an extra factor of $\sqrt{r}$ even though the low-rank approximation of the gradient itself is accurate. The same mismatch enters the smoothness term and the error-feedback recursion in the analysis, which has a knock-on effect on empirical performance. We propose Orth-Dion, which replaces column normalization with QR orthogonalization of the right factor. Under non-Euclidean smoothness, with $L_r$ the curvature constant along rank-$r$ directions, Orth-Dion attains rate $O(\sqrt{L_r/T})$, matching exact spectral methods at the same per-step communication cost as Dion. The proof removes the bounded-drift assumption common in prior error-feedback analyses via a self-consistent fixed-point argument, and uses a time-averaged contraction that only requires the error sequence to contract on average rather than at every step. Experiments on large-scale language model pre-training validate the predicted $\sqrt{r}$ scaling and show that Orth-Dion closes the convergence gap to Muon at Dion's communication cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Orth-Dion方法，通过QR正交化替代列归一化，解决了低秩谱优化器Dion与Muon之间的收敛差距，在相同通信成本下达到与全秩谱方法匹配的收敛速率。
AI.motivation: Dion方法虽兼容全分片数据并行训练，但收敛速度慢于全秩谱方法。作者发现这一差距源于几何原因：列归一化无法产生Muon隐式目标的秩-r极分解因子，导致方向违反低秩谱几何的对偶范数约束，收敛速率额外增加√r因子。
AI.method: 提出Orth-Dion，用QR正交化替换列归一化对右因子进行正交化。理论分析采用非欧几里得光滑性假设，通过自洽不动点论证去除了误差反馈分析中常见的有限漂移假设，并使用时均收缩技术仅要求误差序列在平均意义上收缩。
AI.result: Orth-Dion在相同每步通信成本下达到O(√(L_r/T))的收敛速率，与精确谱方法匹配。大规模语言模型预训练实验验证了√r缩放规律，证明Orth-Dion以Dion的通信成本弥合了与Muon的收敛差距。
AI.conclusion: 低秩梯度压缩中的列归一化操作是导致Dion收敛缓慢的根本几何原因，QR正交化可有效解决该问题，实现通信效率与收敛性能的双赢。

title: Baba in Wonderland: Online Self-Supervised Dynamics Discovery for Executable World Models
summary: Executable world models can be read, edited, executed, and reused for planning, but only if the program captures the environment's transition law rather than semantic shortcuts in its surface vocabulary. We study online executable world-model learning under prior misalignment, where an agent must induce state-dependent dynamics from interaction evidence alone, without rule descriptions, reward signals, or trustworthy lexical priors. We introduce Alice, a closed-loop system that treats failed candidate updates as structural signal: when a candidate explains a new transition but loses previously explained ones, the preservation conflict reveals dynamics that the current program had conflated. Alice refines these conflicts into hypothesis classes that both provide compact, class-stratified preservation counterexamples for update and guide frontier exploration toward transitions that are novel and underrepresented with respect to the current program. We evaluate Alice on Baba in Wonderland, a prior-misaligned variant of Baba Is You that preserves simulator dynamics while replacing semantically meaningful rule-property labels with unrelated words. Experiments show that Alice substantially improves executable world-model learning under prior misalignment, and ablations show that both class refinement and class-aware exploration contribute.

AI.tldr: Alice是一个闭环系统，通过将失败的候选更新视为结构性信号，在词汇先验错配（prior misalignment）条件下从交互证据中学习可执行世界模型。系统利用保存冲突（preservation conflict）提炼假设类别，指导前沿探索朝向新颖且未被充分代表的转移。在Baba in Wonderland环境中的实验表明，Alice显著提升了先验错配下的可执行世界模型学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有可执行世界模型学习方法依赖规则描述、奖励信号或可信的词汇先验，但在先验错配（即环境表面的语义词汇与真实动态规律不一致）条件下无法有效学习。作者希望解决agent仅能从交互证据中学习状态依赖动态、而无可靠先验知识的问题。
AI.method: 提出Alice闭环系统：(1) 将失败的候选更新视为结构性信号，检测保存冲突（新更新解释了新转移但丢失了先前已解释的转移）；(2) 将冲突提炼为假设类别（hypothesis classes），提供紧凑的、按类别分层的保存反例用于更新；(3) 利用类别感知的前沿探索（class-aware frontier exploration）引导agent探索当前程序尚未覆盖的新颖转移。
AI.result: 在Baba in Wonderland（Baba Is You的先验错配变体）上的实验表明，Alice显著优于基线方法；消融实验证实类别提炼（class refinement）和类别感知探索（class-aware exploration）两个组件均对性能提升有贡献。
AI.conclusion: 将失败的更新信号用作结构性反馈，结合假设类别提炼与类别感知探索，能够有效克服先验错配问题，使得agent仅凭交互证据即可学习到正确的可执行世界模型。

title: Port-Hamiltonian Control and Structure-Preserving Algorithm for Grid-Forming SVGs
summary: This paper presents a port-Hamiltonian (PH) modeling, control, and structure-preserving simulation framework for grid-forming static var generators (SVGs). A PH model is established that captures energy exchange among the inductor, capacitor, and DC-link storage ports. Since external disturbances cannot be fully canceled by feedback, an input-to-state stable (ISS) controller is designed to steer subsystem states to zero while minimizing disturbance effects. The controller contains only three tunable parameters with clear physical interpretations and is robust against input errors. A Dirac-structure-preserving midpoint rule is developed, which exactly conserves the Hamiltonian energy when disturbances are absent. Numerical comparisons show that the ISS controller achieves faster settling, smaller offset, and lower control effort than a conventional PI controller, and the structure-preserving midpoint rule maintains exact energy conservation and superior long-term accuracy over standard Runge-Kutta methods.

AI.tldr: 本文针对构网型静止无功发生器(SVG)，提出了端口-哈密顿(PH)建模、输入-状态稳定(ISS)控制和保持狄拉克结构的中点规则仿真框架。PH模型描述电感、电容和直流链路端口的能量交换；ISS控制器仅含三个具有明确物理含义的可调参数，能最小化扰动影响；所提中点规则在无扰动时精确守恒哈密顿能量。数值实验表明ISS控制器比传统PI控制器响应更快、稳态偏差更小、控制能耗更低，且结构保持中点规则相比标准龙格-库塔方法具有精确能量守恒和优越的长期精度。
AI.motivation: 现有构网型SVG控制方法多基于PI控制，存在响应慢、稳态偏移大、参数物理含义不明确等问题；同时传统数值积分方法在长期仿真中无法保持系统能量守恒，影响仿真精度和可靠性。因此需要更优的建模、控制与仿真一体化框架。
AI.method: (1) 建立端口-哈密顿(PH)模型，将SVG的电感、电容和直流链路端口能量交换用PH形式统一描述；(2) 设计输入-状态稳定(ISS)控制器，仅含三个可调参数且物理意义明确，对输入误差具有鲁棒性；(3) 提出狄拉克结构保持中点规则，在无扰动时精确保持哈密顿能量守恒特性。
AI.result: ISS控制器相比传统PI控制器：响应更快、稳态偏移更小、控制能耗更低。结构保持中点规则相比标准龙格-库塔方法：实现精确能量守恒、长期仿真精度更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提PH建模、ISS控制与结构保持中点规则构成的统一框架，为构网型SVG提供了一种物理意义清晰、鲁棒性强、数值保结构特性优越的解决方案，适用于电力系统稳定分析与长期仿真。

title: Feature Learning in Linear-Width Two-Layer Networks: Two vs. One Step of Gradient Descent
summary: We study feature learning in two-layer neural networks within the linear-width regime, where the number of hidden neurons, sample size, and input dimension scale proportionally. While recent work has analyzed feature learning via a single step of gradient descent, such updates are fundamentally limited: they are approximately rank-one, capturing only a single direction, and require the target function to have an information exponent of one. In this paper, we go beyond one-step updates to provide a full characterization of the features learned during the second step of gradient descent with step-sizes $η_1 \asymp N^{α_1}$ and $η_2 \asymp N^{α_2}$ for $α_1, α_2 \in [0,0.5)$. We derive a sharp spectral characterization of the updated weights, demonstrating they behave as a spiked random matrix with multiple outliers, each corresponding to a learned direction. We show that the number of these outliers is determined by the scaling parameters $α_1$ and $α_2$ through $\lfloor \frac{α_2}{1/2 - α_1} \rfloor$. Furthermore, by analyzing the alignment between these learned directions and the target function, we identify a qualitative gap between training with independent versus reused batches. While independent batches restrict learning to directions with an information exponent of one, batch reuse enables the second update to capture directions even when the information exponent exceeds one, under the condition that $α_1, α_2$ are chosen properly. This confirms that the benefits of batch reuse, previously observed in finite-width regimes, persist in the high-dimensional linear-width limit. By characterizing these early-phase spectral transitions, our work establishes a tractable mathematical framework for studying optimization and feature learning phenomenology in modern overparameterized networks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了线性宽度机制下两层神经网络两步梯度下降的特征学习，推导了更新权重的尖峰随机矩阵谱特征，发现离群点数量由步长缩放参数α₁和α₂决定，并揭示了批重用相比独立批训练能够学习信息指数大于1的方向，建立了高维过参数化网络中特征学习的数学框架。
AI.motivation: 已有工作仅分析了单步梯度下降的特征学习，但单步更新本质上是近似秩一的，只能捕获单一方向，且要求目标函数的信息指数为1。本文旨在突破这一限制，通过分析两步梯度下降来全面刻画特征学习过程。
AI.method: 采用线性宽度机制（隐藏神经元数、样本量和输入维度成比例缩放），设置两步梯度下降的学习率分别为η₁ ≍ N^{α₁}和η₂ ≍ N^{α₂}（α₁,α₂∈[0,0.5)），推导更新权重的谱特征，将其建模为具有多个离群点的尖峰随机矩阵，并分析学习方向与目标函数之间的对齐程度。
AI.result: 离群点数量由⌊α₂/(1/2 - α₁)⌋决定。独立批训练仅能学习信息指数为1的方向，而批重用（在适当选择α₁,α₂条件下）可以使第二步更新捕获信息指数大于1的方向。批重用的优势在有限宽度和高维度线性宽度极限下均成立。
AI.conclusion: 通过对早期阶段谱转变的表征，本文建立了一个易于处理的数学框架，用于研究现代过参数化网络中的优化和特征学习现象。

title: DACA-GRPO: Denoising-Aware Credit Assignment for Reinforcement Learning in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models are a compelling alternative to autoregressive models, yet existing RL methods for diffusion treat all denoising steps as equally important and rely on biased, high-variance likelihood estimates. We identify two fundamental weaknesses: the absence of temporal credit assignment across the denoising trajectory, and the systematic bias of mean-field likelihood estimates used for policy optimization. To address these, we propose Denoising-Aware Credit Assignment for GRPO (DACA-GRPO), a lightweight, plug-and-play enhancement for any GRPO-style trainer. DACA-GRPO introduces two complementary mechanisms: Denoising Progress Scores, which extract per-token importance weights from intermediate predictions at no additional forward cost, and Stratified Masking Likelihood, which partitions token positions into strata so that each token is predicted with most of the sequence as context, reducing the mean-field bias. Applied on top of three GRPO base methods, DACA-GRPO achieves consistent improvements across seven benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, constraint satisfaction, and constrained generation, with gains of up to 5.6pp on math reasoning, 7.4pp on code generation, 36.3pp on constraint satisfaction, and 5.9pp on JSON schema adherence.

AI.tldr: 针对扩散大语言模型中RL方法缺乏时序信用分配和均值场似然估计偏差的问题，提出DACA-GRPO，通过去噪进度分数和分层掩码似然两种机制实现无额外开销的性能提升，在数学推理、代码生成等七项基准上取得一致改进。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散LLM的强化学习方法存在两个根本缺陷：一是所有去噪步骤被同等对待，缺乏跨去噪轨迹的时序信用分配；二是用于策略优化的均值场似然估计存在系统性偏差和高方差。
AI.method: 提出DACA-GRPO，包含两个互补机制：1) 去噪进度分数（Denoising Progress Scores），从中期预测中提取每token重要性权重，无需额外前向计算；2) 分层掩码似然（Stratified Masking Likelihood），将token位置分层，使每个token在大部分序列作为上下文的条件下被预测，减少均值场偏差。
AI.result: 在三种GRPO基方法上应用，覆盖七个基准，数学推理提升5.6个百分点，代码生成提升7.4个百分点，约束满足提升36.3个百分点，JSON模式遵循提升5.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: DACA-GRPO是一种轻量级、即插即用的增强方法，可应用于任何GRPO风格训练器，有效解决扩散LLM中RL训练的时序信用分配和偏差问题。

title: A Global-Local Graph Attention Network for Traffic Forecasting
summary: Traffic forecasting is a significant part of intelligent transportation systems. One of the critical challenges of traffic forecasting is to find spatio-temporal correlations. In recent years, graph convolutional networks and graph attention networks have replaced traditional statistical models to predict future traffic. However, it is complicated for both of them to allow vertices to have far different characters. To address this, we propose the Global-Local Graph Attention Network (GLGAT) with pairwise encoding and the event-based adjacency matrix. The GLGAT allows vertices to have a global attention matrix set for the whole graph and assigns local attention matrix sets to each vertex. Experiments on two real-world traffic datasets show that GLGAT can effectively capture spatio-temporal correlations and has competitive performance against other state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出全局-局部图注意力网络（GLGAT），通过成对编码和基于事件的邻接矩阵，结合全局和局部注意力机制，有效捕获交通预测中的时空相关性，在真实数据集上取得 competitive 性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络和图注意力网络难以处理节点间特征差异大的问题，无法同时兼顾全局和局部时空依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出GLGAT模型，包含：1）成对编码（pairwise encoding）；2）基于事件的邻接矩阵（event-based adjacency matrix）；3）全局注意力矩阵集（为整个图设置）；4）局部注意力矩阵集（为每个顶点单独分配）。
AI.result: 在两个真实交通数据集上的实验表明，GLGAT能够有效捕获时空相关性，性能优于其他最先进基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 全局与局部注意力机制的联合设计能够更好地处理节点异质性，提升交通预测的准确性。

title: Inexact Adjoint Gradients and Directional Tolerances for Full-Potential Airfoil Optimization
summary: This paper develops a framework connecting discrete adjoint gradient-error analysis with an optimization method that uses directional error tolerances, and applies it to airfoil shape optimization governed by a conservative full-potential flow solver on body-fitted structured meshes. The theoretical part derives the reduced discrete adjoint formula for scalar objectives constrained by a state equation and analyzes how inexact state and adjoint residuals propagate into the reduced gradient. For residuals that are affine in the state variable, the gradient error is bounded by a linear combination of the state and adjoint residual tolerances. On compact sets of decision variables, a uniform version of this bound is obtained, leading to a directional tolerance condition under which the inexact gradient satisfies an exact descent inequality. The resulting inexact general directions method inherits convergence properties under uniformly bounded, diminishing, and Armijo-type step-size rules. The computational part combines a parabolic initial grid generator, an elliptic mesh smoother, and a full-potential discretization with artificial-density stabilization and approximate-factorization iteration. The optimization problem is formulated as a pressure-matching problem in which a class-shape-transformation airfoil parametrization is adjusted so that the computed surface pressure coefficient approaches prescribed reference data, subject to mesh-generation and full-potential residual constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将离散伴随梯度误差分析与使用方向误差容限的优化方法相结合的框架，并将其应用于由守恒全势流求解器控制的翼型形状优化问题。理论上推导了简约离散伴随公式，分析了不精确状态和伴随残差对梯度误差的影响，证明了在状态变量仿射残差条件下梯度误差由状态和伴随残差容限线性组合界定，进而得到方向容限条件使不精确梯度满足精确下降不等式。计算部分结合了抛物线初始网格生成、椭圆网格平滑、人工密度稳定化和近似因子迭代的全势离散化，通过类形状变换翼型参数化实现了压力匹配优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有翼型形状优化中，全势流求解器的离散伴随梯度计算代价高昂且存在数值误差，缺乏系统的误差分析框架来指导优化算法中的容限设置，从而在不显著牺牲收敛性的前提下降低计算成本。
AI.method: 理论层面：推导了标量目标函数受状态方程约束的简约离散伴随公式，分析了不精确状态和伴随残差向梯度误差的传播机制，建立了残差仿射条件下的梯度误差上界，并在决策变量紧集上得到一致版本的方向容限条件。算法层面：采用抛物线初始网格生成+椭圆网格平滑的混合网格策略，人工密度稳定化的全势离散格式，近似因子迭代求解，以及CST（类形状变换）翼型参数化方法。
AI.result: 证明了当状态和伴随残差容限满足特定方向条件时，不精确梯度依然满足精确下降不等式；所提不精确广义方向法在均匀有界、递减和Armijo型步长规则下保持收敛性质。数值实验验证了该框架在压力匹配翼型优化问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为全势流控制下的翼型形状优化提供了理论严谨的不精确梯度优化框架，通过方向误差容限机制在计算效率与收敛保证之间取得了平衡，可推广至更复杂的流场控制优化问题。

title: Simple Approximation and Derivative Free Inference-Time Scaling for Diffusion Models via Sequential Monte Carlo on Path Measures
summary: iffusion-based generative models increasingly rely on inference-time guidance, adding a drift term or reweighting mixture of experts, to improve sample quality on task-specific objectives. However, most existing techniques require repeated score or gradient evaluations, introducing bias, high computational overhead, or both. We introduce \texttt{URGE}, Unbiased Resampling via Girsanov Estimation, a derivative-free inference-time scaling algorithm that performs path-wise importance reweighting via a Girsanov change of measure. Instead of computing gradient-based particle weights in previous work, \texttt{URGE} attaches a simple multiplicative weight to each simulated trajectory and periodically resamples. No score, no Hessian, and no PDE evaluation is required. We establish an equivalence between path-wise and particle-wise SMC: the Girsanov path weight admits a backward conditional expectation that recovers the previous particle-level weights, guaranteeing that both schemes produce the same unbiased terminal law. Empirically, \texttt{URGE} outperforms existing inference-time guidance baselines on synthetic tests and diffusion-model benchmarks, achieving better generation quality, while being significantly simpler to implement and fully gradient-free.

AI.tldr: URGE是一种无需梯度的推理时引导算法，通过Girsanov测度变换对扩散模型的轨迹进行路径重要性重加权和周期性重采样，在无偏条件下提升生成质量，且实现简单、计算高效。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型的推理时引导技术（如添加漂移项或专家混合重加权）需要反复计算分数或梯度，存在计算开销大、引入偏差等问题。本文旨在设计一种无偏、无需导数计算、实现简单的推理时缩放算法。
AI.method: 提出URGE算法，基于Girsanov测度变换对每条模拟轨迹赋予乘法路径权重，并周期性进行重采样。建立了路径级与粒子级序贯蒙特卡洛(SMC)之间的等价性：Girsanov路径权重通过后向条件期望可恢复粒子级权重，保证两种方案产生相同的无偏终端分布。无需分数、Hessian或PDE计算。
AI.result: 在合成测试和扩散模型基准上，URGE在生成质量上优于现有推理时引导基线，同时实现更简单且完全无需梯度。
AI.conclusion: URGE提供了一种无偏、梯度无关的推理时引导方法，兼具理论保证与实践优越性，为扩散模型的高效推理缩放提供了新路径。

title: LoopQ: Quantization for Recursive Transformers
summary: Looped language models (LoopLMs) improve parameter efficiency by recursively reusing Transformer blocks, enabling deeper computation under a fixed model size. However, this reuse makes LoopLMs more fragile under post-training quantization (PTQ). We present the first systematic study of quantization in LoopLMs and identify three challenges: distribution shift across roles, state reuse across loop transitions, and recursive error accumulation. To address these challenges, we propose LoopQ, a loop-aware PTQ framework that preserves a shared quantized backbone while introducing lightweight adaptations. LoopQ combines activation scaling, selective transformation, cross-loop state alignment, and trajectory-aware optimization to reduce distributional mismatch within loops and error accumulation across loops. Experiments across seven benchmarks show that, under W4A4 quantization, LoopQ improves average downstream accuracy by 68.8% and reduces average perplexity by 87.7% compared with the strongest static PTQ baseline.

AI.tldr: LoopQ是一种针对循环语言模型(LoopLM)的环路感知后训练量化框架，通过激活缩放、选择性变换、跨循环状态对齐和轨迹感知优化，在W4A4量化下相比最强静态PTQ基线平均下游准确率提升68.8%，困惑度降低87.7%。
AI.motivation: 循环语言模型通过递归复用Transformer块提升参数效率，但参数复用使其在后训练量化下更加脆弱，目前缺乏针对LoopLM量化的系统性研究。
AI.method: 提出LoopQ框架，包含激活缩放(activation scaling)、选择性变换(selective transformation)、跨循环状态对齐(cross-loop state alignment)和轨迹感知优化(trajectory-aware optimization)四个组件，在共享量化骨干上引入轻量级适配。
AI.result: 在七个基准测试上，W4A4量化下LoopQ相比最强静态PTQ基线，平均下游准确率提升68.8%，平均困惑度降低87.7%。
AI.conclusion: LoopQ有效解决了LoopLM量化中的分布偏移、状态复用和递归误差累积三大挑战，显著提升了量化后的模型性能。

title: PopuLoRA: Co-Evolving LLM Populations for Reasoning Self-Play
summary: We introduce PopuLoRA, a population-based asymmetric self-play framework for reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) post-training of LLMs. Teachers and students are specialised LoRA adapters on a shared frozen base: teachers propose problems, matched students solve them under a programmatic verifier, and cross-evaluation between sub-populations replaces the self-calibration that limits single-agent self-play. A family of LoRA weight-space evolution operators (mutations and crossovers that produce same-rank population members in seconds) serves as the replacement step of a population-based training loop at 7B scale. We instantiate PopuLoRA on top of Absolute Zero Reasoner and compare it against a per-adapter compute-matched single-agent baseline. Where the single agent self-calibrates to generating easy problems it can reliably solve, the population enters a co-evolutionary arms race: teachers produce increasingly complex problems, student solve rates oscillate, and problem-space coverage keeps expanding throughout training. Despite lower training-time reward, the population mean outperforms the baseline on three code benchmarks (HumanEval+, MBPP+, LiveCodeBench) and seven math benchmarks (AIME 24/25, AMC 23, MATH-500, Minerva, GSM8K, OlympiadBench), and even the weakest member of the population beats the baseline on aggregate.

AI.tldr: 提出PopuLoRA框架，通过基于群体的非对称自博弈（教师-学生LoRA适配器协同进化）替代单智能体自校准，在7B规模LLM的RLVR后训练中实现了问题空间覆盖持续扩展，在多项代码和数学基准上超越计算匹配的单智能体基线。
AI.motivation: 单智能体自博弈在RLVR后训练中会自我校准到生成自身能稳定解决的简单问题，限制了问题空间的覆盖范围和训练效果。作者希望引入群体协同进化机制打破这一局限。
AI.method: 基于共享冻结基座模型，维护教师和学生两类LoRA适配器子群体；教师负责生成问题，学生负责解答，通过程序化验证器进行交叉评估；设计LoRA权重空间的进化算子（变异和交叉），实现秒级同秩个体生成，作为群体训练循环的替换步骤。
AI.result: 在HumanEval+、MBPP+、LiveCodeBench三个代码基准以及AIME 24/25、AMC 23、MATH-500、Minerva、GSM8K、OlympiadBench七个数学基准上，群体均值优于计算匹配的单智能体基线，且群体中最弱成员在整体指标上也超过基线。
AI.conclusion: PopuLoRA通过群体协同进化打破了单智能体自我校准的局限，教师生成的问题复杂度持续上升，学生解题率呈现振荡，问题空间覆盖不断扩大，证明了群体进化策略在LLM后训练中的有效性。

title: Training Infinitely Deep and Wide Transformers
summary: Transformers have become the dominant architecture in modern machine learning, yet the theoretical understanding of their training dynamics remains limited. This paper develops a rigorous mathematical framework for analyzing gradient-based training of transformers in the mean-field regime, where both the depth (number of layers) and width (number of attention heads) tend to infinity. While ResNet training can be understood as controlling a neural ODE, transformer training corresponds to controlling a neural PDE, due to the coupling of multiple token distributions through the attention mechanism. Our mean-field model features two types of measure representations: token distributions evolving through layers and attention parameters at each layer. We establish well-posedness of the forward pass through infinitely deep transformers, characterizing token evolution via flow maps that satisfy ODEs in function spaces. Using adjoint sensitivity analysis, we derive an explicit formula for the conditional Wasserstein gradient of the training risk, involving adjoint variables governed by backward ODEs. We prove the existence and uniqueness of gradient flow curves in the conditional Wasserstein metric space, establishing a rigorous foundation for gradient-based transformer training. A key technical contribution is providing necessary and sufficient conditions for injectivity of the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) for attention mechanisms: we show that NTK injectivity is equivalent to linear independence of log-sum-exp functions modulo affine functions, a condition satisfied by diverse token distributions, including discrete distributions, uniform distributions, and Gaussian mixtures. Under this NTK injectivity assumption, we prove that gradient flow converges to global minima when the initial loss is sufficiently small, eliminating spurious local minima from the optimization landscape.

AI.tldr: 本文在平均场框架下对Transformer的梯度训练进行了严格的数学分析，证明其前向传播等价于神经PDE控制问题，推导了条件Wasserstein梯度公式，并给出了注意力机制NTK核单射性的充要条件，证明了梯度流在初始损失足够小时收敛到全局最小值。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer已成为现代机器学习的主流架构，但其训练动力学的理论理解仍然有限，缺乏严格的数学基础。
AI.method: 建立了平均场框架下的两层度量表示模型（token分布和注意力参数），利用伴随灵敏度分析推导条件Wasserstein梯度公式，通过分析NTK核单射性建立梯度流收敛性理论。
AI.result: 证明了前向传播的适定性、梯度流的存在唯一性；给出了NTK核单射性与log-sum-exp函数线性无关性等价的充要条件；证明了在NTK单射条件下梯度流收敛到全局最小值。
AI.conclusion: 为基于梯度的Transformer训练建立了严格的数学基础，揭示了其与ResNet（神经ODE）的本质区别（神经PDE），并排除了优化景观中的虚假局部极小值。

title: A data-driven Fourier-mixture neural-network method for density estimation
summary: We propose a data-driven Fourier-trained neural-network method for estimating fixed-horizon probability densities from empirical characteristic-function (CF) information. The estimator is a positive Gaussian--Laplace mixture with closed-form CF, so training can be performed directly in Fourier space while preserving nonnegativity and unit mass. We consider two sampling settings. In the direct i.i.d. sampling setting, the method is trained against an empirical CF constructed from i.i.d. samples. In the resampling-based pseudo-sampling setting, it is trained against an empirical pseudo-CF constructed from dependent data by resampling. For the direct i.i.d. case, we derive an expected $L_2$ error bound that separates Fourier truncation, empirical training error, discretization, and CF sampling error. For the pseudo-sampling case, we obtain a conditional analogue with two additional pseudo-law discrepancy terms. We develop a multidimensional extension of the framework and analyze its computational complexity. Numerical experiments show competitive performance relative to Expectation--Maximization on Gaussian-mixture benchmarks, clear gains on heavy-tailed targets, $L_2$ error decay consistent with the theory in a well-specified setting, and effective estimation of one-year Australian equity return law from resampled dependent data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于傅里叶训练的神经网络方法，通过特征函数信息估计固定时域的概率密度。模型采用正定的高斯-拉普拉斯混合分布，在傅里叶空间中训练，同时保证非负性和单位质量。涵盖直接i.i.d.采样和基于重采样的伪采样两种场景，并给出了理论误差界与数值实验验证。
AI.motivation: 从经验特征函数中估计概率密度时，需要一种既能利用傅里叶域计算优势、又能保证密度函数非负性和单位质量的有效方法，同时处理独立数据与依赖数据两种采样场景。
AI.method: 采用具有闭合形式特征函数的正定高斯-拉普拉斯混合作为密度估计器，直接在傅里叶空间中对经验特征函数进行训练。在直接i.i.d.采样场景下，从i.i.d.样本构建经验CF进行训练；在重采样伪采样场景下，从依赖数据通过重采样构建经验伪CF进行训练。并扩展至多维情形。
AI.result: 得到了直接i.i.d.情形下的期望L₂误差界，包含傅里叶截断、经验训练误差、离散化和CF采样误差四项；伪采样情形下增加了两个伪律差异项。数值实验表明：在高斯混合基准上与EM算法相当，在重尾目标上优势明显，L₂误差衰减与理论一致，并能有效估计澳大利亚股票收益的年度分布。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的傅里叶训练神经网络方法在密度估计中兼具理论保证与实用性能，尤其适合重尾分布和依赖数据场景。

title: Goal-Conditioned Supervised Learning for LLM Fine-Tuning
summary:
Large language models often require fine-tuning to better align their behavior with user intent at deployment. Existing approaches are commonly divided into online and offline paradigms. Online methods, such as RL-based alignment, can directly optimize outcome quality but typically rely on external reward models and iterative rollouts, making them costly and difficult to deploy in many cases. Offline methods are more efficient, but prevailing approaches such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and direct preference optimization (DPO) remain limited: SFT typically collapses graded feedback into binary supervision, while DPO depends on paired preference data that is often unavailable or expensive to construct.
  In this paper, we propose goal-conditioned supervised learning (GCSL) as an offline fine-tuning framework for LLMs. Our core idea is to treat feedback signals directly as an explicit goal and train the model, purely through supervised learning, to generate responses that achieve that goal. To better exploit graded feedback, we further introduce a novel goal formulation that defines learning as consistently pursuing outcomes above a target quality threshold, rather than imitating samples from a selected high-quality subset. This design mitigates the bounded-learning effect of SFT and classic GCSL by explicitly guiding the model to learn the directional progression of quality. We also propose natural-language goal representations to better leverage the semantic understanding and reasoning capabilities of LLMs. We evaluate our method on three tasks: non-toxic generation, code generation, and LLM for recommendation. Results show that our approach consistently outperforms standard offline fine-tuning baselines while retaining the efficiency, scalability, and simple data requirements of supervised learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出目标条件监督学习（GCSL）作为LLM的离线微调框架，通过将反馈信号直接作为显式目标进行监督学习，并引入按质量阈值追求结果的新型目标公式，在避免在线方法的高成本和离线方法的局限性同时，在无毒生成、代码生成和推荐任务上优于标准离线微调基线。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM对齐方法存在两难：在线方法（如RL）效果虽好但依赖外部奖励模型和迭代 rollout，成本高且难以部署；离线方法（如SFT、DPO）效率更高但存在局限——SFT将分级反馈坍缩为二元监督，DPO依赖通常难以获取的成对偏好数据。因此需要一种既高效又能充分利用分级反馈信号的离线对齐方法。
AI.method: 提出GCSL离线微调框架，核心思想是将反馈信号直接作为显式目标，通过纯监督学习训练模型生成达到该目标的响应。具体包括：(1) 新型目标公式：定义学习为持续追求超过目标质量阈值的结果，而非模仿选定高质量子集样本，从而缓解SFT和经典GCSL的有界学习效应；(2) 自然语言目标表示：利用LLM的语义理解和推理能力更好地表示目标。
AI.result: 在无毒生成、代码生成和LLM推荐三个任务上，该方法一致优于标准离线微调基线（如SFT、DPO），同时保持了监督学习的效率、可扩展性和简单的数据需求。
AI.conclusion: 所提GCSL框架成功地在离线场景下实现了对分级反馈信号的有效利用，既避免了在线方法的高成本，又克服了SFT和DPO等离线方法的固有局限，为LLM高效对齐提供了一种新的监督学习范式。

title: Body-Grounded Perspective Formation and Conative Attunement in Artificial Agents
summary: This paper proposes a minimal architecture for body-grounded perspective formation in artificial agents. Extending prior work, the model introduces an interoceptive viability signal, a Fisher-style metric over fused exteroceptive-interoceptive states, and a conative alignment mechanism linking bodily tendency to action readiness. In a reward-free gridworld, conation converts learned bodily tendency into stable body-directed behavior, while body-to-perspective routing allows bodily perturbations to leave a recoverable geometric residue in the perspective latent. This study shows how minimal structural conditions for artificial subjectivity can be operationalized in the phenomenological sense, through the embodied organization of how a world is given to an agent.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种最小化架构，通过内感受活力信号、Fisher度量融合内外感受状态以及意动对齐机制，使人工智能体能够在无奖励的网格世界中形成基于身体的视角，实现了现象学意义上的人工主体性。
AI.motivation: 为了在人工智能体中实现现象学意义上的主体性，探索主体视角形成的身体基础和组织条件。
AI.method: 提出包含内感受活力信号、Fisher度量融合内外感受状态、意动对齐机制的最小化架构，并在无奖励网格世界中进行验证。
AI.result: 意动机制将习得的身体倾向转化为稳定的身体导向行为；身体到视角的路由使身体扰动在视角潜变量中留下可恢复的几何痕迹。
AI.conclusion: 展示了人工主体性在现象学意义上的最小结构条件可以通过身体组织与世界呈现方式的关系来实现。

title: A reflected forward-backward splitting algorithmic framework
summary: In this paper, we propose a reflected forward-backward splitting algorithic framework for finding a zero of the sum of finitely many monotone op-erators, including maximally monotone operators, cocoercive operators, and monotone and Lipschitz continuous operators. We provide a unified convergence analysis under mild conditions, eliminating the need to analyze the convergence of each algorithm individually. The heuristic strategies for matrix selections are proposed through a numerical experiment, based on which a new algorithm is derived. A further numerical experiment on the regularized saddle-point problem is then presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种反射前向-后向分裂算法框架，用于求解多个单调算子之和的零点问题，并给出了统一的收敛性分析，通过数值实验提出了矩阵选择启发式策略，在正则化鞍点问题上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法通常需要针对每种算子组合单独分析收敛性，缺乏统一的收敛分析框架，且矩阵选择策略缺乏指导。
AI.method: 提出反射前向-后向分裂算法框架，涵盖极大单调算子、余强制算子、单调Lipschitz连续算子；给出统一的收敛性分析条件；通过数值实验提出矩阵选择的启发式策略。
AI.result: 建立了统一收敛性分析，消除了逐个分析的需求；通过数值实验导出了新的算法；在正则化鞍点问题上验证了算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的反射前向-后向分裂算法框架能够统一处理多种单调算子之和的零点问题，具有收敛性保障，且在实际问题中表现良好。

title: A note on connections between the Föllmer process and the denoising diffusion probabilistic model
summary: The Föllmer process is a Brownian motion conditioned to have a pre-specified distribution at time 1. This process can be interpreted as an "augmented" time-compressed version of the reverse stochastic differential equation (SDE) for the denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM). While this fact has been indirectly used to analyze DDPM sampling errors via discretization of the reverse SDE, connections between direct discretization of the Föllmer process and the DDPM sampler have not yet been fully explored. This note aims to clarify this point while surveying relevant results from existing work. We show that discretized Föllmer processes give natural hyper-parameter settings of the DDPM sampler. Moreover, this allows us to systematically recover state-of-the-art results on DDPM sampling error bounds with slight improvements.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了Föllmer过程与去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）采样器之间的直接联系，证明离散化的Föllmer过程为DDPM采样器提供了自然的超参数设置，并能系统性地恢复并轻微改进现有最先进的DDPM采样误差界结果。
AI.motivation: 尽管Föllmer过程与DDPM反向SDE之间的关系已被间接用于分析DDPM采样误差，但Föllmer过程的直接离散化与DDPM采样器之间的关联尚未被充分探索，本文旨在澄清这一点。
AI.method: 通过将Föllmer过程解释为DDPM反向SDE的"增广"时间压缩版本，直接对Föllmer过程进行离散化，并与DDPM采样器的超参数建立对应关系。
AI.result: 离散化的Föllmer过程为DDPM采样器提供了自然的超参数设置，并系统性地恢复了现有最先进的DDPM采样误差界结果，且略有改进。
AI.conclusion: Föllmer过程的直接离散化与DDPM采样器之间存在紧密联系，这一视角有助于统一理解并优化DDPM的采样过程。

title: PropGuard: Safeguarding LLM-MAS via Propagation-Aware Exploration and Remediation
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems (LLM-MAS) have become a promising paradigm for solving complex tasks through role specialization, tool use, memory, and collaborative reasoning. However, these interactions create new security risks that malicious instructions injected through messages, tools, or memories can propagate across agents and rounds, causing system-level compromise. Existing defenses largely rely on local filtering or graph-based anomaly detection, but they often fail to trace fine-grained propagation paths or remediate contaminated states without disrupting benign collaboration. We propose PropGuard, a propagation-aware framework for safeguarding LLM-MAS. PropGuard constructs a dual-view spatio-temporal graph that combines response-centric risk estimation with full-state evidence preservation. Guided by these risk priors, a GE-GRPO trained inspector sequentially explores the full-state graph to recover compact suspicious propagation subgraphs. PropGuard then verifies harmful propagation through subgraph-aware diagnosis and applies source-guided remediation to correct upstream contamination and replay affected downstream interactions. Experiments across four communication architectures and five attack settings demonstrate that PropGuard consistently lowers attack success while maintaining high task-level defense success, achieving a favorable effectiveness--efficiency trade-off.

AI.tldr: PropGuard是一种针对LLM多智能体系统的传播感知防御框架，通过构建双视图时空图、GE-GRPO训练的检测器、子图诊断和源头修复机制，有效降低攻击成功率并保持高任务完成率。
AI.motivation: LLM多智能体系统中恶意指令可通过消息、工具或记忆跨智能体和轮次传播，导致系统级安全风险，而现有防御方法无法追踪细粒度传播路径或在修复污染状态时保持良性协作。
AI.method: 构建双视图时空图（响应中心风险估计+全状态证据保留），使用GE-GRPO训练的检查器顺序探索全状态图恢复紧凑可疑传播子图，通过子图感知诊断验证有害传播，并采用源头引导修复纠正上游污染、回放受影响的下游交互。
AI.result: 在四种通信架构和五种攻击设置下的实验表明，PropGuard能持续降低攻击成功率，同时保持高任务级防御成功率，实现了有效性-效率的良好权衡。
AI.conclusion: 传播感知的防御方法对于保障LLM多智能体系统安全性行之有效，能在不破坏良性协作的前提下实现细粒度的污染追踪与修复。

title: State Contamination in Memory-Augmented LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents increasingly rely on persistent state, including transcripts, summaries, retrieved context, and memory buffers, to support long-horizon interaction. This makes safety depend not only on individual model outputs, but also on what an agent stores and later reuses. We study a failure mode we call memory laundering: toxic or adversarial context can be compressed into memory summaries that no longer appear toxic under standard detectors, while still preserving hostile framing or conflict structure that influences future generations. Using paired counterfactual multi-agent rollouts, we show that toxic-origin memory summaries can remain below common toxicity thresholds while nevertheless increasing downstream toxicity relative to matched neutral baselines. To measure this hidden influence, we introduce the sub-threshold propagation gap (SPG), which quantifies downstream behavioral differences conditioned on memory states that a deployed monitor would classify as safe. Our experiments show that toxicity propagates through distinct state channels: raw transcript reuse drives overt downstream toxicity, while compressed memory carries hidden sub-threshold influence. We further find that mitigation depends critically on intervention placement. Sanitizing toxic state before summarization substantially reduces the hidden propagation gap, whereas cleaning only the completed summary can leave laundered influence intact. These results suggest that safety in memory-augmented agents should be treated as a state-control problem over evolving context, with sanitization applied before unsafe information is compressed into persistent memory.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM代理中一种称为"记忆洗白"的失效模式：有毒或对抗性上下文在被压缩成记忆摘要后，可逃避标准毒性检测器，但仍能影响下游生成。作者提出亚阈值传播差距(SPG)量化这一隐藏影响，并发现干预时机至关重要——在摘要化前净化有毒状态能有效减少隐藏传播，而仅清洗已完成摘要则效果有限。
AI.motivation: LLM代理依赖持久化状态（如转录、摘要、检索上下文和记忆缓冲区）支持长程交互，这使得安全性不仅取决于单次模型输出，还取决于代理存储和后续重用的内容。现有研究尚未充分关注有毒上下文在被压缩为记忆摘要后仍可逃避检测并影响后续行为的问题。
AI.method: 使用配对反事实多智能体轨迹模拟实验，对比有毒来源与中性基线的记忆摘要。引入亚阈值传播差距(SPG)指标，量化部署监控器判定为安全的记忆状态条件下，下游行为的有毒差异。通过不同状态通道（原始转录复用vs.压缩记忆）分析毒性传播路径。
AI.result: 有毒来源的记忆摘要可保持在常见毒性阈值以下，同时仍增加下游毒性。原始转录复用驱动显式下游毒性，而压缩记忆携带隐藏的亚阈值影响。在摘要化前净化有毒状态可显著减少隐藏传播差距，而仅清洗已完成摘要则无法消除洗白影响。
AI.conclusion: 记忆增强型代理的安全性应被视为一个关于演化上下文的状态控制问题，净化措施应在不安全信息被压缩进持久记忆之前实施。

title: From Optimization to Satisficing: Robust Screening under Distributional Ambiguity
summary: This study investigates a robust screening problem under distributional ambiguity, where a seller is uncertain about a buyer's true valuation distribution, knowing only that it lies near a reference distribution measured by the Wasserstein metric. Traditional robust optimization (RO) approaches prioritize maximizing worst-case revenue within predefined ambiguity sets, often yielding seller-centric outcomes and reliance on precise set specifications. We propose a robust satisficing (RS) framework aimed at attaining a specified revenue target by minimizing the worst-case shortfall across all potential distributions. Our approach offers a tractable formulation and detailed characterization of optimal mechanisms using randomized pricing strategies. We also assess the out-of-sample efficacy of a simple posted pricing mechanism, finding it particularly effective with lower targets and positively skewed valuations, where smaller valuations have high probability mass. Comparing RO with RS, we find that RS consistently enhances buyer surplus when the reference distribution has an increasing hazard rate and increases out-of-sample seller revenue with positively skewed true valuations. Our analysis indicates that a target-driven RS framework enhances buyer surplus and fairness by offering more opportunities to lower-valuation buyers, potentially boosting overall revenue in scenarios with demand skewed toward these valuations. This approach offers a practical and viable modeling alternative to conventional RO methods, effectively overcoming the challenges of ambiguity set calibration while ensuring broader equitable access for diverse buyers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在分布模糊性下的稳健满意（Robust Satisficing, RS）框架，旨在通过最小化最坏情况下的收益短缺来实现指定收益目标，采用随机定价策略，并证明其在改善买方剩余、公平性以及在某些场景下提升卖方收益方面优于传统稳健优化方法。
AI.motivation: 传统稳健优化方法优先最大化最坏情况下的收益，导致卖方中心化结果，且严重依赖精确的模糊集设定。本研究旨在克服这些局限，提出一种目标驱动的稳健满意框架。
AI.method: 提出稳健满意（RS）框架，以Wasserstein距离衡量参考分布附近的分布模糊性，通过最小化最坏情况下的收益短缺来实现指定收益目标，采用随机定价策略，并与简单标价机制进行比较。
AI.result: 1) RS框架具有可处理的公式化形式；2) 当参考分布具有递增风险率时，RS持续改善买方剩余；3) 当真实估值呈正偏态时，RS提升卖方样本外收益；4) 简单标价机制在低目标和正偏态估值下效果良好。
AI.conclusion: 目标驱动的RS框架通过为低估值买家提供更多机会来增强买方剩余和公平性，在需求偏向低估值时可能提升整体收益，是传统稳健优化的可行替代方案。

title: Wasserstein bounds for denoising diffusion probabilistic models via the Föllmer process
summary: This paper studies sampling error bounds for denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) in the 2-Wasserstein distance. Our contributions are threefold. (i) Under general Lipschitz-type conditions on the score function and for a broad class of variance schedules, including the cosine schedule, we establish sharp upper bounds that are optimal in both the dimension and the number of steps, and recover several sharp error bounds previously obtained in the literature. (ii) We prove that the same Lipschitz-type conditions, which encompass those commonly imposed on the (learned) score, imply a logarithmic Sobolev inequality and hence a quadratic transportation cost inequality for the DDPM. As a consequence, in settings covered by existing work, an optimal Wasserstein bound, up to a logarithmic factor, follows from the recently obtained sharp error bound in the Kullback-Leibler divergence under geometric-type variance schedules. (iii) We show that for general log-concave target distributions, the optimal Wasserstein error bound remains attainable even without a quadratic transportation cost inequality for the target. Our analysis is based on viewing the DDPM sampler as a discretization of the Föllmer process rather than the conventional reverse Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了去噪扩散概率模型在2-Wasserstein距离下的采样误差界。通过将DDPM采样器视为Föllmer过程的离散化而非传统的反向Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程，在一般Lipschitz型条件下建立了维度与步数均最优的误差上界，并揭示了与KL散度误差界的联系。
AI.motivation: 为DDPM在2-Wasserstein距离下建立严格且最优的采样误差界，统一并扩展现有理论结果，同时揭示不同误差度量（Wasserstein距离与KL散度）之间的联系。
AI.method: 将DDPM采样器重新解释为Föllmer过程的离散化，利用对数Sobolev不等式与二次运输成本不等式建立理论桥梁，分析一般Lipschitz型条件及对数凹分布下的误差界。
AI.result: (i) 在一般Lipschitz条件下建立了维度与步数均最优的Wasserstein误差上界；(ii) 证明了相同条件蕴含对数Sobolev不等式，从而可从KL散度最优界导出Wasserstein最优界；(iii) 对于一般对数凹目标分布，无需目标满足二次运输成本不等式仍可达到最优Wasserstein误差界。
AI.conclusion: 通过Föllmer过程视角统一了DDPM的采样误差理论，为理解和改进扩散模型采样提供了更坚实的基础。

title: HPC-LLM: Practical Domain Adaptation and Retrieval-Augmented Generation for HPC Support
summary: Modern scientific research increasingly depends on High-Performance Computing (HPC) infrastructures, yet many researchers face significant operational barriers when interacting with cluster environments, job schedulers, GPU resources, and parallel computing frameworks. General-purpose large language models (LLMs) provide useful coding assistance but often lack the domain-specific operational knowledge required for reliable HPC support. This paper presents HPC-LLM, a retrieval augmented and domain-adapted assistant designed to support common HPC workflows including Slurm scheduling, MPI execution, GPU utilization, filesystem management, and cluster troubleshooting. The proposed framework integrates automated documentation ingestion, dense retrieval, lightweight domain adaptation using QLoRA, and local inference within a modular orchestration pipeline. To support domain adaptation, we construct an HPC-oriented corpus from publicly available university HPC documentation, curated operational examples, and synthetic instruction-answer pairs generated from retrieved HPC content. The resulting dataset contains approximately 9,000 to 24,000 HPC-focused training examples spanning job scheduling, GPU computing, distributed training, storage systems, and cluster administration topics. We fine-tune Llama 3.1 8B using QLoRA and evaluate the resulting model against several open weight baselines under retrieval-augmented settings on JetStream2 infrastructure. Experimental results indicate that the adapted 8B model achieves performance comparable to substantially larger general-purpose models while operating under significantly lower GPU memory requirements and inference latency. In particular, the adapted model approaches the performance of Qwen 2.5 14B while requiring substantially fewer computational resources.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HPC-LLM，一个面向高性能计算（HPC）工作流的检索增强与领域自适应助手，通过QLoRA微调Llama 3.1 8B模型，在显著降低GPU资源需求的情况下，性能接近Qwen 2.5 14B等更大模型。
AI.motivation: 研究人员在使用HPC基础设施（集群环境、任务调度器、GPU资源、并行计算框架）时面临操作障碍，而通用LLM缺乏HPC领域特定的运维知识，无法可靠支持HPC工作流。
AI.method: 构建HPC语料库（9000-24000条训练样本），集成自动化文档摄取、稠密检索、QLoRA轻量领域适配、本地推理的模块化编排流水线，对Llama 3.1 8B进行微调，并在JetStream2基础设施上结合检索增强设置进行评估。
AI.result: 微调后的8B模型在GPU内存需求和推理延迟显著更低的条件下，性能与Qwen 2.5 14B等较大规模通用模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域适配和检索增强，较小规模的LLM可以在HPC支持任务上达到与大模型竞争的性能，同时显著降低计算资源开销。

title: NeuroMAS: Multi-Agent Systems as Neural Networks with Joint Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multi-agent language systems are often built as hand-designed workflows, where agents are assigned semantic roles and communication protocols are specified in advance. We propose NeuroMAS, a method that first treats a multi-agent language system as a trainable and scalable neural-network-like architecture with LLM agents as nodes and intermediate textual signals as edges. In NeuroMAS, agent nodes are role-free but structure-aware: the topology only determines how information can flow in general, while reinforcement learning training determines how nodes communicate, specialize, and coordinate. This formulation shifts multi-agent design from workflow engineering toward architecture design, where depth, width, connectivity, and growth protocol become scalable sources of capability. Further, we provide a theoretical perspective showing why such modular textual computation is more parameter-efficient when tasks admit hierarchical decompositions. Experiments show that NeuroMAS improves significantly over both inference-time and trained multi-agent baselines. We further find that organizational scaling is path-dependent: larger systems can be challenging to train from scratch, but become feasible when grown progressively from smaller trained systems. These results suggest that learned neural multi-agent systems are a promising scaling axis for LLMs.

AI.tldr: NeuroMAS将多智能体语言系统构建为可训练、可扩展的类神经网络架构，其中LLM智能体作为节点，中间文本信号作为边。通过强化学习训练，智能体自主实现通信、专业化和协调，无需预设角色和协议。实验表明该方法显著优于基线，并发现组织规模扩展存在路径依赖性——从小系统渐进增长比从头训练大系统更有效。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体语言系统通常依赖手工设计的流程，智能体角色和通信协议需预先指定，缺乏可训练性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出NeuroMAS，将多智能体系统类比为神经网络架构：LLM智能体作为无角色但有结构感知的节点，拓扑决定信息流方向，强化学习训练节点间的通信、专业化和协调方式。
AI.result: NeuroMAS在推理时和训练后的多智能体基线上均取得显著提升；组织规模扩展存在路径依赖性，从小系统渐进增长训练比从头训练大系统更可行。
AI.conclusion: 学习型神经多智能体系统是LLM有前景的扩展维度，将多智能体设计从流程工程转向架构设计，深度、宽度、连通性和增长协议成为可扩展的能力来源。

title: Data-Driven Co-Design of Event-Triggered and Sparse Control for Resource-Aware Networked Control Systems
summary: This paper investigates the data-driven co-design of event-triggered control (ETC) and sparse control (SC) for networked control systems (NCSs) with unknown linear dynamics. While ETC and SC have been widely studied as effective strategies to reduce communication and computation burdens on different resource dimensions, existing works typically address them separately and rely on accurate system models. Furthermore, their joint design in a data-driven setting, especially in the presence of measurement and process noise, remains largely unexplored. To bridge these gaps, we propose a unified data-driven framework that simultaneously accounts for bounded state and input measurement noise as well as process noise, and enables the co-design of ETC mechanisms and sparse controllers directly from data. Within this framework, we characterize stability, uniformly ultimately bounded (UUB) behavior, and $H_\infty$ performance under different noise conditions. For each problem, given the event-triggered parameters, we provide a sufficient condition for the existence of a feasible controller and develop an iterative algorithm to solve the associated nonconvex optimization problem. Numerical examples are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有未知线性动力学的网络化控制系统，提出了一种数据驱动的事件触发控制与稀疏控制协同设计框架，该框架能同时处理有界状态/输入测量噪声和过程噪声，在不同噪声条件下刻画了系统的UUB稳定性和H∞性能，并通过数值算例验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有工作通常分别处理事件触发控制和稀疏控制，且依赖精确系统模型；在数据驱动场景下，特别是存在测量噪声和过程噪声时，二者的联合设计尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出统一的数据驱动框架，同时考虑有界状态/输入测量噪声和过程噪声，实现ETC机制与稀疏控制器的协同设计；针对每个问题，在给定事件触发参数下给出可行控制器存在的充分条件，并开发迭代算法求解非凸优化问题。
AI.result: 在不同噪声条件下表征了系统的UUB稳定性和H∞性能；数值算例验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的数据驱动协同设计框架有效桥接了ETC与SC在未知动力学和噪声环境下的联合设计空白，为网络化控制系统的资源优化提供了新途径。

title: Canonical Regularisation of Wide Feature-Learning Neural Networks
summary: Wide neural networks in the feature-learning regime drive modern deep learning, and yet they remain far less studied than their kernel-regime counterparts. We consider a critical yet under-explored difference between these two regimes: the regulariser and prior implied by gradient flow training. This canonical regularisation property is well-studied in kernel regime networks -- of all the infinite global minima, gradient flow selects exactly the vanishing ridge solution -- and underpins the celebrated NN-GP correspondence, precisely allowing the modelling of noise during training. However, we prove ridge regularisation biases gradient flow in feature-learning regime networks, even in the infinitesimal limit of vanishing regularisation. Over training, ridge distorts the inductive bias of the network, with a particular damage done to pretrained networks where the implicit prior is informative. We resolve this by axiomatising the canonical regulariser as a regime-agnostic function-space energy and lift, which uniquely identifies ridge in the kernel regime, and crucially generalises to the feature-learning regime. By studying the Riemannian geometry of feature-learning networks, we derive geodesic ridge from our framework, generalising ridge to the feature-learning regime. Correspondingly, we prove the canonical function-space prior is a Riemannian Gibbs Process, generalising the more familiar Gaussian Process. As a practical contribution, we propose arc ridge as a minimax-robust, scalable surrogate to geodesic ridge, revealing a deep relationship between early stopping and canonical regularisation across learning regimes. Finally, we demonstrate the consequences of our theory empirically on both image processing and NLP transfer-learning problems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了特征学习（feature-learning）机制下宽神经网络的规范正则化与核机制网络的差异，证明岭正则化在特征学习机制中会扭曲网络的归纳偏置，并通过提出测地岭（geodesic ridge）和弧岭（arc ridge）作为泛化解决方案，揭示了不同学习机制下规范函数空间先验的深层联系。
AI.motivation: 特征学习机制下的宽神经网络在现代深度学习中占据主导地位，但其规范正则化性质远不如核机制网络研究得透彻。核机制网络中梯度流训练隐含岭回归正则化（ridge regularisation），支持NN-GP对应和噪声建模；然而特征学习机制中岭正则化会扭曲网络归纳偏置，尤其损害预训练网络的先验信息，因此需要重新审视并建立适用于该机制的规范正则化框架。
AI.method: 本文首先证明岭正则化在特征学习机制中的偏置扭曲效应，然后通过公理化方式定义与学习机制无关的函数空间能量，进而识别核机制中的岭正则化并将其推广到特征学习机制。通过研究特征学习网络的黎曼几何，推导出测地岭（geodesic ridge）；并提出弧岭（arc ridge）作为其可扩展的替代方案，揭示早停（early stopping）与规范正则化之间的深层关系。
AI.result: 证明特征学习机制中岭正则化会扭曲网络的归纳偏置；提出测地岭作为岭正则化在特征学习机制中的泛化形式；推导出规范函数空间先验为黎曼吉布斯过程（Riemannian Gibbs Process），推广了高斯过程；提出弧岭作为可扩展的替代方案；在图像处理和NLP迁移学习任务上验证了理论的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 特征学习机制下的规范正则化与核机制有本质不同，岭正则化在该机制下不再适用；所提出的测地岭和弧岭框架提供了正确的泛化，并建立了早停与规范正则化之间的跨学习机制联系。

title: Flow-Direct: Feedback-Efficient and Reusable Guidance for Flow Models via Non-Parametric Guidance Field
summary: Training-free guidance enables pre-trained diffusion and flow models to optimize application-specific objectives using feedback from external black-box reward functions. However, existing methods are feedback-inefficient because reward feedback is used only transiently to inform a localized gradient approximation or a discrete search decision, and is subsequently discarded. To address this limitation, we propose Flow-Direct, a framework that guides the generation process via a persistent guidance field.
