Theoretically, this guidance field is analytically derived from the log-density ratio between the base and reward-weighted target distributions; it transports the pre-trained distribution to the target distribution. In practice, the field is implemented as a non-parametric estimator constructed from all accumulated reward-evaluated samples. As more samples are collected during optimization, this empirical guidance field becomes increasingly accurate. This persistent formulation yields two major advantages. First, Flow-Direct is highly feedback-efficient: because every evaluated sample is used to refine the global guidance field, no reward information is wasted. Second, the framework is naturally reusable: once optimization is complete, the collected dataset defines a reusable guidance field for generating novel target samples without additional reward evaluations, and distinct guidance fields can be combined to generate samples that simultaneously satisfy multiple objectives.

AI.tldr: Flow-Direct通过持久化引导场（persistent guidance field）实现高效的奖励反馈利用，该场基于非参数估计器从所有历史奖励评估样本构建，在无需额外奖励查询即可生成新样本的同时，可组合多个目标引导场实现多目标优化。
AI.motivation: 现有免训练引导方法仅在局部梯度近似或离散搜索决策中使用奖励反馈，随后丢弃，导致反馈效率低下。
AI.method: 提出Flow-Direct框架，通过解析推导基础分布与奖励加权目标分布之间的对数密度比，构建持久化引导场；实践中采用非参数估计器从所有累积的奖励评估样本中实现该引导场。
AI.result: 1) 高反馈效率：每个评估样本都用于优化全局引导场，不浪费任何奖励信息；2) 自然可复用：优化完成后，收集的数据集定义可重用的引导场，无需额外奖励评估即可生成新目标样本；不同引导场可组合生成满足多个目标的同时样本。
AI.conclusion: Flow-Direct通过持久化而非瞬态使用奖励反馈，显著提升了反馈效率，并实现了引导场的可复用性与多目标组合能力。

title: Multi-Paradigm Agent Interaction in Practice:A Systematic Analysis of Generator-Evaluator, ReAct Loop,and Adversarial Evaluation in the buddyMe Framework
summary: The rapid evolution of Large Language Model (LLM) agents has produced diverse interaction paradigms, yet few production systems integrate multiple paradigms within a unified architecture. This paper presents a systematic analysis of three principal agent interaction paradigms, including Multi-Agent Orchestration (Generator-Evaluator), ReAct Tool-Use Loops, and Memory-Augmented Interaction, as implemented in buddyMe, an open-source multi-model agent programming framework. We formalize a five-stage processing pipeline: Requirement Pre-Review -> Task Decomposition -> ReAct Execution -> Real-Execution Verification -> Adversarial Evaluation Discussion, and establish a six-dimensional evaluation schema with weighted scoring. Through four empirical case studies drawn from real-world deployment logs covering museum guide generation, scheduled weather tasks, and comprehensive tour planning, we draw three key conclusions. First, Generator-Evaluator pre-review detects requirement omissions in 20 percent of complex tasks, with 80 percent tasks passing initial inspection. Second, the ReAct loop ensures stable subtask execution but leads to around 30 percent redundant tool invocations. Third, adversarial Evaluator-Defender discussions reach consensus within 2-3 rounds for nearly 70 percent of scenarios, functioning mainly for content refinement rather than logical reversal. We additionally provide three Mermaid-based architectural diagrams and conduct cross-paradigm comparisons with CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph, MemGPT and A-Mem across six system dimensions. The research outcomes offer practical design guidelines for constructing stable and reliable multi-paradigm agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了三种主体交互范式（多智能体编排、ReAct工具循环、记忆增强交互）在buddyMe框架中的实现，通过四个真实案例研究得出关键结论：生成器-评估器预审可检测20%复杂任务中的需求遗漏，ReAct循环存在约30%冗余工具调用，对抗性讨论在70%场景中2-3轮达成共识，并提供了跨范式比较和设计指南。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体交互范式多样，但少有生产系统在统一架构中集成多种范式，缺乏对不同范式在真实部署中的系统比较和设计指导。
AI.method: 基于buddyMe开源框架实现三种主体交互范式，形式化五阶段处理流水线（需求预审→任务分解→ReAct执行→实执验证→对抗评估讨论），建立六维加权评估体系，通过四个真实部署日志案例研究进行实证分析。
AI.result: 生成器-评估器预审在20%复杂任务中检测到需求遗漏，80%任务通过初始审查；ReAct循环确保稳定子任务执行但导致约30%冗余工具调用；对抗性评估者-防御者讨论在近70%场景中2-3轮达成共识，主要用于内容精炼而非逻辑反转。
AI.conclusion: 研究成果为构建稳定可靠的多范式智能体系统提供了实用设计指南，并给出了与CrewAI、AutoGen等五种框架的跨范式系统维度比较。

title: Convergence Analysis via ODE Approach for Convex Optimization with Linear Equality Constraints
summary: This paper studies the continuous-time dynamics of primal-dual algorithms for linearly constrained convex optimization problems and provides a quantitative convergence analysis using the Lyapunov functions. With the growing prevalence of sparse and low-rank models, large-scale problems involving nonsmooth objective functions have become increasingly important. Our approach addresses nonsmooth and nonstrong convex objective functions, which is particularly effective in extending classical accelerated methods to broader large-scale optimization problems. Building upon the ordinary differential equation (ODE) approach inspired by the recent work on Nesterov's acceleration methods, we extend the analysis to an ODE associated with an optimization problem with linear equality constraints. Moreover, by imposing a geometric condition analogous to the \textit{Kurdyka--\textŁojasiewicz (K\textŁ) property} on the objective function, we derive convergence rates that depend explicitly on the local geometry and establish the $\mathcal{O}(1/t^2)$ local convergence rate. For the algorithmic construction, a numerical scheme is derived by discretizing the proposed ODE. Furthermore, we investigate the influence of algorithm parameters and provide insights into their optimal selection. Finally, preliminary numerical experiments are provided to validate the consistency with the theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性约束凸优化问题原对偶算法的连续时间动力学，利用李雅普诺夫函数进行定量收敛性分析。针对非光滑非强凸目标函数，基于ODE方法（受Nesterov加速方法启发）扩展至线性等式约束问题。通过施加Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz几何条件，推导出依赖于局部几何的收敛速率，并建立了O(1/t²)的局部收敛率。通过离散化ODE得到数值格式，探讨了算法参数选择，数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 随着稀疏和低秩模型的普及，大规模非光滑目标函数的优化问题日益重要。经典加速方法在扩展至更广泛的大规模优化问题时面临挑战，需要新的理论框架和分析工具。
AI.method: 基于连续时间ODE方法，将Nesterov加速方法扩展到线性等式约束的优化问题；利用李雅普诺夫函数进行定量分析；施加Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz几何条件推导显式收敛速率；通过离散化ODE构造数值算法。
AI.result: 建立了依赖于局部几何性质的收敛速率，证明了O(1/t²)的局部收敛率；通过数值实验验证了理论结果与算法参数选择原则的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ODE框架有效扩展了加速方法至线性约束非光滑凸优化问题，KŁ条件为收敛性分析提供了几何洞察，为大规模优化算法设计提供了理论指导。

title: Forward-Learned Discrete Diffusion: Learning how to noise to denoise faster
summary: Discrete diffusion models are a powerful class of generative models with strong performance across many domains. For efficiency, however, discrete diffusion typically parameterizes the generative (reverse) process with factorized distributions, which makes it difficult for the model to learn the target process in a small number of steps and necessitates a long, computationally expensive sampling procedure. To reduce the gap between the target and model distributions and enable few-step generation, we propose Forward-Learned Discrete Diffusion (FLDD), which introduces discrete diffusion with a learnable forward (noising) process. Rather than fixing a Markovian forward chain, we adopt a non-Markovian formulation with learnable marginal and posterior distributions. This allows the generative process to remain factorized while matching the target defined by the noising process. We train all parameters end-to-end under the standard variational objective. Experiments on various benchmarks show that, for a given number of sampling steps, our approach produces a higher quality samples than conventional discrete diffusion models using the same reverse parameterization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出前向学习离散扩散模型(FLDD)，通过引入可学习的前向(加噪)过程，使用非马尔可夫公式化与可学习的边缘分布和后验分布，使得生成过程在保持因子化分解的同时匹配目标分布，从而实现少步生成并提升样本质量。
AI.motivation: 传统离散扩散模型使用因子化分解的参数化方式，导致生成(逆向)过程难以在少量步骤内学习目标分布，需要冗长且计算昂贵的采样过程。为缩小目标分布与模型分布之间的差距并实现少步生成，作者提出了FLDD。
AI.method: FLDD引入可学习的前向(加噪)过程，采用非马尔可夫公式化，使用可学习的边缘分布和后验分布替代固定的马尔可夫前向链。生成过程保持因子化分解，同时匹配由加噪过程定义的目标分布。所有参数通过标准变分目标进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，在相同采样步数下，FLDD生成的样本质量优于使用相同逆向参数化的传统离散扩散模型。
AI.conclusion: 可学习的前向过程能够有效缩小目标分布与模型分布之间的差距，使离散扩散模型在更少采样步数下生成更高质量的样本。

title: Geometric Asymmetry in MoE Specialization: Functional Decorrelation and Representational Overlap
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures achieve scalable capacity through sparse routing, yet the geometric structure of expert specialization remains poorly understood. We introduce a unified Jacobian-PCA-Grassmann framework for analyzing MoE layers in both function space and representation space. Across pretrained MoE Transformers (Mistral, Qwen), we find a consistent structural asymmetry: experts exhibit strong functional decorrelation (consistently low, near-zero cross-expert Jacobian alignment) while their routed representations occupy distinct but partially overlapping subspaces. This indicates that functional decorrelation and representation overlap coexist rather than coincide in MoE specialization. Controlled routing experiments further indicate that routing sparsity appears to be a key factor shaping this geometry: top-k routing induces sharper functional separation and larger subspace divergence, whereas fully soft routing yields more entangled expert structure. Together, these results suggest a geometric interpretation in which MoE layers may be viewed as implementing locally decorrelated operators over overlapping submanifolds on a shared representation manifold, and provide a general diagnostic framework for studying conditional computation in modern Transformer architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Jacobian-PCA-Grassmann统一框架分析MoE架构，发现专家在功能上解相关（低Jacobian对齐）而表示子空间部分重叠，路由稀疏性是塑造这种几何结构的关键因素：top-k路由导致功能分离更尖锐、子空间发散更大，而soft路由产生更纠缠的专家结构。MoE层可视为在共享表示流形的重叠子流形上实现局部解相关算子。
AI.motivation: MoE架构通过稀疏路由实现可扩展容量，但专家专业化的几何结构尚不明确，缺乏统一的分析框架来理解专家在函数空间和表示空间中的专业化模式。
AI.method: 提出统一的Jacobian-PCA-Grassmann框架，在函数空间（Jacobian对齐）和表示空间（PCA子空间分析）两个维度分析MoE层；在Mistral、Qwen等预训练MoE Transformer上进行实验，并设计控制实验对比top-k路由与完全soft路由对专家几何结构的影响。
AI.result: 专家间存在一致的结构不对称性：功能上强解相关（跨专家Jacobian对齐接近零），但路由表示占据不同且部分重叠的子空间；功能解相关与表示重叠共存而非重合；路由稀疏性塑造几何结构——top-k路由导致更尖锐的功能分离和更大的子空间发散，soft路由产生更纠缠的结构。
AI.conclusion: MoE层可视为在共享表示流形的重叠子流形上实现局部解相关算子；提供了研究现代Transformer中条件计算的通用诊断框架。

title: Voices in the Loop: Mapping Participatory AI
comment: Accepted to The 2026 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '26), June 25--28, 2026, Montreal, QC, Canada
summary: Participatory approaches to artificial intelligence are increasingly documented across public, civic, and humanitarian settings, but evidence about how participation is organized remains fragmented. This paper reports on the construction of an open repository and interactive atlas of participatory AI initiatives, using records harmonized from Maga~na and Shilton's Trustworthy AI corpus, and additional audited cases from research and practice. We contribute three elements. First, we specify a reproducible protocol for discovery, vetting, harmonization, geocoding, provenance tracking, and release-based publication of participatory AI records. Second, we report corpus-level patterns in geography, participation tiers, lifecycle loci, organizational form, verification status, and remaining documentation gaps. Documented initiatives remain concentrated in a small number of countries, while participation is most often coded at problem formulation, evaluation, and governance rather than model development or training. Third, we show how the atlas operationalizes a design and governance framework for participatory-by-default AI infrastructures through versioned releases, record-linked issue and annotation channels, schema feedback workflows, and redaction or restricted-disclosure requests. The atlas is intended to support comparative research, policy learning, and community scrutiny through a living inventory that can be updated, contested, and reused.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个参与式AI倡议的开放存储库与交互式地图集，采用可复现的协议进行记录发现、验证、协调、地理编码、溯源追踪和发布。研究发现参与式AI倡议在地理分布上高度集中，参与主要发生在问题制定、评估和治理阶段，而非模型开发或训练。该地图集通过版本化发布、记录链接的问题与注释渠道、模式反馈工作流以及删除或限制披露请求，实现了“参与式默认”AI基础设施的设计与治理框架。
AI.motivation: 参与式AI方法在公共、公民和人道主义环境中日益增多，但关于参与如何组织的证据仍然零散，缺乏系统化的比较研究和可复现的分析框架。
AI.method: 基于Magaña和Shilton的Trustworthy AI语料库及额外审计案例，构建了一个开放存储库和交互式地图集，制定了可复现的发现、验证、协调、地理编码、溯源追踪和发布协议，并对语料库进行地理分布、参与层级、生命周期位置、组织形式、验证状态和文档空白等模式分析。
AI.result: 已记录的参与式AI倡议高度集中在少数国家；参与最常发生在问题制定、评估和治理阶段，而非模型开发或训练；地图集通过版本化发布、记录链接的问题与注释渠道、模式反馈工作流及删除或限制披露请求来运营化参与式默认AI基础设施。
AI.conclusion: 该地图集旨在通过一个可更新、可质疑和可复用的动态清单，支持比较研究、政策学习和社区审查。

title: On the convergence of doubly stochastic Primal-Dual Hybrid Gradient Method
summary: We study a block-structured class of convex-concave saddle-point problems in which both the primal and dual variables admit natural separable decompositions. Motivated by large-scale applications where a full update on either side can be computationally expensive, we propose a doubly stochastic primal--dual hybrid gradient method (DSPDHG) that performs randomized block updates on both primal and dual variables.The method extends classical PDHG and stochastic PDHG (SPDHG) schemes in a unified manner:it reduces to deterministic PDHG when all blocks are selected and to one-sided stochastic variants when only one side is randomized. For the general convex setting, we establish an $\mathcal{O}(1/K)$ ergodic convergence rate for the expected restricted primal--dual gap under suitable blockwise step-size conditions. We further analyze a restarted variant of DSPDHG under a quadratic growth condition in terms of the smoothed primal-dual gap. Under this regularity assumption, we prove linear convergence of the restarted outer iterates. Numerical evidence is provided to show that restarted DSPDHG with standard step sizes demonstrates competitive practical performance compared with PDHG, SPDHG, and their restarted variants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双随机原始-对偶混合梯度方法（DSPDHG），用于解决块结构凸-凹鞍点问题，在原始和对偶变量上同时进行随机块更新，并在一般凸设置下建立了O(1/K)的遍历收敛率，同时在二次增长条件下证明了重启变体的线性收敛性。
AI.motivation: 大规模应用中，对原始侧或对偶侧进行完整更新计算代价高昂，现有方法（如PDHG和SPDHG）仅在一侧进行随机化，缺乏同时在两侧进行随机块更新的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出双随机原始-对偶混合梯度方法（DSPDHG），在原始和对偶变量上同时执行随机块更新；该方法统一了确定性PDHG（选择所有块时）和单侧随机变体（仅一侧随机化时）；进一步分析了在二次增长条件下的重启变体。
AI.result: 在一般凸设置下，建立了期望受限原始-对偶间隙的O(1/K)遍历收敛率；在二次增长条件下，证明了重启外迭代的线性收敛性；数值实验表明重启DSPDHG在实用性能上与PDHG、SPDHG及其重启变体相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: DSPDHG提供了一个统一的框架，通过双侧随机块更新有效降低大规模凸-凹鞍点问题的计算成本，且在适当的正则性条件下可实现线性收敛。

title: Geometric Dictionary Learning of Dynamical Systems with Optimal Transport
summary: Learning dynamical systems through operator-theoretic representations provides a powerful framework for analyzing complex dynamics, as spectral quantities such as eigenvalues and invariant structures encode characteristic time scales and long-term behavior. However, dynamical operators are typically estimated independently for each system, preventing the discovery of shared structure across related dynamics. To address this limitation, we posit that related dynamical systems lie near a low-dimensional manifold in spectral operator space. Based on this hypothesis, we introduce DOODL (Dynamical OperatOr Dictionary Learning), a framework that learns a dictionary of characteristic spectral dynamics whose combinations approximate this manifold and yield compact, interpretable embeddings of individual systems. Beyond representation learning, DOODL enables fast and interpretable operator estimation from short and partially observed trajectories by constraining the estimation to the learned operator manifold. Experiments on metastable Langevin dynamics and turbulent plasma simulations demonstrate that DOODL scales to highly complex multiscale regimes while capturing characteristic spectral structure governing the dynamics rather than merely fitting trajectories, achieving errors one to two orders of magnitude lower than independent operator estimation methods in challenging low-data regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOODL框架，通过学习动力学算子字典来捕捉相关动力学系统间的共享谱结构，实现低数据量下的快速、可解释算子估计，在亚稳态朗之万动力学和湍流等离子体模拟中误差较独立估计方法降低一到两个数量级。
AI.motivation: 传统动力学算子估计方法独立处理每个系统，无法发现相关动力学间的共享结构，导致在短轨迹或部分观测数据场景下估计精度不足。
AI.method: 提出DOODL框架，假设相关动力学系统在谱算子空间中位于低维流形附近，通过学习特征谱动力学字典来逼近该流形，得到紧凑的可解释嵌入；将算子估计约束在学习到的流形上，实现从短且部分观测轨迹中进行快速可解释估计。
AI.result: 在亚稳态朗之万动力学和湍流等离子体模拟中，DOODL在低数据量场景下误差比独立算子估计方法低一到两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: DOODL能够扩展到高度复杂的多尺度动力学系统，捕捉控制动力学的特征谱结构而不仅仅是拟合轨迹，验证了利用谱算子空间流形假设进行共享动力学表示学习的有效性。

title: Federated Nested Learning: Collaborative Training of Self-Referential Memories for Test-Time Adaptation
summary: We rethink Federated Learning (FL) from a nested learning perspective, framing the core challenge as how to collaboratively learn optimization rules, not just static models, to tackle Non-IID client data. To address this, we propose Federated Nested Learning (FedNL), a novel framework that reformulates FL as a three-level nested optimization system. FedNL embeds Titans-based linear attention into FL, enabling clients to perform lightweight, zero-shot test-time adaptation by treating a delta rule as an online gradient step. Experiments on Non-IID MMLU and long-context benchmarks show that FedNL achieves competitive performance in short-context reasoning, enhances the performance of long-context retrieval and streaming Cross-Entropy, and maintains constant inference memory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出联邦嵌套学习（FedNL），将联邦学习重构为三层嵌套优化系统，通过引入Titans线性注意力机制实现零样本测试时自适应，在非独立同分布数据上取得竞争性表现，同时保持恒定推理内存。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习仅聚焦于协同训练静态模型，无法有效应对客户端数据的非独立同分布（Non-IID）问题。作者从嵌套学习视角重新审视FL，认为核心挑战在于如何协作学习优化规则而非仅是静态模型。
AI.method: 提出FedNL框架，将FL重构为三层嵌套优化系统；在FL中嵌入基于Titans的线性注意力机制；利用delta规则作为在线梯度步，使客户端能够进行轻量级零样本测试时自适应。
AI.result: 在Non-IID MMLU和长上下文基准测试中，FedNL在短上下文推理上取得竞争性表现；提升了长上下文检索和流式交叉熵的性能；保持恒定推理内存。
AI.conclusion: FedNL通过嵌套学习和线性注意力机制有效解决了FL中的Non-IID挑战，在多种场景下展现性能优势，且具有内存效率优势。

title: Sketch Then Paint: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Diffusion Multi-Modal Large Language Models
summary: Diffusion Multi-Modal Large Language Models (dMLLMs) are powerful for image generation, but optimizing them through reinforcement learning (RL) remains a major challenge. One primary difficulty is that a single image can be generated through many different unmasking sequences, which makes calculating importance ratios often intractable. Additionally, existing methods tend to ignore the hierarchical generation process of dMLLMs, where early tokens define the global layout and later tokens focus on local details. By assigning uniform rewards to all tokens, these current methods fail to reflect the actual contribution of each token to the final image. To address these issues, we propose Hierarchical Token GRPO (HT-GRPO), which integrates this hierarchy directly into the policy optimization process. Our approach features a Sketch-Then-Paint training scheme that organizes updates into three distinct stages: global, structure, and refinement. We also use a prompt-conditioned estimator to calculate importance ratios starting from a fully masked state. Furthermore, we introduce a Hierarchical Credit Assignment mechanism that prioritizes key structural tokens to ensure accurate reward propagation. Experiments using two popular dMLLM backbones, MMaDA and Lumina-DiMOO, demonstrate that HT-GRPO achieves substantial gains on the GenEval and DPG benchmarks. Evaluations across six additional metrics confirm significant improvements in image quality, aesthetics, and human preference.

AI.tldr: 针对扩散多模态大模型(dMLLM)中强化学习优化面临的去噪路径多样性和忽略层次生成过程的问题，提出Hierarchical Token GRPO (HT-GRPO)方法，通过"先草图后绘制"三阶段训练方案、基于提示条件的估计器和层次化信用分配机制，显著提升图像质量和人类偏好。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在优化dMLLM时面临两大挑战：(1) 单张图像可通过多种去噪序列生成，导致重要性比率难以计算；(2) 忽略dMLLM的层次生成过程（早期token定义全局布局，后期token关注局部细节），对所有token分配统一奖励，未能反映每个token对最终图像的实际贡献。
AI.method: 提出HT-GRPO，包含三个核心组件：(1) Sketch-Then-Paint训练方案，将更新组织为全局(global)、结构(structure)、细化(refinement)三个阶段；(2) 使用基于提示条件的估计器从完全掩码状态计算重要性比率；(3) 层次化信用分配(Hierarchical Credit Assignment)机制，优先处理关键结构token以确保准确的奖励传播。
AI.result: 在MMaDA和Lumina-DiMOO两种主流dMLLM骨干网络上，HT-GRPO在GenEval和DPG基准测试上取得显著提升；在六个额外指标的评估中，图像质量、美学质量和人类偏好均有大幅改善。
AI.conclusion: HT-GRPO通过将层次生成过程显式融入策略优化，有效解决了dMLLM的RL优化难题，在多个评估维度上验证了其有效性。

title: A Differentiable Interior-Point Method in Single Precision
comment: The source code is available at https://github.com/qpax-solver/qpax
summary: Primal-dual interior-point methods solve constrained convex optimization problems to tight tolerances with speed and robustness. Their solutions are also efficiently differentiable with respect to the problem data through the implicit function theorem. However, the standard treatment of primal-dual complementarity makes the underlying linear systems increasingly ill-conditioned near the solution. While this ill-conditioning is often benign in double precision, it can be catastrophic in single precision, preventing interior-point methods from fully exploiting the accelerated hardware that underpins modern machine learning. This paper introduces a differentiable interior-point method designed for low-precision arithmetic. By using an alternative complementarity representation, we ensure that the underlying linear systems remain spectrally bounded -- even near the solution -- a property that is essential for computing accurate gradients and avoiding arithmetic exceptions. As a result, our method enables interior-point solvers to reliably solve and differentiate optimization problems in single precision that were previously confined to double precision. We demonstrate the approach through an ablation study against the standard interior-point formulation and applications in bilevel and end-to-end learning settings where differentiating through constrained optimization is essential. The source code is available at https://github.com/qpax-solver/qpax.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于低精度算术的可微内点法，通过替代互补性表示确保线性系统在解附近保持谱有界，使单精度下可求解和微分约束优化问题，并在双层和端到端学习任务中验证效果。
AI.motivation: 标准内点法在解附近线性系统病态严重，虽在双精度下尚可，但在单精度（机器学习加速硬件常用）下会导致数值灾难，阻碍利用低精度硬件加速。需要一种在低精度下仍能稳定求解且可微的优化方法。
AI.method: 采用替代互补性表示（alternative complementarity representation）替代标准的原始-对偶互补条件，使得求解过程中的线性系统在解附近保持谱有界（spectrally bounded），从而避免病态化，保障单精度下的数值稳定性与梯度计算准确性。
AI.result: 该方法使内点求解器能够在单精度下可靠求解和微分优化问题（先前仅能在双精度下完成）。通过消融实验（与标准内点公式对比）以及在双层学习和端到端学习中的应用验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可微内点法通过改进互补性表示，成功克服了低精度下内点法的病态问题，为在机器学习场景中利用单精度硬件加速约束优化问题的求解与反向微分提供了可行的方案。

title: On Stability and Decomposition of Sample Quantiles under Heavy-Tailed Distributions
summary:
We study sample quantiles of distributions indexed by estimated parameters, with a on Value-at-Risk related to linear projections of financial returns that whose underlying probability law is heavy-tailed. In this setting, the projection direction and the empirical quantile threshold are estimated from the data, so the standard Bahadur representation under a fixed distribution does not separate the distinct sources of instability. A canonical starting point is Bahadur's representation, which expresses the sample quantile through the empirical distribution function plus a remainder term \cite{bahadur1966}. Empirical-process theory provides a usable scaffolding through the mechanics of half-spaces, symmetric differences, and Glivenko--Cantelli uniform convergence. They yield stability bounds, but absorb changes in projection direction and changes in quantile threshold into a single symmetric-difference measure. Interestingly, a global uniform-convergence requirement is imposed on what is intrinsically a local quantile-stability problem.
  This paper introduces a Q-Q orthogonality formulation for separating projection-direction and quantile-threshold effects. The object of interest is the difference between the empirical quantile computed using the estimated projection direction and the population quantile computed at the reference projection direction. We decompose this difference into three terms, $\hat q_α(\hat w)-q_α(w_0)=D_1+D_2+D_3$. Here, $D_1$ measures the population quantile movement induced by perturbing the projection direction, $D_2$ measures the empirical quantile fluctuation with the projection direction held fixed, and $D_3$ is the Bahadur-type remainder.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种Q-Q正交分解方法，将重尾分布下依赖估计参数的样本分位数（如VaR）的估计误差分解为投影方向扰动、固定方向下分位数波动和Bahadur余项三个可分离来源，克服了传统Bahadur表示和对称差方法无法区分不同稳定性来源的局限。
AI.motivation: 在金融收益的重尾线性投影中，VaR相关的样本分位数同时涉及投影方向和分位数阈值的估计，标准Bahadur表示无法分离这两种不同的不稳定来源；而经验过程理论通过半空间和对称差度量将两者混为一谈，且对局部分位数稳定性问题施加了全局均匀收敛要求，过于苛刻。
AI.method: 提出Q-Q正交性（分位数-分位数正交）分解框架，将估计投影方向下的经验分位数与参考投影方向下的总体分位数之差分解为三项：（1）D1，投影方向扰动引起的总体分位数漂移；（2）D2，固定投影方向下经验分位数的随机波动；（3）D3，Bahadur型余项。
AI.result: 该分解成功分离了投影方向和分位数阈值两个不同来源的估计误差，避免了全局均匀收敛的强假设，为局部分位数稳定性分析提供了更精细的刻画。
AI.conclusion: Q-Q正交分解为重尾分布下依赖估计参数的分位数估计问题提供了新的理论工具，能够更清晰地理解各因素对VaR等风险度量的影响。

title: PIMSM: Physics-Informed Multi-Scale Mamba for Stable Neural Representations under Distribution Shift
summary: Scientific foundation models are expected to reuse representations under changes in dataset, acquisition protocol, and deployment domain, yet many sequence backbones treat scientific temporal structure as an unconstrained pattern to be fitted. We argue that this misses a central property of natural dynamical systems: neural and atmospheric time series are organized by interacting processes across multiple physical timescales, and failure to preserve this multiscale structure contributes to brittleness under distribution shift. We formalize this failure mode as temporal kernel mismatch, where a model fits in-distribution dynamics with an effective memory policy that is not anchored to the signal's physical timescales, leading to representation drift and degraded transfer. We propose Physics-Informed Multi-Scale Mamba (PIMSM), a state-space architecture that maps spectrum-estimated transition points between frequency regimes (knee frequencies) to scale-specific discretization parameters and anchors them to acquisition time units. On Human Connectome Project fMRI, PIMSM improves robustness and representation stability under severe temporal-context truncation, extreme low-resource transfer, and resting-state-to-task-state generalization. Without modality-specific adaptation, the same architecture also attains the lowest variable-wise MAE across all reported horizons and variables on Weather-5K held-out-station spatial out-of-distribution forecasting. These results support temporal-scale alignment as a practical inductive bias for scientific foundation models that must preserve structure, not only fit correlations, under deployment shift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间核失配（temporal kernel mismatch）问题，即科学基础模型在时间序列建模中未能保留信号的多物理时间尺度结构，导致分布漂移下性能脆弱。作者提出物理信息多尺度Mamba（PIMSM），通过将频谱估计的膝点频率映射为尺度特定的离散化参数并锚定到采集时间单位，在fMRI和天气预测任务上显著提升了鲁棒性和迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有科学基础模型将时间序列视为无约束模式进行拟合，忽略了自然动态系统中多物理时间尺度交互作用的核心属性，导致在分布偏移下表征脆弱、迁移能力差。
AI.method: 提出Physics-Informed Multi-Scale Mamba (PIMSM)：一种状态空间架构，通过频谱分析估计频率区间之间的过渡点（膝点频率），将其映射为尺度特定的离散化参数，并锚定到采集时间单位，从而在模型记忆中保留信号的多尺度物理时间结构。
AI.result: 在HCP fMRI上，PIMSM在严重时间上下文截断、极低资源迁移和静息态到任务态泛化中均提升了鲁棒性和表征稳定性。在Weather-5K空间分布外预测中，无需模态适配即取得所有预报时域和变量上最低的变量wise MAE。
AI.conclusion: 时间尺度对齐是一种有效的归纳偏置，对于需要在部署偏移下不仅拟合相关性、更要保留结构信息的科学基础模型具有实践价值。

title: Artificial Adaptive Intelligence: The Missing Stage Between Narrow and General Intelligence
summary: Between the narrow systems we deploy and the general intelligence we speculate about lies an entire regime of machine behavior that has never received its own name. This monograph argues that this regime is not empty: it is where meta-learning, neural architecture search, AutoML, continual learning, evolutionary computation, and physics-informed modeling have quietly converged on a common principle, namely the steady removal of the human from the loop of parameter specification. We name this regime Artificial Adaptive Intelligence (AAI) and define it operationally: a system exhibits AAI to the extent that it requires no human-specified tunable hyperparameters while maintaining competitive performance across a diverse distribution of tasks. To make the definition quantitative, we introduce an adaptivity index that measures progress along an axis orthogonal to scale, combining the fraction of hyperparameters absorbed by the system with the performance ratio against a task-specialized baseline. We develop the principle of parametric minimality and ground it in the minimum description length framework, showing that the appropriate hyperparameter count is data-determined rather than designer-determined. We then organize the field around three pathways to minimality: data- and task-aware configuration, structural and evolutionary morphing, and in-training self-adaptation. We analyze their stability, convergence, and governance implications, and illustrate them through case studies spanning aerospace design, financial regime detection, turbulence modeling, ecological dynamics, and vision-language systems. The thesis is that the path from ANI to AGI passes through AAI, and that naming this stage changes what we measure, what we build, and what we call a success.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并定义了"人工自适应智能（AAI）"这一概念，指代那些无需人工指定超参数、能在多样化任务上保持竞争力的系统。论文构建了自适应指数定量衡量标准，提出参数最小化原则（基于最小描述长度框架），梳理了实现AAI的三条路径，并通过多个跨领域案例验证了其有效性。核心论点是：从狭义人工智能通往通用人工智能的路径必然经过AAI这一阶段。
AI.motivation: 当前人工智能领域存在一个未被命名但已实际存在的"中间地带"——介于窄域部署系统与通用人工智能之间。元学习、神经架构搜索、AutoML、持续学习、进化计算和物理信息建模等方法虽起源于不同方向，却悄然收敛于同一核心原则：将人从参数指定过程中逐步移除。作者认为需要为这一协同演化的研究范式赋予正式名称，并提供定量化的评价框架。
AI.method: 1) 定义"人工自适应智能（AAI）"的操作性定义：系统无需人工指定的可调超参数，同时在多样化任务分布上保持有竞争力的性能。2) 提出自适应指数（adaptivity index），沿与规模正交的轴衡量进展，结合超参数吸收比例与面向任务专用基线的性能比。3) 发展参数最小性原则，以最小描述长度（MDL）框架为理论基础，主张超参数数量应由数据决定而非设计者决定。4) 将领域组织为三条通向最小化的路径：数据与任务感知配置、结构与进化变形、训练内自适应。
AI.result: 论文构建了AAI的理论框架和定量评价体系，涵盖自适应指数、参数最小性原则及MDL理论基础。通过航空航天设计、金融制度检测、湍流建模、生态动力学、视觉-语言系统等跨领域案例研究，展示了AAI三条实现路径的稳定性、收敛性和技术治理含义。论证了AAI是从窄域智能通往通用智能的必经阶段。
AI.conclusion: 命名AAI这一阶段将改变我们衡量什么、构建什么以及定义什么是成功的方式。从ANI到AGI的路径必须经过AAI，这意味着研究重心应从单纯扩大模型规模转向提升系统的自适应能力——即系统自主吸收超参数、减少人类干预的程度。

title: Quantitative Fredholm backstepping and rapid stabilization
summary:
In this paper, we address the existence of Fredholm backstepping transformations for self-adjoint and skew-adjoint operators $A$. Under suitable assumptions on the operator $A$ and the possibly unbounded control operator $B$, we prove the existence of a Fredholm backstepping transformation for operators of order strictly greater than $1$.
  This work overcomes two major limitations of the classical Fredholm backstepping framework. One of the main contributions is the explicit identification of the underlying isomorphism used in the construction of the transformation $T$, thereby bypassing the compactness arguments and Riesz basis mechanisms traditionally used in the literature. This explicit structure enables us to derive quantitative and sharp estimates for $\|T\|_{\mathcal{L}(H;H)}$ and $\|T^{-1}\|_{\mathcal{L}(H;H)}$ with respect to the decay rate $λ$. As a consequence, we obtain quantitative rapid stabilization and small-time null controllability results for a broad class of operators.

AI.tldr: 本文针对自伴和斜伴算子A，证明了阶数大于1的Fredholm反步变换的存在性，突破了经典框架的两大限制，并给出了变换T及其逆的显式定量估计，从而获得了快速镇定和小时间零可控性结果。
AI.motivation: 克服经典Fredholm反步变换框架的两大局限性：一是传统方法依赖紧性论证和Riesz基机制，二是缺乏对变换算子的显式刻画与定量估计。
AI.method: 通过显式识别构造变换T所用的同构映射，替代传统的紧性论证和Riesz基机制；在此基础上推导变换范数关于衰减率λ的定量尖锐估计。
AI.result: 获得了‖T‖和‖T⁻¹‖关于衰减率λ的定量尖锐估计，并由此得到了快速镇定和小时间零可控性结果。
AI.conclusion: 对阶数大于1的自伴/斜伴算子，存在Fredholm反步变换；通过显式同构识别可获得定量估计，进而实现快速镇定与小时间零可控。

title: Generalized Functional ANOVA in Closed-Form: A Unified View of Additive Explanations
summary: The functional ANOVA, or Hoeffding decomposition, provides a principled framework for interpretability by decomposing a model prediction into main effects and higher-order interactions. For independent inputs, this classical decomposition is explicit. It is closely connected to SHAP values, generalized additive models, and orthogonal polynomial expansions, and therefore constitutes a fundamental tool for additive explainability. In the more general and realistic dependent setting, however, obtaining a tractable representation and estimating the decomposition from data remain challenging. In this work, we address this problem for continuous inputs. By combining Hilbert space methods with the generalized functional ANOVA, we build an explicit decomposition Riesz Basis allowing to easily compute the decomposition. Our formulation recovers the classical independent case and its associated orthogonal decomposition. Building on this representation, we propose a simple but mighty algorithm to estimate the decomposition from a data sample in a model-agnostic setting and we compare it empirically with several state-of-the-art explanation methods, demonstrating the power of the approach.

AI.tldr: 本文针对连续输入变量的依赖情形，通过希尔伯特空间方法与广义泛函方差分析相结合，构建了一种显式的Riesz基分解，使得在依赖输入下也能高效计算泛函ANOVA分解，并提出了模型无关的估计算法，实验表明其优于现有可解释性方法。
AI.motivation: 经典的泛函ANOVA（Hoeffding分解）在输入独立时具有显式形式，是SHAP值、广义加性模型等可解释性方法的基础工具。但在实际中更常见的依赖输入情形下，获得可处理的分解表示并估计分解项仍然困难，本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 将希尔伯特空间方法与广义泛函ANOVA结合，构建显式的Riesz基分解，使得在依赖连续输入下能够方便地计算分解；该表示可恢复经典独立情形下的正交分解。在此基础上提出一个简单但强大的模型无关估计算法。
AI.result: 所提出的表示在依赖输入下具有显式形式，并且能够退化到经典独立情形。所提算法在模型无关设定下与多种现有可解释性方法进行了实证比较，展示了优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过希尔伯特空间与广义泛函ANOVA的结合，有效解决了依赖连续输入下泛函ANOVA分解的表示与估计问题，为依赖输入下的加性可解释性提供了有力工具。

title: Augmenting Human Evaluation with LLM Judges: How Many Human Reviews Do You Need?
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as automated evaluators of AI systems, including in high-stakes applications. In this role, LLMs are used to generate judgments about the quality, appropriateness, or even safety of model outputs. This approach is motivated by practical constraints. Expert human ratings are costly and difficult to scale, whereas LLM ratings can be produced quickly at low cost. However, current approaches to deploying LLM evaluators are ad hoc, typically limited to reporting agreement metrics between human and LLM judges as a justification for substitution of human ratings, and lack a formal basis for study design. This paper (1) shifts the role of the LLM judge from substitutive to auxiliary, and (2) formulates the LLM-as-a-judge paradigm as one of augmenting human evaluation through a two-stage sampling design, where LLM evaluations are measured for all observations at the first stage and human ratings are partially observed for a subsample at the second stage. We propose to use a doubly robust estimator from the missing data literature, which takes advantage of the robustness property against the prediction model, since the missingness model is known by design. Using the asymptotic variance of this estimator, we propose how sample sizes of human and LLM ratings can be determined to achieve a targeted level of power. We also show that a study can be efficiently designed by allocating more human ratings for types of evaluations where the predictability of LLM ratings is not high. To the best of our knowledge, there is very little guidance on how much human oversight should be retained when validating benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将LLM评估者从替代角色转变为辅助角色，采用两阶段抽样设计（LLM评估所有样本，人类评估子样本），并通过双重稳健估计器进行统计推断，同时给出了样本量确定和实验设计的指导原则。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM评估者的使用缺乏严谨的统计基础，通常仅通过报告人机一致性指标来证明替代人工评估的合理性，缺乏系统性的研究设计方法。
AI.method: (1) 将LLM评估角色从替代(substitutive)转变为辅助(auxiliary)；(2) 提出两阶段抽样设计：第一阶段LLM评估所有观测，第二阶段人类评估部分子样本；(3) 采用缺失数据文献中的双重稳健估计器，利用其对抗预测模型的稳健性；(4) 基于估计量的渐近方差，给出样本量确定方法以达到目标统计功效。
AI.result: 通过理论分析表明，该设计可提高统计效率；研究可优先分配更多人类评估给LLM预测性不高的评价类型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为LLM辅助人工评估提供了正式的统计框架，填补了当前缺乏关于验证基准时应保留多少人工监督的指导空白。

title: Learning to Learn from Multimodal Experience
summary: Experience-driven learning has emerged as a promising paradigm for enabling agents to improve from interaction trajectories by accumulating and reusing past experience. However, existing approaches are predominantly developed in textual settings and rely on manually designed memory schemas, limiting their applicability to multimodal environments. In real-world scenarios, experience is inherently multimodal, involving heterogeneous signals across perception, reasoning, and action, which makes effective memory design significantly more challenging. In particular, the optimal way to structure and utilize multimodal experience is highly task-dependent and evolves over time, rendering fixed memory designs insufficient. In this work, we propose a new paradigm, learning to learn from multimodal experience, which shifts memory design from a predefined component to an adaptive and learnable process. Our framework enables agents to dynamically construct, organize, and utilize memory based on task requirements and interaction history, effectively learning how to structure experience for improved performance. Experiments demonstrate that adaptive memory design substantially enhances agent performance and generalization across multimodal tasks, highlighting the critical role of learning memory mechanisms in experience-driven learning.

AI.tldr: 提出"从多模态经验中学习如何学习"的新范式，将记忆设计从预定义组件转变为自适应、可学习的过程，使智能体能够根据任务需求和交互历史动态构建、组织和利用记忆，实验证明该方法能显著提升多模态任务的性能和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有经验驱动学习方法主要在文本环境中开发，依赖手动设计的记忆模式，难以适应多模态环境。多模态经验涉及感知、推理和行动中的异构信号，最优记忆结构高度依赖具体任务且随时间演化，固定记忆设计无法满足需求。
AI.method: 提出"从多模态经验中学习如何学习"（Learning to Learn from Multimodal Experience）的新范式，将记忆设计从预定义组件转变为自适应、可学习的过程。智能体基于任务需求和交互历史动态构建、组织和利用记忆，自主学习如何结构化经验以提升性能。
AI.result: 自适应记忆设计显著提升了智能体在多模态任务中的性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 学习记忆机制在经验驱动学习中扮演关键角色，自适应记忆设计优于固定记忆方案，为多模态智能体的经验学习提供了新的有效范式。

title: From Saddle Points Toward Global Minima: A Newton-Type Method on Wasserstein Space
summary: We study the minimization of non-convex functionals over the Wasserstein space. While recent work has showed that perturbed Wasserstein gradient methods can avoid saddle points for benign landscapes, existing approaches remain essentially first-order and do not provide fast local convergence once the iterates enter a neighborhood of a global minimizer. We propose Wasserstein Saddle-Free Newton (WSFN), a second-order method that preconditions the Wasserstein gradient by a regularized square root of the squared Wasserstein Hessian. This construction preserves attraction toward directions of positive curvature while inducing repulsion along directions of negative curvature, thereby overcoming the tendency of standard Wasserstein Newton dynamics to be attracted to saddles. We also establish second-order sufficient optimality conditions on Wasserstein space for strict local minimality. Under regularity and benign landscape assumptions, we prove that WSFN escapes saddle regions and reaches an $α$-neighborhood of a global minimizer in polynomial time, with improved dependence on saddle parameters compared with prior perturbed first-order methods. Once inside this neighborhood, we show that WSFN converges linearly in $L^2$-Wasserstein distance to a non-degenerate global minimizer. Finally, we present a particle-based implementation of the method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Wasserstein Saddle-Free Newton (WSFN)方法，一种用于Wasserstein空间非凸泛函最小化的二阶优化算法。该方法通过正则化Wasserstein Hessian平方根预处理Wasserstein梯度，在保持正曲率方向吸引力的同时引入负曲率方向排斥力，克服了标准Wasserstein Newton动力学被鞍点吸引的缺陷。在良性景观假设下，WSFN能以多项式时间逃离鞍点区域并达到全局极小点的α邻域，且对鞍点参数的依赖优于扰动一阶方法；进入邻域后，WSFN在L^2-Wasserstein距离下线性收敛到非退化全局极小点。
AI.motivation: 现有Wasserstein梯度方法虽能避免良性景观中的鞍点，但本质上仍是一阶方法，一旦迭代进入全局极小点邻域后无法实现快速局部收敛；同时标准Wasserstein Newton动力学倾向于被鞍点吸引，缺乏处理负曲率方向的有效机制。
AI.method: 提出Wasserstein Saddle-Free Newton (WSFN)，通过正则化Wasserstein Hessian平方根对Wasserstein梯度进行预处理，构建一种保持正曲率方向吸引并排斥负曲率方向的二阶动力学；并建立了Wasserstein空间上严格局部极小的二阶充分最优性条件。
AI.result: 在正则性和良性景观假设下，WSFN在多项式时间内逃离鞍点区域并到达全局极小点的α邻域，对鞍点参数的依赖优于扰动一阶方法；进入邻域后，在L^2-Wasserstein距离下线性收敛到非退化全局极小点。
AI.conclusion: WSFN成功将二阶优化方法（尤其是鞍点-free Newton方法）推广到Wasserstein空间，兼顾了鞍点逃逸效率和局部快速收敛，为Wasserstein空间上的非凸优化提供了更高效的理论框架，并给出了粒子实现的可行性。

title: Shallow ReLU$^s$ Networks in $L^p$-Type and Sobolev Spaces: Approximation and Path-Norm Controlled Generalization
comment: 42 pages, 1 figure. Authors are listed in alphabetical order and contributed equally
summary: We study approximation by shallow ReLU$^s$ networks, $σ_s(t)=\max{0,t}^s$, and the generalization behavior of such networks under $\ell_1$ path-norm control. For the $L^p$-type integral spaces $\widetilde{\mathcal{F}}_{p,τ_d,s}$, $1\le p\le2$, we establish approximation bounds for shallow networks using spherical harmonic analysis. In particular, when the parameter measure is the uniform measure $τ_d$ and $p<p^*=(2d+2)/(d+3)$, we obtain the rate $O(m^{-1/2-d(2-p)/(2d(2-p)+2p(2s+d+1))}\log^{3/2}m)$, which improves the corresponding random-feature rate. We also derive approximation rates for Sobolev spaces $W^{α,p}$ in the range $1\le p<2$ by embedding them into spectral Barron spaces. Finally, for nonparametric regression with sub-Gaussian noise, we prove minimax-optimal generalization bounds for path-norm-regularized shallow ReLU$^s$ networks over Barron and Sobolev spaces, with matching lower bounds up to logarithmic factors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了浅层ReLU^s网络在L^p型积分空间和Sobolev空间上的逼近界，并证明了路径范数正则化下的极小极大最优泛化界。
AI.motivation: 建立浅层ReLU^s网络在更广泛函数空间（L^p型积分空间和Sobolev空间）上的逼近理论，并分析路径范数控制下的泛化性能。
AI.method: 利用球谐分析建立逼近界；通过嵌入到谱Barron空间推导Sobolev空间的逼近率；采用路径范数正则化进行非参数回归分析。
AI.result: 在均匀测度且p<p^*条件下得到率O(m^{-1/2-d(2-p)/(2d(2-p)+2p(2s+d+1))}log^{3/2}m)，优于随机特征率；对Sobolev空间1≤p<2导出逼近率；获得极小极大最优泛化界（含匹配下界）。
AI.conclusion: 浅层ReLU^s网络在路径范数正则化下对Barron和Sobolev空间达到最优泛化性能，逼近率优于随机特征方法。

title: LEAF: A Living Benchmark for Event-Augmented Forecasting
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to forecasting. To evaluate this capability while mitigating pre-training data contamination, several living benchmarks have been proposed. However, existing benchmarks either lack the multidimensional events essential for accurate forecasting due to data scarcity, or focus on relatively closed environments. To assess the predictive capabilities of LLMs in complex, real-world scenarios, we propose LEAF, the first living benchmark for event-augmented forecasting tasks, including future event probabilities, trend and time series forecasting. LEAF utilizes a recursive retrieval agent system paired with dual-agent cross-validation to provide comprehensive and relevant auxiliary text for forecasting. Evaluating state-of-the-art proprietary and open-weight LLMs, we find that these models can leverage signals extracted from complex events to enhance predictive performance. In the stock domain, we find that LLMs achieve better performance on equities they confidently identify as more predictable. Furthermore, the events demonstrate a strong correlation with the target equities. To this end, LEAF provides a necessary, dynamically updating testbed to continuously track and drive progress in event-driven forecasting tasks.

AI.tldr: LEAF是首个面向事件增强预测任务的动态基准，通过递归检索代理系统和双代理交叉验证，评估LLM在复杂真实场景中利用事件信号提升预测性能的能力，涵盖未来事件概率、趋势和时间序列预测。
AI.motivation: 现有基准要么因数据稀缺而缺乏预测所需的多维事件，要么聚焦于相对封闭环境，无法评估LLM在复杂真实场景中的预测能力。
AI.method: 提出LEAF动态基准，包含递归检索代理系统和双代理交叉验证，为预测提供全面相关的辅助文本；涵盖未来事件概率、趋势和时间序列三类预测任务。
AI.result: SOTA闭源和开源LLM能利用复杂事件信号提升预测性能；在股票领域，LLM对自信识别为更可预测的股票表现更好；事件与目标股票存在强相关性。
AI.conclusion: LEAF提供了一个必要的动态更新测试平台，以持续追踪和推动事件驱动预测任务的发展。

title: Reasoning Can Be Restored by Correcting a Few Decision Tokens
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) substantially outperform their base LLM counterparts on challenging reasoning benchmarks, yet it remains poorly understood where base models go wrong during token-by-token generation and how to narrow this gap efficiently. We study the base-reasoning gap through quantifying token-level distributional disagreement between a base model and a stronger reasoning model using likelihood-based divergences. Across benchmarks, we find that the reasoning advantage is highly sparse and concentrates on a small set of early, planning-related decision tokens. For instance, on Qwen3-0.6B, only ~8% of generated tokens account for the salient disagreement, and these tokens concentrate early in the response, are strongly enriched in planning-related decisions (17x), and coincide with high base-model uncertainty -- suggesting that base models fail mainly at early planning points that steer the subsequent reasoning trajectory. Building on these findings, we propose disagreement-guided token intervention, a simple inference-time delegation scheme that performs a one-token takeover by the reasoning model only at high-disagreement positions and immediately switches back to the base model. With a small intervention budget, this sparse delegation substantially recovers and can even surpass the performance of a same-size reasoning model on challenging reasoning tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/AlphaLab-USTC/RRTokenIntervention.

AI.tldr: 本文通过量化基础模型与强推理模型在 token 级别的分布差异，发现推理优势高度稀疏，集中在少数早期规划决策 token 上。基于此提出分歧引导的 token 干预方法，仅在分歧高的位置由推理模型接管一个 token，即可显著恢复甚至超越同等规模推理模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在推理基准上显著优于基础 LLM，但基础模型在逐 token 生成过程中具体在何处出错，以及如何高效缩小这一差距，尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用基于似然的散度量化基础模型与推理模型在 token 级别的分布不一致性；提出分歧引导的 token 干预（disagreement-guided token intervention），仅在分歧高的位置让推理模型执行一个 token 的接管，随后立即切回基础模型。
AI.result: 推理优势高度稀疏（如 Qwen3-0.6B 上仅约 8% 的 token 产生显著分歧），这些 token 集中在响应早期、富含规划决策（17 倍富集），且与基础模型的高不确定性重合。稀疏干预以极小预算即可大幅恢复甚至超越推理模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 基础模型主要在早期规划决策点上失败，这些点决定了后续推理轨迹。通过稀疏的 token 级干预可以有效弥合基础模型与推理模型之间的差距。

title: Control-Channel Informativity for Koopman EDMDc under Behavior-Policy Data
summary: Extended dynamic mode decomposition with control (EDMDc) is often trained from trajectories generated by a behavior policy or a pre-existing feedback controller. Such data can predict the observed behavior accurately while failing to identify how new input commands change the lifted state. This paper studies that failure as a control-channel informativity problem. We introduce a conditional intervention certificate, defined as the residual input covariance after projecting the input data away from the active lifted-state feature span. The certificate is the Schur complement of the lifted-state block in the EDMDc information matrix. We prove that its strict positivity is necessary and sufficient for finite-sample sample- identifiability of the lifted control-channel block. If the certificate vanishes, distinct lifted models agree on every collected transition but disagree under counterfactual inputs. We then give a closed-loop statistical bound using predictable regressors, conditionally sub-Gaussian transition noise, and a regularized Schur complement. A scalar feedback example shows the unavoidable scaling: under dithered feedback, residual intervention information grows quadratically with the dither amplitude and the control-channel error decreases with the inverse intervention signal-to-noise scale. New experiments verify these scalings exactly in a linear system and diagnostically in controlled Duffing and Van der Pol benchmarks. A larger EDMDc acquisition grid further shows that state coverage, joint regression conditioning, and intervention excitation are complementary diagnostics rather than interchangeable performance score.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了EDMDc在控制通道信息不足时的失效问题，提出了条件干预证书（Conditional Intervention Certificate）作为判断控制通道可辨识性的充要条件，并给出了统计界限和实验验证。
AI.motivation: EDMDc通常由行为策略或反馈控制器生成的轨迹训练，这类数据能准确预测观测行为，但无法识别新输入命令如何改变提升态（lifted state）。本文旨在从控制通道信息性（informativity）角度解释这一失效现象。
AI.method: 1) 定义条件干预证书为输入数据投影到活跃提升态特征张成空间后的残差输入协方差（即EDMDc信息矩阵中提升态块的Schur补）。2) 证明该证书严格正定是有限样本下提升控制通道块可辨识性的充要条件。3) 利用可预测回归量、条件次高斯转移噪声和正则化Schur补给出闭环统计界。4) 通过标量反馈例子推导出抖振幅度与控制通道误差的反比二次关系。
AI.result: 1) 条件干预证书为零时，不同提升模型在观测到的所有转移上一致，但在反事实输入下不一致。2) 抖振反馈下，残差干预信息与抖振幅度呈二次增长，控制通道误差与干预信噪比倒数成比例。3) 实验在线性系统中验证了精确缩放关系，在Duffing和Van der Pol基准中验证了诊断性。4) 更大的EDMDc采集网格表明状态覆盖、联合回归条件和干预激励是互补的诊断指标，不可互换。
AI.conclusion: 条件干预证书为EDMDc控制通道的可辨识性提供了理论基础和实用诊断工具，揭示了干预激励在系统辨识中的关键作用，且不能仅靠状态覆盖或回归条件替代。

title: Flowing with Confidence
summary: Generative models can produce nonsensical text, unrealistic images, and unstable materials faster than simulation or human review can absorb; without per-sample confidence, trust erodes. Existing fixes run $k$ ensembles or stochastic trajectories at $k\times$ compute, measuring variability between models, not model confidence. We propose Flow Matching with Confidence (FMwC). FMwC injects input-dependent multiplicative noise at selected layers, propagates its variance through the network in closed form, and integrates it along the ODE trajectory, yielding a per-sample confidence score at standard sampling cost. The score supports multiple uses: filtering improves image quality and thermodynamic stability of crystals; editing rewinds trajectories to the points where the model commits and redirects them; and adaptive stepping concentrates ODE compute where the flow is ambiguous. We find that the confidence score correlates with the magnitude of the divergence of the learned velocity field, which gives us a window to understand the generative process, opening up surgical forms of guidance that target the moments that matter, new sampling algorithms and interpretability of generative models.

AI.tldr: 提出流匹配置信度（FMwC）方法，通过注入输入相关乘性噪声并沿ODE轨迹传播方差，在标准采样成本下得到每样本置信度分数，支持过滤、编辑和自适应步进等多种应用。
AI.motivation: 生成模型可能产生无意义输出，而现有方法（如集成或随机轨迹）需k倍计算且仅度量模型间变异性而非模型置信度，缺乏高效的每样本置信度评估手段。
AI.method: 在选定层注入输入相关的乘性噪声，通过闭式传播方差，沿ODE轨迹积分，得到每样本置信度分数。
AI.result: 置信度分数可用于过滤（提升图像质量和晶体热力学稳定性）、编辑（回退到模型承诺点并重定向轨迹）以及自适应步进（在模糊区域集中ODE计算）。置信度分数与学习速度场散度大小相关。
AI.conclusion: 置信度分数为理解生成过程提供了窗口，支持针对关键时刻的引导、新采样算法和生成模型的可解释性。

title: ProxyKV: Cross-Model Proxy Pruning for Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference
summary:
Efficient long-context inference in Large Language Models (LLMs) is severely constrained by the Key-Value (KV) cache memory wall, yet existing pruning methods force a choice between
  low-latency heuristics that sacrifice precision and high-precision reconstruction methods that incur prohibitive prefilling overhead. To bridge this scoring-cost--accuracy gap, we propose
  ProxyKV, a cross-model proxy pruning framework that offloads importance scoring to a lightweight intra-family Small-Model Proxy executed asynchronously to the Large-Model Target. To bridge
  the architectural gap between heterogeneous models, we design the HybridAxialMapper, which disentangles temporal feature extraction from cross-head alignment, together with a
  Multi-Granularity Hybrid Loss that shifts the learning objective from rigid regression to relative ranking consistency. Across the Llama-3.1, Qwen-2.5, and Qwen-3 families spanning targets
  from 7B up to 32B parameters on LongBench, SCBench, and RULER, ProxyKV matches KVZip on aggregate (recovering $\sim$$98.7\%$ of its mean accuracy) while delivering up to a $3.21\times$
  prefilling speedup on Llama-3.1-8B (dual-GPU; $\sim$$1.5\times$ shared single-GPU) and sustaining the speedup at contexts up to 170k tokens on Qwen-2.5-7B.

AI.tldr: 提出ProxyKV框架，利用轻量级同族小模型作为代理异步执行重要性评分，配合HybridAxialMapper和混合损失函数，在保持高精度的同时实现KV缓存剪枝的3.21倍预填充加速。
AI.motivation: 长上下文推理中KV缓存内存墙严重制约LLM效率，现有剪枝方法在低延迟启发式（牺牲精度）与高精度重建（高昂预填充开销）之间存在评分-成本-精度鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出跨模型代理剪枝框架ProxyKV：1) 轻量级同族小模型作为代理异步为大模型目标执行重要性评分；2) HybridAxialMapper解耦时序特征提取与跨头对齐以弥合异构模型架构差距；3) 多粒度混合损失将学习目标从刚性回归转为相对排序一致性。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.1、Qwen-2.5、Qwen-3系列（7B-32B）上，在LongBench、SCBench、RULER基准上达到KVZip约98.7%的平均精度，在Llama-3.1-8B上实现3.21倍预填充加速（双GPU），在Qwen-2.5-7B上在17万token上下文中保持加速效果。
AI.conclusion: ProxyKV有效弥合了KV缓存剪枝中评分-成本-精度的鸿沟，通过异步代理评分和架构对齐机制实现了精度与效率的帕累托改进。

title: Virtual Nodes Guided Dynamic Graph Neural Network for Brain Tumor Segmentation with Missing Modalities
comment: The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026
summary: Multimodal magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is crucial for brain tumor segmentation, with many methods leveraging its four key modalities to capture complementary information for effective sub-region analysis. However, the absence of several modalities is very common in practice, leading to severe performance degradation in existing full-modality segmentation methods. Limited by the structured data model, recent works often adopt a multi-stage training strategy for full-modality and missing-modality scenarios, which increases training costs and inadequately addresses the interference of miss. In this work, we propose a graph-based one-stage framework for robust brain tumor segmentation with missing modalities. Specifically, we introduce modality-specific virtual nodes that serve as supplementary information sources to compensate for missing modalities. To enhance model robustness against arbitrary modality combinations, we leverage the inherent flexibility of graph networks to devise a dynamic connection strategy. This mechanism dynamically adjusts the adjacency matrix based on modality availability, preserving beneficial information flow while mitigating interference effects caused by missing modalities. Furthermore, we enhance the graph network through heterogeneous weight matrices, enhancing its adaptability to multimodal scenarios. Extensive experiments on the BRATS-2018 and BRATS-2020 datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on almost all subsets of incomplete modalities.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图网络的一阶段框架，通过模态特定虚拟节点和动态连接策略，实现在任意模态缺失情况下的鲁棒脑肿瘤分割。
AI.motivation: 现有脑肿瘤分割方法在多模态MRI场景下，当部分模态缺失时性能严重下降；且多阶段训练策略成本高，难以有效应对模态缺失带来的干扰。
AI.method: 1) 引入模态特定虚拟节点作为补充信息源补偿缺失模态；2) 利用图网络灵活性设计动态连接策略，根据模态可用性动态调整邻接矩阵；3) 通过异构权重矩阵增强图网络对多模态场景的适应性。
AI.result: 在BRATS-2018和BRATS-2020数据集上，几乎所有不完整模态子集上的分割性能均优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于图网络的一阶段框架能有效处理任意模态缺失情况，提升脑肿瘤分割的鲁棒性，且无需多阶段训练。

title: A Benders Decomposition Approach for the k-Defensive Domination Problem
summary: The k-defensive domination problem is a powerful modeling tool for strategic decision-making in network security and disaster/emergency management, where multiple nodes may be simultaneously under attack. Despite its practical relevance, the problem has been poorly studied, largely due to its high computational difficulty. This study investigates the application of Benders decomposition to the k-defensive domination problem, aiming to improve computational efficiency over standard integer programming formulations. Several cut generation strategies, including a combinatorial approach and the simultaneous addition of multiple cuts, are proposed. Theoretical results on the strength of feasibility cuts are presented. In addition, two novel enhancement strategies are proposed: a clique-cover-based heuristic, the first feasible solution method in the literature for this problem, achieving up to 98% improvement over the trivial upper bound, and an initial cut generation heuristic that in some cases resolves the problem without further branching. Experiments on Erdos-Renyi, chordal, and Barabasi-Albert instances show that the algorithm variant involving all of the proposed components is able to solve instances that remain out of reach for classical formulations and standard Benders decomposition.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了k-防御支配问题的Benders分解方法，提出了组合割生成策略、团覆盖启发式算法（首个可行解方法，改进率达98%）和初始割生成启发式，实验证明该方法能解决经典方法无法处理的实例。
AI.motivation: k-防御支配问题是网络安全和灾难应急管理中重要的建模工具，但由于计算难度高而研究不足，现有标准整数规划方法效率低，亟需更高效的求解方法。
AI.method: 采用Benders分解方法求解k-防御支配问题，提出多种割生成策略（包括组合方法和多割同时添加），证明了可行性割的强度理论；提出两种增强策略：团覆盖启发式（首个可行解方法）和初始割生成启发式。
AI.result: 在Erdos-Renyi、弦图和Barabasi-Albert实例上，集成了所有提出组件的算法变体能解决经典公式和标准Benders分解无法处理的实例；团覆盖启发式相比平凡上界改进达98%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的Benders分解及其增强策略显著提升了k-防御支配问题的求解效率，团覆盖启发式为该问题提供了首个有效可行解方法。

title: Statistical Limits and Efficient Algorithms for Differentially Private Federated Learning
summary: Federated Learning is a leading framework for training ML and AI models collaboratively across numerous user devices or databases. We study the trade-offs among estimation accuracy, privacy constraints, and communication cost for differentially private (DP) federated M estimation. The two standard methods in the literature are FedAvg, which may suffer from high federation bias, and FedSGD, which can incur high communication cost. Aimed at improving accuracy at a reduced communication cost, we propose FedHybrid, which uses FedSGD starting with an improved initialization by the FedAvg estimator. We propose FedNewton, which averages local Newton iterations to reduce bias in FedAvg, achieving an estimation accuracy comparable to FedSGD with much fewer communication rounds when the number of clients grows sufficiently slowly. We establish finite sample upper bounds on the mean-squared error rates of the DP versions of these estimators as functions of the number of clients, local sample sizes, privacy budget, and number of iterations. We further derive a minimax lower bound on the MSE of any iterative private federated procedure that provides a benchmark to assess the optimality gap of these methods. We numerically evaluate our methods for training a logistic regression and a neural network on the computer vision datasets MNIST and CIFAR-10.

AI.tldr: 本文研究差分隐私联邦M估计中精度、隐私和通信开销的权衡，提出FedHybrid（结合FedAvg初始化的FedSGD）和FedNewton（平均局部牛顿迭代以减少偏差），在理论上建立了有限样本MSE上界和极小化下界，并在MNIST和CIFAR-10上验证了效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的联邦学习标准方法FedAvg存在高联邦偏差，FedSGD则通信成本高。为在降低通信成本的同时提升估计精度，需要新的方法。
AI.method: 提出FedHybrid（先用FedAvg估计器初始化，再执行FedSGD）和FedNewton（平均局部牛顿迭代以减少FedAvg的偏差）。对差分隐私版本导出有限样本MSE上界，并推导极小化下界作为最优性基准。
AI.result: FedNewton在客户端数量增长足够慢时，估计精度与FedSGD相当但通信轮次更少。理论给出了MSE率与客户端数、本地样本量、隐私预算和迭代次数之间的函数关系。数值实验在逻辑回归和神经网络上验证。
AI.conclusion: FedHybrid和FedNewton在差分隐私联邦M估计中可有效平衡精度、隐私与通信开销，FedNewton特别适合客户端数增长缓慢的场景。

title: TailedTS: Benchmark Dataset for Heavy-Tailed Time Series Prediction and Periodicity Quantification
summary: We present TailedTS, a large-scale benchmark dataset derived from Wikipedia hourly page view observations throughout 2024, specifically designed to test time series forecasting models under heavy-tailed, zero-inflated, and non-Gaussian conditions. The dataset comprises approximately 24.69 billion data points spanning roughly 3 million unique Wikipedia pages per month, stored in high-efficiency Apache Parquet format. Wikipedia traffic follows a pronounced power-law distribution where roughly 5% of pages account for over 70% of total page views, creating a natural and rigorous testbed for model robustness against extreme volatility that are absent from or underrepresented in existing benchmarks such as M4, M5, and UCI electricity datasets. TailedTS enables several research tasks. First, we introduce a periodicity quantification framework based on sparse autoregression with sparsity and non-negativity constraints, revealing that frequently-viewed pages exhibit significantly weaker periodic structure than their less-viewed counterparts, showing direct implications for server allocation and traffic forecasting on large digital platforms. Second, we provide standardized prediction benchmarks evaluated under a suite of non-Gaussian loss functions, including $\ell_1$-norm, Huber, quantile, and $\ell_p$-norm losses, demonstrating that standard Gaussian-based estimators degrade substantially on high-volume page categories, while robust alternatives provide consistent gains across all traffic scales. TailedTS is publicly available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17070469.

AI.tldr: TailedTS是一个基于2024年维基百科每小时页面浏览量构建的大规模时间序列基准数据集，专门用于测试预测模型在重尾、零膨胀和非高斯条件下的鲁棒性。数据包含约246.9亿个数据点，覆盖约300万维基百科页面。约5%的页面贡献了超过70%的浏览量，呈现明显的幂律分布。论文引入基于稀疏自回归的周期性量化框架，发现高频页面周期性显著弱于低频页面；同时在多种非高斯损失函数下评估预测模型，表明标准高斯估计在高流量页面类别上表现不佳，而鲁棒替代方法在所有流量规模上均有一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基准数据集（如M4、M5、UCI电力数据集）缺乏或不足以表征时间序列中的重尾、零膨胀和非高斯特征，而真实世界中（如维基百科流量）存在大量此类极端波动。TailedTS旨在填补这一空白，提供一个能够严格测试模型鲁棒性的基准。
AI.method: 从2024年全年维基百科每小时页面浏览量中提取数据，采用Apache Parquet高效格式存储。引入基于稀疏自回归（带有稀疏性和非负性约束）的周期性量化框架来评估不同流量页面的周期结构。在多种非高斯损失函数（ℓ1-范数、Huber、分位数、ℓp-范数）下建立标准化预测基准。
AI.result: 数据集包含约246.9亿个数据点，覆盖约300万维基百科页面/月。流量服从幂律分布，约5%的页面贡献超过70%浏览量。高频页面周期性显著弱于低频页面。标准高斯损失函数在高流量页面类别上表现显著退化，而鲁棒损失函数在所有流量规模上均表现一致。
AI.conclusion: TailedTS为重尾、零膨胀和非高斯时间序列预测提供了一个大规模、真实的基准测试平台。研究结果对大规模数字平台的服务器分配和流量预测具有直接启示：高频流量页面缺乏强周期性结构，且需要采用非高斯鲁棒损失函数进行建模。

title: NGM: A Plug-and-Play Training-Free Memory Module for LLMs
summary: Recent studies introduce conditional memory modules that decouple knowledge storage from neural computation, enabling more direct knowledge access. Compared to MoE, which relies on dynamic computation paths, explicit lookup provides a more efficient knowledge retrieval mechanism. However, these approaches still depend on learned memory embeddings, requiring additional training and limiting flexibility. To address this, we propose N-gram Memory (NGM), a training-free, plug-and-play module composed of a Causal N-Gram Encoder and a Cosine-Gated Memory Injector. The Causal N-Gram Encoder directly averages the pretrained token embeddings of the backbone model to construct N-gram representations, thereby eliminating the need to train separate N-gram embeddings from scratch. This design requires neither an additional memory table nor a retrieval pipeline. The Cosine-Gated Memory Injector then uses a non-parametric cosine gate with ReLU to modulate the retrieved embeddings into the contextual representations. We evaluate NGM on the Qwen3 series from 0.6B to 14B across eight benchmarks. NGM improves average performance by 0.5 to 1.2 points, with particularly clear gains on code generation and knowledge-intensive tasks (e.g., +3.0 on LiveCodeBench and +3.03 on GPQA for Qwen3-14B). Moreover, NGM also improves performance in multimodal benchmarks (e.g., MMStar +1.53 on Qwen3-VL-2B).

AI.tldr: 提出 N-gram Memory (NGM)，一种无需训练、即插即用的记忆模块，通过因果 N-gram 编码器和余弦门控注入器，直接利用预训练 token 嵌入构建 N-gram 表示，无需额外记忆表或检索管道，在 Qwen3 系列上提升 0.5~1.2 个点，代码生成和知识密集型任务增益显著。
AI.motivation: 现有条件记忆模块虽能解耦知识存储与神经计算，但仍依赖可学习的记忆嵌入，需要额外训练且灵活性受限。作者希望设计一种无需训练、可直接插入现有模型的记忆增强方法。
AI.method: 提出 NGM 模块，包含两部分：1) Causal N-Gram Encoder，直接对预训练 token 嵌入做平均来构建 N-gram 表示，无需单独训练 N-gram 嵌入；2) Cosine-Gated Memory Injector，使用非参数化的余弦门控加 ReLU 将检索到的嵌入调制到上下文表示中。该模块即插即用，无需额外记忆表或检索管道。
AI.result: 在 Qwen3 系列（0.6B~14B）八个基准上平均提升 0.5~1.2 点；代码生成任务 LiveCodeBench +3.0，知识密集型任务 GPQA +3.03（Qwen3-14B）；多模态基准 MMStar +1.53（Qwen3-VL-2B）。
AI.conclusion: NGM 作为一种训练免费、即插即用的记忆增强模块，能有效提升大语言模型在代码生成和知识密集型任务上的表现，且适用于多模态场景，具备良好的通用性和实用性。

title: Symmetry-Compatible Principle for Optimizer Design: Embeddings, LM Heads, SwiGLU MLPs, and MoE Routers
summary: A striking geometric disparity has long persisted in the practice of deep learning. While modern neural network architectures naturally exhibit rich symmetry and equivariance properties, popular optimizers such as Adam and its variants operate inherently coordinate-wise, rendering them unable to respect the equivariance structures of the parameter space. We address this disparity by introducing a symmetry-compatible principle for optimizer design: the gradient update rule should be equivariant under the symmetry group acting on the corresponding weight block. Following this principle, we first provide a unified perspective on bi-orthogonally equivariant updates for general matrix layers, as employed by stochastic spectral descent, Muon, Scion, and polar gradient methods. More importantly, by moving from orthogonal groups to permutation and shared-shift symmetries, we derive symmetry-compatible optimizers for parameter blocks whose symmetries differ from those of general matrix layers: embedding and LM head matrices, SwiGLU MLP projections, and MoE router matrices. These constructions include one-sided spectral, row-norm, hybrid row-norm/spectral, row-aware, column-aware, centered row-norm, and left-spectral updates. They yield an end-to-end layerwise optimizer stack in which each major matrix-valued parameter class is assigned an update whose equivariance matches its symmetry group. We corroborate this principle through pre-training experiments on dense and sparse MoE language models, including Qwen3-0.6B-style, Gemma 3 1B-style, OLMoE-1B-7B-style, and downsized gpt-oss architectures. Across these experiments, symmetry-compatible updates consistently improve final validation loss, and in several cases training stability, over corresponding AdamW updates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出对称性兼容的优化器设计原则：梯度更新规则应尊重参数块的等变结构。基于此，为不同矩阵层（如嵌入矩阵、SwiGLU投影、MoE路由器矩阵等）设计了对应的等变更新方法，构建了端到端的逐层优化器堆栈。在Qwen3、Gemma 3、OLMoE等多种架构的预训练实验中，该方法相比AdamW持续改善了验证损失和训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现代神经网络架构天然具有丰富的对称性和等变性质，但Adam等主流优化器采用逐坐标更新方式，无法尊重参数空间的等变结构，二者之间存在长期未解决的几何不匹配问题。
AI.method: 1. 提出对称性兼容的设计原则：梯度更新规则应在作用于对应权重块的对称群下保持等变；2. 对一般矩阵层统一了双正交等变更新视角（涵盖Spectral Descent、Muon、Scion、Polar Gradient等）；3. 将等变思想从正交群推广到置换群和共享平移对称性，为嵌入矩阵、LM头、SwiGLU MLP投影、MoE路由器矩阵等不同参数块推导了对应的对称性兼容优化器（包括单边谱、行范数、混合行范数/谱、行感知、列感知、中心化行范数、左谱更新）。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-0.6B、Gemma 3 1B、OLMoE-1B-7B、gpt-oss等多种稠密和稀疏MoE语言模型预训练实验中，对称性兼容的更新方法在最终验证损失上持续优于AdamW，且在多个案例中提升了训练稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 对称性兼容的优化器设计原则是有效的，能够弥合神经网络架构的等变性质与优化器坐标式更新之间的几何鸿沟，为不同参数块匹配合适的等变更新可系统性地提升深度学习训练效果。

title: SURGE: Approximation-free Training Free Particle Filter for Diffusion Surrogate
summary: Diffusion-based generative models increasingly rely on inference-time guidance, adding a drift term or reweighting mixture of experts, to improve sample quality on task-specific objectives. However, most existing techniques require repeated score or gradient evaluations, introducing bias, high computational overhead, or both. We introduce \texttt{URGE}, Unbiased Resampling via Girsanov Estimation, a derivative-free inference-time scaling algorithm that performs path-wise importance reweighting via a Girsanov change of measure. Instead of computing gradient-based particle weights in previous work, \texttt{URGE} attaches a simple multiplicative weight to each simulated trajectory and periodically resamples. No score, no Hessian, and no PDE evaluation is required. We establish an equivalence between path-wise and particle-wise SMC: the Girsanov path weight admits a backward conditional expectation that recovers the previous particle-level weights, guaranteeing that both schemes produce the same unbiased terminal law. Empirically, \texttt{URGE} outperforms existing inference-time guidance baselines on synthetic tests and diffusion-model benchmarks, achieving better generation quality, while being significantly simpler to implement and fully gradient-free.

AI.tldr: URGE是一种无需梯度的推理时重采样算法，通过Girsanov测度变换对扩散模型轨迹进行路径重要性加权，在无偏条件下提升生成质量，计算简单且效果优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型推理时引导方法需重复计算分数或梯度，存在偏差和高计算开销，亟需一种无偏、高效且免梯度的推理时缩放算法。
AI.method: 提出URGE算法：基于Girsanov测度变化对每条模拟轨迹赋予简单乘性权重，无需分数、Hessian或PDE计算，并定期执行重采样；理论上证明路径权重与粒子权重的后验条件期望等价，保证无偏性。
AI.result: 在合成测试和扩散模型基准上，URGE在生成质量上优于现有推理时引导基线，实现完全免梯度、实现更简单且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: URGE提供了一种无偏、免梯度的推理时引导方案，在理论上建立了路径级与粒子级序贯蒙特卡洛的等价性，为扩散模型的高效推理提供了新范式。

title: When Is Rank-1 Steering Cheap? Geometry, Granularity, and Budgeted Search
summary:
Activation steering offers a lightweight way to control LLMs without retraining, but its effectiveness varies sharply across concepts. Prior work often reads this variability as evidence that many concepts are not captured by a single steering direction. We argue instead that much of it reflects search difficulty: a useful rank-1 intervention often exists, but finding it can be expensive.
  We formalize rank-1 steering as a budget-constrained optimization over intervention layer and coefficient. Across concepts and model families, prompt-boundary directional alignment predicts where effective interventions occur, enabling geometry-guided search that reaches high utility with substantially fewer evaluations, reducing the trials needed to recover 95\% of best-found utility by 39.8\% on average across three model families. To explain why some concepts remain expensive even under better search, we introduce \emph{concept granularity}, a measure of directional heterogeneity across contrastive contexts. Granularity distinguishes concepts whose difference vectors share a stable global direction from those where prompts agree locally within each input but the utility-maximizing direction rotates systematically across inputs. Higher granularity is associated with slower convergence and lower best-found performance (Pearson $r{=}0.44$ with trials-to-95\%, $r{=}{-}0.46$ with best-found utility, both $p<0.001$).
  We present \textit{GRACE}, a Granularity- and Representation-Aware Concept Engineering framework that uses activation geometry to diagnose the dominant source of steering difficulty, select the appropriate remedy, and allocate optimization effort efficiently. Our results shift the frame from ``\textit{when does rank-1 fail?}'' to ``\textit{when is rank-1 cheap and stable?}'', turning activation geometry from a descriptive tool into an actionable prior for LLM control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出激活干预效果不佳主要源于搜索困难而非概念本身不可线性表示。通过引入提示边界方向对齐性（指导几何搜索）和概念粒度（衡量方向异质性）两种几何度量，构建了GRACE框架，可将达到95%最优效用的搜索次数平均降低39.8%，并从“何时秩1干预失败”转向“何时秩1干预廉价且稳定”的问题视角。
AI.motivation: 现有激活干预方法在不同概念上效果差异显著，以往研究将此归因于概念本身无法被单一方向捕获。本文认为这种变异性很大程度上反映了搜索困难——有用的秩1干预往往存在，但找到它代价高昂。需要解释这种变异的来源并设计更高效的搜索策略。
AI.method: (1) 将秩1干预形式化为干预层和系数的预算约束优化问题；(2) 提出提示边界方向对齐性（prompt-boundary directional alignment）作为几何引导，预测有效干预的位置；(3) 引入概念粒度（concept granularity）衡量跨对比上下文的语义方向异质性；(4) 构建GRACE框架，利用激活几何诊断干预困难的主导原因，选择适当补救措施并高效分配优化预算。
AI.result: 几何引导搜索将恢复95%最优效用的试验次数平均减少39.8%（跨三个模型系列）。概念粒度与收敛速度（r=0.44, p<0.001）和最优效用（r=-0.46, p<0.001）显著相关，高粒度概念更难优化。
AI.conclusion: 应将关注点从“何时秩1干预失败”转向“何时秩1干预廉价且稳定”，激活几何可作为LLM控制的可操作先验，而非仅描述性工具。

title: TOBench: A Task-Oriented Omni-Modal Benchmark for Real-World Tool-Using Agents
summary: Tool-using agents are increasingly expected to operate across realistic professional workflows, where they must interpret multimodal inputs, coordinate external tools, inspect intermediate artifacts, and revise their actions before producing a final result. Existing benchmarks, however, often evaluate tool use, computer use, and multimodal reasoning in isolation, leaving a gap between benchmark settings and end-to-end omni-modal tool use in the real world. To address this gap, we introduce MM-ToolBench, a benchmark and evaluation harness for task-oriented omni-modal tool use. MM-ToolBench contains 100 executable tasks from two macro task families, Customer Service and Intelligent Creation, covering 20 subcategory slices and supported by 27 MCP servers with 324 tools. The central design of MM-ToolBench is closed-loop multimodal verification: agents must execute tools, inspect rendered or transformed artifacts, and self-correct when outputs fail task-specific requirements. To make such evaluation scalable and verifiable, MM-ToolBench couples MCP-based execution with task-specific grounded evaluators and a semi-automated construction pipeline for scenario discovery, task instantiation, evaluator synthesis, and human audit. Experiments on 15 contemporary agentic models show that MM-ToolBench remains highly challenging: Claude Opus 4.6, commonly regarded as one of the strongest coding-agent models, achieves only 32.0% task success, far below the 94.0% human benchmark. We envision MM-ToolBench as a practical foundation for evaluating and advancing next-generation omni-modal tool-using agents through closed-loop multimodal verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-ToolBench，一个面向任务型全模态工具使用的基准测试与评估框架，包含100个可执行任务、27个MCP服务器、324个工具，采用闭环多模态验证机制。实验表明最强模型Claude Opus 4.6仅达32.0%任务成功率，远低于人类94.0%的基准。
AI.motivation: 现有基准往往将工具使用、计算机操作和多模态推理分开评估，缺乏能够反映真实世界中端到端全模态工具使用的评估标准，存在从基准设置到现实应用之间的差距。
AI.method: 构建了包含100个可执行任务的基准，覆盖客服和智能创作两大宏观任务族、20个子类；基于MCP协议集成27个服务器上的324个工具；采用闭环多模态验证机制，要求模型执行工具、检查产物并自我修正；设计了半自动化构建流水线进行场景发现、任务实例化、评估器合成和人工审核。
AI.result: 对15个当代智能体模型进行实验，最强模型Claude Opus 4.6仅达32.0%任务成功率，人类基准为94.0%，表明该基准具有高度挑战性。
AI.conclusion: MM-ToolBench可作为评估和推进下一代全模态工具使用智能体的实用基础，通过闭环多模态验证推动该领域发展。

title: Robust Optimal Reinsurance, Investment,and Surplus Allocation for Epstein-Zin Preferences
summary: In this paper, we investigate the robust optimal reinsurance,investment,and internal surplus distribution (i.e., consumption) problem for an insurer with Epstein-Zin recursive preferences in an incomplete market. It is assumed that the insurer can allocate wealth to a financial market consisting of a risk-free asset and a risky asset, where the price process of the risky asset follows a diffusion process with a stochastic drift rate governed by an Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (O-U) process. For both the unit and non-unit elasticity of intertemporal substitution (EIS) cases, by applying the classical dynamic programming approach, we derive explicit solutions for the optimal robust reinsurance, investment,and consumption strategies and also verify that the obtained solutions indeed solve the optimal control problem. Furthermore, we compare the robust solutions with their non-robust counterparts, and the comparative results shown in the figures are consistent with economic intuition. Finally, we contrast the exact solutions with the Campbell-Shiller approximation and assess the accuracy of the approximation method.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不完全市场中具有Epstein-Zin递归偏好的保险人的稳健最优再保险、投资和内部盈余分配（消费）问题，在风险资产价格由O-U过程驱动的设定下，推导了单位和非单位跨期替代弹性情形的显式解，并与非稳健解及Campbell-Shiller近似解进行了比较。
AI.motivation: 在不完全市场环境下，保险人面临模型不确定性和跨期替代弹性差异带来的决策挑战，现有研究缺乏对Epstein-Zin偏好下稳健再保险、投资与消费联合决策的显式解分析。
AI.method: 采用经典动态规划方法，分别处理单位和非单位EIS情形，通过求解鲁棒HJB方程得到显式最优策略，并通过与Campbell-Shiller近似对比评估近似精度。
AI.result: 给出了两种EIS情形下稳健最优再保险、投资和消费策略的显式解；稳健解与非稳健解的比较结果符合经济学直觉；Campbell-Shiller近似方法在一定条件下具有较好的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 动态规划方法能有效求解Epstein-Zin偏好下保险人的稳健最优决策问题，模型不确定性显著影响最优策略，且近似方法可用于简化计算但需注意其适用范围。

title: ORACLE: Anticipating Scams from Partial Trajectories in Streaming App Usage
summary: Smartphone scams are increasingly prevalent and typically manifest as multi-stage, cross-application processes with gradually emerging intent. Effective intervention thus requires anticipating scams before the intent becomes explicit. This is inherently challenging, as decisions must rely on partial trajectories with temporally distributed evidence. In this paper, we propose \textbf{ORACLE} Online Reasoning for Anticipating Cross-temporal Latent thrEats, the first agentic framework for early scam anticipation from \textit{streaming app-usage} trajectories. To support this setting, we curate a real-world long-horizon benchmark of streaming app-usage trajectories, covering 12 scam types, spanning extended periods (15 days on average), involving diverse applications (95 apps), and interleaving normal and scam behaviors. To address fragmented evidence, we introduce a self-evolving context manager that adaptively consolidates entity-centric interactions over time, enabling more effective reconstruction of cross-temporal evidence from partial observations. To enhance sensitivity to latent early-stage signals, we propose an on-policy self-distillation scheme in which a teacher model, conditioned on summarized anti-scam reflections and clues by skills, supervises a student model without access to such reflections. This scheme thereby distills evidence-informed knowledge and improves recognition of emerging fraud patterns from partial trajectories. Experiments show that \method{} consistently improves early scam anticipation, yielding timely warnings while reducing false alerts in realistic streaming scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ORACLE，首个面向流式应用使用轨迹的早期诈骗预警智能体框架，通过自进化上下文管理器和在线自蒸馏方案，实现对跨时间、跨应用的隐蔽诈骗行为的早期预判。
AI.motivation: 智能手机诈骗日益猖獗且呈现多阶段、跨应用、意图逐步暴露的特点，传统方法需要在意图明确后才能识别，缺乏对部分轨迹中碎片化证据的早期预测能力，亟需能够在流式场景下提前预警的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 构建了覆盖12种诈骗类型、平均跨度15天、涉及95个应用的长时间流式应用使用轨迹基准数据集；2) 提出自进化上下文管理器，自适应整合实体为中心的跨时间交互信息；3) 提出在线自蒸馏方案，教师模型基于反诈骗反思和线索技能指导学生模型，增强对部分轨迹中早期信号敏感性。
AI.result: 实验表明ORACLE在流式场景下持续提升早期诈骗预判能力，能在更早时间发出及时预警，同时减少误报。
AI.conclusion: ORACLE框架通过自适应上下文管理和在线知识蒸馏，有效解决了跨时间碎片化证据下的早期诈骗预警问题，为移动安全领域的实时干预提供了可行方案。

title: From Static Risk to Dynamic Trajectories: Toward World-Model-Inspired Clinical Prediction
summary: Clinical decision-making is a feedback system where risk estimates influence treatment, which in turn changes disease trajectories, and both shape clinicians' measurement practices. Static prediction often fails clinically: models trained on observational care logs conflate disease biology with clinician behavior, particularly under treatment confounder feedback and irregular or informative observation. This Review focuses on intervention-aware disease trajectory modeling in clinical AI--methods estimating patient-specific longitudinal disease evolution and assessing trajectory changes under alternative treatments. We organize the field around six linked components: three decision tasks (factual forecasting, counterfactual estimation, policy evaluation) and three data-generating mechanisms (disease evolution, treatment assignment, observation process) that determine identifiability. We present the first unified framework bridging forecasting, counterfactual trajectories, and policy evaluation across discrete/continuous time, explicitly addressing treatment assignment, time-varying confounding, and observation bias. We synthesize key method families (multistate/joint models, temporal point-process, deep sequence architectures, longitudinal causal inference), map them to relevant components, and align evaluation with claim strength via overlap diagnostics, uncertainty quantification, off-policy robustness, and target-trial validation. This synthesis advances benchmark prediction to decision-grade clinical evidence, enabling treatment-sensitive individualized futures, pre-deployment policy stress-testing, and safer closed-loop learning health systems that adapt/abstain when evidence is insufficient.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的干预感知疾病轨迹建模框架，将临床决策中的事实预测、反事实估计和政策评估三个决策任务与疾病演化、治疗分配和观察过程三个数据生成机制相结合，系统解决了治疗混杂反馈、不规则观测等挑战，为实现从基准预测到决策级临床证据的转化提供了方法论基础。
AI.motivation: 静态预测模型在临床实践中常常失败，因为观测数据中的治疗分配和观察过程存在混杂反馈，导致模型混淆了疾病生物学与临床医生行为。现有方法缺乏一个统一的框架来同时处理事实预测、反事实轨迹和政策评估，且未能系统解决治疗分配、时变混杂和观测偏差等关键问题。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个六组分统一框架：三个决策任务（事实预测、反事实估计、政策评估）和三个数据生成机制（疾病演化、治疗分配、观察过程），涵盖离散/连续时间设置。系统梳理了多状态/联合模型、时间点过程、深度序列架构和纵向因果推断等关键方法族，并通过重叠诊断、不确定性量化、离策略鲁棒性和目标试验验证来对齐评估与声明强度。
AI.result: 提出了首个统一的干预感知疾病轨迹建模框架，明确了在不同数据生成机制下的可识别性条件，将方法族映射到框架的对应组件，并建立了评估与声明强度的对齐体系。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将基准预测推进到决策级临床证据，支持治疗敏感的个体化预后预测、部署前政策压力测试以及更安全的闭环学习健康系统。

title: Resolvent Moreau identities without monotonicity: theory and applications to Gabay duality, Douglas--Rachford and ADMM
summary: Duality is most often defined as a relationship between convex functions. If those functions are nonconvex, classical duality breaks down. Notwithstanding, we show that another kind of duality still exists, not between the functions themselves, but between the so-called resolvent operators used to solve associated problems. In fact, this duality-like relationship holds for any set-valued mapping, and is a generalization of the Moreau's identity. We use this duality to study existing operator schemes and to design new ones. In particular, we show that the duality-like relationship Daniel Gabay illuminated between the Douglas--Rachford splitting (DR) and the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) extends to nonmonotone inclusion problems. We use this relationship to provide explicit counterexamples to the convergence of ADMM in several open cases, by studying the (easier to analyse) DR scheme. Motivated by our observations, we design a class of convergent resolvent homotopy schemes and use them to solve nonconvex-regularised least absolute deviations problems. This important problem class has received little attention in the literature, since the convex component of the objective does not enjoy strong convexity.

AI.tldr: 本文发现非凸函数之间仍存在一种基于预解算子的对偶关系，是Moreau恒等式的推广。该关系将Douglas-Rachford分裂与ADMM的联系扩展至非单调包含问题，并用于设计可收敛的预解同伦方案，解决非凸正则化最小绝对偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 经典对偶理论局限于凸函数，非凸情形下对偶性失效。本文旨在探索非凸函数间是否存在某种形式的对偶关系，并利用该关系设计新的求解算法。
AI.method: 1) 证明任意集值映射间存在基于预解算子的对偶关系，推广Moreau恒等式；2) 将该对偶关系用于分析现有算子分裂方案；3) 证明DR与ADMM的对偶关系可扩展至非单调包含问题；4) 通过DR方案构造ADMM收敛的反例；5) 设计可收敛的预解同伦方案并应用于非凸正则化最小绝对偏差问题。
AI.result: 建立了非凸情形下基于预解算子的对偶关系；将DR-ADMM对偶关系扩展至非单调包含问题；给出了ADMM在若干开放情形下收敛性的显式反例；设计了可收敛的预解同伦方案。
AI.conclusion: 非凸函数间存在基于预解算子的对偶关系，该关系可推广Moreau恒等式，用于分析算子分裂算法并设计新方案，有效解决非凸正则化最小绝对偏差问题。

title: Machine Learning-Based Pre-Test Risk Stratification for PCR-Confirmed Chlamydia Using Patient-Reported Data and Urine Biomarkers
summary:
Early identification of individuals at elevated risk of Chlamydia trachomatis infection may enable optimal use of molecular testing in resource-aware screening. We evaluate the feasibility of pre-test risk stratification (PTRS) using machine-learning models trained on routinely available, non-invasive clinical data.
  A curated dataset of 93 urine samples with PCR reference labels was analyzed using three feature groups: patient-reported history and symptoms, urine biomarkers from standard urinalysis, and their combination. Five supervised classifiers were evaluated using stratified 5-fold cross-validation with out-of-fold probability estimates. Performance was assessed using area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) and threshold-dependent metrics, with uncertainty quantified via bootstrap confidence intervals.
  Models using only patient-reported data showed moderate discrimination (AUC up to 0.72).
