Urine biomarker-based models demonstrated slightly lower peak discrimination but more consistent performance, with ensemble methods yielding the strongest results. Combining feature groups marginally increased the peak AUC and reduced performance variability across models, indicating improved robustness.
  Findings indicate that urine biomarkers provide a reliable predictive signal for PTRS that is complementary to patient-reported information, while feature integration enhances robustness. This work supports the integration of non-invasive, routinely available information for PTRS into screening workflows, including decentralized or home-based PCR contexts, to optimize testing prioritization.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了利用机器学习模型对尿液样本进行衣原体感染预检风险分层的可行性。结合患者报告信息和尿液生物标志物的综合模型在AUC和稳健性方面表现最佳，表明非侵入性常规数据可用于优化筛查优先级。
AI.motivation: 早期识别沙眼衣原体感染高风险个体，可在资源有限的筛查场景中优化分子检测资源的配置。
AI.method: 基于93份尿液样本（PCR参考标签），使用三组特征（患者报告数据、尿液生物标志物及其组合），评估五种监督分类器，采用分层5折交叉验证和bootstrap置信区间分析。
AI.result: 患者报告数据模型AUC最高0.72；尿液生物标志物模型一致性更好；组合特征模型AUC略有提升且性能变异性降低，稳健性提高。
AI.conclusion: 尿液生物标志物提供与患者报告信息互补的可靠预测信号，特征整合增强模型稳健性，支持将非侵入性常规信息整合入筛查流程以优化检测优先级。

title: How do Humans Process AI-generated Hallucination Contents: a Neuroimaging Study
summary: While AI-generated hallucinations pose considerable risks, the underlying cognitive mechanisms by which humans can successfully recognize or be misled by these hallucinations remain unclear. To address this problem, this paper explores humans' neural dynamics to characterize how the brain processes hallucinated content. We record EEG signals from 27 participants while they are performing a verification task to judge the correctness of image descriptions generated by a multi-modal large language model (MLLM). Based on an averaged event-related potential (ERP) study, we reveal that multiple cognitive processes, e.g., semantic integration, inferential processing, memory retrieval, and cognitive load, exhibit distinct patterns when humans process hallucinated versus non-hallucinated content. Notably, neural responses to hallucinations that were misjudged versus correctly judged by human participants showed significant differences. This indicates that misjudged AI-generated hallucinations failed to trigger the standard neurocognitive fact verification pathway.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过记录27名参与者在判断多模态大模型生成的图像描述正确性时的脑电图信号，揭示了人脑处理幻觉与非幻觉内容时在语义整合、推理加工、记忆检索和认知负荷等多个认知过程中呈现不同的神经动态模式，并且发现被误判的AI生成幻觉未能触发标准的事实验证神经通路。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI生成的幻觉带来重大风险，但人类能够成功识别或被误导的潜在认知机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 记录27名参与者在执行图像描述验证任务时的EEG信号，基于平均事件相关电位（ERP）分析，比较人脑处理幻觉与非幻觉内容时的神经动态差异。
AI.result: 发现多个认知过程（语义整合、推理加工、记忆检索、认知负荷）在处理幻觉与非幻觉内容时呈现不同模式；被误判与被正确判断的幻觉在神经响应上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 被误判的AI生成幻觉未能触发标准的神经认知事实验证通路。

title: Trajectory convergence and $o(t^{-2})$ rates for Nesterov accelerated primal-dual dynamics without Lipschitz gradient assumption
summary:
We consider the Nesterov accelerated primal-dual dynamical system \[  egin{cases} \ddot{x}(t)+\dfracα{t}\dot{x}(t) +
abla f(x(t)) +A^	op igl(λ(t)+θt\dotλ(t) igr)+βA^	op(Ax(t)-b)=0,\[0.6em] \ddotλ(t)+\dfracα{t}\dotλ(t) - igl(A(x(t)+θt\dot{x}(t))-b igr)=0, \end{cases} \] which is linked to the linearly constrained optimization problem $
  \min_{x\in\mathbb{R}^n} f(x),\ s.t.\ Ax=b, $ where $α\ge 3$ and $f$ is convex and continuously differentiable. In a Hilbert framework, the weak convergence of its trajectory was established by Boţ and Nguyen (J. Differential Equations, 303:369--406, 2021) under $α>3$ and the Lipschitz continuity assumption on $
abla f$. In this paper, we prove in finite-dimensional spaces that the trajectory converges to a primal-dual solution for $α\ge3$, without assuming Lipschitz continuity of $
abla f$. Moreover, when $α>3$, we establish improved $o(t^{-2})$ convergence rates for both the objective residual and the feasibility violation. Our analysis relies on Bregman-distance arguments, instead of the Lipschitz continuity of $
abla f$. The same strategy can also be extended to time-scaled primal-dual dynamics to obtain analogous convergence results. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first results in this topic without Lipschitz gradient assumption. Our result also present the first work on the convergence of the trajectory of the accelerated primal-dual dynamical system for the critical case $α=3$.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Nesterov加速原始-对偶动力系统，在有限维空间中证明了当α≥3时轨迹收敛到原始-对偶解，且无需∇f的Lipschitz连续性假设；当α>3时建立了目标残差和可行性违背的o(t^{-2})改进收敛速率。这是首个不依赖Lipschitz梯度假设以及处理临界情形α=3的收敛性结果。
AI.motivation: 现有工作（Boţ和Nguyen, 2021）在Hilbert框架下仅当α>3且假设∇f Lipschitz连续时建立了该动力系统的弱收敛性。本文旨在去除Lipschitz连续性假设，并将收敛性证明推广到α≥3（包括临界情形α=3）。
AI.method: 采用Bregman距离论证替代传统的Lipschitz连续性假设来建立收敛性；该方法还可推广到时间尺度变换的原始-对偶动力学系统。
AI.result: 1) 在有限维空间中，当α≥3时轨迹收敛到原始-对偶解，无需∇f Lipschitz连续；2) 当α>3时，目标残差和可行性违背达到o(t^{-2})的改进收敛速率；3) 首次处理了临界情形α=3的轨迹收敛问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文在无Lipschitz梯度假设下获得了α≥3时Nesterov加速原始-对偶动力系统的收敛性证明，填补了该领域关于临界情形α=3的研究空白，为约束优化问题的加速算法理论提供了新工具。

title: Lost or Hidden? A Concept-Level Forgetting in Supervised Continual Learning
summary: Continual learning studies how models can adapt to new tasks while retaining previously acquired knowledge. Although a broad spectrum of methods has been proposed to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, the field remains predominantly performance-driven, with limited insight into what forgetting actually corresponds to within the vision model's representation space. Prior work has primarily analyzed forgetting through task-level performance or coarse measures of representational drift, without disentangling output-level accessibility from changes in finer-grained internal structure. To this end, we propose a diagnostic framework that leverages Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) to define a task-anchored latent feature space, enabling analysis of how task-specific information evolves at a finer granularity, where individual SAE latents are treated as concept proxies for recurring and relatively disentangled visual patterns in the model's internal computations. Within this framework, we decompose forgetting into apparent concept deletion, recoverability, and decodability. We show that a large portion of seemingly lost concept-level information can often be recovered under linearity assumption, with concept decodability degrading as more tasks are introduced. Overall, our findings suggest that a significant part of concept-level forgetting can be attributed to changes in the representational accessibility rather than complete information erasure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）的诊断框架，通过将SAE潜变量视为概念代理，从概念删除、可恢复性和可解码性三个维度分解灾难性遗忘，发现大部分概念级遗忘源于表征可访问性变化而非信息完全擦除。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法主要关注任务级性能或粗粒度的表征漂移度量，未能区分输出级可访问性与内部细粒度结构变化，缺乏对遗忘在视觉模型表征空间中真正含义的深入理解。
AI.method: 利用稀疏自编码器（SAE）定义任务锚定的潜在特征空间，将SAE潜变量作为重复出现且相对解耦的视觉模式的概念代理，将遗忘分解为概念删除、可恢复性和可解码性三个维度进行分析。
AI.result: 大部分看似丢失的概念级信息在线性假设下可以被恢复；概念可解码性随任务数量增加而逐渐退化；概念级遗忘主要源于表征可访问性变化而非信息完全擦除。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习中的遗忘在很大程度上是表征可访问性（accessibility）的问题，而非信息彻底丢失，这为设计更有效的缓解策略提供了新的视角。

title: Harnessing AI for Inverse Partial Differential Equation Problems: Past, Present, and Prospects
summary: Solving inverse partial differential equation (PDE) problems is a fundamental topic in scientific research due to its broad significance across a wide range of real-world applications. Inverse PDE problems arise across medical imaging, geophysics, materials science, and aerodynamics, where the goal is to infer hidden causes, design structures, or control physical states. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive review of recent advances in solving inverse PDE problems using artificial intelligence (AI). We first introduce the basic formulation, key challenges, and traditional numerical foundations of inverse PDE problems, and then organize it into three major categories: inverse problems, inverse design, and control problems. For each category, we further present a methodological paradigms, and review representative state-of-the-art approaches from recent years. We then summarize representative applications across scientific and industrial domains, including mechanical systems, aerodynamic problems, thermal systems, full-waveform inversion, system identification, and medical imaging. Finally, we discuss open challenges and future prospects, such as physics-informed architectures, limited real-world data, uncertainty quantification, and inverse foundation models. This survey aims to provide the first unified and systematic perspective on AI for inverse PDE problems, demonstrating how modern learning-based methods are reshaping inverse problems, inverse design, and control problems in PDE-governed systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了利用人工智能求解偏微分方程反问题的最新进展，涵盖反问题、逆设计与控制问题三大类别，总结了代表性方法和应用，并讨论了未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 偏微分方程反问题在医学成像、地球物理、材料科学和空气动力学等多个领域具有广泛而重要的实际应用价值，传统数值方法面临计算复杂度和病态性等挑战，亟需借助人工智能提供新的解决范式。
AI.method: 首先介绍反问题的基本定义、关键挑战和传统数值基础；然后将其组织为反问题、逆设计和控制问题三大类别，每类再细分方法学范式，并综述近年代表性工作；最后总结各领域的典型应用。
AI.result: 系统梳理了AI驱动的PDE反问题研究全貌，给出了三类问题的统一视角和方法分类，并汇总了在机械系统、气动问题、热系统、全波形反演、系统辨识和医学成像等领域的代表性应用成果。
AI.conclusion: 该综述首次为AI求解PDE反问题提供了统一而系统的视角，展示了现代学习方法如何重塑PDE控制系统中反问题、逆设计与控制问题。未来方向包括物理信息架构、有限真实数据、不确定性量化及反问题基础模型等。

title: Optimizing vaccine allocation in an age-structured SIR model
summary: We study an optimal control problem where the objective is to find the best vaccine allocation during an epidemic outbreak. The epidemic dynamics is described by an age-structured SIR model with nonlocal interactions. Both the infection and death rates depend on the age of the individuals, reflecting the effect of heterogeneities within the population. Our model includes a vaccination term, depending on time and age, which serves as a control function. The aim is to minimize the impact of the epidemic, that is, the number of casualties, under the constraint of limited vaccine supply. In a first part, we show that our optimization problem is equivalent to another static optimization problem. We then use this new optimization problem to obtain qualitative properties for the optimal allocations of vaccines.

AI.tldr: 研究疫情中年龄结构SIR模型的最优疫苗分配问题，通过将动态优化转化为静态优化，得到最优分配方案的定性性质。
AI.motivation: 在有限疫苗供应约束下，寻找最小化疫情伤亡人数（特别是考虑年龄异质性导致的感染率和死亡率差异）的最优疫苗分配策略。
AI.method: 建立年龄结构SIR模型（含非局部相互作用），将疫苗接种作为时间和年龄依赖的控制函数；首先证明原动态优化问题等价于一个静态优化问题，然后利用该等价性推导最优疫苗分配的定性性质。
AI.result: 成功将动态最优控制问题转化为静态优化问题，并基于此得到了最优疫苗分配方案的定性特征。
AI.conclusion: 通过问题转化，为有限疫苗供应下考虑年龄异质性的最优分配策略提供了理论分析框架和定性指导。

title: Does Weight Decay Enhance Training Stability?
summary: In modern deep learning, weight decay is often credited with "stabilizing" training dynamics, diverging from its classical role as a static regularization penalty. We investigate a fundamental question: *does weight decay stabilize training dynamics, and if so, through which mechanism?* Indeed, training stability is understood through different but related notions in the literature. We consider how weight decay affects the parameter-space dynamics and loss sharpness by analyzing its effects at the \emph{Edge of Stability} (EoS). We show that weight decay robustly slows *progressive sharpening}. Furthermore, we uncover a striking architecture-dependent phase transition. In CNNs, weight decay dampens the oscillations at the EoS, while in MLPs, increasing weight decay causes a phase transition in which the sharpness stabilizes at a threshold significantly below the theoretical $\frac{2}η$ boundary. We develop a mathematical framework that accurately models these phenomena and identify the global alignment of the parameter vector and the sharpness gradient as the mechanistic driver of the phase transition. Importantly, we show that these phenomena translate into stability in terms of search in function-space (NTK). Last, this shows that curvature thresholds obtained from convex/quadratic heuristics may not be reliable stability diagnostics under regularization.

AI.tldr: 本文探究权重衰减（weight decay）在深度学习训练动态中的稳定化作用机制。研究发现，权重衰减能有效减缓“渐进锐化”过程，并在CNN和MLP中展现出不同的相变行为：CNN中权重衰减抑制EoS振荡，MLP中则导致锐度稳定在低于理论边界的阈值。作者建立数学模型，指出参数向量与锐度梯度的全局对齐是相变的机制驱动因素，并证明这些现象可转化至函数空间（NTK）的稳定性。最后，研究表明基于凸/二次启发式的曲率阈值在正则化下并非可靠的稳定性诊断指标。
AI.motivation: 传统上权重衰减被视为静态正则化惩罚，但在现代深度学习中常被认为能“稳定”训练动态。作者希望从机制层面回答：权重衰减是否确实稳定训练动态，以及通过何种机制实现。
AI.method: 在Edge of Stability（EoS）框架下分析权重衰减对参数空间动态和损失锐度的影响。通过理论建模与实验验证，研究CNN和MLP中的相变行为，并分析参数向量与锐度梯度的对齐关系，以及NTK视角下的函数空间稳定性。
AI.result: 1) 权重衰减稳健地减缓了渐进锐化过程；2) 存在架构依赖的相变：CNN中权重衰减抑制EoS振荡，MLP中锐度稳定在显著低于理论边界2/η的阈值；3) 参数向量与锐度梯度的全局对齐是相变的机制驱动因素；4) 这些现象可转化为NTK函数空间的稳定性；5) 凸/二次启发式的曲率阈值在正则化下不可靠。
AI.conclusion: 权重衰减通过抑制渐进锐化和引发架构依赖的相变来稳定训练动态，其机制源于参数向量与锐度梯度的全局对齐。研究同时揭示了传统曲率阈值在正则化下的局限性，为理解深度学习中的隐式正则化与训练稳定性提供了新视角。

title: M$^2$FedAQI: Multimodal Federated Learning for Air Quality Prediction on Heterogeneous Edge Devices
summary: Accurate air quality prediction is essential for public health, environmental monitoring, and industrial safety. However, most existing approaches rely on centralized learning paradigms, which introduce challenges related to scalability, privacy preservation, and communication overhead in distributed Internet of Things (IoT) environments. Moreover, current federated learning (FL) based solutions predominantly utilize unimodal data, limiting their capability to capture complex environmental patterns. To address these limitations, we propose M$^2$FedAQI, a lightweight multimodal federated framework for decentralized Air Quality Index (AQI) prediction across heterogeneous edge devices. The proposed framework integrates visual and tabular modalities through a feature modulation based fusion mechanism that enables efficient cross-modal interaction while maintaining low computational overhead. M$^2$FedAQI is evaluated on two benchmark datasets, PM25Vision and TRAQID, for both classification and regression tasks under centralized and federated settings. Experimental results demonstrate that M$^2$FedAQI consistently outperforms existing approaches, achieving improvements of up to 11.0\% in Accuracy, 3.53\% in AUC, 12.2\% in F1-score, and 18.0\% in $R^2$, while reducing MAE and RMSE by up to 25.4\% and 20.4\%, respectively, compared with the strongest baselines. Furthermore, deployment on heterogeneous edge devices demonstrates efficient resource utilization in terms of communication overhead, memory footprint, and computational cost. To enhance communication security, TLS-based authentication is incorporated to ensure secure client participation and protect the FL communication channel from unauthorized third-party access without modifying the underlying FL protocol.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M²FedAQI，一种轻量级多模态联邦学习框架，用于分布式IoT环境中的空气质量指数(AQI)预测。该框架通过特征调制融合机制整合视觉和表格模态数据，在集中式和联邦设置下均优于现有方法，在准确率、AUC、F1-score、R²等指标上提升显著，同时降低MAE和RMSE，并在异构边缘设备上实现高效资源利用，且通过TLS认证增强通信安全。
AI.motivation: 现有空气质量预测方法大多依赖集中式学习范式，在分布式IoT环境中面临可扩展性差、隐私保护不足和通信开销大等问题。同时，当前基于联邦学习的方案主要使用单模态数据，难以捕获复杂的环境模式。
AI.method: 提出M²FedAQI轻量级多模态联邦框架：(1) 集成视觉和表格模态数据；(2) 采用基于特征调制的融合机制实现高效跨模态交互且计算开销低；(3) 支持异构边缘设备上的联邦学习部署；(4) 引入TLS认证增强通信安全，不修改底层联邦协议。
AI.result: 在PM25Vision和TRAQID两个基准数据集上，分类和回归任务中均优于现有方法：准确率提升11.0%，AUC提升3.53%，F1-score提升12.2%，R²提升18.0%，MAE降低25.4%，RMSE降低20.4%。在异构边缘设备上部署表现出高效资源利用。
AI.conclusion: M²FedAQI通过多模态融合和联邦学习有效解决了分布式AQI预测中的可扩展性、隐私和通信效率问题，为实际IoT环境中的空气质量监测提供了可行方案。

title: Brain Vascular Age Prediction Using Cerebral Blood Flow Velocity and Machine Learning Algorithms
summary: Defining vascular age in terms of physiological function has become one focal point of the extensive studies to categorize and track chronological age. Transcranial Doppler (TCD) is a method by which cerebral blood flow velocity is measured along the major arteries feeding the human brain. This study aims to use features extracted from TCD to estimate chronological age and assess accelerated aging in subjects with various brain diseases. We predict subjects with various brain diseases to present with accelerated cerebrovascular aging when tested on various regression models trained by healthy subjects. 168 healthy subjects and 277 diseased subjects with bilateral TCD recordings of the middle cerebral artery were analyzed using the Morphological Analysis and Clustering of Intracranial Pressure (MOCAIP) algorithm. MOCAIP-generated features and heart rate variability features were used as input features for regression models to predict the brain vascular age. 66 subjects with acute stroke, 27 subjects with post stroke, 26 subjects with Alzheimer's disease, 23 subjects with mild cognitive impairment, and 135 established subjects were tested against the machine learning model to assess for accelerated cerebrovascular age. The trained model, on average, predicted healthy subjects' cerebrovascular age to be 3.69 years above their chronological age. Subjects with different disease conditions exhibited varying levels of age acceleration. The differences in healthy and diseased subjects' performances suggest that features generated using TCD may be relevant when evaluating accelerated cerebrovascular aging. Moreover, imbalanced datasets have been observed to affect the performance of machine-learning-based brain age prediction models.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用经颅多普勒超声（TCD）提取特征，通过机器学习回归模型评估脑血管年龄，并检测不同脑疾病患者的加速衰老情况。健康受试者的预测年龄平均高于实际年龄3.69岁，各类疾病患者表现出不同程度的年龄加速，表明TCD特征可用于评估脑血管加速衰老，同时数据集不平衡会影响模型性能。
AI.motivation: 以生理功能定义血管年龄已成为追踪和分类实际年龄的研究热点。本研究旨在利用TCD提取的特征来估计实际年龄，并评估各类脑疾病患者的加速衰老情况。
AI.method: 使用MOCAIP算法处理168名健康受试者和277名脑疾病患者的双侧大脑中动脉TCD记录，提取MOCAIP特征和心率变异性特征作为输入，训练回归模型预测脑血管年龄。测试对象包括急性中风（66人）、中风后（27人）、阿尔茨海默病（26人）、轻度认知障碍（23人）和已确诊患者（135人）。
AI.result: 健康受试者的预测脑血管年龄平均高于实际年龄3.69岁；不同疾病患者表现出不同程度的年龄加速；健康与患病受试者的性能差异表明TCD特征对评估脑血管加速衰老具有相关性；数据不平衡会影响机器学习脑年龄预测模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: TCD提取的特征可用于评估脑血管加速衰老，且数据不平衡是影响脑年龄预测模型性能的重要因素。

title: Null Controllability for Degenerate Parabolic Equations with Internal Control Applied on a Measurable Subset
summary: This work serves as a continuation of our preceding paper [28]. In that study, we presented a separable variable method to derive the Lebeau-Robbiano spectral inequality for a specific degenerate parabolic equation and subsequently employed it to demonstrate the null controllability of said equation when internal control is applied to an open subset. In the current paper, we reapply the separable variable method to attain the Lebeau-Robbiano spectral inequality for a different degenerate parabolic equation, and we substantiate the null controllability of this equation with internal control acting on a measurable subset. This approach may offer an alternative means of proving controllability results for degenerate parabolic equations.

AI.tldr: 本文延续前期工作，通过可分离变量法推导退化抛物方程的Lebeau-Robbiano谱不等式，并证明其在可测子集内部控制下的零能控性。
AI.motivation: 为退化抛物方程提供一种替代的可控性证明方法，延续并扩展前期研究中提出的方法框架。
AI.method: 采用可分离变量法（separable variable method）推导Lebeau-Robbiano谱不等式。
AI.result: 针对另一种退化抛物方程，通过可分离变量法获得了Lebeau-Robbiano谱不等式，并证明了该方程在可测子集内部控制下的零能控性。
AI.conclusion: 该可分离变量法为证明退化抛物方程的可控性结果提供了一种替代途径。

title: Your SaaS Is an Insurance Product: A Modeling Framework
comment: 23 pages, 2 figures, 7 tables. Companion code archived at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20213155
summary: Capped-usage SaaS products -- LLM subscriptions such as Claude Code and ChatGPT, cloud platforms such as Vercel and Cloudflare Workers, corporate benefit platforms, identity-verification services with liability transfer -- share a structural signature with insurance products: a fixed premium decoupled from realized consumption, stochastic per-user demand with heavy-tailed severity, a non-fungible cap that resets on a fixed schedule, and a portfolio-level exposure that requires reserve adequacy under tail risk. We argue that this is not an analogy. It is the same operational problem actuarial science has been tooled for decades to address, restated with new dependent variables (tokens, bandwidth bytes, function-invocations, gym check-ins) in place of medical claims. This paper proposes a modeling framework for capped-usage SaaS pricing built from frequency-severity decomposition, premium calculation principles, and Monte Carlo reserve adequacy. We map the framework to publicly observable subscription tiers in two domains (LLM services and cloud platforms), ground it in canonical health-insurance economics (Arrow 1963; Pauly 1968; Manning et al. 1987; Brot-Goldberg et al. 2017), and demonstrate divergence from traditional unit economics through a worked example. The contribution is operational rather than theoretical: not a new theorem, but vocabulary and tools currently absent from cs.LG/stat.ML practice.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了带用量上限的SaaS产品（如LLM订阅、云平台等）与保险产品具有相同的运作结构，并提出了一个基于精算科学的定价框架，包括频率-严重度分解、保费计算原理和蒙特卡洛准备金充足性分析。
AI.motivation: 现有cs.LG/stat.ML领域缺乏处理带上限SaaS产品定价的精算工具和术语，而这些产品与保险产品共享结构性特征，应该借鉴成熟精算科学的方法。
AI.method: 采用频率-严重度分解（frequency-severity decomposition）、保费计算原则（premium calculation principles）和蒙特卡洛准备金充足性分析（Monte Carlo reserve adequacy）构建定价框架，并映射到LLM服务和云平台等公开可观测的订阅层级。
AI.result: 通过实际案例展示了该框架与传统单位经济学（unit economics）的差异，验证了精算框架在SaaS定价中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架的贡献是操作性的而非理论性的——不是提出新定理，而是为cs.LG/stat.ML实践引入当前缺失的精算词汇和工具。

title: Mixing Times of Glauber Dynamics on Masked Language Models
summary: Masked language models (MLMs) define local conditional distributions over tokens but do not, in general, correspond to any consistent joint distribution over sequences. This raises a fundamental question: what global distributional behavior is induced when such conditionals are used iteratively for generation? We address this question by modeling iterative masked-token resampling as a Glauber dynamics Markov chain on the discrete space of token sequences. We first show that MLM conditionals are intrinsically incompatible: we introduce a rectangle test that certifies this incompatibility and empirically verify its prevalence across modern MLMs. We then provide a theoretical analysis of the induced Markov chain. Under bounded cross-token influence, we establish a high-temperature contraction result implying $O(n\log n)$ mixing time where $n$ is the sequence length. In contrast, we prove that under a uniform local margin condition, the chain exhibits metastability, with exponentially slow escape from semantic basins at low temperatures. Empirically, we demonstrate a phase transition in mixing behavior as a function of temperature and sequence length, consistent with the theoretical predictions. We further characterize the induced stationary behavior through semantic trajectories, identifying persistent structures such as long-lived traps and recurrent semantic basins, with political content serving as a measurable case study.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了掩码语言模型（MLM）的局部条件分布与全局联合分布的不一致性，将迭代掩码标记重采样建模为Glauber动力学马尔可夫链，从理论和实验两方面分析了该链在不同温度下的混合行为，发现了从快速混合到亚稳态的相变现象。
AI.motivation: MLM定义的是局部条件概率，但通常不对应任何一致的全局联合分布，这引发了一个根本性问题：当使用这些条件概率进行迭代生成时，会产生怎样的全局分布行为？作者旨在从理论上揭示这一现象。
AI.method: 将迭代掩码标记重采样建模为离散标记序列空间上的Glauber动力学马尔可夫链；提出矩形测试（rectangle test）来验证MLM条件分布的内在不兼容性；在有限跨标记影响下建立高温收缩结果（O(n log n)混合时间）；在均匀局部边际条件下证明低温亚稳态（指数慢逃逸）；通过实验验证温度与序列长度相关的相变。
AI.result: 矩形测试证实了现代MLM中条件分布的不兼容性普遍存在；高温条件下链在O(n log n)时间内混合；低温条件下链呈现亚稳态，从语义盆地逃逸呈指数缓慢；实验验证了温度驱动的相变行为；发现了长期陷阱和循环语义盆地等持久结构。
AI.conclusion: MLM的条件分布无法对应一致的联合分布，其迭代生成行为由温度控制：高温时快速混合，低温时陷入语义亚稳态。该研究为理解MLM的生成行为提供了理论基础，揭示了其内在的分布不一致性及其后果。

title: A Conflict-aware Evidential Framework for Reliable Sleep Stage Classification
summary: Multi-view learning has been widely applied for sleep stage classification using multi-modal data. However, existing methods typically assume that different modalities are well-aligned, which is often unattainable in real-world scenarios, thereby compromising the reliability of the staging results. In this paper, we propose ConfSleepNet, a conflict-aware evidential framework that dynamically resolves inter-view conflicts. The framework consists of multi-view evidence extraction and conflict-aware aggregation. In the first phase, it learns category-related evidence from different modalities, which represents the degree of support for individual sleep stages. Considering the inherent characteristics of varying modalities, we propose hybrid category structures for different modalities to promote more reasonable evidence learning. In the second phase, view-specific opinions, including prediction results and uncertainty, are constructed from the learned evidence. Notably, we propose a novel conflict-aware aggregation method that integrates these view-specific opinions into a reliable joint decision. This mechanism can effectively resolve conflicts among opinions and synthesize them into a reliable joint decision. Both theoretical analysis and experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of ConfSleepNet in sleep staging tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/By4te/ConfSleepNet_ICML2026/.

AI.tldr: ConfSleepNet是一个冲突感知的证据框架，通过多视图证据提取和冲突感知聚合两个阶段，动态解决多模态睡眠数据中的视角间冲突，从而实现更可靠的睡眠阶段分类。
AI.motivation: 现有多视图学习方法通常假设不同模态数据良好对齐，但在实际场景中这一假设难以满足，导致分期结果可靠性下降。
AI.method: 提出ConfSleepNet框架，包含两个阶段：(1) 多视图证据提取阶段，对不同模态学习类别相关证据，并针对不同模态特性提出混合类别结构以促进合理证据学习；(2) 冲突感知聚合阶段，从证据构建视图特定意见（包括预测结果和不确定性），通过冲突感知聚合方法有效解决意见间的冲突，合成可靠联合决策。
AI.result: 理论分析和实验结果表明ConfSleepNet在睡眠分期任务中有效。
AI.conclusion: ConfSleepNet通过冲突感知的证据框架有效解决了多模态睡眠数据中的视图冲突问题，提升了睡眠分期的可靠性。

title: Attention-based PCA
summary: We study attention mechanisms through the lens of a canonical unsupervised problem: principal component analysis (PCA). We show that, when trained on Gaussian data, both softmax and linear attention layers learn parameters that align with the principal eigenvectors of the covariance matrix, thereby establishing a direct and explicit connection with PCA. Our analysis covers both finite and infinite prompt regimes. In the infinite-prompt limit, we prove convergence to globally optimal solutions aligned with the leading spectral direction, while in the finiteprompt setting we show that the same behavior emerges up to sampling effects. We further extend the analysis to an in-context setting with spiked Wishart covariances, where attention successfully recovers the underlying signal direction. These results demonstrate that attention inherently performs PCA-like computations under unsupervised objectives, providing a theoretical foundation for its representation-learning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文通过无监督PCA问题研究注意力机制，证明在训练高斯数据时，softmax和线性注意力层学习的参数与协方差矩阵的主特征向量对齐，建立了注意力与PCA之间的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 揭示注意力机制在无监督目标下的内在计算原理，为注意力机制的表征学习能力提供理论基础。
AI.method: 理论分析：分别在有限prompt和无限prompt两种设定下，分析softmax和线性注意力层在高斯数据上的学习行为。进一步扩展到具有尖峰Wishart协方差结构的上下文学习场景。
AI.result: 在无限prompt极限下，注意力收敛到与主导谱方向对齐的全局最优解；在有限prompt设定下，相同行为在采样效应范围内成立；在尖峰Wishart协方差上下文中，注意力成功恢复底层信号方向。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制在无监督目标下本质上执行类似PCA的计算，这为其表征学习能力提供了理论依据。

title: Isolating Nonlinear Independent Sources in fMRI with $β$-TCVAE Models
summary: Learning meaningful latent representations from nonlinear fMRI data remains a fundamental challenge in neuroimaging analysis. Traditional independent component analysis, widely used due to its ability to estimate interpretable functional brain networks, relies on a linear mixing assumption for latent sources, limiting its ability to capture the inherently nonlinear and complex organization of brain dynamics. More recently, deep representation learning methods have emerged as promising alternatives for modeling nonlinear latent structure. However, many of these approaches have been evaluated primarily on simulated datasets or natural image benchmarks, with comparatively limited validation on real-world neuroimaging data such as fMRI. In this work, we are motivated by the $β$-TCVAE (Total Correlation Variational Autoencoder), a refinement of the $β$-VAE framework for learning latent representations without introducing additional hyperparameters during training. We adapt and modify this model to fMRI data for nonlinear source disentanglement, aiming to separate mixed spatial and temporal brain signals into interpretable components. We show that the $β$-TCVAE framework can recover meaningful nonlinear spatial components with biological relevance, including well-established intrinsic connectivity networks such as the default mode network. Furthermore, we evaluate the learned representations using functional network connectivity, showing that the latent structure captures coherent and interpretable brain organization patterns. This study provides a pilot investigation that bridges nonlinear representation learning and fMRI analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将β-TCVAE（全相关变分自编码器）应用于fMRI数据，实现非线性空间组分的解缠，成功恢复了包括默认模式网络在内的具有生物学意义的内在连接网络，并通过功能网络连接分析验证了潜在结构的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统ICA假设线性混合，难以捕捉fMRI数据中固有的非线性和复杂脑动态组织；现有深度表示学习方法多在模拟数据或自然图像上评估，缺乏在真实fMRI数据上的充分验证。
AI.method: 对β-TCVAE框架进行适配和修改，将其应用于fMRI数据，实现非线性空间与时间脑信号的解缠，分离出可解释的成分，且不引入额外的超参数。
AI.result: β-TCVAE能够恢复具有生物学意义的非线性空间组分，包括默认模式网络等已确立的内在连接网络；通过功能网络连接分析，显示潜在结构捕获了连贯且可解释的脑组织模式。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了非线性表示学习与fMRI分析之间的桥梁，为在真实神经影像数据上应用深度解缠模型提供了初步探索和验证。

title: An Information-Theoretic Criterion for Efficient Data Synthesis
summary: Synthetic data becomes crucial for large language model training, but its effectiveness is highly inconsistent. We provide an information-theoretic account of this inconsistency: synthetic data improves a model only when the generation-training loop is information-open, i.e., shaped by external signals (verifiers, environments, or rubrics) that inject task-relevant information beyond the model's current distribution. When the loop is information-closed (relying on the model's own outputs without such signals), the data processing inequality ensures that task-relevant information can only decrease, making collapse a predicted outcome. Among information-open pipelines, both efficiency and generalization hinge on the meta-level of supervision: a coarser signal such as binary correctness treats all acceptable outputs as equivalent, so the behavior it teaches is not tied to any particular domain or surface form and generalizes naturally across tasks and domains. These observations lead to a guiding thesis: learning preferentially converges to the most information-efficient signal component available, which accelerates learning when that component is the intended one, but causes reward hacking when a spurious pattern happens to be simpler.

AI.tldr: 本文从信息论角度解释合成数据在大模型训练中的不一致效果：只有当生成-训练循环是信息开放的（由外部信号塑造），合成数据才能提升模型性能；信息封闭循环由于数据处理不等式必然导致信息减少和模型退化。外部监督的粒度决定泛化能力，并提出了"学习优先收敛于最高信息效率信号分量"的核心论点。
AI.motivation: 合成数据在大语言模型训练中被广泛使用，但其效果高度不一致，缺乏理论解释。作者希望从信息论视角为这一现象提供统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用信息论分析框架，区分信息开放循环（外部信号注入任务相关信息）和信息封闭循环（仅依赖模型自身输出），并应用数据处理不等式（Data Processing Inequality）进行理论推导。同时通过监督粒度（粗粒度vs细粒度）分析泛化特性。
AI.result: 信息封闭循环必然导致任务相关信息减少和模型坍缩；信息开放循环中，粗粒度信号（如二元正确性）比细粒度信号具有更好的跨任务跨领域泛化能力；学习算法会优先收敛到信息效率最高的信号分量，这既可能加速学习（当该分量是预期目标时），也可能导致奖励攻击（当虚假模式更简单时）。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据的有效性取决于生成-训练循环的信息开放性以及监督信号的粒度选择。这为理解合成数据何时有效、为何失效以及如何设计更好的合成数据生成流程提供了理论指导，同时也解释了奖励攻击现象的信息论根源。

title: Reliability and Effectiveness of Autonomous AI Agents in Supply Chain Management
summary: This paper studies autonomous generative AI agents in multi-echelon supply chains using the MIT Beer Game. We identify four inference-time levers that shape performance: model selection, policies and guardrails, centralized data sharing, and prompt engineering. Model capability is the dominant factor: an out-of-the-box reasoning model exceeds human-level performance, and optimized reasoning models reduce costs by up to 67% relative to human teams. However, strong average performance masks substantial reliability risks. We introduce the agent bullwhip effect, the amplification of decision unreliability across echelons, manifesting along two dimensions: decision variance increases both across facilities at the same point in time and within the same facility across time. We develop a mathematical framework showing that this phenomenon is inherent to multi-agent systems that involve coordination and information delays, and we demonstrate that repeated sampling fails to meaningfully reduce it. To address this limitation, we propose a Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)-based reinforcement-learning post-training framework that trains a shared base LLM using system-level supply-chain rewards. GRPO post-training substantially reduces tail events, curtails agent bullwhip, and improves the reliability of autonomous supply-chain agents.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了多级供应链中的自主生成式AI智能体（以MIT啤酒游戏为实验平台），识别出四个推理时杠杆（模型选择、策略与护栏、集中数据共享、提示工程）对性能的影响。模型能力是主导因素：开箱即用的推理模型超越人类水平，优化后的推理模型相比人类团队可降低高达67%的成本。然而，强大的平均性能掩盖了显著的可靠性风险。我们提出了智能体牛鞭效应——决策不可靠性在供应链各层级间被放大的现象，表现为两个维度：同一时间点不同设施的决策方差增大，以及同一设施在不同时间的决策方差增大。我们构建了数学框架证明该现象是包含协调和信息延迟的多智能体系统的固有属性，并证明重复采样无法有效缓解。为解决此问题，我们提出基于GRPO的强化学习后训练框架，使用系统级供应链奖励训练共享基础大语言模型。GRPO后训练显著减少了尾部事件，遏制了智能体牛鞭效应，提升了自主供应链智能体的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单个生成式AI智能体的能力，但对其在多级供应链这种多智能体协调场景中的可靠性和系统性风险缺乏理解。本研究旨在揭示自主AI智能体在多层级供应链中的性能决定因素、固有的可靠性风险（智能体牛鞭效应），并提出有效的缓解方法。
AI.method: 以MIT啤酒游戏作为多级供应链仿真环境，实验识别四个推理时杠杆对性能的影响；提出数学框架分析智能体牛鞭效应的成因；提出基于GRPO的强化学习后训练方法，使用系统级供应链奖励训练共享基础LLM，以提升可靠性和减少尾部风险。
AI.result: 推理模型（如o1）开箱即用即超越人类水平；优化后成本降低67%；但存在智能体牛鞭效应——决策方差在跨设施和跨时间两个维度被放大，且重复采样无法有效缓解；GRPO后训练显著减少了尾部事件并遏制了智能体牛鞭效应。
AI.conclusion: 尽管强大生成式AI模型在多级供应链中表现优异，但存在固有的可靠性风险（智能体牛鞭效应），这是多智能体协调与信息延迟系统的内在属性。GRPO后训练是提升自主供应链智能体可靠性的有效途径。

title: Quantum Model for CVRPTW
summary: This paper proposes a quantum algorithm for the capacitated vehicle routing problem with time windows (CVRPTW) based on Grover Search framework. This problem is often faced by Postal services in the context of package delivery or other time-sensitive operations. We provide an implementation on gate based quantum computer of a model inspired by classical route first, cluster second technique. The quantum paradigm allows to overcome suboptimality inherent property of this decomposition. In the current NISQ (Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum) era, the most important limitation is the number of available qubits which makes time windows and capacity constraints hard to tackle. We introduce a qubit-efficient split-inspired modeling which adds only a linear number of decision qubits to standard quantum formulations for Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Grover Search框架的量子算法，用于求解带时间窗的容量车辆路径问题（CVRPTW）。受经典"先规划路线，后聚类"技术的启发，量子范式克服了这种分解方法固有的次优性。针对NISQ时代量子比特数量有限的瓶颈，作者提出了一种量子比特高效的分割启发式建模方法，相较于标准TSP量子公式仅增加线性数量的决策量子比特。
AI.motivation: 邮政包裹递送等时效敏感场景中常面临CVRPTW问题，经典"先路线后聚类"方法存在次优性缺陷；且NISQ时代量子计算机可用量子比特数量有限，时间窗和容量约束难以处理。
AI.method: 基于Grover Search量子搜索框架，采用受经典"路线优先、聚类其次"技术启发的量子模型实现；提出一种量子比特高效的分割启发式建模方法，使决策量子比特数量相较于标准TSP量子公式仅呈线性增长。
AI.result: 在门模型量子计算机上实现了所提出的量子算法，有效克服了经典分解方法的次优性，同时将量子比特开销控制在较低水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的量子比特高效建模方法使CVRPTW在NISQ量子计算机上的求解变得可行，相较于标准TSP量子公式仅增加线性数量的决策量子比特。

title: ReTAMamba: Reliability-Aware Temporal Aggregation with Mamba for Irregular Clinical Time Series Prediction
summary: Clinical time-series data are difficult to model with methods designed for regular sequences because they exhibit irregular sampling, frequent missing values, and heterogeneous observation patterns across variables. Existing approaches commonly use observation masks and time-gap information, but they do not continuously capture the decaying reliability of past observations or consistently organize multi-resolution information within a coherent temporal context during aggregation. To address these limitations, we propose Reliability-aware Temporal Aggregation with Mamba (ReTAMamba), which reconstructs clinical time series as time-variable token sequences, estimates observation reliability from missingness and elapsed time, and augments interval summaries with statistical descriptors. Chronological Weaving is used to integrate short- and long-term temporal information within a coherent temporal context, and a budgeted token router is applied to constrain sequence length while preserving informative summaries. Experiments on MIMIC-IV, eICU, and PhysioNet 2012 show that ReTAMamba consistently improves AUPRC over strong baselines, with average relative gains of 7.51%, 7.80%, and 10.15%, respectively. Cohort-level and patient-level analyses on eICU further showed that the learned mean decay for more dynamic signals, such as heart rate and blood pressure, was 24.3% larger than that for relatively static signals, such as laboratory test variables. These findings suggest that effective prediction in irregular clinical time series requires modeling not only what was measured, but also when and how it was observed, including information freshness and observation timeliness.

AI.tldr: 提出ReTAMamba模型，通过可靠性感知的时间聚合与Mamba架构，处理临床时间序列中的不规则采样、缺失值和异质性观测模式，在三个公开数据集上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用观测掩码和时间间隔信息，但未能持续捕捉历史观测的衰减可靠性，也无法在聚合过程中将多分辨率信息组织到一致的时序上下文中。
AI.method: 将临床时间序列重构为时变token序列，从缺失性和经过时间估计观测可靠性，并用统计描述符增强区间摘要；提出Chronological Weaving整合短期和长期时序信息，设计budgeted token router约束序列长度。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV、eICU和PhysioNet 2012上AUPRC分别相对提升7.51%、7.80%和10.15%；eICU分析表明动态信号（如心率、血压）的学习平均衰减比静态信号（如实验室检验变量）大24.3%。
AI.conclusion: 不规则临床时间序列的有效预测不仅需要建模测量了什么，还需要建模何时以及如何观测的，包括信息新鲜度和观测及时性。

title: Evidential Information Fusion on Possibilistic Structure
summary: Dempster's rule is a fundamental tool for combining belief functions from distinct and reliable sources. However, its intersection-based semantics imposes strong structural restrictions, which limits its flexibility in handling complex source states and diverse information fusion scenarios. To overcome this limitation, we propose a reversible transformation, derived from the isopignistic principle, between belief functions and a possibilistic structure defined on the power set. In this transformation, the relationships among subsets are explicitly characterized by a belief evolution network, which provides a more flexible representation of evidential information beyond the conventional mass function structure. On this basis, we further introduce the triangular norm family to develop a general and adaptive evidential information fusion framework. Unlike fusion methods rooted in Dempster semantics, the proposed framework supports more flexible combination behaviors and exhibits advantages in non-distinct source fusion, conflict management, parametric combination design, and heterogeneous information fusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于等信度原则的可逆变换，将证据理论中的信度函数转换为幂集上的可能性结构，并通过信度演化网络和三角范数族构建了更灵活的自适应证据融合框架，克服了Dempster规则在复杂源状态和信息融合场景中的结构性限制。
AI.motivation: Dempster组合规则虽然是指标融合的基本工具，但其基于交集语义的结构限制过于严格，难以灵活处理复杂的信息源状态和多样化的融合场景，亟需一种更通用的融合框架。
AI.method: 首先通过等信度原则（isopignistic principle）建立信度函数与幂集上可能性结构之间的可逆变换，利用信度演化网络显式刻画子集间关系；在此基础上引入三角范数（t-norm）族，构建通用且自适应的证据融合框架。
AI.result: 所提框架支持更灵活的组合行为，在非独立源融合、冲突管理、参数化组合设计以及异构信息融合等场景中展现出优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架突破了Dempster语义的局限，为复杂证据融合问题提供了更具适应性的解决方案。

title: Solving a large oral examination timetabling problem using a multidimensional knapsack MILP formulation
summary: This paper addresses the Oral Examination Timetabling Problem (OETP) for France's prestigious engineering schools, an organization managed by the Service des Concours Communs Polytechniques (SCCP). The scheduling is highly complex, involving over 7,000 candidates across a four-week period while accounting for constraints such as exam overlaps, geographic origin, and visa requirements. To manage this scale, the paper shows how to model the problem as a Multidimensional Knapsack Problem (MKP) using a Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) formulation. Their strategy reduces combinatorial complexity by assigning candidates to a predetermined set of pre-validated schedules rather than individual time slots. Experimental results using the SCIP solver on a real 2025 data instance successfully accommodated 7,796 out of 7,804 candidates within a 20-minute time limit.

AI.tldr: 本文针对法国精英工程师学校的口试排课问题（OETP），提出了一种将问题建模为多维背包问题（MKP）的混合整数线性规划（MILP）方法，通过将考生分配至预验证的日程表而非独立时间段来降低复杂度，并在真实数据集上成功排课7,796/7,804名考生（20分钟时限）。
AI.motivation: 法国精英工程师学校的口试排课涉及超过7,000名考生、四周时间跨度，且需处理考试冲突、地理来源、签证要求等多重约束，人工排课极其复杂，亟需自动化优化方法。
AI.method: 将OETP建模为多维背包问题（MKP），采用混合整数线性规划（MILP）形式化表达；核心策略是将考生分配至一组预先生成并验证过的可行日程表（而非逐个时间段），从而大幅降低组合复杂度。
AI.result: 基于SCIP求解器，在2025年真实数据实例上，20分钟计算时限内成功将7,804名考生中的7,796名分配到有效日程。
AI.conclusion: 所提MILP-MKP建模策略能够高效求解大规模口试排课问题，在极短时间内实现接近完全的考生覆盖，具有实际部署价值。

title: Differentiable Optimization Layers for Guaranteed Fairness in Deep Learning
comment: To be published in International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2026
summary: Differentiable optimization layers are traditionally integrated in predict-then-optimize frameworks where a neural model estimates parameters that subsequently serve as fixed inputs to downstream decision-making optimization problems. In this work, we introduce the concept of a "fairness layer": a differentiable optimization layer appended to a model's output layer that guarantees a chosen notion of output parity is satisfied when integrated into a neural network. Additionally, we introduce an online primal-dual inference algorithm that provides provable aggregate fairness guarantees for streaming predictions with arbitrarily small batch sizes, where traditional per-batch constraints become overly restrictive. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the fairness layer and associated algorithm, and theoretical analysis characterizes the layer's differentiability and stability properties during model training and backpropagation. Our code for these experiments is publicly available on GitHub (https://github.com/dtroxell19/FairDL-ICML-2026.git) and our public Python package documentation can be found online: https://dtroxell19.github.io/fairness_training/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“公平层”（fairness layer），一种可微优化层，将其附加在神经网络输出层后，能在预测-优化框架中保证输出满足特定公平性约束；同时提出在线原始-对偶推理算法，为流式预测提供可证明的聚合公平性保证。实验和理论分析验证了方法的有效性与可微性、稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统可微优化层用于预测-后-优化框架，但缺乏对模型输出公平性的显式保证；现有公平性约束在流式预测场景下（小批量甚至单样本）无法直接施加，需要一种既能嵌入神经网络又能处理流式数据且提供可证明公平性保证的机制。
AI.method: (1) 提出“公平层”，一种可微优化层，附加于模型输出层，通过优化问题将网络原始输出映射为满足指定公平性约束（如输出均等）的解；(2) 提出在线原始-对偶推理算法，对任意小批量（包括batch size=1）的流式预测提供聚合公平性保证，避免传统逐批次约束的过度严格性。
AI.result: 数值实验表明公平层及在线算法能有效保证输出公平性；理论分析表征了该层在训练和反向传播中的可微性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 公平层为神经网络提供了嵌入式的、端到端可训练的公平性保证机制，在线原始-对偶算法扩展了其适用性到流式预测场景，为公平深度学习提供了新工具。

title: QuantFPFlow: Quantum Amplitude Estimation for Fokker--Planck Policy Optimisation in Continuous Reinforcement Learning
summary:
We introduce \textbf{QuantFPFlow}, a reinforcement learning framework that integrates quantum amplitude estimation into the Fokker--Planck~(FP) formulation of stochastic policy optimisation. Classical continuous-space RL agents must estimate the FP partition function $Z = \int e^{-V(\mathbf{x})/D}\,d\mathbf{x}$ at cost $\calO(1/\varepsilon^{2})$; QuantFPFlow replaces this with a Grover-amplified amplitude estimator achieving $\calO(1/\varepsilon)$ -- a provable quadratic speedup. While the full quantum acceleration requires fault-tolerant hardware, the quantum-inspired classical simulation demonstrated here already exhibits the $\calO(1/\varepsilon)$ algorithmic structure.
  The estimated stationary distribution $\rhostar$ drives a theoretically grounded exploration bonus $\Raug = \Renv + α\log(1/\rhostar(s))$. This bonus steers the agent toward globally optimal regions of multimodal reward landscapes while simultaneously constraining policy variance through FP diffusion matching.
  On a continuous-control task specifically designed to expose local-optima failure, QuantFPFlow achieves mean reward $1{,}295.7 \pm 423.2$ versus $1{,}284.0 \pm 474.0$ for Soft Actor-Critic~(SAC), while discovering the global optimum \textbf{10.4\,\% more frequently} (33.9\,\% vs.\ 30.7\,\%). Policy entropy remains near $H(π)\approx 6.5$\,nats throughout training, whereas SAC collapses to $1.5$\,nats, confirming that FP diffusion matching actively prevents premature convergence. Dimensionality experiments further show computational scaling of $\calO(d^{0.35})$ for QuantFPFlow versus $\calO(d^{0.76})$ for classical FP estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出QuantFPFlow框架，将量子振幅估计集成到Fokker-Planck随机策略优化中，实现了从经典O(1/ε²)到量子O(1/ε)的二次加速。该框架通过FP扩散匹配约束策略方差，在连续控制任务中比SAC更频繁发现全局最优(33.9% vs 30.7%)，且策略熵保持稳定(~6.5 nats)防止早熟收敛，维度实验显示计算复杂度为O(d⁰·³⁵) vs 经典O(d⁰·⁷⁶)。
AI.motivation: 经典连续空间强化学习代理估计FP配分函数Z时需O(1/ε²)成本，存在计算效率瓶颈；同时多模态奖励 landscapes 中局部最优陷阱问题亟待解决。
AI.method: 将量子振幅估计(QAE)与Grover放大引入FP策略优化框架，替代经典配分函数估计；设计基于FP扩散匹配的理论探索奖励Raug = Renv + αlog(1/ρ*(s))，引导策略向全局最优区域探索。
AI.result: 在连续控制任务中平均奖励1295.7(±423.2) vs SAC的1284.0(±474.0)，全局最优发现频率33.9% vs 30.7%；策略熵稳定在~6.5 nats而SAC坍缩至1.5 nats；维度实验O(d⁰·³⁵) vs 经典O(d⁰·⁷⁶)。
AI.conclusion: QuantFPFlow通过量子启发的经典模拟实现了O(1/ε)的算法结构，FP扩散匹配有效防止策略早熟收敛并提升全局最优发现能力，维度扩展性优于经典方法。

title: PersonaArena: Dynamic Simulation for Evaluating and Enhancing Persona-Level Role-Playing in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly serve as interactive social agents, yet their ability to maintain coherent and authentic persona-level role-playing remains limited, particularly in realistic social scenarios. Existing research predominantly focuses on character-level settings and relies on static evaluation formats, failing to capture the complexity of everyday social interactions. In this work, we present PersonaArena, a dynamic simulation framework for evaluating and improving persona-level role-playing in LLMs. PersonaArena leverages a large, filtered corpus of user-generated social content to construct a nuanced persona bank, and elicits multi-turn, context-rich interactions within simulated social environments. Our framework features a multi-agent debating judge for holistic and unbiased assessment. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that PersonaArena enables rigorous evaluation and enhancement of LLMs' role-playing capabilities, advancing the development of more authentic and socially adept AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PersonaArena，一个用于评估和提升大语言模型在真实社交场景中人格层面角色扮演能力的动态模拟框架，通过构建人格库、模拟多轮社交互动，并采用多智能体辩论裁判进行综合评估。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要聚焦于角色层面的设定且依赖静态评估形式，无法捕捉日常社交互动的复杂性，LLM在维持连贯、真实的人格层面角色扮演方面仍存在局限。
AI.method: PersonaArena利用大规模过滤后的用户生成社交内容构建细粒度人格库，在模拟社交环境中引发多轮、上下文丰富的互动，并采用多智能体辩论裁判进行整体且无偏的评估。
AI.result: 实验表明PersonaArena能够实现对LLM角色扮演能力的严格评估与提升，推动了更真实、更善于社交的AI智能体的发展。
AI.conclusion: PersonaArena作为一个动态仿真框架，能够有效评估和增强LLM的人格层面角色扮演能力，为开发更真实且具有社交能力的AI智能体提供了有力支持。

title: The distance-based formation controller design for multi-agent systems in port-Hamiltonian form
summary: Based on the practical scenario where collisions in formation control may lead to agent damage, this paper investigates the integrated problem of distance-based formation control and collision avoidance for multi-agent systems governed by port-Hamiltonian dynamics. A foundational step involves constructing a signed incidence matrix, which, by design, corresponds to a directed acyclic graph and possesses the full column rank property. To overcome the prevalent issue of local minima in traditional artificial potential fields, a novel design utilizing attraction-only potentials is introduced, with collision avoidance rigorously enforced by safety barriers. This framework leads to a unified controller that concurrently manages velocity tracking, target formation acquisition, and inter-agent safety. The stability of the resulting closed-loop system is guaranteed through LaSalle's invariance principle. Numerical simulations demonstrate the validity and effectiveness of the proposed control strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文针对端口-哈密顿动力学的多智能体系统，提出了一种融合距离编队控制与碰撞避免的统一控制策略。通过构造有向无环图的符号关联矩阵，利用仅含吸引势能的人工势场结合安全屏障解决局部极小值问题，并基于LaSalle不变性原理保证了闭环系统稳定性。
AI.motivation: 编队控制中智能体碰撞可能导致损坏，现有基于人工势场的方法普遍存在局部极小值问题，亟需一种同时兼顾编队形成、速度跟踪和碰撞避免的统一控制方案。
AI.method: 1) 构造具有满列秩特性的有向无环图符号关联矩阵；2) 设计仅含吸引势能的人工势场避免局部极小值；3) 引入安全屏障严格强制执行碰撞避免；4) 利用LaSalle不变性原理分析闭环系统稳定性。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了所提控制策略的有效性，系统能够同时实现速度跟踪、目标编队获取和智能体间安全避碰。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的统一控制器有效解决了端口-哈密顿多智能体系统的编队控制与碰撞避免集成问题，通过理论分析和仿真验证了其稳定性与有效性。

title: A Theory of Training Profit-Optimal LLMs
summary: Scaling LLMs requires tremendous computational resources, and recent advances in AI have gone hand in hand with massive amounts of capital expenditure. While it is established that scaling up LLMs reliably increases model quality (quantified in terms of loss or downstream evaluations), it is unclear how these quality improvements translate to potential revenue, and whether revenue increases would offset costs of larger-scale training and inference. In this work, we develop an economic model for characterizing the rational behavior of an LLM training firm by combining scaling laws with microeconomic theory. Under our model of firm behavior, LLM quality can be increased with more parameters and training tokens, leading to more potential adoption by consumers, who each have a quality threshold for using the LLM. On the other hand, additional parameters and training tokens both incur additional costs. We analyze the profit maximization problem for this model under compute-bound and data-bound regimes. In the compute-bound regime, optimal model size and token budget track hardware efficiency $E$ (FLOPs/\$) at a near-linear rate; total training cost then scales sub-quadratically in $E$. Data efficiency improvements incentivize larger models and training expenditure. When we are limited to $D$ data, profit-optimal training expenditure scales as $D^2/E$, i.e, increase with data and decreases with hardware efficiency (as well as data efficiency). Finally, we analyze practical trends in training expenditure: current trends are consistent with our most permissive model variants in the compute-bound regime, but are not profit-optimal in the data-bound regime or assuming hardware advances will stall. Overall, our results provide a theory of profit-optimal LLM training, providing a foundation for engaging critically with industry statements and supporting long-term economic decision making.

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合规模定律与微观经济理论，构建了LLM训练企业的经济模型，分析在计算受限和数据受限两种情境下，模型规模、训练预算与企业利润之间的最优关系，并验证了当前行业趋势与模型预测的一致性。
AI.motivation: 虽然已知扩大LLM规模能可靠提升模型质量（如损失降低、下游评估提升），但这些质量改进如何转化为潜在收入，以及收入增长是否能抵消更大规模训练和推理的成本，尚不清楚。本文旨在构建一个理论框架来回答这一问题。
AI.method: 将规模定律（Scaling Laws）与微观经济理论（企业利润最大化模型）结合，构建LLM训练企业的理性行为模型。模型设定：LLM质量随参数量和训练token数增加而提升，进而吸引更多消费者（每个消费者有质量阈值）；同时，额外的参数量和训练token均带来额外成本。分别在计算受限和数据受限两种情境下分析利润最大化问题。
AI.result: 在计算受限情境下，最优模型规模和token预算与硬件效率E（FLOPs/$）近线性相关，总训练成本随E次二次方增长；数据效率提升激励更大的模型和训练支出。在数据受限（最多D个数据）情境下，利润最优的训练支出与D²/E成正比。当前行业趋势与计算受限情境下最宽松的模型变体一致，但在数据受限或假设硬件进步停滞的情况下并非利润最优。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了利润最优的LLM训练理论，为批判性地审视行业声明以及支持长期经济决策提供了基础。

title: Towards Human-Level Book-Writing Capability
summary: Large language models optimized for instruction following and agentic tasks remain poorly aligned with the requirements of high-quality creative writing. Fiction frequently depends on behaviors that assistant-tuned models are explicitly trained to avoid, particularly deception, moral ambiguity, and unreliable narration. As a result, generated stories often appear structurally correct while remaining stylistically generic, overly explanatory, or weakly grounded in human literary behavior. We present a dataset construction and training framework for book-scale creative writing that reframes supervised fine-tuning as a prompt-to-book generation task grounded in human-authored fiction. Starting from public-domain novels, we derive a multi-resolution planning scaffold by summarizing each book at progressively finer levels, from a high-level premise to chapter- and scene-level structure. We then invert this hierarchy during training: the model learns to expand a prompt into increasingly detailed plans and finally into the original human-authored book text. This formulation preserves human prose as the final supervised target while using intermediate summaries to make book-scale generation learnable. We train a long-context language model on these prompt-to-book trajectories and study whether this objective shifts generation away from assistant-style prose and toward human literary writing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向书籍级创意写作的数据集构建与训练框架，通过从公共领域小说中提取多分辨率规划层级（从梗概到章节再到场景），并将监督微调重构为从提示逐步扩展为人类原著文本的生成任务，使长上下文语言模型学会从助理性写作转向人类文学性写作。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型针对指令跟随和智能体任务优化后，在高质量创意写作方面表现不佳，生成的故事情节结构正确但风格千篇一律、过于解释性或缺乏文学性，因为模型被训练去避免欺骗、道德模糊和不可靠叙述等人类文学中常见的行为。
AI.method: 从公共领域小说出发，对每本书进行多层次摘要（从高层梗概到章节再到场景结构），构建多分辨率规划支架；然后在训练时反转这一层级，让模型学习将提示逐步扩展为越来越详细的计划，最终生成人类原著文本，以保持人类散文作为最终监督目标。
AI.result: 训练后的长上下文语言模型在生成风格上从助手式散文向人类文学写作转变，产生更具文学性的文本。
AI.conclusion: 这种将监督微调重构为提示到书籍的生成任务、利用多分辨率规划层次作为中间监督的训练框架，能够有效使模型摆脱助手式写作风格，向人类文学性写作方向迁移。

title: Boundary Stabilization for the Rayleigh Beam System under Event-triggered Controls
summary: In this paper, we propose two event-triggered control laws incorporating an eventtriggering mechanism to tackle the boundary stabilization for the Rayleigh beam system. Under this event-triggered controls, a sufficient condition for parameter determination is constructed to guarantee the exponential stability of the closed-loop system by using the integral multiplier technique and energy perturbation method, wherein the desired exponential decay rate can be precisely determined. Numerical examples are presented to demonstrate the efficacy of the event-triggered control methodology.

AI.tldr: 本文针对瑞利梁系统的边界镇定问题，提出了两种结合事件触发机制的控制律，通过积分乘子技术和能量摄动法构建了参数确定的充分条件，确保了闭环系统的指数稳定性，并精确确定了期望的指数衰减率，数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决瑞利梁系统的边界镇定问题，引入事件触发机制以减少控制更新频率，同时保证系统稳定性。
AI.method: 提出了两种事件触发控制律；利用积分乘子技术和能量摄动法构建参数确定的充分条件；精确确定期望的指数衰减率。
AI.result: 构建了保证闭环系统指数稳定性的充分条件；精确确定了期望的指数衰减率；数值实验验证了事件触发控制方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的事件触发控制方法能够有效实现瑞利梁系统的边界镇定，并在保证指数稳定性的同时减少了控制更新次数。

title: The Geometry of Projection Heads: Conditioning, Invariance, and Collapse
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. 29 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables
summary: We develop a geometric theory of projection heads in self-supervised learning by modeling the head as a trainable Riemannian metric on the backbone representation manifold. We show that linear heads perform implicit subspace whitening, while nonlinear heads adapt local metrics to satisfy the specific topological constraints of the loss, with head depth empirically dictating this capacity. Analyzing dimensional collapse, we prove that smooth nonlinear heads natively induce negative eigenvalues in the Hessian at collapsed equilibria, making them unstable. We empirically validate this by continuously tracking the optimization geometry during training, which reveals that smooth activations like Swish can generate explicit negative curvature to escape collapse, whereas linear and ReLU heads under continuous-time gradient flow cannot, relying instead on discrete-time optimization dynamics and BatchNorm. Finally, we geometrically characterize how metric degeneracy governs the information-invariance trade-off, explaining why the head must be discarded. Evaluated across contrastive and decorrelation-based objectives on foundation models, our results demonstrate that the projection head acts as a universal geometric buffer, decoupling the semantic backbone from the rigid, destructive constraints of the pretraining objective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出投影头的几何理论，将其建模为骨干网络表示流形上的可训练黎曼度量。研究表明线性头进行隐式子空间白化，非线性头通过深度调节局部度量以满足损失函数的拓扑约束。平滑激活（如Swish）可产生负曲率逃离坍塌，而线性/ReLU头需依赖离散优化和BatchNorm。投影头作为通用几何缓冲，解耦语义骨干与预训练目标的刚性约束。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习中的投影头（projection head）缺乏统一的几何理论解释，其在表示空间中的作用机制、维度坍塌的逃逸原理以及为何最终需要被丢弃等问题尚未得到理论层面的严谨刻画。
AI.method: 将投影头建模为骨干网络表示流形上的可训练黎曼度量；理论分析线性头与非线性头的几何性质；通过Hessian矩阵特征值分析证明平滑非线性头使坍塌平衡态不稳定；在对比学习和去相关目标上进行实证验证。
AI.result: 线性头执行隐式子空间白化；非线性头通过深度调节局部度量适应损失拓扑约束；平滑激活（Swish）在连续时间梯度流下产生显式负曲率逃离坍塌，而线性/ReLU头无法做到；度量退化规律解释了信息-不变性权衡及头必须丢弃的原因。
AI.conclusion: 投影头充当通用几何缓冲，将语义骨干与预训练目标的刚性、破坏性约束解耦，为自监督学习头部的设计与丢弃提供了几何层面的理论依据。

title: Edge-AI-Driven Learning-to-Rank for Decentralized Task Allocation in Circular Smart Manufacturing
summary: Task allocation in smart manufacturing systems needs to operate under decentralized decision-making, dynamic workloads, and shared resource constraints. In circular manufacturing settings, these challenges are further intensified by the need to balance operational efficiency with resource and energy sustainability. While learning-based approaches have been explored, many focus on predicting absolute performance metrics that do not necessarily translate into improved allocation outcomes, since decentralized assignment is governed by the relative ordering of candidate machines. This work proposes an Edge-AI-driven decentralized task allocation framework based on ranking-aware negotiation, where lightweight decision intelligence is embedded at the machine level to enable low-latency coordination without centralized control. The framework is developed progressively: a resource-aware heuristic first establishes the decentralized bidding structure, an Edge-AI-based regression model then provides learned local bid approximation, and a ranking-aware formulation finally reshapes the learning objective to align with the ordering-based nature of winner selection. Each machine evaluates incoming tasks using local information, including processing capability, queue state, and resource contention. The framework is evaluated via discrete-event simulation under high-load and tight-deadline scenarios using delay, deadline violations, throughput, and energy consumption. Results show improved delay and deadline adherence under high load, and enhanced energy efficiency under tighter constraints, leading to more resource-efficient operation aligned with circular manufacturing objectives. These findings demonstrate that aligning learning objectives with decentralized decision structures is critical for effective negotiation-driven task allocation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于排序感知协商的边缘AI驱动去中心化任务分配框架，通过将轻量级决策智能嵌入机器层级，实现低延迟协调。该框架逐步发展：资源感知启发式建立去中心化投标结构，边缘AI回归模型提供局部投标近似，排序感知公式重塑学习目标以对齐胜选者的排序本质。在高负载和紧截止时间场景下的仿真评估显示，该方法在延迟、截止时间违规、吞吐量和能耗方面均有改善，更符合循环制造目标。
AI.motivation: 在循环制造环境中，去中心化决策、动态工作负载和共享资源约束下的任务分配面临挑战，且现有基于学习的方法多聚焦于预测绝对性能指标，未能有效转化为分配结果改进，因为去中心化分配由候选机器的相对排序决定。
AI.method: 提出Edge-AI驱动的去中心化任务分配框架，包含三步：1) 资源感知启发式建立去中心化投标结构；2) 边缘AI回归模型提供学习型局部投标近似；3) 排序感知公式重塑学习目标以对齐胜选者排序本质。每台机器利用本地信息（处理能力、队列状态、资源争用）评估任务。
AI.result: 在高负载和紧截止时间场景下的离散事件仿真表明，该方法在延迟、截止时间违规、吞吐量和能耗方面均优于对比方法，实现了更资源高效的运行。
AI.conclusion: 将学习目标与去中心化决策结构对齐对于有效的协商驱动任务分配至关重要，该框架为循环制造提供了可行的去中心化智能解决方案。

title: AnchorDiff: Topology-Aware Masked Diffusion with Confidence-based Rewriting for Radiology Report Generation
summary: Radiology report generation (RRG) aims to automatically produce clinically accurate textual reports from medical images. Existing methods predominantly rely on autoregressive (AR) language models, whose causal dependency structure restricts generation to a unidirectional left-to-right process. This paradigm can induce sequence bias, where models tend to follow stereotypical token orders and high-frequency report templates rather than fully grounding generation in image-specific evidence. In this paper, we propose AnchorDiff, the first masked-diffusion framework for RRG that integrates knowledge-graph-derived clinical anchors into diffusion language modeling. By leveraging bidirectional context and iterative refinement, AnchorDiff mitigates the limitations of fixed-order autoregressive decoding. Specifically, we introduce a topology-aware training strategy that uses RadGraph-derived entity hierarchies to assign clinically important tokens differentiated masking protection and loss weights. We further design an inference-time rewriting strategy that detects unstable committed tokens through perturbation-based testing and selectively revises them during denoising. Extensive experiments on the MIMIC-CXR and MIMIC-RG4 benchmarks demonstrate that AnchorDiff achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, showing the effectiveness of clinically anchored masked diffusion for radiology report generation.

AI.tldr: AnchorDiff 是首个将知识图谱引导的临床锚点集成到掩码扩散语言模型中的放射学报告生成框架，通过双向上下文和迭代精炼克服了自回归模型的方向性偏置，在 MIMIC-CXR 和 MIMIC-RG4 基准上达到 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自回归语言模型的放射学报告生成方法存在因果依赖结构导致的序列偏置问题，模型倾向于遵循固定 token 顺序和高频模板，而非充分基于图像特异性证据进行生成。
AI.method: 提出 AnchorDiff 框架：（1）将 RadGraph 导出的临床实体层次结构用于拓扑感知训练，为重要临床 token 分配差异化掩码保护和损失权重；（2）设计推理时重写策略，通过扰动检测识别不稳定提交 token 并在去噪过程中选择性修订。
AI.result: 在 MIMIC-CXR 和 MIMIC-RG4 两个基准数据集上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 临床锚定的掩码扩散模型能有效克服自回归范式在放射学报告生成中的序列偏置，验证了双向上下文迭代精炼在该任务上的优越性。

title: Scale-Invariant Neural Network Optimization: Norm Geometry and Heavy-Tailed Noise
summary: A growing lesson from neural network optimization is that optimizer design should respect how the model is parametrized. Scale-invariant methods become important because their normalized layerwise updates can not only support hyperparameter transfer across model sizes but exploit input-output matrix norm geometry. At the same time, stochastic gradient noises in deep learning are often far from sub-Gaussian and may exhibit heavy tails. These crucial observations have shaped recent algorithmic principles for training neural networks, yet their joint theoretical consequences remain underexplored. In particular, it is unclear what dimension dependence is unavoidable for scale-invariant methods with general input-output matrix norm, and whether higher-order smoothness can accelerate training under heavy-tailed noise. We study these questions through nonconvex smooth stochastic optimization over $\mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ with general norms, where the goal is to achieve an $ε$-stationary point under $p^{\mathrm{th}}$-moment heavy-tailed noise. Our first contribution is a dimension-dependent lower bound: when $\frac{\max\{m,n\}}{(\min\{m,n\})^2}$ is large enough, any scale-invariant first-order method with spectral norm requires $Ω(\min\{m, n\}ε^{-\frac{3p-2}{p-1}})$ oracle calls. We prove that a batched Scion method with spectral norm achieves the matching upper bound of $O(\min\{m, n\}ε^{-\frac{3p-2}{p-1}})$. To exploit higher-order smoothness, we propose a transported Scion method and improve the bound to $O(\min\{m, n\}ε^{-\frac{5p-3}{2p-2}})$ when the norm is spectral and the Hessian is Lipschitz. Finally, we incorporate practical heuristics into our transported method and evaluate it across multiple architectures and model sizes, demonstrating its flexibility and compatibility in training neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在一般范数下的非凸光滑随机优化中，尺度不变方法在重尾噪声下的维度依赖性和高阶光滑性加速问题，提出了匹配的上下界以及一种传输Scion方法，并在多种神经网络架构上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 神经网络优化中，尺度不变方法对超参数迁移和矩阵范数几何利用很重要，而深度学习中的随机梯度噪声常呈现重尾分布。这两个关键观察虽已影响算法设计，但其联合理论后果尚未被充分探索，尤其是不清楚尺度不变方法在一般输入-输出矩阵范数下的维度依赖性的下界，以及高阶光滑性能否在重尾噪声下加速训练。
AI.method: 1) 提出维度依赖下界：当max{m,n}/(min{m,n})²足够大时，任何谱范数下的尺度不变一阶方法都需要Ω(min{m,n}ε^{-(3p-2)/(p-1)})次Oracle调用。2) 证明批处理Scion方法在谱范数下达到匹配上界O(min{m,n}ε^{-(3p-2)/(p-1)})。3) 提出传输Scion方法，利用Hessian Lipschitz条件将上界改进为O(min{m,n}ε^{-(5p-3)/(2p-2)})。4) 将实用启发式方法融入传输方法，在多种架构和模型规模上评估。
AI.result: 建立了尺度不变方法在重尾噪声下的维度依赖下界，给出了匹配的上下界。利用高阶光滑性（Hessian Lipschitz）将复杂度从ε^{-(3p-2)/(p-1)}改进到ε^{-(5p-3)/(2p-2)}。实验验证了所提方法在多种神经网络架构和模型规模中的灵活性和兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 本文在理论上完整刻画了尺度不变方法在重尾噪声下的优化复杂度，证明了维度依赖下界的不可避免性，并展示了高阶光滑性可以加速收敛。所提出的传输Scion方法在理论和实践上均具有优势。

title: Dimension-Free Convergence of Discrete Diffusion Models: Adjoint Equations Induce the Right Space
summary:
Discrete diffusion has become a leading framework for generative modeling in various applications including language, vision, and biology. Existing convergence theory, however, exhibits fundamental limitations. KL-based analyses diverge under singular priors such as the masked distribution, while bounds in total variation (TV) depend on the state space size $S$ and become vacuous for modern language tasks, where vocabularies contain hundreds of thousands of tokens. We develop a unified adjoint-equation-based framework that establishes dimension-free convergence guarantees in any integral probability metric (IPM). To the best of our knowledge, our bounds are the first to be entirely free of $S$ and applicable to both masked and uniform priors. Importantly, our theory relies only on a single standard rate-matrix regularity assumption and is compatible with time-inhomogeneous schedules.
  Four novel techniques drive our improvements: working in the space of observables via adjoint equations rather than directly with probability measures, a regularity analysis that yields bounds on any IPM, a coupling argument that removes $S$-dependence under uniform transitions, and a score-marginal cancellation technique that removes $S$-dependence under masked transitions. Our framework thus sharply departs from prior analyses and avoids the shortcomings of pathspace-KL and existing TV-based approaches. Beyond convergence bounds, our framework provides a versatile toolkit for further theoretical study of discrete diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文针对离散扩散模型的收敛性分析，提出了一种基于伴随方程的统框架，首次实现了与状态空间大小S无关的维度自由收敛保证，适用于任意积分概率度量（IPM），并兼容掩码和均匀先验分布。
AI.motivation: 现有离散扩散模型的收敛理论存在根本性局限：基于KL散度的分析在奇异先验（如掩码分布）下发散；基于全变差（TV）的界限依赖于状态空间大小S，在词汇表包含数十万token的现代语言任务中变得无效。因此需要一种不依赖于S且适用于多种先验分布的收敛性分析框架。
AI.method: 提出四项创新技术：(1) 在可观测函数空间（而非概率测度空间）通过伴随方程进行分析；(2) 正则性分析得到任意IPM下的界限；(3) 耦合论证消除均匀转移下的S依赖性；(4) 分数-边缘相消技术消除掩码转移下的S依赖性。仅需单一的标准速率矩阵正则性假设，兼容非均匀时间调度。
AI.result: 首次实现了完全与状态空间大小S无关的收敛保证，适用于任意积分概率度量（IPM），同时适用于掩码和均匀先验分布。
AI.conclusion: 该框架从根本上区别于先前的分析路径，避免了路径空间KL和现有基于TV方法的所有缺陷，并为离散扩散模型的进一步理论研究提供了通用工具包。

title: GPU-Accelerated Deep Learning for Heatwave Prediction and Urban Heat Risk Assessment
summary: Heatwaves are an important problem in cities, and climate change makes this problem more difficult. In this paper, we present a GPU-based deep learning framework for next-day prediction of urban thermal conditions and for heat risk assessment. The study was carried out in Sarajevo by using MODIS land surface temperature data and Open-Meteo forecast data. We tested several models, including convolutional models and spatiotemporal models. Among them, ConvLSTM with a mixed loss function gave the best results. The obtained values were MAE = 0.2293, RMSE = 0.3089, and R2 = 0.8877. The experiments also showed that results can be improved by using longer temporal series and additional meteorological variables. Since the framework was implemented on a GPU and trained with mixed precision, the execution time was reduced. Based on the predicted temperature fields, it was also possible to combine hazard information with exposure and vulnerability data in order to generate city heat risk maps. The proposed framework can be used as a practical basis for city heat analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于GPU的深度学习框架，利用ConvLSTM和混合损失函数，结合MODIS地表温度数据和Open-Meteo气象预报数据，对萨拉热窝城市热状况进行次日预测和热风险评估。模型取得了MAE=0.2293、RMSE=0.3089、R²=0.8877的性能，并通过混合精度训练和GPU加速降低了执行时间。预测的温度场可结合暴露度和脆弱性数据生成城市热风险地图。
AI.motivation: 热浪是城市中的重要问题，且气候变化加剧了这一挑战。现有方法缺乏高效、准确的次日城市热状况预测及风险评估工具，因此需要一种基于深度学习的框架来提升预测能力并支持实际城市热分析。
AI.method: 使用MODIS地表温度数据和Open-Meteo气象预报数据，在萨拉热窝进行实验。测试了卷积模型（CNN）和时空模型（如ConvLSTM），其中ConvLSTM结合混合损失函数表现最佳。框架在GPU上实现并采用混合精度训练以提升执行效率。预测温度场与暴露度、脆弱性数据结合生成热风险地图。
AI.result: 最优模型ConvLSTM取得MAE=0.2293、RMSE=0.3089、R²=0.8877。使用更长时间序列和更多气象变量可进一步提升性能。GPU混合精度训练显著缩短了执行时间。成功基于预测温度场生成了城市热风险地图。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的GPU深度学习框架可作为城市热分析的实际基础，有效预测城市热状况并评估热风险，具有较好的应用前景。

title: RAGA: Reading-And-Graph-building-Agent for Autonomous Knowledge Graph Construction and Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary:
Existing LLM-driven knowledge graph (KG) construction methods predominantly employ stateless batch processing pipelines, exhibiting structural deficiencies in cross-chunk semantic relation capture, entity disambiguation, and construction process interpretability. These limitations undermine KG quality, retrieval precision, and deployment trust in high-stakes domains.
  We propose RAGA (Reading And Graph-building Agent), an LLM-based autonomous KG construction and retrieval fusion framework. RAGA provides an atomic toolset supporting full KG lifecycle CRUD operations and embeds a Read-Search-Verify-Construct cognitive constraint into a ReAct tool loop. A KG-vector synchronization mechanism enables hybrid symbolic-vector retrieval, while evidence-anchored verification links every knowledge entry to its source text for auditable provenance.
  Preliminary experiments on a subset of the QASPER scientific QA dataset indicate that RAGA's fusion retrieval outperforms zero-shot baselines, with KG integration providing measurable gains in both answer and evidence quality. The framework design and experimental baseline serve as a reference for agent-driven autonomous KG construction.

AI.tldr: 提出RAGA框架，一种基于LLM的自主知识图谱构建与检索融合框架，通过原子化工具集、认知约束循环和证据锚定验证机制，解决现有批处理方法在跨块语义捕捉、实体消歧和可解释性方面的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的知识图谱构建方法采用无状态批处理流程，存在跨块语义关系捕捉不足、实体消歧困难、构建过程缺乏可解释性等结构缺陷，影响高风险领域的KG质量、检索精度和部署信任。
AI.method: 提出RAGA框架：提供支持KG全生命周期CRUD操作的原子化工具集；将"阅读-搜索-验证-构建"认知约束嵌入ReAct工具循环；设计KG-向量同步机制实现混合符号-向量检索；通过证据锚定验证将每个知识条目链接到源文本，确保可审计溯源。
AI.result: 在QASPER科学问答数据集子集上的初步实验表明，RAGA的融合检索优于零样本基线，知识图谱集成在答案质量和证据质量两方面均带来可测量的提升。
AI.conclusion: RAGA框架设计及实验基线可作为智能体驱动的自主知识图谱构建的参考范式。

title: Capacitated power dominating set problem: a solution approach based on forbidden propagation sets
summary: The optimal placement of measurement devices in electrical power systems is commonly modeled through the power dominating set problem. However, in real-world applications, these devices have limited capacities, leading to a capacitated variant of the problem that has received little attention in the literature. In this work, we introduce forbidden propagation sets, novel combinatorial structures that cannot occur simultaneously in any feasible solution. This notion enables a new class of integer linear programming formulations. They combine infection-based variables with exponentially many constraints, while avoiding big-$M$ constraints. We derive structural properties, valid inequalities, and redundancy-breaking constraints, and design an efficient lazy-separation procedure based on cycle detection. Computational experiments on benchmark instances with up to 14,000 vertices show that the proposed method achieves an average execution-time improvement of 1.7x over existing approaches adapted from the literature. Moreover, the results indicate that performance depends not only on network size, but also on capacities.

AI.tldr: 本文针对电力系统中测量设备容量受限的电力支配集问题，提出了禁止传播集这一新型组合结构，并基于此设计了避免大M约束的整数线性规划公式，通过循环检测的惰性分离算法，在多达14000个顶点的基准实例上实现了平均1.7倍的执行时间改进。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中测量设备存在容量限制，而有容量约束的电力支配集变体问题在文献中研究不足。
AI.method: 引入禁止传播集（不能同时出现在可行解中的新型组合结构），基于感染变量和指数级约束设计整数线性规划公式，避免大M约束；推导结构性质、有效不等式和冗余消除约束；设计基于循环检测的惰性分离算法。
AI.result: 在多达14000个顶点的基准实例上，平均执行时间比现有方法提升1.7倍；性能不仅取决于网络规模，还受容量影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了容量受限的电力支配集问题，在大型实例上表现优于现有方法。

title: Learning in Position-Aware Multinomial Logit Bandits: From Multiplicative to General Position Effects
summary: We study the dynamic joint assortment selection and positioning problem, where the attraction of each product depends on both its intrinsic appeal and its display position under a Multinomial Logit (MNL) choice framework. Our study ranges from the multiplicative position effects model, in which each product's attraction is scaled by a position-specific factor, to a general position effects model assigning independent attraction parameters to every product--position pair to capture heterogeneous synergies. For both models, we design round-based learning algorithms that update decisions after every single feedback, and establish the first regret-optimal characterization. Besides, our round-based algorithms provide the prompt operations needed by modern platforms. For the multiplicative model, we develop a cross-position pairwise maximum likelihood estimator with a clipping mechanism, and prove that our algorithm P2MLE-UCB attains a regret of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NT})$, matching the lower bound and closing the $\sqrt{K}$ gap left by prior epoch-based analyses. For the general model, we establish a minimax lower bound and propose GP2-UCB with a matching upper bound. Moreover, we design an efficient subroutine for the per-round joint assortment and positioning optimization based on Dinkelbach's method and maximum-weight bipartite matching. Numerical experiments on synthetic data and the Expedia dataset show that our algorithms consistently outperform state-of-the-art benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动态联合品类选择与定位问题，在MNL选择框架下，针对乘法位置效应模型和一般位置效应模型，设计了基于轮次的学习算法(P2MLE-UCB和GP2-UCB)，实现了$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NT})$的最优遗憾界，并提出了高效的每轮联合优化子程序，在合成数据和Expedia数据集上均优于现有基准方法。
AI.motivation: 现代电商平台需要同时决策产品品类（assortment）和展示位置（positioning），而产品吸引力受其内在吸引力和展示位置共同影响。现有研究多为批次级（epoch-based）算法，存在$\sqrt{K}$的遗憾差距，且无法满足平台对即时操作（prompt operations）的需求。
AI.method: 针对乘法位置效应模型，提出了P2MLE-UCB算法，采用跨位置成对极大似然估计（cross-position pairwise MLE）与裁剪机制（clipping mechanism）；针对一般位置效应模型，提出了GP2-UCB算法。每轮联合优化通过Dinkelbach方法和最大权二分图匹配的高效子程序实现。
AI.result: P2MLE-UCB达到$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NT})$遗憾，匹配下界，消除了先前$\sqrt{K}$的差距；GP2-UCB达到匹配的极小极大下界。数值实验在合成数据和Expedia数据集上均优于现有最优基准。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为动态联合品类选择与定位问题提供了遗憾最优的一阶刻画，且基于轮次的算法设计满足现代平台对快速响应的需求。

title: Byzantine-Resilient Federated Learning via QUBO-Based Client Selection on Quantum Annealers
summary: Federated Learning (FL) trains a global model across decentralized clients while preserving data privacy, but at scale it is vulnerable to malicious updates. Byzantine-resilient aggregation methods such as MultiKrum score gradients against their nearest neighbors and can miss malicious updates that preserve the statistical properties of honest ones. We propose a quantum annealing approach that reformulates client selection as a Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problem, encoding pairwise distances into a cost function solved by quantum annealers (QA). Unlike MultiKrum's greedy per-client scoring, the QUBO formulation jointly optimizes over all subsets to find the mutually closest group of $m$ clients. At small scale (15 clients), QUBO outperforms MultiKrum on the most challenging Byzantine attacks: e.g., Advanced LIE is detected with 95.11% accuracy versus 81.33% on MNIST and 97.78% versus 75.56% on CIFAR-10. QUBO fares poorly on simpler attacks where MultiKrum excels, so the two methods are complementary. QUBO quality also degrades as the number of clients grows. To address this, we introduce a MultiSignal ensemble that uses a dual-feature routing gate based on Euclidean and cosine Krum score gaps to classify attacks into four regimes and routes evasion attacks to a suspicion-penalized QUBO with agreement voting. At 100 clients on MNIST, MultiSignal achieves 95.3% average detection accuracy versus 91.8% for classical MultiKrum, with the largest gains on Sparse Lie (72.0% to 95.2%, +23.2 points) and Advanced Lie (80.4% to 85.2%, +4.8 points). These results show that QUBO-based quantum annealing with MultiSignal is a principled and scalable defense against the most challenging Byzantine strategies in federated learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于量子退火求解QUBO问题的拜占庭鲁棒聚合方法，通过联合优化选择最接近的m个客户端，并引入MultiSignal集成框架实现大规模场景下的高效防御。
AI.motivation: 现有的拜占庭鲁棒聚合方法（如MultiKrum）基于逐贪心评分，无法有效检测那些保留统计特性的恶意更新，尤其在高阶攻击（如Advanced LIE）下表现不佳。
AI.method: 将客户端选择建模为QUBO问题，利用量子退火求解全局最优子集；为应对规模扩展问题，提出MultiSignal集成框架，通过双特征路由门（欧氏距离与余弦Krum分数差距）将攻击分类为四个区间，对规避攻击采用怀疑惩罚QUBO与一致性投票。
AI.result: 15客户端下QUBO对Advanced LIE检测准确率：MNIST 95.11% vs 81.33%，CIFAR-10 97.78% vs 75.56%；100客户端下MultiSignal平均检测准确率95.3% vs 91.8%，Sparse Lie提升23.2个百分点，Advanced Lie提升4.8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: QUBO与MultiKrum互补，MultiSignal框架有效解决了QUBO在客户端数量增长时的性能退化问题，是应对联邦学习中复杂拜占庭攻击的可扩展防御方案。

title: Scientific Logicality Enriched Methodology for LLM Reasoning: A Practice in Physics
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: With the continuous advancement of reasoning abilities in Large Language Models (LLMs), their application to scientific reasoning tasks has gained significant research attention. Current research primarily emphasizes boosting LLMs' performance on scientific QA benchmarks by training on larger, more comprehensive datasets with extended reasoning chains. However, these approaches neglect the essence of the scientific reasoning process -- logicality, which is the rational foundation to ensure the validity of reasoning steps leading to reliable conclusions. In this work, we make the first systematic investigation into the internal logicality underlying LLM scientific reasoning, and develop a scientific logicality-enriched methodology, including a set of assessment criteria and data sampling methods for logicality-guided training, to improve the logical faithfulness as well as task performance. Further, we take physics, characterized by its diverse logical structures and formalisms, as an exemplar discipline to practise the above methodology. For data construction, we extract scientific problems from academic literature and sample a high-quality dataset exhibiting strong logicality. Experiments based on three different backbone LLMs reveal that: 1) the training data we constructed can effectively improve the scientific logicality in LLM reasoning; and 2) the enriched scientific logicality plays a critical role in solving scientific problems. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/ScienceOne-AI/PhysLogic}{https://github.com/ScienceOne-AI/PhysLogic}.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究大语言模型科学推理中的内在逻辑性，并提出一套包含评估标准和基于逻辑性引导的数据采样方法的方法论，以物理学科为例构建高质量逻辑性数据集，实验证明该方法能有效提升LLM推理的逻辑忠实性和任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注通过更大数据集和更长推理链提升LLM在科学QA基准上的表现，但忽视了科学推理过程的本质——逻辑性，即确保推理步骤有效性并得出可靠结论的理性基础。
AI.method: 1) 首次系统研究LLM科学推理的内在逻辑性；2) 提出科学逻辑性增强方法论，包括评估标准和逻辑性引导训练的数据采样方法；3) 以物理学为示例学科，从学术文献中提取科学问题并采样高质量逻辑性数据集；4) 基于三种不同骨干LLM进行实验验证。
AI.result: 1) 构建的训练数据能有效提升LLM推理中的科学逻辑性；2) 增强的科学逻辑性在解决科学问题中起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑性是科学推理的核心要素，通过逻辑性引导的训练方法可以同时提升LLM推理的逻辑忠实性和任务性能，为增强LLM科学推理能力提供了新方向。

title: Efficient Gradient Methods for Distributed Saddle Problems
summary: The distributed setting for Saddle Problems (SPs) has recently emerged as a framework for various modern applications in machine learning and multiagent systems. Despite its relevance, the theoretical foundations of this setting have not yet been thoroughly established. In this paper, we advance this research direction by formalizing the distributed setup for SPs and providing rigorous definitions of communication and computational costs. Our main result is a novel decoupled method that achieves optimal communication cost within the zero-respecting framework. Our method is based on a multi-stage reduction to the decoupled minimization of residual norms, which yields strict improvements over the best known communication cost for the class and the long-standing oracle cost of the Extragradient method. Further, we show by a matching lower bound that our method is communication-optimal within the family of gradient-span algorithms. Finally, we study the extension of distributed SP into Variational Inequality Problem (VIP), which generalizes two-player zero-sum games to multiplayer general-sum games. We show that our decoupled method achieves a new state-of-the-art communication complexity for this broader class.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化了分布式鞍点问题（SPs）的设置，提出了一种基于多阶段归约到残差范数解耦最小化的新方法，在零尊重框架下实现了最优通信复杂度，并通过匹配下界证明了其通信最优性。该方法还扩展到了变分不等式问题（VIP），取得了新的最优通信复杂度。
AI.motivation: 分布式鞍点问题（SPs）已成为机器学习和多智能体系统中多种现代应用的重要框架，但该设置的理论基础尚未被充分建立，现有方法的通信代价和计算代价缺乏严格定义。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的解耦方法，基于多阶段归约到残差范数的解耦最小化，在零尊重框架下实现最优通信代价。该方法还扩展到了更广泛的变分不等式问题（VIP）。
AI.result: 所提方法在零尊重框架下实现了最优通信代价，严格优于已知最佳通信代价和Extragradient方法的长期oracle代价；通过匹配下界证明在梯度跨度算法族中通信最优；在VIP问题上取得了新的最优通信复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 本文推进了分布式鞍点问题的理论基础，提出的解耦方法在通信效率上具有理论最优性，并能推广到更一般的变分不等式问题中，具有重要的理论和应用价值。

title: Calibeating for general proper losses: A Bregman divergence approach
summary: This work introduces a general framework for calibeating based on regret minimization. As compared to Foster and Hart's seminal calibeating work which had specialized treatments of Brier score (squared loss) and log loss, we consider a large family of proper losses that includes $α$-Tsallis losses (for $α\in [1, 2]$) and Lipschitz losses. Our results for Tsallis losses also hold for an unscaled version of Tsallis loss that recovers log loss. Our analysis is oriented around the Bregman divergence view of a proper loss. Technically, our results for the family of Tsallis losses that we consider are U-calibration results, simultaneously obtaining logarithmic regret for all losses in this family while having a weaker dependence on the dimension compared to previous results. Of potential independent interest, we also show a new regret equality for the regret of Be The Regularized Leader. This regret equality holds for general proper losses and itself is based on two results related to online updating formulas for the generalized variance, the latter being a previously introduced generalization of variance based on Bregman divergences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于遗憾最小化的通用calibeating框架，覆盖包括α-Tsallis损失（α∈[1,2]）和Lipschitz损失在内的大类适当损失函数，获得了U-校准结果，同时实现了对数遗憾和更弱的维度依赖，并证明了一个适用于一般适当损失的BTRL遗憾等式。
