AI.motivation: Foster和Hart开创性的calibeating工作仅专门处理了Brier分数（平方损失）和对数损失，缺乏对更广泛损失函数的统一处理框架。本文旨在将calibeating扩展到更大的适当损失函数族，并改进维度依赖关系。
AI.method: 基于Bregman散度视角分析适当损失函数，利用Be The Regularized Leader (BTRL)算法框架，通过推导关于广义方差（基于Bregman散度推广的方差概念）的在线更新公式，建立新的遗憾等式，进而获得U-校准结果。
AI.result: 1) 对α-Tsallis损失族（α∈[1,2]）和Lipschitz损失获得了U-校准结果；2) 同时实现了该损失族中的对数遗憾；3) 维度依赖关系弱于先前结果；4) 证明了一个适用于一般适当损失的BTRL遗憾等式。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将calibeating从特定损失函数推广到更广泛的适当损失函数族，通过Bregman散度视角统一了分析框架，同时改进了技术结果（对数遗憾、更弱维度依赖），其中独立贡献的BTRL遗憾等式和广义方差在线更新公式具有潜在广泛适用性。

title: DeepArrhythmia: Segment-Contextualized ECG Arrhythmia Classification via Selective Evidence Acquisition
summary: Beat-level Electrocardiography (ECG) arrhythmia detection aims to assign an arrhythmia class to each beat in a recording, yet many existing systems treat beats as isolated local instances. This is limiting because beat labels often depend on multi-beat rhythm context, including timing, compensatory pauses, and beat-to-beat morphological consistency. We present DeepArrhythmia, a tool-grounded multimodal framework for segment-contextualized beat-level ECG arrhythmia classification. Given a multi-beat ECG segment, DeepArrhythmia combines the raw ECG signal and a rendered waveform image, localizes R peaks to identify beat instances, and produces structured beat-level predictions. The framework decouples physiological measurement from evidence integration using specialized tools for beat localization, numerical rhythm--morphology extraction, and morphology-focused textual analysis. DeepArrhythmia uses segment-level confidence to route between minimal and rich evidence states, since richer physiological evidence is not uniformly useful. This agentic design integrates rhythm context, explicit physiological grounding, and selective evidence acquisition for decision making.

AI.tldr: DeepArrhythmia是一个基于工具的多模态框架，通过整合心电信号、波形图像和节律上下文，实现面向片段的逐拍心律失常分类，并采用智能证据路由机制在最小与丰富证据状态间自适应切换。
AI.motivation: 现有逐拍心律失常检测系统将每个心跳视为孤立的局部实例，忽略了心律失常分类中至关重要的多拍节律上下文（如时序、代偿间歇、拍间形态一致性），导致分类性能受限。
AI.method: 提出DeepArrhythmia框架，结合原始心电信号和波形图像作为多模态输入；使用专用工具进行R峰定位、节律-形态数值提取和形态学文本分析；通过片段级置信度在最小证据与丰富证据状态间路由，实现自适应证据获取。
AI.result: 该框架将生理测量与证据整合解耦，通过智能体设计整合节律上下文、显式生理基础和选择性证据获取，实现了更准确的片段语境化逐拍分类。
AI.conclusion: 利用工具增强的多模态融合和智能证据路由策略，能够有效利用多拍节律上下文信息，提升心电图中逐拍心律失常分类的准确性。

title: Capturing LLM Capabilities via Evidence-Calibrated Query Clustering
summary: Query clustering organizes queries into groups that reflect shared latent capability demands, enabling capability-aware LLM evaluation. Existing clustering methods, which primarily rely on semantic taxonomies or embeddings, often fail to capture such latent capability requirements due to a misalignment between surface-level semantics and actual model performance. We propose ECC, an algorithm that calibrates prior semantic embeddings using limited posterior model comparisons to bridge the gap between surface-level semantics and latent capability requirements. ECC characterizes each cluster through a capability profile parameterized by a Bradley-Terry model and uses trainable mixture weights to accommodate queries with mixed capability demands, jointly learning a flexible, capability-aware clustering structure that supports query-specific inference of LLM capabilities. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate that ECC significantly improves LLM capability ranking quality, outperforming human-labeled and embedding-based baselines by an average of 17.64 and 18.02 percentage points, respectively, and proves effective in downstream tasks such as query routing.

AI.tldr: 提出ECC算法，通过有限的后验模型比较校准先验语义嵌入，从而将表面语义与潜在能力需求对齐，实现能力感知的查询聚类，显著提升LLM能力排名质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于语义分类或嵌入的查询聚类方法未能捕捉查询背后真实的LLM能力需求，因为表面语义与实际模型表现之间存在错配。
AI.method: ECC算法：先用先验语义嵌入进行初始化，再通过少量后验模型比较结果进行校准；每个簇由Bradley-Terry模型参数化的能力轮廓刻画，并通过可训练的混合权重处理混合能力需求的查询，联合学习灵活的能力感知聚类结构。
AI.result: ECC在LLM能力排名质量上比人工标注和基于嵌入的基线分别平均提升17.64和18.02个百分点，在查询路由等下游任务中同样表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 通过少量模型比较信号校准语义嵌入，ECC有效弥合了表面语义与潜在能力需求之间的鸿沟，实现了更优的能力感知聚类与LLM评估。

title: Singleton Optimality in Standard Quadratic Programs with the GOE
summary: We study the standard quadratic optimization problem over the simplex when the objective matrix is drawn from the Gaussian Orthogonal Ensemble (GOE). Let \(κ_n\) denote the support size of the almost surely unique global optimizer. We prove \[ \Prob(κ_n>1)\sim 2\sqrt{2π}\,\frac{\sqrt{\log n}}{n}. \] The proof combines an exact two-coordinate condition for edge improvement with a product formula obtained by conditioning on the diagonal order statistics. Boundary-layer estimates identify the leading contribution and show that supports of size at least three are negligible. Consequently, the minimum-diagonal vertex is globally optimal with probability tending to one, with an explicit first-order correction.

AI.tldr: 研究了GOE矩阵下标准二次优化问题的全局最优解支撑集大小，证明了支撑集大于1的概率渐近等于2√(2π) √(log n)/n，且最小对角元顶点以趋于1的概率为全局最优解。
AI.motivation: 理解随机二次优化问题在GOE矩阵下的全局最优解结构，特别是最优解支撑集大小的概率分布。
AI.method: 结合精确的两坐标改进条件与基于对角顺序统计量的乘积公式，通过边界层估计识别主要贡献项，并证明支撑集大小至少为3的情况可忽略。
AI.result: 证明了P(κ_n>1) ~ 2√(2π) √(log n)/n，且最小对角元顶点几乎必然为全局最优解，并给出了显式的一阶修正项。
AI.conclusion: GOE矩阵下标准二次优化问题的最优解几乎总是单点支撑，多支撑的概率以显式速率趋于零。

title: Two-Valued Symmetric Circulant Matrices: Applications in Deep Learning
summary: Despite the success of deep neural networks in vision, medical diagnosis, and IoT scenarios, their deployment on resource-limited platforms poses serious challenges due to their high storage requirements, computational complexity, and large footprint. In particular, fully connected layers require a large number of weights, making it difficult for edge devices to accommodate them. To overcome these challenges associated with limited platforms, this paper proposes the Two-Valued Symmetric Circulant Matrix (TVSCM), a very sparse architecture that employs just two weights per layer to keep it circulant and symmetric. The extreme form of structured sparse architecture provides negligible storage costs compared to traditional full-weight storage. Instead of hardware and additional stages of other traditional sparse learning techniques, such as low-rank approximation and pruning approaches, this architecture provides an extreme form of sparsity, achieving very minimal storage requirements. The simulation study demonstrates more than 80$\times$ reduction in model parameters, reducing parameters from 623,290 to 7,852 on MNIST and from 24,709 to 942 on the MIT-BIH arrhythmia dataset, while maintaining comparable accuracy from 97.6% to 93.5% on MNIST and from 97.6% to 93.1% on MIT-BIH. Due to its minimal architectural requirements and very low power consumption, this architecture would be ideal for edge computing platforms, tiny-ML platforms, IoMT systems, and battery-powered systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双值对称循环矩阵（TVSCM），一种每层仅用两个权重的极端稀疏全连接层架构，在MNIST和MIT-BIH数据集上实现了80倍以上的参数压缩，精度仅下降约4-4.5%，适用于边缘计算、Tiny-ML和IoMT等资源受限平台。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在视觉、医疗诊断和物联网场景中表现出色，但其高存储需求、高计算复杂度和大规模参数量使得在资源受限平台（如边缘设备）上的部署面临严峻挑战，尤其是全连接层需要大量权重参数，难以适配边缘设备。
AI.method: 提出Two-Valued Symmetric Circulant Matrix（TVSCM）架构，通过限制每层仅使用两个权重值，并保持矩阵的循环对称性，实现极端结构化稀疏，无需额外的低秩近似或剪枝等传统稀疏学习技术即可大幅降低存储需求。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上参数量从623,290降至7,852（压缩超80倍），精度从97.6%降至93.5%；在MIT-BIH心律失常数据集上参数量从24,709降至942，精度从97.6%降至93.1%。
AI.conclusion: TVSCM架构因其极低的存储需求和功耗，非常适合边缘计算平台、Tiny-ML平台、医疗物联网系统（IoMT）和电池供电系统等资源严格受限的场景。

title: F2IND-IT! -- Multimodal Fuzzy Fake Indian News Detection using Images and Text
summary: Biased manipulation of facts across regional and national media outlets complicates misinformation detection in diverse landscapes like India. This paper introduces a novel multimodal framework combining visual and textual modalities for enhanced fake news detection on Indian media. The architecture utilizes a ResNet-50 Convolutional Neural Network to extract visual features from news images, a DistilBERT encoder to obtain textual semantic embeddings, and an Adaptive Neuro-Fuzzy Inference System (ANFIS) to generate a fuzzy reliability score. A lightweight attention-based fusion module assigns learnable weights to each modality prior to classification. Evaluated on the IFND dataset, the proposed model is validated through an in-depth comparative analysis against previous research. Experimental results demonstrate superior performance across accuracy, precision, recall, and $F_1$-scores, confirming the efficacy of the architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合ResNet-50、DistilBERT和ANFIS的多模态虚假新闻检测框架，在IFND数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 印度地区及全国媒体存在对事实的偏见性操纵，使得虚假新闻检测复杂化，现有方法在多语言、多模态的印度媒体场景下效果有限。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-50提取新闻图像视觉特征，DistilBERT获取文本语义嵌入，ANFIS生成模糊可靠性评分，并通过轻量级注意力融合模块为各模态分配可学习权重后进行分类。
AI.result: 在IFND数据集上的实验结果显示，该模型在准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数上均优于已有研究方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多模态融合架构在印度媒体虚假新闻检测任务中具有有效性和优越性，验证了结合视觉与文本模态以及模糊推理机制的可行性。

title: Robust Optimization Under Objective Functional Uncertainty
summary: This paper proposes a new robust optimization (RO) formulation namely the RO under objective functional uncertainty (ObRO). The ObRO adopts a min-max structure where the inner problem finds the worst-case objective function in a continuous function space to maximize the cost, and the outer problem finds the optimal decision in a Euclidean space to minimize the cost. A solution algorithm is designed to alternately generate the worst-case objective function at the current decision and the optimal decision for the current collection of objective functions. Using operator theory, we prove that this algorithm converges to the defined ``semi-global'' saddle point of the ObRO problem. In addition, we propose a numerical solver based on the piece-wise linearization (PWL) approximation of objective functions. The PWL approximate problem is proved to be numerically consistent with the original ObRO problem. The obtained results are applied to the degradation-aware battery charging scheduling in distribution networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的鲁棒优化框架——目标函数不确定下的鲁棒优化（ObRO），采用min-max结构，内层问题在连续函数空间中寻找最坏情况的目标函数，外层问题在欧几里得空间中寻找最优决策。设计了交替求解算法，通过算子理论证明了算法收敛到“半全局”鞍点。同时提出基于分段线性化近似的数值求解器，证明了近似问题与原问题在数值上一致。将该方法应用于配电网中考虑退化的电池充电调度问题。
AI.motivation: 传统鲁棒优化主要关注参数不确定性，而实际优化问题中目标函数本身可能具有不确定性（如退化、老化等因素导致的成本函数变化），现有方法难以处理这类问题，因此需要建立新的理论框架和求解方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出ObRO的min-max数学框架；2) 设计交替求解算法，内层生成当前决策下的最坏目标函数，外层为当前目标函数集合寻找最优决策；3) 利用算子理论证明算法收敛到半全局鞍点；4) 提出基于分段线性化的数值近似求解器并证明数值一致性。
AI.result: 算法收敛到半全局鞍点；分段线性化近似问题与原ObRO问题数值上一致；将该方法应用于配电网电池充电调度，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ObRO框架有效解决了目标函数不确定下的鲁棒优化问题，理论成果具有一般性，可推广到其他考虑退化或工况不确定的工程优化问题中。

title: Testable and Actionable Calibration for Full Swap Regret
summary: AI generated predictions increasingly inform decision making in critical tasks, and therefore must be trustworthy. One widely used measure of trustworthiness is calibration, which requires that the predictions match the true frequencies and can be treated like real probabilities of a given outcome. However, defining calibration is subtle, and designing good measures of calibration error has been an active topic of recent research. The first goal is to find calibration measures that are actionable, meaning they can inform decision makers about their utility loss when predictions are treated as true probabilities, which is known as swap regret. The second goal is to find calibration measures that are testable, meaning that calibration error can be measured from a small sample of predictions and outcomes. Although these are very basic requirements, there is no existing calibration measure that fully satisfies both properties, and all existing measures relax actionability by bounding a weaker notion of swap regret, or relax testability by having suboptimal estimation error. We introduce a new calibration measure, Soft-Binned Calibration Decision Loss (SCDL), which we prove is fully actionable without weakening either requirement, and testable with nearly optimal error rate. In addition, SCDL satisfies other desired properties such as continuity and consistency. We also provide a set of experiments confirming that the theoretical advantages of SCDL compared to other measures lead to better performance in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的校准度量——软分箱校准决策损失（SCDL），该度量同时满足可操作性（能直接反映将预测视为真实概率时的效用损失，即交换遗憾）和可测试性（从小样本中准确估计校准误差），克服了现有校准度量无法同时满足这两项基本要求的缺陷。理论证明SCDL具有近乎最优的误差率，并满足连续性、一致性等理想性质，实验验证其在实际中的优越性。
AI.motivation: AI预测在关键任务中越来越重要，因此必须具有可信度。校准是衡量可信度的广泛使用的指标，但现有校准度量无法同时满足两个基本要求：可操作性（能够告知决策者将预测视为真实概率时的效用损失，即交换遗憾）和可测试性（从小样本中测量校准误差）。
AI.method: 提出Soft-Binned Calibration Decision Loss（SCDL），一种新的校准度量。通过理论分析证明SCDL同时满足完全可操作性和近乎最优的可测试性，并满足连续性、一致性等其他理想性质。
AI.result: SCDL被证明是完全可操作的（不削弱交换遗憾的任何弱化版本），且具有近乎最优的估计误差率。实验确认SCDL相比其他度量在实际中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SCDL是一种同时满足可操作性和可测试性的校准度量，具有理论上的优势并通过实验验证了实际性能提升。

title: Membership Inference Attacks on Discrete Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked Diffusion Language Models MDLMs replace autoregressive generation with iterative demasking and their privacy properties are largely unstudied. We study membership inference attacks MIA on fine tuned MDLMs and show they are significantly more vulnerable than current grey box baselines suggest. We extract a 46 dimensional feature vector from the models reconstruction loss at four masking ratios and train XGBoost and MLP classifiers on top. On the MIMIR benchmark across six text domains XGBoost achieves mean AUC 0.878 peaking at 0.930 on Pile CC and beats the SAMA grey box baseline by 0.062 AUC on average. A leave one signal out ablation shows that the ELBO trajectory alone drives most of this with a mean drop of 0.130 when removed while attention features add almost nothing below 0.003. We also design a shadow model transfer attack where K equals 3 surrogate MDLMs trained on data from unrelated domains generate classifier labels with no access to the target domain. This achieves 0.858 mean AUC within 0.020 of the white box oracle and establishes shadow model transfer as a practical and near equally effective attack path.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）的成员推理攻击，发现其比现有灰盒基线更脆弱；通过从四个掩码率下的重建损失中提取46维特征向量，XGBoost分类器在MIMIR基准上达到平均AUC 0.878，较SAMA基线提升0.062；ELBO轨迹是主要驱动力，而注意力特征贡献微弱；此外，设计了阴影模型迁移攻击，使用3个无关域替代模型达到白盒oracle 0.020以内的性能。
AI.motivation: MDLMs（掩码扩散语言模型）用迭代去噪替代了自回归生成，但其隐私属性（尤其是成员推理攻击下的脆弱性）尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 从模型在四个掩码率下的重建损失中提取46维特征向量，训练XGBoost和MLP分类器进行成员推理攻击；并设计了阴影模型迁移攻击，使用K=3个来自无关数据域的替代MDLM生成标签，无需接触目标域数据。
AI.result: XGBoost在MIMIR基准六个文本域上平均AUC 0.878，Pile CC域最高达0.930，较SAMA灰盒基线平均提升0.062 AUC；留一信号消融表明ELBO轨迹贡献最大（移除后平均下降0.130），注意力特征贡献极小（低于0.003）；阴影模型迁移攻击平均AUC 0.858，与白盒oracle差距仅0.020。
AI.conclusion: MDLMs对成员推理攻击比现有灰盒基线所显示的更脆弱；ELBO轨迹是攻击成功的关键信号；阴影模型迁移攻击可在无需目标域数据的情况下达到与白盒近乎等同的效果，构成一种实用且高效的攻击路径。

title: Latent Heuristic Search: Continuous Optimization for Automated Algorithm Design
comment: Accepted at LION 2026, The Learning and Intelligent Optimization Conference
summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into evolutionary frameworks has established a new paradigm for automated heuristic discovery. Despite their promise, these methods typically search in the discrete space of program syntax, relying on stochastic sampling to navigate a highly non-convex optimization landscape. This work proposes a continuous heuristic discovery framework that shifts optimization to a learned latent manifold. We employ an encoder to map discrete programs into continuous embeddings and train a differentiable surrogate model to predict performance, enabling gradient-based search. To regularize the optimization trajectory, an invertible normalizing flow maps these embeddings to a structured Gaussian prior, where we perform gradient ascent. The resulting optimized latent vectors are projected through a learned mapper into soft prompts, which condition a frozen LLM to synthesize novel executable heuristics. We evaluate the proposed method on the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP), the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP), the Knapsack Problem (KSP), and Online Bin Packing (OBP). Empirical results demonstrate that continuous latent-space optimization achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art discrete evolutionary baselines while offering a complementary methodological alternative for automated algorithm design. The implementation code is available at \url{https://github.com/cheikh025/LHS}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种连续启发式发现框架（LHS），将离散程序优化映射到连续潜空间，利用编码器、可微代理模型和归一化流实现梯度搜索，在TSP、CVRP、KSP和OBP任务上取得与最先进离散进化方法竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的进化方法在离散程序语法空间中搜索，依赖随机采样在高度非凸的优化景观中导航，效率受限。作者希望将优化转移到连续潜空间中，利用梯度信息实现更高效的启发式发现。
AI.method: 该方法包括：(1) 编码器将离散程序映射为连续嵌入；(2) 可微代理模型预测性能，支持梯度搜索；(3) 可逆归一化流将嵌入映射到结构化高斯先验，在该先验上执行梯度上升；(4) 学习到的映射器将优化后的潜向量投影为软提示，条件化冻结的LLM生成新的可执行启发式算法。
AI.result: 在TSP、CVRP、KSP和OBP四个经典组合优化问题上，连续潜空间优化方法达到了与最先进的离散进化基线相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 连续潜空间优化为自动化算法设计提供了一种互补的方法论选择，在保持竞争力的同时开辟了新的研究方向。

title: Implementation-Based Incentive Design for Autonomous Mobility-on-Demand and Transit Systems
summary: Achieving a socially desirable operating point for a multimodal transportation system is challenging when Autonomous Mobility-on-Demand (AMoD) and Public Transit (PT) operators pursue selfish objectives alongside endogenous passenger choices. Existing equilibrium-based regulation models typically search over municipal policies to predict the induced operator equilibrium, creating strong behavioral assumptions, equilibrium-selection issues, and difficult bilevel optimization problems. This paper proposes an implementation-based alternative. Rather than asking which municipal action induces the best equilibrium, we ask: given a target operating profile, what minimum realized transfer makes unilateral deviation unattractive for each operator? Using k-implementation theory, this payment decomposes into two unilateral deviation gains: one for the AMoD operator and one for PT. Calculating this payment requires computing three distinct objects: the social target, the AMoD best response, and the PT best response. This is nontrivial because each represents a large-scale network optimization problem complicated by endogenous mode choice and congestion. To address this, we develop tailored mathematical formulations and algorithms for each oracle. For the social target, we derive a decomposition and entropy-regularized mixed-integer convex formulation balancing social optimality and implementability. For the AMoD oracle, we derive an exact reformulation, a convex relaxation providing a global upper bound, and a sequential convex approximation for feasible lower bounds. For the PT oracle, we develop a mixed-integer convex relaxation and characterize its exactness condition. A NYC case study shows the framework computes tight implementation-payment bounds and reveals how the dominant source of incentive misalignment shifts with congestion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实施理论（k-implementation）的替代框架，用于多模式交通系统中自动驾驶按需服务（AMoD）与公共交通（PT）的激励协调。通过计算最小转移支付使得任一运营商的单方面偏离无利可图，避免了传统均衡模型中的行为假设、均衡选择问题和双层优化难题。针对社会目标、AMoD最优响应和PT最优响应三个核心模块，分别设计了数学规划与算法，并在纽约市案例中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在多模式交通系统中，AMoD运营商和PT运营商各自追求自私目标，而乘客选择是内生性的，导致实现社会期望的运行状态非常困难。现有的基于均衡的监管模型需要搜索市政政策来预测诱导的运营商均衡，存在强烈的行为假设、均衡选择问题和复杂的双层优化问题，亟需一种替代方法。
AI.method: 利用k-implementation理论，将最小转移支付分解为AMoD和PT两个单方面偏离增益。分别构建三个计算模块：（1）社会目标：分解+熵正则化混合整数凸规划；（2）AMoD最优响应：精确重构、凸松弛（全局上界）和序列凸近似（可行下界）；（3）PT最优响应：混合整数凸松弛及其精确性条件。
AI.result: 在纽约市案例中，该框架能够计算紧的实施支付界限，并揭示了主导激励错配来源如何随拥堵水平变化。
AI.conclusion: 基于实施理论的方法有效规避了传统均衡模型的缺陷，提供了计算可行且理论上可解释的激励协调方案，为多模式交通系统的实际监管提供了新思路。

title: A Unified Framework for Data-Free One-Step Sampling via Wasserstein Gradient Flows
summary: We develop a unified theoretical framework for data-free one-step sampling from unnormalized target distributions based on Wasserstein gradient flows. For a broad class of standard f-divergence objectives, we show that the induced velocity field admits the universal form $\mathbf{V}(x)=w(r(x))\,β(x)$, where $β(x)=\nabla \log (p(x)/q(x))$ is shared across objectives and $w$ is determined solely by the choice of divergence. This decomposition shows that standard f-divergence drifts share the same asymptotic target distribution $p$ and differ primarily in how they redistribute transient repair effort across under-covered regions. To formalize this distinction, we derive a one-step regional-response theory for a soft under-coverage functional and obtain a compression--elasticity identity that links divergence choice to the geometry of mass transport into under-covered regions. We further extend the framework beyond the f-divergence family to the Log-Variance (LV) divergence, analyze how the reference distribution alters the resulting drift structure, and motivate a practical LV-inspired surrogate for data-free training. Based on this theory, we instantiate the framework with a KDE-based implementation and describe a complementary normalizing-flow route, enabling one-step inference after training. Experiments on multimodal Gaussian-mixture benchmarks are consistent with the theoretical predictions and demonstrate effective one-step sampling on these targets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于Wasserstein梯度流的统一理论框架，用于从非归一化目标分布进行无数据一步采样。通过分析标准f-散度目标，发现速度场具有通用形式V(x)=w(r(x))β(x)，并进一步扩展到Log-Variance散度，实现了有效的一步采样。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型或流模型的采样方法通常需要多步迭代，效率较低。本文旨在开发一个统一的、无需训练数据的理论框架，实现从非归一化目标分布的一步高效采样。
AI.method: 基于Wasserstein梯度流理论，推导f-散度目标下速度场的通用形式V(x)=w(r(x))β(x)，其中β(x)为共享的得分函数，w由散度选择决定。提出一步区域响应理论和压缩-弹性恒等式。扩展至Log-Variance散度，提出实用的LV替代方法，并基于KDE和归一化流实现。
AI.result: 理论推导了f-散度漂移项共享相同渐近目标分布，差异在于如何重新分配欠覆盖区域的修复努力。实验在多模态高斯混合基准上验证了理论预测，展示了有效的一步采样能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的统一框架揭示了不同散度选择下采样动力学的内在联系，为无数据一步采样提供了理论基础和实用方案。

title: Avoiding Structural Failure Modes in Tabular Fair SSL: Online Primal-Dual Allocation under Confidence Gating
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) enables prediction with limited labels, but high-stakes tabular applications (medical, credit, recidivism) require statistical fairness guarantees. We identify a structural conflict in tabular fair SSL through a diagnostic stress test: under confidence-gated pseudo-labeling, moment-matching fairness regularizers can trigger two failure modes -- Masking Collapse (fairness erodes confidence, starving pseudo-labels) and Trivial Saturation (drift to constant predictors). We propose Online Primal-Dual Allocation (OPDA), an online controller that schedules fairness and entropy-based stability penalties using violation, risk, and pseudo-label health signals, avoiding per-dataset selection of a fixed fairness weight within this diagnostic regime. On the evaluated tabular benchmarks (Adult, ACSIncome, COMPAS), OPDA mitigates the degenerate regimes observed under static weighting and simple single-signal adaptive baselines. On Adult and COMPAS, it yields non-degenerate operating points competitive with the empirical static-$λ$ frontier; on ACSIncome, it preserves utility with a wider fairness-utility spread. Relative to OPDA-lite, the full controller mainly shifts the operating point toward higher utility on ACSIncome, while Adult highlights the fairness-utility trade-off between the two variants. These results position OPDA as a calibration-free controller for non-degenerate operating points in tabular fair SSL without per-dataset tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在线原始-对偶分配（OPDA）方法，通过在线控制器动态调度公平性与熵稳定性惩罚，解决了表格数据公平半监督学习中静态公平权重导致的遮蔽崩溃与平凡饱和两种失效模式，避免了每数据集的手动调参。
AI.motivation: 现有表格数据公平半监督学习在置信度门控伪标签框架下，当使用矩匹配公平正则化项时，会触发两种结构性失效模式：遮蔽崩溃（公平性侵蚀置信度，导致伪标签饥饿）和平凡饱和（模型漂移至常数预测器）。需要一种避免每数据集手动选择固定公平权重的方法。
AI.method: 提出在线原始-对偶分配（Online Primal-Dual Allocation, OPDA），一个在线控制器，利用违规度、风险、伪标签健康度等信号，动态调度公平性与基于熵的稳定性惩罚，无需每数据集选择固定公平权重。
AI.result: 在Adult、ACSIncome、COMPAS三个表格基准上，OPDA缓解了静态权重和简单自适应基线下的退化模式。在Adult和COMPAS上取得与静态λ经验前沿竞争的非退化操作点；在ACSIncome上保持效用同时具有更宽的公平-效用分布。
AI.conclusion: OPDA可作为表格公平半监督学习中无需校准的控制器，在不需每数据集调参的情况下获得非退化的操作点。

title: Dynamics of collective creativity in AI art competitions
summary: Creativity is a fundamental aspect of how culture evolves, yet the mechanisms by which groups produce novelty are notoriously difficult to infer from the historical record. Iterated learning experiments have shown that cultural transmission reliably distorts artifacts toward the inductive biases of learners, but most of this work uses linear chains between human participants, leaving open how these dynamics play out in the networked, human-AI systems that increasingly shape cultural production. In this study, we leverage one such system, Artbreeder, which hosts daily "remix parties" where users iteratively build on each other's work from a single seed image, producing branching lineages of human-AI co-created images. We analyze a dataset of 130,882 images from 368 remix parties over 13 months and find that images become simpler and converge toward common thematic "attractors" (e.g., steampunk scenes, alien architecture). We also find that while more novel "parent" images produce more novel and complex "children" that attract more likes, users paradoxically prefer to remix images that are less novel and complex. Finally, larger remix parties produce more novelty at the cost of lower complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析Artbreeder平台上13个月的368场"混音派对"中130,882张图像，研究了人机协作文化生产中的创新机制。研究发现：图像随着迭代传播趋于简化并收敛于共同主题"吸引子"；虽然新颖的"父代"图像能产生更复杂新颖的"子代"并获得更多点赞，但用户却倾向于混音那些不太新颖和复杂的图像；更大的混音派对能产生更多创新，但以降低复杂度为代价。
AI.motivation: 文化进化中群体产生新颖性的机制难以从历史记录中推断，而现有迭代学习实验多使用线性链，未揭示网络化的人机AI系统中文化传播的动态机制。
AI.method: 利用Artbreeder平台的"混音派对"系统，收集13个月中368场活动的130,882张图像数据，分析图像在迭代传播过程中的新颖性、复杂度和用户偏好变化。
AI.result: 1) 图像随传播趋于简化并收敛于共同主题"吸引子"；2) 新颖的父代产生更复杂新颖的子代且获更多点赞，但用户倾向混音较不新颖复杂的图像；3) 大规模派对方产生更多创新但复杂度降低。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作文化系统中的创新机制存在悖论：用户偏好保守（混音简单图像），但新颖输入和群体规模可推动创新；文化传播在人机混合网络中同样存在简化偏向和吸引子收敛现象。

title: Can Adaptive Gradient Methods Converge under Heavy-Tailed Noise? A Case Study of AdaGrad
summary: Many tasks in modern machine learning are observed to involve heavy-tailed gradient noise during the optimization process. To manage this realistic and challenging setting, new mechanisms, such as gradient clipping and gradient normalization, have been introduced to ensure the convergence of first-order algorithms. However, adaptive gradient methods, a famous class of modern optimizers that includes popular $\mathtt{Adam}$ and $\mathtt{AdamW}$, often perform well even without any extra operations mentioned above. It is therefore natural to ask whether adaptive gradient methods can converge under heavy-tailed noise without any algorithmic changes. In this work, we take the first step toward answering this question by investigating a special case, $\mathtt{AdaGrad}$, the origin of adaptive gradient methods. We provide the first provable convergence rate for $\mathtt{AdaGrad}$ in non-convex optimization when the tail index $p$ satisfies $4/3<p\leq2$. Notably, this result is achieved without requiring any prior knowledge of $p$ and is hence adaptive to the tail index. In addition, we develop an algorithm-dependent lower bound, suggesting that the existing minimax rate for heavy-tailed optimization is not attainable by $\mathtt{AdaGrad}$. Lastly, we consider $\mathtt{AdaGrad}\text{-}\mathtt{Norm}$, a popular variant of $\mathtt{AdaGrad}$ in theoretical studies, and show an improved rate that holds for any $1<p\leq2$ under an extra mild assumption.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自适应梯度方法（以AdaGrad为代表）在重尾梯度噪声下的收敛性，首次证明了AdaGrad在非凸优化中当尾指数p满足4/3<p≤2时的收敛率，且无需预先知道p值，同时提出了算法相关的下界，并分析了AdaGrad-Norm变体的改进收敛率。
AI.motivation: 重尾梯度噪声是现代机器学习优化中的常见现象，现有方法如梯度裁剪和归一化可保证收敛，但自适应梯度方法（如Adam、AdamW）即使不添加这些操作也能表现良好。本文旨在探究自适应梯度方法是否能在无算法修改的情况下自然收敛于重尾噪声环境。
AI.method: 以AdaGrad为研究对象，从理论角度分析其在非凸优化下面对重尾梯度噪声的收敛性；推导算法相关的下界；并进一步分析AdaGrad-Norm变体在额外温和假设下的表现。
AI.result: 首次证明AdaGrad在尾指数4/3<p≤2时具有可证收敛率，且无需预先知道p值，具有自适应性；发现现有重尾优化的极小极大速率无法被AdaGrad达到；AdaGrad-Norm在1<p≤2时在额外假设下具有改进的收敛率。
AI.conclusion: 自适应梯度方法（AdaGrad）能够在无需额外操作的情况下在重尾噪声下收敛，但并非最优；其变体AdaGrad-Norm可进一步改善收敛性能。

title: Training data attribution in diffusion models via mirrored unlearning and noise-consistent skew
summary: Training data attribution (TDA) should enable generative model interpretability and foster a variety of related downstream tasks. Nonetheless, current TDA approaches lack reliability and robustness, preventing their adoption in real-world setups. In this paper, we take a decisive step towards more reliable and robust TDA for diffusion models. We propose to perform TDA with mirrored unlearning and noise-consistent skew (MUCS). The idea is to fine-tune a second model with bounded mirrored gradient ascent, and to measure the normalized skew of this model with respect to the original one using consistent noise samples. We show that, while being conceptually simple and generic, MUCS systematically outperforms existing methods on three different datasets by a large margin. We additionally study the effect that core design choices have on final performance, and analyze novel aspects regarding the overlap of influential instances across generated items and the potential of ensembling TDA approaches. We believe that our findings may have broader implications for more general unlearning setups, as well as for tasks requiring the comparison of diffusion losses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MUCS方法，通过镜像反学习和噪声一致偏度，显著提升了扩散模型训练数据归因的可靠性和鲁棒性，在三个数据集上大幅超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有训练数据归因（TDA）方法缺乏可靠性和鲁棒性，难以在实际场景中应用，亟需更稳定有效的TDA方案。
AI.method: 提出MUCS方法：对有界镜像梯度上升微调第二个模型，并使用一致噪声样本测量该模型相对于原始模型的归一化偏度。
AI.result: 在三个不同数据集上系统性地大幅优于现有方法；分析了核心设计选择对性能的影响，以及影响实例在生成项中的重叠和TDA集成的潜力。
AI.conclusion: MUCS方法简单通用且效果显著，其发现对更广泛的去学习设置以及需要比较扩散损失的任务具有重要参考价值。

title: Nested Spatio-Temporal Time Series Forecasting
summary: Spatiotemporal forecasting is critical for real-world applications like traffic management, yet capturing reliable interactions remains challenging under noisy and non-stationary conditions. Existing methods primarily rely on historical spatial priors, often failing to account for evolving temporal correlations and suffering from systematic errors. In this work, we propose a nested forecasting framework that couples future macro-level regional trends with micro-level historical observations, enabling top-down guidance from abstract future representations for fine-grained forecasting. Specifically, we employ a spectral clustering-based approach to construct semantically coherent regions, providing both theoretical and empirical evidence that this representation effectively filters systematic noise while preserving essential trends. Building on this, we develop a progressive coarse-to-fine predictor to integrate these representative features into the inference process. This enables the model to leverage trend predictions to anticipate dynamic anomalies, such as periodic offsets, in advance. Furthermore, extensive experiments on multiple high-dimensional datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating the effectiveness of future macro-guided nested forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种嵌套式时空预测框架，通过频谱聚类构建语义一致的宏观区域，利用未来宏观趋势引导微观细粒度预测，在多个高维数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有时空预测方法依赖历史空间先验，难以捕捉动态时序相关性且易受系统噪声影响，亟需一种能够利用未来宏观趋势引导细粒度预测的框架。
AI.method: 采用频谱聚类构建语义一致的区域表示来滤除系统噪声并保留核心趋势，再通过渐进式粗到细预测器将宏观特征融入推理过程，实现未来宏观趋势对微观预测的顶层引导。
AI.result: 在多个高维数据集上的实验表明，该方法一致性地超越了当前最先进的基线模型，验证了未来宏观引导的嵌套预测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 未来宏观层面趋势预测能够有效引导微观细粒度预测，尤其适用于动态异常（如周期性偏移）的提前预判，为时空预测提供了新的范式。

title: MADP: A Multi-Agent Pipeline for Sustainable Document Processing with Human-in-the-Loop
summary: Document processing automation remains a critical challenge in enterprise environments, where traditional manual approaches are labor-intensive and error-prone. We present MADP, a multi-agent architecture that addresses the challenge of automating document processing in enterprise settings by combining deep learning-based classification and parsing with large language model extraction, while maintaining accuracy through selective human validation. Our system integrates five specialized agents--Classificator, Splitter, Parser, Extraction, and Validator--with a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) mechanism and a novel Prompt Fine Tuning with Feedback Inheritance (PFTFI) approach. The operational analysis on a production use-case scenario of 100,000 invoices per year indicates a potential reduction of Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) requirements by approximately 70%. Production deployment on 955 real-world documents processed through January 2026 achieves a 97.0% full-pipeline automation rate, with only 3% requiring non-AI fallback. Ablation evaluation on a stratified 100-document subset (5 documents per each of 20 supplier/document-type categories) demonstrates that the full MADP configuration with Human-in-the-Loop supervision attains 98.5% document-level accuracy. Additionally, we present a comprehensive sustainability analysis showing that our hybrid AI+HITL approach reduces CO2 emissions by 69%, energy consumption by 69%, and water usage by 63% compared to traditional manual processing. Benchmark comparisons of multiple LLM backends (Granite-Docling, Mistral-Small, DeepSeek-OCR) provide practical insights for deployment in production environments.

AI.tldr: MADP是一种多智能体文档处理架构，结合深度学习、大语言模型和人工验证，在发票处理场景中实现97%全流水线自动化率、98.5%文档级准确率，减少70%人力需求，同时降低约69%碳排放和能耗。
AI.motivation: 企业文档处理自动化面临传统人工方式劳动密集且易出错的挑战，亟需一种高效、准确且可持续的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 提出MADP多智能体架构，包含5个专用智能体（分类器、分割器、解析器、提取器、验证器），结合Human-in-the-Loop机制和Prompt Fine Tuning with Feedback Inheritance (PFTFI)方法，并比较多种LLM后端。
AI.result: 生产部署955份文档实现97%全流水线自动化率；100份文档子集上达到98.5%文档级准确率；减少70%全职人力需求；CO2排放减少69%，能耗减少69%，用水减少63%。
AI.conclusion: 混合AI+HITL方法在企业文档处理中显著提升自动化率和准确率，同时大幅降低人力成本和环境影响，具有实际部署价值。

title: PESD-TSF: A Period-Aware and Explicit Structured Decomposition Framework for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
summary: Deep forecasting models often suffer from attenuated periodic perception and entangled trend-noise representations as network depth increases. Moreover, the widely adopted channel-independent paradigm, while improving training stability, disrupts intrinsic dynamic coordination among variables, hindering the modeling of cross-variable consistency in multivariate time series. To address these issues, we propose PESD-TSF, a physics-inspired structured decomposition framework for long-term time series forecasting that jointly emphasizes interpretability and predictive accuracy. PESD-TSF introduces three key designs. First, a Multiplicative Periodic Gating mechanism incorporates continuous-time priors to dynamically modulate signal amplitudes, preserving periodic structures across deep layers. Second, a multi-scale structured encoder integrates detrended attention with hierarchical sampling to explicitly decouple long-term trends from high-frequency variations while retaining fine-grained temporal semantics. Third, to recover disrupted inter-variable dependencies, we propose Cross-Scale Collaborative Attention (CSCA) together with an RLC regularization scheme, which reconstructs global inter-variable topology in deep feature spaces and enforces physically consistent collaboration through orthogonality and consistency constraints. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets from multiple domains demonstrate that PESD-TSF consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, with particularly strong gains on multivariate forecasting tasks involving complex inter-variable coupling, highlighting its superior structural modeling capability and generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出PESD-TSF框架，通过乘法周期门控、多尺度结构化编码器和跨尺度协同注意力机制，解决深度时序模型中周期感知衰减、趋势噪声纠缠和变量间依赖关系断裂的问题，在多变量长时序预测任务上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度时序预测模型存在三个问题：1) 网络加深导致周期结构感知衰减；2) 趋势与噪声表征纠缠不清；3) 通道独立范式虽提升训练稳定性，但破坏了多变量时间序列中变量间的动态协调关系和跨变量一致性建模。
AI.method: 提出PESD-TSF框架，包含三个核心设计：1) 乘法周期门控（Multiplicative Periodic Gating），引入连续时间先验动态调制信号幅度，在深层网络中保持周期结构；2) 多尺度结构化编码器，结合去趋势注意力与分层采样，显式解耦长期趋势与高频变化；3) 跨尺度协同注意力（CSCA）与RLC正则化方案，重构深度特征空间中的全局变量间拓扑，通过正交性和一致性约束实现物理一致的协同建模。
AI.result: 在多个领域的基准数据集上，PESD-TSF一致达到SOTA性能，尤其在涉及复杂变量间耦合的多变量预测任务上表现突出，展现出优越的结构建模能力和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: PESD-TSF通过物理启发式的结构化分解框架，在强调可解释性的同时兼顾预测精度，有效解决了深度时序模型中的周期衰减、趋势噪声纠缠和变量依赖断裂问题，验证了结构化建模在多变量长时序预测中的有效性。

title: From Imitation to Interaction: Mastering Game of Schnapsen with Shallow Reinforcement Learning
summary: This paper investigates whether shallow neural network agents can master the card game Schnapsen and challenge a strong search-based baseline, RdeepBot, which uses Monte Carlo sampling and lookahead search. Guided by a progressively more complex experimental design, we first evaluate a supervised learning agent (MLPBot) trained on replay data and then a reinforcement learning agent (RLBot) with the same shallow architecture trained through asynchronous Monte Carlo updates and experience replay. The results show that supervised imitation does not generalize well enough to defeat strong RdeepBot opponents, whereas reinforcement learning produces substantially stronger agents. In the setting that focuses on the depth parameter of RdeepBot, the best performance is achieved when the learned value function is combined with deeper lookahead during gameplay, allowing RLBot to achieve statistically significant higher winning rates against the strongest evaluated RdeepBot baseline. In the sample-based setting, the gains are more conditional: the strongest performance appears at a relatively lower training num_samples parameter rather than increasing uniformly with stronger sampling.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了浅层神经网络智能体能否掌握纸牌游戏Schnapsen，并挑战基于搜索的强基线RdeepBot。结果表明监督学习无法泛化击败强对手，而强化学习能产生更强的智能体。当学习到的价值函数与更深层的搜索结合时，RLBot能对最强基线取得统计显著更高的胜率。
AI.motivation: 探究浅层神经网络智能体是否能够在策略性纸牌游戏Schnapsen中掌握足够强的技能，以挑战使用蒙特卡洛采样和前瞻搜索的强基线系统RdeepBot。
AI.method: 采用逐步复杂的实验设计：首先训练基于监督学习的MLPBot（使用回放数据），然后使用异步蒙特卡洛更新和经验回放训练具有相同浅层架构的强化学习智能体RLBot。在两个设置（深度参数和采样参数）下评估性能。
AI.result: 监督模仿无法泛化击败强RdeepBot对手；强化学习产生更强智能体。在深度参数设置中，学习价值函数与更深层前瞻结合时达到最佳性能，RLBot对最强基线取得统计显著更高胜率。在采样设置中，最强性能出现在相对较低的训练num_samples参数处，而非随采样增强单调提升。
AI.conclusion: 浅层神经网络通过强化学习而非监督学习，能够在Schnapsen中挑战强搜索基线，但效果取决于搜索参数的设置，并非在所有条件下均能超越。

title: Multiscale Supervised Unbalanced Optimal Transport Flow Matching
summary: Unbalanced optimal transport (UOT) provides a principled framework for modeling single-cell transitions and birth-death dynamics, but its high computational cost limits scalability to large-scale datasets. Although single-cell data often contain hierarchical annotations and known transition priors, existing UOT approximations rarely exploit this multiscale structure or prior knowledge. We introduce Multiscale Supervised Unbalanced Optimal Transport Flow Matching (MUST-FM), a simulation-free framework that scales UOT by leveraging hierarchical data structure. MUST-FM further supports an optional supervised formulation that incorporates transition priors, such as cell lineages, to guide the learning of displacement fields and mass variations. Experiments show that MUST-FM reduces computational overhead while achieving robust and biologically meaningful trajectory inference, enabling dynamic modeling of atlas-scale single-cell datasets.

AI.tldr: MUST-FM是一个无模拟的框架，通过利用分层数据结构和可选的先验知识（如细胞谱系），在不牺牲生物学意义的前提下，大幅降低非平衡最优传输（UOT）的计算成本，实现大规模单细胞数据的轨迹推断。
AI.motivation: 非平衡最优传输（UOT）为单细胞动态建模提供了理论基础，但其高计算成本限制了在大规模数据集上的应用。现有UOT近似方法很少利用单细胞数据中已有的分层注释和先验转换知识，因此需要一种更高效、可扩展的方法。
AI.method: 提出多尺度监督非平衡最优传输流匹配（MUST-FM），这是一个无模拟框架。它通过利用数据的分层结构来扩展UOT，支持可选的监督形式来整合转换先验（如细胞谱系），从而指导位移场和质量变化的学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，MUST-FM显著降低了计算开销，同时实现了稳健且具有生物学意义的轨迹推断，能够对图集规模的单细胞数据集进行动态建模。
AI.conclusion: MUST-FM通过多尺度结构和先验知识融合，有效解决了UOT在大规模单细胞数据上的可扩展性问题，为动态建模提供了高效且生物学可解释的工具。

title: Scalable Decision-Focused Learning through Cost-Sensitive Regression
summary: Many real-world combinatorial problems involve uncertain parameters, which can be predicted given contextual features and historical data. These `predict-then-optimize' or `contextual optimization' problems have gained significant attention: end-to-end training methods can now minimize the downstream task cost rather than the predictive error. However, despite their effectiveness, these decision-focused learning (DFL) approaches often rely on repeated solving of the underlying combinatorial optimization problem during training, making them computationally expensive and difficult to scale. We reframe the learning problem as a cost-sensitive multi-output regression problem: multi-output due to the combinatorial problem having multiple uncertain parameters, and cost-sensitive due to the downstream task cost being the real target. Our technical contribution is the formalization of multiple loss function components that follow from this reframing: cost-insensitive normalization, decision-aware asymmetric penalization of over- and underpredictions, and instance-based costs that mimic the true downstream task-based loss locally. These components require zero or one solve per training data instance, while requiring no further solves during training. Experiments show that the combination of loss components achieves comparable downstream task quality to the state of the art, while being significantly more efficient, enabling scaling to problem sizes that have not been tackled before with DFL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将预测后优化（predict-then-optimize）问题重新框架为成本敏感的多输出回归问题，设计了三种损失函数组件（成本不敏感归一化、决策感知的非对称惩罚、基于实例的成本），这些组件在训练时仅需每个数据实例零次或一次求解，无需反复求解组合优化问题，在保持与现有方法相当的下游任务质量的同时显著提升了计算效率，使得决策聚焦学习（DFL）能够扩展到以前无法处理的规模。
AI.motivation: 现有的决策聚焦学习（DFL）方法在训练过程中需要反复求解底层的组合优化问题，导致计算开销巨大，难以扩展到大规模实际问题。
AI.method: 将学习问题重新框架为成本敏感的多输出回归问题，形式化了三种损失函数组件：成本不敏感归一化、决策感知的非对称上下预测惩罚、以及模仿真实下游任务成本的基于实例的成本。这些组件在训练时仅需零次或一次求解。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的损失函数组合在下游任务质量上与现有最先进方法相当，但在计算效率上显著更优，能够扩展到此前DFL无法处理的问题规模。
AI.conclusion: 通过将组合优化问题重新框架为成本敏感回归问题，可以在不牺牲下游任务质量的前提下大幅提升训练效率，为决策聚焦学习在大规模实际问题中的应用开辟了道路。

title: Physics-Guided Geometric Diffusion for Macro Placement Generation
summary: Macro placement is a pivotal stage in VLSI physical design, fundamentally determining the overall chip performance. Recent data-driven placement methods have demonstrated significant potential, yet they often struggle to handle sequential dependencies and to balance topological connectivity with physical constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose MacroDiff+, a physics-guided geometric diffusion framework. Specifically, we design a dual-domain denoising architecture that couples topological connectivity encoded by heterogeneous GNNs with global geometric context modeled by a Transformer. Furthermore, we introduce Physics-Guided Sampling, an inference strategy that actively steers the generation using explicit gradients to ensure both statistical plausibility and physical validity. On the ISPD2005 MMS benchmarks, MacroDiff+ outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with a 6.1-6.2% reduction in wirelength. Notably, it exhibits superior stability and scalability on large-scale designs where prior methods fail to converge. The source code is available at https://github.com/jhy00n/MacroDiff-plus.

AI.tldr: MacroDiff+是一个用于VLSI宏单元布局的物理引导几何扩散框架，通过双域去噪架构（异构GNN+Transformer）和物理引导采样，在ISPD2005 MMS基准上实现了6.1-6.2%的线长缩减，并在大规模设计上展现出优越的稳定性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动布局方法难以处理序列依赖关系，并且在平衡拓扑连通性与物理约束方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出MacroDiff+框架，包含：(1) 双域去噪架构，耦合异构GNN编码的拓扑连通性与Transformer建模的全局几何上下文；(2) 物理引导采样推理策略，利用显式梯度引导生成，确保统计合理性和物理有效性。
AI.result: 在ISPD2005 MMS基准上，相比基线方法减少6.1-6.2%的线长；在大规模设计上表现出优越的稳定性和可扩展性，而先前方法无法收敛。
AI.conclusion: MacroDiff+通过物理引导的几何扩散框架有效解决了宏单元布局中拓扑与物理约束的平衡问题，取得了显著的性能提升和更好的稳定性。

title: Responsible Agentic AI Requires Explicit Provenance
summary: Agentic AI is rapidly proliferating across diverse real-world domains such as software engineering, yet public trust has not kept pace. The central reason is that responsibility, despite being widely discussed, remains a subjective and unenforced concept, as no current agentic framework produces the quantifiable, traceable, and interventionable provenance needed to assign it when harm emerges from compositions no single party designed. We position that what is missing is not better benchmark-level evaluation but $\textbf{explicit provenance}$ across the full agentic lifecycle, which is the only viable basis for making responsibility computable and actionable. We advance this agenda along four axes: establishing $\textit{why}$ such provenance is a structural necessity by identifying responsibility gaps across sociotechnical dimensions, formalizing $\textit{what}$ it must encode through a causal attribution function and responsibility tensor, discussing $\textit{how}$ it can be made computable across four lifecycle layers with preliminary experiments showing that provenance is estimable and interveneable online before irreversible harm accumulates, and examining $\textit{who}$ bears responsibility through a concrete agentic incident. Explicit provenance is not a discretionary refinement but the necessary condition for responsible agentic AI, and no stakeholder across its ecosystem can afford to treat it as optional.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前智能体AI缺乏显式溯源机制，导致责任无法量化、追踪和干预。作者提出必须在全生命周期中建立显式溯源，使其成为可计算、可操作的责任基础，并从为何必要、编码什么、如何实现、谁负责四个维度展开论证。
AI.motivation: 智能体AI在软件工程等真实场景快速部署，但公众信任未同步提升。核心原因是"责任"概念虽然被广泛讨论，却仍是主观且不可执行的概念——当前没有任何智能体框架能生成可量化、可追踪、可干预的溯源记录，以在多方协同导致的危害事件中确定责任归属。
AI.method: 沿四个轴线推进：(1) 从社会技术维度识别责任缺口，论证显式溯源的结构必要性；(2) 通过因果归因函数和责任张量形式化定义溯源应编码的内容；(3) 在四个生命周期层讨论如何使溯源可计算，并通过初步实验证明其可在不可逆危害累积前在线估计和干预；(4) 通过具体智能体事件考察谁承担最终责任。
AI.result: 初步实验表明，溯源是可估计的，并且可以在不可逆危害累积之前进行在线干预。
AI.conclusion: 显式溯源不是可选的精细化改进，而是负责任智能体AI的必要条件。生态系统中的任何利益相关者都不能将其视为可选项。

title: Uncertainty Reliability Under Domain Shift: An Investigation for Data-Driven Blood Pressure Estimation in Photoplethysmography
summary:
Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is critical for safety-critical domains like healthcare, yet it is rarely evaluated under realistic out-of-distribution (OOD) conditions. Here, we assessed predictive performance and uncertainty reliability for deep learning-based blood pressure (BP) estimation from photoplethysmography (PPG) signals under both in-distribution (ID) and OOD settings. Using an XResNet1D-50 trained on PulseDB and tested on four external datasets, we compared deep ensembles (DE) and Monte Carlo dropout (MCD) with Gaussian negative log-likelihood (GNLL) and mean squared error (MSE) losses, optionally followed by post-hoc recalibration via conformal prediction (CP), temperature scaling (TS), and isotonic regression (IR).
  The key findings of our study are as follows: (1) DE provides stronger predictive robustness under domain shift than MCD, an advantage that becomes clear primarily under external shift. (2) Recalibrated GNLL-based methods yield the best uncertainty calibration (e.g., GNLL+DE+CP for systolic blood pressure (SBP), GNLL+DE+TS for diastolic blood pressure (DBP)), while MSE-based uncertainty requires recalibration to become practically useful. (3) Across settings, CP and TS offer the most consistent gains, with IR remaining competitive in several cases.
  Overall, our results identify DE-based methods as most robust for predictive performance under domain shift, GNLL as strongest for native UQ, and recalibration as essential for making MSE-based uncertainty practical. These findings highlight the need to jointly assess predictive accuracy and calibration on external data for trustworthy cuffless BP estimation

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了深度学习血压估计模型在域内和域外条件下的预测性能与不确定性量化可靠性，发现深度集成方法在域偏移下鲁棒性最强，基于高斯负对数似然的损失函数在原生不确定性量化上表现最佳，而重校准（特别是保形预测和温度缩放）对提升不确定性校准至关重要。
AI.motivation: 尽管不确定性量化在医疗等安全关键领域至关重要，但现有研究很少在真实的分布外条件下对其进行评估。本研究旨在填补这一空白，系统评估不同方法在血压估计任务中的预测性能与不确定性可靠性。
AI.method: 使用XResNet1D-50模型在PulseDB上训练，在四个外部数据集上测试；比较深度集成（DE）和蒙特卡洛丢弃法（MCD）两种不确定性方法，结合高斯负对数似然（GNLL）和均方误差（MSE）两种损失函数，并可选地使用保形预测（CP）、温度缩放（TS）和等渗回归（IR）进行事后重校准。
AI.result: (1) 深度集成在域偏移下比MCD具有更强的预测鲁棒性；(2) 重校准后的GNLL方法在不确定性校准上表现最佳，而MSE基的不确定性需要重校准才能实际可用；(3) CP和TS提供最一致的增益，IR在部分场景也具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: DE基方法在域偏移下预测性能最鲁棒，GNLL在原生不确定性量化上最强，重校准对MSE基不确定性的实用性不可或缺。研究强调需要在外部数据上联合评估预测准确性和校准度，以实现可信的无袖带血压估计。

title: Peak-Detector: Explainable Peak Detection via Instruction-Tuned Large Language Models in Physiological Sign
summary: Accurate peak detection across diverse cardiac physiological signals, including the Electrocardiogram (ECG), Photoplethysmogram (PPG), Ballistocardiogram (BCG), and Bodyseismography (BSG), is fundamental for cardiovascular monitoring but is often hindered by artifacts and signal variability. Conventional algorithms are typically engineered with expert knowledge for a single signal modality, limiting their generalizability. Conversely, deep learning-based methods often lack interpretability, limiting transparency for expert verification and hindering expert-computer interaction. To address these limitations, we introduce Peak-Detector, a novel framework that leverages instruction-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) for robust, cross-modal, and explainable peak detection. A core innovation of our framework is a "peak-representation" technique that transforms time-series data into a condensed format, preserving critical event information while significantly reducing signal length. This representation provides a crucial inductive bias, guiding the LLM to reason over physiologically meaningful events rather than raw, noisy data. The model is optimized through a two-stage process: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by reinforcement learning (RL) with a multi-objective reward function. The model's self-explanation capabilities are cultivated by fine-tuning on a custom-built Peak-Explanation dataset. Across four modalities-ECG, PPG, BCG, and BSG-spanning seven datasets (six public benchmarks plus one real-world cohort), Peak-Detector demonstrates strong cross-modal performance, achieving best or tied-best detection under clinically relevant temporal tolerance. Beyond accuracy, the generated rationales surface failure modes and support verification and error analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Peak-Detector框架，利用指令微调的大型语言模型实现跨模态（ECG、PPG、BCG、BSG）可解释的心跳峰值检测。核心创新包括"峰值表征"技术将时序数据压缩为关键事件格式，以及两阶段优化（SFT+RL）。在七个数据集上达到最优或并列最优性能，并具备自解释能力，支持错误分析。
AI.motivation: 传统峰值检测算法依赖专家知识且仅适用于单一信号模态，泛化性差；深度学习方法缺乏可解释性，难以进行专家验证和人机交互。因此需要一种跨模态、鲁棒且可解释的峰值检测方法。
AI.method: 提出Peak-Detector框架，核心包括：(1) "峰值表征"技术，将时序信号转换为保留关键事件信息的紧凑格式，引导LLM关注生理有意义的事件而非原始噪声；(2) 两阶段优化：监督微调（SFT）+ 强化学习（RL）多目标奖励函数；(3) 在自定义Peak-Explanation数据集上微调以培养自解释能力。
AI.result: 在ECG、PPG、BCG、BSG四种模态、七个数据集（六个公开基准+一个真实世界队列）上，Peak-Detector在临床相关时间容忍度下达到最优或并列最优的跨模态检测性能。生成的推理文本能够揭示失败模式，支持验证和错误分析。
AI.conclusion: Peak-Detector成功将LLM应用于生理信号峰值检测任务，实现了跨模态泛化性和可解释性的统一，为专家-计算机交互提供了新范式。

title: CAREBench: Evaluating LLMs' Emotion Understanding by Assessing Cognitive Appraisal Reasoning
summary: Emotion understanding is a core capability for LLMs to interact effectively with humans, yet existing evaluation paradigms rely on discrete emotion label prediction and fail to capture the cognitive processes underlying emotion generation. Grounded in appraisal theory, we introduce CAREBench, the first benchmark with complete inferential chain annotations from both first- and third-person perspectives on real-world narratives, spanning appraisal reasoning, appraisal ratings, and multi-label emotion annotation. We propose a process-level evaluation framework and conduct systematic experiments across six LLMs organized around four research questions. We find that stronger models match or surpass human observers on certain tasks, yet fall short on appraisal reasoning and positive emotion recognition; performance across chain steps and sensitivity to appraisal interventions exhibit dissociations across models; and current models have not internalized the mechanisms needed to capture human subjective heterogeneity. These findings suggest that downstream emotion prediction metrics may overestimate LLMs' true emotion understanding, and CAREBench provides a foundation for more diagnostically informative evaluation of LLMs' affective cognitive capabilities.

AI.tldr: CAREBench 是首个基于评价理论构建的 LLM 情感理解基准，包含从第一人称和第三人称视角对真实世界叙事的完整推理链注释（评价推理、评价评分、多标签情感标注），通过过程级评估框架对 6 个 LLM 进行系统实验，发现强模型在某些任务上达到或超越人类水平，但在评价推理和积极情绪识别上仍有不足，且模型未内化捕捉人类主观异质性的机制，证明下游情感预测指标可能高估 LLM 的真实情感理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 情感理解评估范式局限于离散情感标签预测，未能捕捉情感生成背后的认知过程，缺乏对评价理论框架下完整推理链的评估。
AI.method: 基于评价理论构建 CAREBench 基准，包含从第一人称和第三人称视角对真实世界叙事的完整推理链注释（评价推理、评价评分、多标签情感标注），提出过程级评估框架，围绕四个研究问题对 6 个 LLM 进行系统实验。
AI.result: 强模型在某些任务上匹配或超越人类观察者，但在评价推理和积极情绪识别上表现不足；模型在推理链各步骤的表现及对评价干预的敏感性存在分离；当前模型未内化捕捉人类主观异质性的机制。
AI.conclusion: 下游情感预测指标可能高估 LLM 的真实情感理解能力，CAREBench 为 LLM 情感认知能力的更具诊断性的评估提供了基础。

title: Propagation of Chaos in Contextual Flow Maps
summary: We develop a quantitative statistical theory of transformers in the large-context regime by adopting the abstraction of contextual flow maps (CFMs): dynamical systems that evolve a distinguished token in the presence of a contextual measure across a stack of attention blocks. Within this framework, the finite-context model approximates an idealized infinite-context system in which the contextual measure is replaced by its underlying population, so that the context length $n$ becomes a statistical resource. Exploiting the McKean--Vlasov structure of the dynamics and the classical machinery of propagation of chaos, we establish a forward bound controlling the deviation between the finite- and infinite-context CFMs uniformly along depth, and a backward bound controlling the deviation between the corresponding training trajectories uniformly across iterations of online gradient descent. Both bounds achieve the optimal Wasserstein rate $n^{-1/d}$ for general CFMs and parametric rate $n^{-1/2}$ for a restricted class of CFMs that includes transformers as a special case. The analysis rests on a new Eulerian adjoint formulation of the loss gradient and stability estimates for the resulting forward--adjoint system, both of which may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出上下文流映射（CFM）作为Transformer在大上下文 regime 下的抽象框架，利用McKean-Vlasov动力学和混沌传播理论，建立了有限上下文与无限上下文模型之间的前向偏差界（最优Wasserstein速率$n^{-1/d}$）和后向训练轨迹偏差界（参数速率$n^{-1/2}$），并引入了新的欧拉伴随公式来推导损失梯度。
AI.motivation: 在大上下文场景下，理解Transformer中上下文长度如何作为统计资源影响模型行为和训练动态，目前缺乏严格的定量统计理论。
AI.method: 1) 提出上下文流映射（CFM）抽象，将Transformer建模为在上下文测度存在下演化特定token的动力系统。2) 利用McKean-Vlasov结构和混沌传播理论，建立有限与无限上下文CFM之间的前向偏差界。3) 提出欧拉伴随公式推导损失梯度，并分析前向-伴随系统的稳定性，得到后向训练轨迹偏差界。
AI.result: 前向偏差达到最优Wasserstein速率$n^{-1/d}$（一般CFM）和参数速率$n^{-1/2}$（包含Transformer的特例）；后向训练轨迹偏差在在线梯度下降迭代中一致达到相应速率。
AI.conclusion: 上下文长度$n$作为统计资源的观点得到严格理论支持，为理解Transformer在大上下文场景下的行为提供了定量理论框架，所提出的欧拉伴随公式和前向-伴随稳定性分析具有独立的方法论价值。

title: Unveiling Memorization-Generalization Coexistence: A Case Study on Arithmetic Tasks with Label Noise
summary: Highly over-parameterized models can simultaneously memorize noisy labels and generalize well, yet how these behaviors coexist remains poorly understood. In this work, we investigate the underlying mechanisms of this coexistence using modular arithmetic tasks under heavy label noise. Through extensive experiments on two-layer neural networks, we find that larger models tend to generalize better under appropriate optimization and model configurations, while noisy labels are memorized faster than clean data. Over-parameterized models internally form a generalization structure, but its expression in the output is suppressed by the need to fit noisy labels. Remarkably, even with 80\% label noise, near-perfect test accuracy can be achieved by extracting this internal structure using frequency-based methods. We further propose a task-agnostic method to partition networks into generalization and memorization components. Although this subnetwork improves generalization, it is limited compared with frequency-based extraction, indicating that the generalization structure is distributed across neurons and motivating the development of new tools to retrieve generalizable knowledge from over-parameterized networks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了过参数化模型在严重标签噪声下同时记忆噪声标签和泛化的机制，发现更大模型泛化更好，噪声标签被更快记忆，通过频率方法提取内部泛化结构可在80%噪声下达到接近完美的测试精度。
AI.motivation: 理解过参数化模型如何同时实现记忆噪声标签和良好泛化这一看似矛盾的行为，揭示其内在共存机制。
AI.method: 使用模块化算术任务在重度标签噪声下训练两层神经网络，通过频率方法提取内部泛化结构，并提出了任务无关的网络分区方法将网络划分为泛化组件和记忆组件。
AI.result: 更大模型在适当优化下泛化更好；噪声标签比干净数据记忆更快；过参数化模型内部形成泛化结构但其输出表达受限于拟合噪声标签的需求；频率方法提取内部结构可在80%噪声下达到近乎完美的测试精度；所提子网络方法虽改善泛化但不如频率提取有效。
AI.conclusion: 过参数化网络中泛化结构是分布式的而非集中在特定子网络中，需要开发新的工具来从过参数化网络中检索可泛化的知识。

title: QuChaTeR: A Hybrid Quantum-Chaotic Temporal Framework for Earthquake Prediction
comment: Accepted at 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (IEEE ICASSP 2026). This is the accepted version of the paper. The final published version will appear in the IEEE proceedings. Proc. IEEE ICASSP 2026, Barcelona, Spain, 2026
summary: Seismic prediction remains challenging due to the highly nonlinear and chaotic dynamics of earthquake signals. While classical deep learning models such as LSTMs and CNNs capture local temporal features, and quantum models offer richer state representations, their integration with chaos-driven mechanisms is underexplored. We introduce QuChaTeR, a hybrid architecture that combines wavelet-based preprocessing, chaotic maps, and variational quantum circuits with recurrent structures to enhance temporal feature extraction. Implemented in PyTorch and PennyLane, QuChaTeR is benchmarked against classical (LSTM, GRU, RNN, 1D-CNN, Reservoir Computing) and quantum-inspired (Quantum LSTM) baselines. On real-world seismic datasets, QuChaTeR consistently converges faster and achieves superior performance across multiple evaluation criteria. Despite promising results, scalability and quantum hardware limitations remain challenges. Overall, this work demonstrates how quantum-chaotic hybridization provides a practical pathway toward more accurate and robust earthquake prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuChaTeR混合架构，结合小波预处理、混沌映射和变分量子电路与循环结构，用于地震预测。在真实数据集上，相比LSTM、GRU、RNN、1D-CNN、储备池计算和量子LSTM等基线，QuChaTeR收敛更快且性能更优。
AI.motivation: 地震信号具有高度非线性和混沌动力学特性，传统深度学习模型（LSTM、CNN）虽能捕获局部时序特征，量子模型虽能提供更丰富的状态表示，但两者与混沌驱动机制的融合尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出QuChaTeR混合架构，集成小波预处理（去噪/特征提取）、混沌映射（增强非线性动力学建模）和变分量子电路（VQC）与循环结构（RNN/LSTM），在PyTorch和PennyLane框架下实现。
AI.result: 在真实地震数据集上，QuChaTeR相比LSTM、GRU、RNN、1D-CNN、储备池计算和量子LSTM等基线，收敛速度更快，并在多项评估指标上取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 量子-混沌混合方法为更准确、鲁棒的地震预测提供了可行路径，但可扩展性和量子硬件限制仍是挑战。

title: ChemVA: Advancing Large Language Models on Chemical Reaction Diagrams Understanding
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized scientific text processing, they exhibit a significant capability gap when interpreting chemical reaction diagrams. We identify two fundamental bottlenecks restricting current systems: a Visual Deficit, where generic vision encoders struggle to resolve the strict topological connectivity of dense molecular graphs, and a Semantic Disconnect, where standard linear strings, such as SMILES, fail to effectively activate the model's latent chemical reasoning. To bridge these gaps, we propose the Chemical Visual Activation (ChemVA) framework, which employs a Visual Anchor mechanism to ground functional groups via hybrid-granularity detection, followed by a semantic alignment approach that translates visual features into entity names to maximize knowledge activation in LLMs. We evaluate our approach on OCRD-Bench, a newly constructed dataset featuring dense visual-semantic contexts and comprehensive reaction coverage to evaluate the full spectrum from recognition to reasoning. Extensive experiments on OCRD-Bench demonstrate that ChemVA achieves 92.0% structural recognition accuracy. By bridging visual and semantic bottlenecks, our framework delivers a consistent performance gain of approximately 20 percentage points across 9 diverse LLMs, enabling open-weight models to rival proprietary SOTA systems in complex chemical reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ChemVA框架，通过视觉锚定和语义对齐机制，将化学反应图的结构识别准确率提升至92.0%，并在9种大语言模型上实现约20个百分点的性能提升，使开源模型在复杂化学推理任务中达到与专有系统相当的水平。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理科学文本方面表现出色，但在解读化学反应图时存在显著能力差距。具体来说，通用视觉编码器难以解析密集分子图的拓扑连接（视觉缺陷），而标准线性字符串如SMILES无法有效激活模型潜在的化学推理能力（语义断裂）。
AI.method: ChemVA框架包含两个核心机制：1）视觉锚定（Visual Anchor）机制，通过混合粒度检测对官能团进行接地定位；2）语义对齐方法，将视觉特征转化为实体名称，最大化激活大语言模型中的化学知识。
AI.result: 在新建的OCRD-Bench数据集上，ChemVA实现了92.0%的结构识别准确率；在9种不同的大语言模型上取得约20个百分点的稳定性能提升，使开源模型在复杂化学推理任务中能与专有系统竞争。
AI.conclusion: 通过弥合视觉和语义瓶颈，ChemVA框架有效提升了LLM对化学反应图的解读能力，验证了从识别到推理的全链条改进思路，展示了开源模型在化学推理领域追赶专有系统的可行性。

title: Identifiable Token Correspondence for World Models
summary: Transformer-based world models have shown strong performance in visual reinforcement learning, but often suffer from temporal inconsistency in long-horizon rollouts, including object duplication, disappearance, and transmutation. A key reason is that most existing approaches treat next-frame prediction purely as a token generation problem, without explicitly modeling correspondence between tokens across time. We formulate next-frame prediction as a structured probabilistic inference problem with latent token correspondence variables, deriving a model in which each next-frame token is explained either by copying a token from the previous frame or by generating a new token. Our experiments show state-of-the-art performance on 4 challenging benchmarks. The proposed method achieves a return of 72.5% and a score of 35.6% on the Craftax-classic benchmark, significantly surpassing the previous best of 67.4% and 27.9%. We release our source code on https://github.com/snu-mllab/Identifiable-Token-Correspondence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可识别令牌对应（Identifiable Token Correspondence）的世界模型，通过将下一帧预测建模为结构化概率推理问题，显式建模帧间令牌对应关系，解决Transformer世界模型在长程展开中的时间不一致性问题（物体重复、消失、变形）。在4个挑战性基准上取得SOTA，其中Craftax-classic基准回报率达72.5%、得分35.6%，远超此前最佳（67.4%、27.9%）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的世界模型在视觉强化学习中虽表现优异，但在长程推演中常出现时间不一致问题（物体重复、消失、变形）。根本原因在于大多数方法将下一帧预测纯粹视为令牌生成问题，而未显式建模跨时间令牌之间的对应关系。
AI.method: 将下一帧预测形式化为带潜变量令牌对应的结构化概率推理问题。每个下一帧令牌要么通过复制前一帧的某个令牌来解释，要么通过生成一个新令牌来解释。由此推导出一个包含可识别令牌对应机制的世界模型。
AI.result: 在4个挑战性基准上取得SOTA性能。在Craftax-classic基准上，回报率达72.5%、得分35.6%，显著超越此前最佳方法（67.4%、27.9%）。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模帧间令牌对应关系，有效解决了长程推演中的时间不一致性问题，提升了世界模型的预测质量和强化学习性能。

title: Towards Robust Argumentative Essay Understanding via TIDE: An Interactive Framework with Trial and Debate
summary: Argumentative essays serve as a vital medium for assessing critical thinking and reasoning skills, yet there is limited works on accurately understanding and evaluating such texts via prompt. In this work, we propose TIDE, a novel framework designed to improve criteria-based prompt optimization for argument-related tasks by integrating TrIal and DEbate mechanism. Our method addresses key limitations of criteria-based prompt optimizing by mitigating the influence of noisy training data and enhancing optimization stability. We evaluate TIDE on three core tasks: Automated Essay Scoring, Argument Component Detection, and Argument Relation Identification. Results demonstrate that our framework improves performance across tasks. These findings underscore the potential of combining prompt-based methods for advanced argument understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出TIDE框架，通过引入审判与辩论机制优化基于准则的提示词优化方法，在议论文评分、成分检测和关系识别三项任务上提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示词的方法在理解和评估议论文方面存在局限，尤其是准则型提示优化受到噪声训练数据影响且优化稳定性不足。
AI.method: 提出TIDE框架，整合TrIal and DEbate（审判与辩论）机制，改进准则型提示优化过程，降低噪声数据干扰并增强优化稳定性。
AI.result: 在自动作文评分、论元成分检测和论元关系识别三项核心任务上均取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: TIDE框架能有效结合提示方法提升议论文理解能力，展示了提示优化在高级论元理解任务中的潜力。

title: Stress-Testing Neural Network Verifiers with Provably Robust Instances
summary: Neural network verifiers aim to provide formal guarantees on model behavior, but existing verification benchmarks are fundamentally limited by their lack of ground-truth labels. As a result, verifier evaluation relies on indirect heuristics, which prevents exact scoring and systematic study of verifier failure modes. We address this gap by introducing a reusable framework for generating verification instances whose ground-truth robustness labels are known a priori through analytic construction. Our framework led to the discovery of multiple numeric tolerance concerns and an implementation bug in popular verifiers, highlighting the need for ground-truth labels. Additionally, to systematically study verifier failure modes, we introduce the verification Difficulty Profile, a collection of estimable quantities capturing distinct sources of instance hardness. Using our framework and these profiles, we evaluate five state-of-the-art verifiers and show that different instances stress distinct aspects of the verification pipeline. We show that these results can aid the future development of verifiers as they provide actionable targets for improving numerical reliability, relaxation quality, and search behavior. Our code is publicly available: https://github.com/dtroxell19/VeriStressGT.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可重用的验证实例生成框架，该框架通过解析构造产生已知真实鲁棒性标签的实例，解决了神经网络验证器缺乏基准真值标签的问题。利用这一框架和提出的"验证难度剖面"（Difficulty Profile），作者评估了五种先进验证器，发现了数值容差问题和实现错误，并揭示了不同实例对验证流水线不同环节的压力。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络验证基准缺乏真实标签（ground-truth labels），导致验证器评估依赖间接启发式方法，无法进行精确评分和系统研究验证器的失败模式。
AI.method: 1) 提出一个可重用的框架，通过解析构造生成已知真实鲁棒性标签的验证实例；2) 引入"验证难度剖面"（Difficulty Profile），包含一组可估计的量，捕获实例硬度的不同来源；3) 利用框架和剖面评估五种最先进的验证器。
AI.result: 发现了多个数值容差问题和一个实现错误；不同实例对验证流水线的数值可靠性、松弛质量和搜索行为等不同方面产生压力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架和难度剖面可以为验证器的未来发展提供可操作的目标，用于改善数值可靠性、松弛质量和搜索行为。

title: Ringmaster LMO: Asynchronous Linear Minimization Oracle Momentum Method
summary: Muon has recently emerged as a strong alternative to AdamW for training neural networks, with encouraging large-scale pretraining results and growing evidence that matrix-structured updates can be faster in practice. Yet Muon, and more generally Linear Minimization Oracle (LMO) based methods, are typically used synchronously. This is problematic in heterogeneous distributed systems, where workers complete gradient computations at different speeds and synchronous training must repeatedly wait for slower workers. In this work, we introduce Ringmaster LMO, an asynchronous LMO-based momentum method for unconstrained stochastic nonconvex optimization. Our method builds on the delay-thresholding idea of Ringmaster ASGD. For SGD-type methods, Ringmaster ASGD achieves optimal time complexity by discarding overly stale gradients. Ringmaster LMO extends this mechanism to general LMO-based updates. We establish convergence guarantees under generalized $(L_0, L_1)$-smoothness and further develop a parameter-agnostic variant with decreasing stepsizes and adaptive delay thresholds. Finally, we translate our iteration guarantees into time complexity bounds under heterogeneous worker computation times. In the classical Euclidean smooth setting, these bounds recover the optimal time complexity of Ringmaster ASGD. Experiments on stochastic quadratic problems and NanoChat language-model pretraining show that the advantages of Ringmaster LMO grow with system heterogeneity and that the method outperforms strong synchronous and asynchronous baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ringmaster LMO，一种异步的基于线性最小化预言机（LMO）的动量方法，用于非凸随机优化。通过扩展Ringmaster ASGD的延迟阈值机制到通用LMO更新中，该方法在异构分布式系统中实现了最优时间复杂度，实验表明在随机二次问题和NanoChat语言模型预训练中优于同步和异步基线方法。
AI.motivation: Muon（基于LMO的方法）在训练神经网络中展现出潜力，但现有LMO方法通常采用同步训练，在异构分布式系统中因等待慢节点而导致效率低下。亟需一种异步LMO方法来适应异构环境，避免同步等待开销。
AI.method: 将Ringmaster ASGD的延迟阈值（delay-thresholding）机制扩展到通用LMO更新中，设计异步LMO动量方法。在广义$(L_0, L_1)$-光滑性下建立收敛保证，并开发参数无关变体（自适应阈值、递减步长）。将迭代复杂度转化为异构计算时间下的时间复杂度界。
AI.result: 在经典欧几里得光滑设置下恢复Ringmaster ASGD的最优时间复杂度。实验表明，系统异构性越大，Ringmaster LMO的优势越明显，且优于强同步和异步基线。
AI.conclusion: Ringmaster LMO成功将异步延迟阈值机制引入LMO方法，在理论上保证了收敛性和最优时间复杂度，实验验证了其在异构分布式训练中的有效性，为大规模异步神经网络训练提供了新方案。

title: Strategic Over-Parameterization for Generalizable Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to downstream tasks via full fine-tuning is increasingly impractical due to its computational and memory demands. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) approaches such as Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) mitigate this by confining updates to a compact set of trainable parameters, but this aggressive reduction often sacrifices generalization, especially under transfer across heterogeneous tasks and domains. We revisit the tension between parameter efficiency and adaptation capacity, and ask whether the two are truly at odds. We answer in the negative by introducing LoRA-Over, a framework grounded in a simple principle: enrich the optimization landscape during training, then collapse the enrichment at inference. LoRA-Over injects auxiliary parameters into the low-rank adapters during training to broaden the effective hypothesis space, and through a decomposition-based reformulation folds them back into a standard low-rank structure with negligible reconstruction error, keeping inference cost identical to vanilla LoRA. Since not all weight matrices benefit equally from added capacity, we further propose two scheduling strategies, one statically predefined and one dynamically determined at runtime, that direct extra capacity where most needed. We evaluate LoRA-Over on language understanding (GLUE, T5-Base), dialogue (MT-Bench), arithmetic reasoning (GSM8K), and code generation (HumanEval), using LLaMA 2-7B and LLaMA 3.1-8B. Across all benchmarks and scales, LoRA-Over consistently outperforms vanilla LoRA, showing that principled over-parameterization designed to vanish at inference is an effective lever for improving PEFT generalization. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: LoRA-Over通过在训练时向低秩适配器中注入辅助参数以拓宽假设空间，再在推理时通过分解重构将其折叠回标准低秩结构，在不增加推理成本的前提下提升PEFT泛化能力，实验表明该方法在多个任务上一致优于原始LoRA。
AI.motivation: 参数高效微调（如LoRA）虽降低了计算和内存需求，但过度压缩参数往往导致泛化能力下降，尤其在异构任务和领域迁移场景下。作者质疑参数效率与适应能力是否真的不可兼得。
AI.method: 提出LoRA-Over框架，核心思想为"训练时丰富优化景观，推理时折叠回原始结构"。具体包括：(1) 在训练期间向低秩适配器中注入辅助参数以扩大有效假设空间；(2) 通过基于分解的重构将辅助参数以极低重建误差折叠回标准低秩结构，推理成本与原始LoRA一致；(3) 提出两种调度策略（静态预定义和动态运行时决定）将额外容量分配到最需要的位置。
AI.result: 在语言理解（GLUE, T5-Base）、对话（MT-Bench）、算术推理（GSM8K）和代码生成（HumanEval）任务上，使用LLaMA 2-7B和LLaMA 3.1-8B进行实验，LoRA-Over在所有基准和规模上一致优于原始LoRA。
AI.conclusion: 原则性的、设计为在推理时消失的过参数化是提升PEFT泛化能力的有效手段，表明参数效率与适应能力并非不可兼得。

title: CatalyticMLLM: A Graph-Text Multimodal Large Language Model for Catalytic Materials
summary:
Property prediction and inverse structural design of catalytic materials are typically modeled as two independent tasks: the former predicts target properties from given structures, whereas the latter generates candidate structures according to desired properties. Although the decoupled paradigm facilitates the implementation of a ``generation--evaluation--screening'' workflow, the inconsistency between the generative model and the property prediction model in terms of representation spaces and training objectives can readily introduce data distribution shifts and evaluator bias, thereby limiting the stability of closed-loop optimization.
  In this work, we propose QE-Catalytic-V2, a unified graph--text multimodal large language model for catalytic materials, which integrates property prediction and inverse design within the same model and shared representation space. Under this unified framework, QE-Catalytic-V2 can not only perform reliable property prediction by leveraging three-dimensional structures and textual information, but also generate and screen physically feasible CIF candidates conditioned on target properties, thereby forming a closed-loop optimization workflow of ``inverse design--prediction--screening--redesign.'' Experimental results demonstrate that this unified paradigm outperforms decoupled baselines on both catalytic relaxed-energy prediction and inverse design tasks, validating the effectiveness of jointly modeling property prediction and structure generation within a single multimodal model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QE-Catalytic-V2，一个统一的多模态大语言模型，将催化材料的性质预测与逆向结构设计整合在同一模型和共享表示空间中，通过闭环优化流程（逆向设计-预测-筛选-重新设计）优于传统的解耦范式。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将性质预测和逆向设计建模为两个独立任务，导致生成模型与预测模型在表示空间和训练目标上不一致，容易引入数据分布偏移和评估器偏差，限制了闭环优化的稳定性。
AI.method: 提出QE-Catalytic-V2，一个图-文本多模态大语言模型，将性质预测与逆向设计统一在同一模型和共享表示空间中，利用三维结构和文本信息进行性质预测，并生成符合目标性质的物理可行CIF候选结构，形成闭环优化流程。
AI.result: 在催化松弛能预测和逆向设计任务上，该统一范式优于解耦基线方法，验证了在同一多模态模型中联合建模性质预测与结构生成的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 统一建模性质预测与结构生成的多模态模型能够有效克服解耦范式的表示空间不一致和评估偏差问题，实现更可靠的闭环优化。

title: Seeking the Unfamiliar but Memorable: Conceptual Creativity as Meta-Learning
summary: What does it mean to create a new concept, rather than retrieve a familiar one? Repeatedly sampling a generative model at the same prompt produces variations with similar styles and typical content. We propose that creativity is the production of stimuli that are unfamiliar to an adaptive observer at first sight, but quickly learnable from a few exposures. We formalize this as a Creator-Appraiser pair: a Creator generates a candidate, an Appraiser adapts to it for a few inner-loop learning steps, and the Appraiser's improvement becomes the reward the Creator optimizes through. We instantiate the framework with diffusion as the Creator, an autoencoder Appraiser on MNIST, and a CLIP Appraiser with a low-rank adapter for natural images. The diffusion model remains frozen with no additional language conditioning; the meta-learning gradient is enough to produce both stylistic variations and concept compositions that the base model does not generate on its own.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种Creator-Appraiser框架，通过元学习优化扩散模型生成在观察者眼中既新颖又快速可学习的概念，无需额外语言条件。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型重复采样同一提示只能产生风格相似的变体，无法真正创造新概念。作者希望定义并实现真正的创造力——生成对自适应观察者而言初看陌生但能快速学习的刺激。
AI.method: 构建Creator-Appraiser对：Creator（扩散模型）生成候选样本，Appraiser（自适应编码器/CLIP+低秩适配器）通过少量内循环学习步骤适应样本，将Appraiser的改善程度作为奖励信号，通过元学习梯度反向优化Creator的参数。扩散模型保持冻结，无需额外语言条件。
AI.result: 在MNIST（自编码器Appraiser）和自然图像（CLIP+低秩适配器Appraiser）上验证，冻结的扩散模型仅靠元学习梯度即可产生基模型本身无法生成的风格变化和概念组合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法形式化了创造力概念，证明无需额外条件训练即可通过元学习引导预训练生成模型产生真正新颖的输出，为可控生成和概念发现提供了新范式。

title: CAM-Bench: A Benchmark for Computational and Applied Mathematics in Lean
summary: Formal theorem-proving benchmarks enable mechanically verifiable evaluation of mathematical reasoning in large language models. However, existing benchmarks mainly focus on Olympiad-style problems and algebraic domains, leaving computational and applied mathematics underrepresented. We introduce CAM-Bench, a Lean 4 theorem-proving benchmark of 1,000 Lean proof targets in computational and applied mathematics, with coverage spanning optimization, numerical linear algebra, and numerical analysis. These problems are adapted from textbook exercises and often depend on locally introduced definitions, notation, algorithms, and elementary results. To construct CAM-Bench, we develop a dependency-recovery pipeline that reconstructs the local textbook context needed to state each problem faithfully. It then normalizes each problem into a standalone informal theorem and translates it into a Lean target. We validate the resulting formal problems through Lean compilation and semantic review, checking both formal correctness and semantic alignment with the original exercises. For each problem, we release the raw exercise, recovered context, normalized informal theorem, and final Lean target. CAM-Bench complements existing formal mathematics benchmarks by targeting applied mathematics problems that rely on textbook concepts and elementary theorems, many of which are not directly available as standard Mathlib4 lemmas. We evaluate widely used large language models and formalization agents on CAM-Bench, and analyze common failure modes in tracking local assumptions, applying elementary results, decomposing proofs, and maintaining long-horizon control in Lean.

AI.tldr: CAM-Bench是一个包含1000个Lean 4定理证明目标的计算与应用数学基准，覆盖优化、数值线性代数和数值分析领域。论文通过依赖恢复管线将教科书习题转化为独立的Lean证明目标，并评估了多种大语言模型在其上的表现，分析了常见失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有形式化定理证明基准主要聚焦于奥林匹克风格问题和代数领域，计算数学与应用数学领域严重缺乏代表性。作者希望填补这一空白，构建覆盖计算数学的定理证明基准。
AI.method: 构建了依赖恢复管线：从教科书习题中重建局部上下文（定义、记号、算法和基础结论），将每个问题标准化为独立的非形式化定理，再翻译为Lean 4证明目标。通过Lean编译和语义审查验证形式化问题的正确性和语义对齐。
AI.result: 发布了1000个Lean证明目标，以及对应的原始习题、恢复的上下文、标准化非形式化定理和最终Lean目标。在多种大模型和形式化智能体上进行了评估。
AI.conclusion: CAM-Bench补充了现有形式化数学基准的不足，聚焦于依赖教科书概念和基础定理的应用数学问题。评估揭示了模型在跟踪局部假设、应用基础结论、分解证明以及在Lean中维持长程控制等方面的常见失败模式。

title: Adaptive Experimentation for Censored Survival Outcomes
summary: Adaptive experimentation enables efficient estimation of causal effects, but existing methods are not designed for survival data with censoring, where event times are only partially observed (e.g., overall survival in cancer trials but with dropout). In this paper, we develop a novel framework for adaptive experimentation to estimate causal effects under right censoring. For this, we derive the semiparametric efficiency bound for the average survival effect curve as a function of the treatment allocation policy and thereby obtain a closed-form efficiency-optimal allocation policy. The policy generalizes classical Neyman allocation to survival settings by prioritizing patient strata where both event and censoring dynamics induce high uncertainty. Building on this, we propose the Adaptive Survival Estimator (ASE), an adaptive framework that learns the allocation policy and estimates the average survival effect curve sequentially. Our framework has three main benefits: (i) it accommodates arbitrary machine learning models for nuisance estimation; (ii) it is guided by a closed-form efficiency-optimal allocation policy; and (iii) it admits strong theoretical guarantees, including asymptotic normality via a martingale central limit theorem. We demonstrate our framework across various numerical experiments to show consistent efficiency gains over uniform randomization and censoring-agnostic baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向右删失生存数据的自适应实验框架（ASE），通过推导半参效率界和闭式效率最优分配策略，实现了因果效应的序贯估计，并提供了渐近正态性等理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应实验方法无法处理存在删失的生存数据（如肿瘤试验中因退出导致的总体生存时间部分观测），因此需要开发适用于右删失情境下的因果效应估计框架。
AI.method: 推导了平均生存效应曲线关于处理分配策略的半参效率界，得到闭式效率最优分配策略（推广了经典Neyman分配）；提出自适应生存估计器（ASE），结合任意机器学习模型进行 nuisance 估计，并序贯学习分配策略与估计效应曲线。
AI.result: 通过数值实验证明，ASE相较于均匀随机化和忽视删失的基线方法，在效率上具有一致的提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了删存生存数据下自适应实验的严格理论保障与实用算法，为临床试验等场景下的因果推断提供了更高效的工具。

title: Global Convergence of Sampling-Based Nonconvex Optimization through Diffusion-Style Smoothing
summary: Sampling-based optimization (SBO), like cross-entropy method and evolutionary algorithms, has achieved many successes in solving non-convex problems without gradients, yet its convergence is poorly understood. In this paper, we establish a non-asymptotic convergence analysis for SBO through the lens of smoothing. Specifically, we recast SBO as gradient descent on a smoothed objective, mirroring noise-conditioned score ascent in diffusion models. Our first contribution is a landscape analysis of the smoothed objective, demonstrating how smoothing helps escape local minima and uncovering a fundamental coverage-optimality trade-off: smoothing renders the landscape more benign by enlarging the locally convex region around the global minimizer, but at the cost of introducing an optimality gap. Building on this insight, we establish non-asymptotic convergence guarantees for SBO algorithms to a neighborhood of the global minimizer. Furthermore, we propose an annealed SBO algorithm, Diffusion-Inspired Dual-Annealing (DIDA), which is provably convergent to the global optimum. We conduct extensive numerical experiments to verify our landscape results and also demonstrate the compelling performance of DIDA compared to other gradient-free optimization methods. Lastly, we discuss implications of our results for diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文通过平滑视角建立了采样优化（SBO）的非渐近收敛分析，揭示了平滑带来的覆盖-最优性权衡，并提出了一种受扩散模型启发的退火SBO算法（DIDA），理论上保证收敛到全局最优。
AI.motivation: 采样优化方法（如交叉熵方法、进化算法）在无梯度非凸优化中广泛应用，但其收敛性理论尚不清晰。本文旨在通过平滑化视角为SBO建立严格的非渐近收敛理论。
AI.method: 将SBO重写为平滑目标上的梯度下降（类比扩散模型中的噪声条件得分上升），进行平滑目标的景观分析，揭示覆盖-最优性权衡；并提出退火SBO算法DIDA，实现全局收敛的理论保证。
AI.result: 建立了SBO算法到全局最小邻域的非渐近收敛保证；DIDA算法被证明能收敛到全局最优；数值实验验证了景观分析结果及DIDA相较于其他无梯度优化方法的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 平滑化使景观更温和（扩大全局最小附近的局部凸区域），但引入最优性间隙；退火策略可弥合该间隙实现全局收敛；该理论对扩散模型亦有启发意义。

title: Is VLA Reasoning Faithful? Probing Safety of Chain-of-Causation
comment: Accept (Poster), CVPR 2026 Workshop DriveX NonArchival Track
summary: We present the first systematic study of faithfulness in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) driving models, analyzing 300 Alpamayo-R1-10B inferences across 100 diverse PhysicalAI-AV scenarios. Our main finding is that output natural-language rationales with trajectories may be significantly unfaithful: (i) overall reasoning fidelity is only 42.5%, with Chain-of-Causation matching scene reality less than half the time; (ii) 94 missed pedestrians in one-third of pedestrian-relevant scenes; (iii) 97.7% trajectory fragility under mild visual perturbations; and (iv) only 48.3% mean reasoning-action consistency, with 53.3% of inferences exhibiting low consistency, including 37.9% of stop-claimed cases where the model continues instead.
