Over three independent runs on four problems, MEMOIR's run-to-run validity standard deviation is more than an order of magnitude below that of every baseline we evaluated in this setting, suggesting that memory-guided exploration yields consistent improvements rather than reflecting sampling variance.

AI.tldr: MEMOIR是一个带有两级记忆层级（分支局部记忆和全局记忆）的记忆引导树搜索框架，用于LLM自动求解器合成，在7个组合优化问题上实现96.7%的解决方案有效性，平均归一化分数提升7.3分，且运行间方差比基线低一个数量级以上。
AI.motivation: 现有基于树搜索和进化的智能体在并行优化候选轨迹时缺乏显式知识传递，导致重复出现相同的约束违反，并收敛于相似的算法族，缺乏跨分支的知识迁移能力。
AI.method: 提出MEMOIR框架，包含两级记忆层级：分支局部记忆（branch-local memory）在单个算法设计的迭代中保留执行层面的细化细节；全局记忆（global memory）跨分支存储压缩后的算法和故障模式摘要。在分支终止时进行反思步骤（reflection step），提炼摘要实现跨分支知识迁移，避免用低级调试痕迹污染未来上下文。
AI.result: 在7个组合优化问题（涵盖调度、路由、装箱和几何设计）上，MEMOIR达到96.7%的解决方案有效性（比最强基线高9.2个百分点），平均归一化分数提升7.3分。在4个问题上的三次独立运行中，MEMOIR的运行间有效性标准差比所有基线低一个数量级以上。
AI.conclusion: 记忆引导的探索能够产生一致性的改进，而非反映采样方差，验证了显式跨分支知识迁移对LLM自动求解器合成的有效性。

title: SCOUT: Cyclic Causal Discovery Under Soft Interventions with Unknown Targets
summary: Learning causal relationships between variables from data is a fundamental research area with many applications across disciplines. Most existing causal discovery algorithms rely on the assumptions that (i) the underlying system is acyclic, (ii) the exogenous noise variables are Gaussian, and (iii) the intervention targets for the data-generating experiments are known. While these assumptions simplify the analysis, they are violated in real-life systems. Most existing methods that address these issues either assume the underlying model is linear or are constrained to operate in limited interventional settings. To that end, we propose SCOUT, a novel causal discovery framework for learning nonlinear cyclic causal relationships from soft interventional data with unknown targets. Our approach maximizes the data log-likelihood to recover the graph structure, using two normalizing-flow architectures: contractive residual flows and neural spline flows. Through experiments on synthetic and real-world data, we show that SCOUT outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both causal graph recovery and unknown target recovery across various interventional and noise settings.

AI.tldr: SCOUT是一个新型因果发现框架，利用归一化流架构从软干预数据中学习非线性循环因果关系，并同时恢复未知干预目标和因果图结构。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现算法大多假设系统为无环、噪声为高斯、干预目标已知，这些假设在真实系统中常被违反。现有方法要么假设线性模型，要么局限于有限的干预设置。
AI.method: 提出SCOUT框架，通过最大化数据对数似然来恢复图结构，采用两种归一化流架构：收缩残差流和神经样条流，处理非线性循环因果结构和未知干预目标。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上的实验表明，SCOUT在因果图恢复和未知目标恢复方面均优于现有最先进方法，适用于多种干预和噪声设置。
AI.conclusion: SCOUT有效解决了真实系统中因果发现的多个关键挑战，为非线性循环因果图与未知干预目标的学习提供了可行方案。

title: Evaluating Deep Research Agents on Expert Consulting Work: A Benchmark with Verifiers, Rubrics, and Cognitive Traps
summary:
Frontier deep research agents (DRAs) plan a research task, synthesize across documents, and return a structured deliverable on demand. They are being deployed in enterprise workflows faster than they are being evaluated. Existing benchmarks measure factual recall, single-hop QA, or generic agentic skill, missing the multi-document, decision-grade work DRAs are deployed to produce. We introduce a benchmark targeting the structured analytical deliverables that fill a management consultant's typical week.
  We grade three frontier agents, namely Claude Opus 4.6 with web search, OpenAI o3-deep-research, and Google Gemini 3.1 Pro deep-research, on 42 SME-authored prompts. Each of the 126 responses is scored on two layers: deterministic ground-truth verifiers (mean 13.8 per task) and a five-criterion 0-3 SME rubric, composed into a Verifier-Rubric Score (VRS) on 0-100. Most prompts embed cognitive traps that penalize surface-pattern matching. Acceptance under our joint threshold (rubric mean >= 2.5 and verifier rate >= 80%) is uniformly low: Gemini 21.4%, o3 9.5%, Claude 9.5%.
  Mean VRS scores agree with published rubric-based benchmarks (our top 62.6 vs. APEX-v1 64.2, ProfBench 65.9, ResearchRubrics < 68%), validating the rubric construct. ACCEPT rates sit below APEX-Agents' MC-segment Pass@1 band (12.3-22.7%) on dedicated DR agents; our floor is three points lower despite the harness advantage, opened by stricter conjunctive grading and trap design.
  Each agent fails distinctively. Claude produces the deliverable most reliably (4.5x the others' rate on file-required tasks) but carries the highest fabrication signature. o3 has the cleanest reasoning average yet drops required sections and propagates arithmetic errors. Gemini is bimodal, with the highest acceptance rate alongside the most zero-scored rubric cells.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对前沿深度研究代理（DRA）的基准测试，评估其在多文档、决策级分析任务中的表现。对Claude、o3、Gemini三个模型在42个SME编写的提示上进行了测试，发现所有模型的接受率都很低（Gemini 21.4%，o3和Claude均为9.5%），且各模型失败模式各不相同。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要评估事实回忆、单跳问答或通用代理技能，无法衡量DRA在多文档综合分析方面的能力。而DRA正被快速部署到企业工作流中，亟需针对其实际应用场景的评估基准。
AI.method: 基于42个SME编写的提示，对Claude Opus 4.6、OpenAI o3-deep-research、Google Gemini 3.1 Pro三个前沿代理进行测试。每个任务使用双重评分机制：确定性真实验证器（平均13.8个/任务）和五准则0-3分SME评分表，组合成0-100分的验证器-评分表分数（VRS）。大多数提示嵌入了认知陷阱以惩罚表面模式匹配。联合阈值标准为评分表均值>=2.5且验证器通过率>=80%。
AI.result: 所有模型的接受率都很低：Gemini 21.4%，o3和Claude均为9.5%。平均VRS分数（最高62.6）与现有基准（APEX-v1 64.2, ProfBench 65.9, ResearchRubrics < 68%）一致。各模型失败模式不同：Claude交付最可靠（文件要求任务的交付率是其他模型的4.5倍），但存在最高的事实捏造率；o3推理最清晰但会遗漏必要章节并传播算术错误；Gemini呈双峰分布，接受率最高但零分单元格也最多。
AI.conclusion: 现有前沿DRAs在结构化分析交付任务上表现普遍不佳，验证了基准的有效性。不同模型有各自独特的失败模式，表明需要针对性的改进。联合阈值评分方法比单一评分更严格，结合认知陷阱设计能更好地区分模型能力。

title: Generalization or Memorization? Brittleness Testing for Chess-Trained Language Models
summary: Recent work has fine-tuned language models on chess data and reported high benchmark scores as evidence that the resulting models can understand the rules of chess, play full chess games at a professional level, or generate human-readable explanations grounded in expert knowledge. We train KinGPT, a 25M-parameter character-level language model trained only on (position, best-move) pairs, who exceeds 3B-parameter ChessGPT on a 600-puzzle mate-in-N suite and 4B-parameter C1-4B over a 20-theme puzzle benchmark. We examine several claims made in existing literature regarding chess-trained language models and assert that their impressive benchmark performance is largely explained by pattern-matching. We also demonstrate how LLM-Modulo, a verifier-in-the-loop framework, raises RedPajama 3B's best move accuracy from 1.2% to 21.2% and move generation validity from 19.3% to 95.3% on mate-in-N chess puzzles, comparable to gains achieved from ChessGPT's fine-tuning on chess-specific web corpora at a fraction of the cost. Our results illustrate how pairing a general LLM with an external verifier offers a more flexible alternative to directly training on synthetic data for well-defined domains. We open source all training/evaluation code, datasets, puzzle samples, and KinGPT model checkpoints for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文通过训练小型模型KinGPT（25M参数）和LLM-Modulo框架，揭示了现有国际象棋语言模型的高分表现主要源于模式匹配而非真正理解棋理，并提出使用外部验证器替代直接训练合成数据的方法更灵活高效。
AI.motivation: 质疑并检验现有文献中声称的"语言模型通过微调可以理解国际象棋规则、进行专业级对弈或生成专家级可读解释"的说法，揭示其基准测试高分主要是模式匹配的结果。
AI.method: 1) 训练KinGPT，一个25M参数的字符级语言模型，仅使用（局面，最佳走法）对训练；2) 采用LLM-Modulo框架，将通用大语言模型与外部验证器（verifier）结合；3) 在多个棋盘谜题基准上对比KinGPT与ChessGPT、C1-4B等模型；4) 进行消融实验分析模式匹配的影响。
AI.result: KinGPT（25M参数）在600道将杀谜题和20主题谜题基准上分别超越3B参数的ChessGPT和4B参数的C1-4B。LLM-Modulo框架将RedPajama 3B的最佳走法准确率从1.2%提升至21.2%，走法生成合法性从19.3%提升至95.3%，效果与ChessGPT专门微调相当但成本大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: 现有国际象棋语言模型的高基准分数很大程度上可由模式匹配解释；LLM-Modulo框架（通用LLM+外部验证器）为定义明确的领域提供了比直接训练合成数据更灵活且经济的替代方案。

title: Learning How to Cube
summary: Despite the effectiveness of Cube-and-Conquer (C&C) for solving challenging Boolean Satisfiability (SAT) problems, no prior work has shown that transformer-based models can learn effective cubing heuristics. We introduce a neuro-symbolic post-training framework for this task. We design an MCTS-based data curation pipeline that uses symbolic heuristics to explore splitting decisions over SAT competition formulas, producing preference data grounded in solver statistics and augmented with reasoning traces from a teacher model. Our two-stage post-training, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by direct preference optimization (DPO), enables a 4B-parameter model to achieve a pass@5 score of 53 on 100 SAT competition benchmarks, surpassing frontier LLMs such as Claude-Sonnet-4 (50) and matching the best symbolic heuristic (53). Ablations show that SFT alone improves pass@5 from 46 to 51, with DPO adding 2 additional benchmarks; an entropy/agreement ablation on realized first-cube decisions further shows that SFT, not DPO, accounts for the root-level decision diversity that produces complementary per-run coverage over deterministic symbolic methods. This demonstrates that transformers can be trained to make effective cubing decisions in a domain traditionally dominated by symbolic methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个神经符号后训练框架，通过MCTS数据管线、SFT和DPO两阶段训练，使4B参数Transformer模型在SAT竞赛基准上达到与最优符号启发式方法相当的53 pass@5成绩，证明了Transformer可学习传统符号方法主导的立方划分决策。
AI.motivation: 此前尚无工作证明基于Transformer的模型能够学习有效的立方划分（cubing）启发式方法，尽管Cube-and-Conquer（C&C）策略在解决具有挑战性的布尔可满足性（SAT）问题上表现出色。
AI.method: 设计了一个基于MCTS的数据构建管线，利用符号启发式探索SAT公式的划分决策，生成以求解器统计信息为基础、并配有教师模型推理轨迹的偏好数据；采用两阶段后训练：先进行监督微调（SFT），再进行直接偏好优化（DPO）。
AI.result: 4B参数模型在100个SAT竞赛基准上取得53 pass@5的成绩，超越Claude-Sonnet-4（50），与最优符号启发式方法（53）持平；消融实验表明SFT将pass@5从46提升至51，DPO额外增加2个；熵/一致性消融实验表明SFT贡献了根层级决策多样性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer可以通过后训练框架学习在传统由符号方法主导的SAT领域中做出有效的立方划分决策。

title: ECG-WM: A Physiology-Informed ECG World Model for Clinical Intervention Simulation
summary: Electrocardiogram (ECG)-based models have achieved strong performance in diagnostic tasks, yet they remain limited in modeling how cardiac dynamics evolve under external interventions. In particular, existing approaches focus primarily on static prediction and lack mechanisms to capture ECG variations under different pharmacological conditions. In this work, we propose an ECG World Model for action-conditioned predictive simulation of cardiac electrophysiology. Moving beyond disjoint pipelines, our framework features a principled integration of physiological ordinary differential equation (ODE) priors into latent diffusion dynamics via energy regularization. This structural constraint enables the synthesis of physiologically plausible post-intervention ECG trajectories while effectively mitigating generative hallucinations. Building on this simulation process, we introduce an uncertainty-aware evaluation strategy that leverages the stochasticity of diffusion sampling to characterize both the expected clinical risk and its variability, allowing a more reliable comparative assessment of candidate interventions. We evaluate our method across diverse settings, including controlled drug-response scenarios and real-world clinical records. Beyond standard waveform metrics, experimental results demonstrate improved risk calibration and strong alignment with expert-informed treatment preferences. These results establish our approach as a robust foundation for safe and intervention-aware clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于心电图的世界模型，通过将生理ODE先验融入潜扩散动力学，实现动作条件下的心脏电生理预测性模拟，并引入不确定性感知评估策略以支持临床干预决策。
AI.motivation: 现有基于心电图的模型在诊断任务中表现良好，但无法建模外部干预（如药物）下心脏动力学的演化过程，缺乏动作条件下的预测模拟能力。
AI.method: 将生理常微分方程（ODE）先验通过能量正则化方式融入潜扩散动力学，形成结构约束以生成生理上合理的干预后ECG轨迹；并利用扩散采样的随机性构建不确定性感知评估策略。
AI.result: 在药物响应场景和真实临床记录上，该方法在标准波形指标、风险校准以及与专家治疗偏好的一致性上均取得优异表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为安全且干预感知的临床决策支持提供了稳健基础，有效缓解了生成幻觉并提升了干预评估的可靠性。

title: MedMIX: Modality-Internal Expert Fusion for Multimodal Medical Diagnosis
summary: Multimodal clinical prediction faces three challenges: multiple foundation models (FMs) with complementary strengths per modality, pervasive missing modalities at training and test time, and sample-specific variation in modality contributions. We introduce MedMIX, a multimodal framework that combines intra-modality expert fusion, learned inter-modality fusion, and training-only large--small model collaboration for robust medical prediction under incomplete modalities. Within each modality, MedMIX aggregates complementary embeddings from multiple small expert models; across modalities, it performs learned fusion over available modalities; and during training, it leverages large teacher models to improve deployed representations without additional inference cost. Across three heterogeneous benchmarks (OpenI, MIMIC-IV-MM, and MMIST-ccRCC), MedMIX achieves consistently strong performance while remaining robust under controlled missing-modality perturbations, and further demonstrates sustained robustness under cross-cohort shift on MIMIC-III. These results highlight MedMIX as a practical framework that unifies within-modality expert collaboration, sample-specific cross-modality fusion, and efficient large--small model collaboration while remaining robust to incomplete modalities.

AI.tldr: MedMIX是一个多模态临床预测框架，通过模态内专家融合、模态间学习融合以及训练时大-小模型协作，有效应对多基础模型、模态缺失和样本特异性问题，在多个基准上取得稳健性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态临床预测面临三个核心挑战：不同模态存在多个具有互补优势的基础模型；训练和测试阶段普遍存在模态缺失问题；不同样本的模态贡献存在特异性差异。现有方法难以同时解决这些问题。
AI.method: MedMIX框架包含三个关键组件：1) 模态内专家融合：在每个模态内聚合多个小专家模型的互补嵌入；2) 模态间学习融合：对可用模态执行可学习的融合；3) 训练时大-小模型协作：利用大型教师模型改进部署表示，且不增加推理成本。
AI.result: 在OpenI、MIMIC-IV-MM和MMIST-ccRCC三个异构基准上，MedMIX实现了一致且强劲的性能；在受控的模态缺失扰动下保持稳健；在MIMIC-III跨队列迁移下展现出持续的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MedMIX是一个实用的多模态临床预测框架，统一了模态内专家协作、样本特异性跨模态融合和高效的大-小模型协作，同时对不完整模态保持鲁棒性。

title: NeuSymMS: A Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Memory System for Persistent, Self-Curating LLM Agents
summary: We present NeuSymMS, an adaptive memory system that enables large language model (LLM) agents to learn, remember, and reason about users across sessions via a hybrid neuro-symbolic architecture. NeuSymMS couples neural fact extraction from unstructured dialogue with a CLIPS-based expert system that classifies, deduplicates, and reconciles facts under explicit lifecycle rules. The system represents knowledge as subject-relation-value triples stored in relational database management system, supports user/agents/agent-to-agents scoping, and implements a dual-horizon short-term/long-term memory model with access-based promotion and time-based pruning. NeuSymMS maintains continuity of memory while avoiding context-window bloat and cross-entity contamination. We argue that this architecture offers a practical path to trustworthy, auditable memory for production agentic systems and discuss its novelty relative to log retrieval, summarization, and key-value approaches.

AI.tldr: NeuSymMS 是一个混合神经符号记忆系统，使 LLM 代理能够跨会话学习、记住和推理用户信息，通过神经事实提取与 CLIPS 专家系统相结合，以三元组形式存储知识，并实现双视野短期/长期记忆模型。
AI.motivation: 解决 LLM 代理在跨会话场景中缺乏持久记忆能力、上下文窗口膨胀以及跨实体信息污染的问题，同时确保记忆的可信度和可审计性。
AI.method: 采用混合神经符号架构：神经模块从非结构化对话中提取事实，CLIPS 专家系统负责事实分类、去重和基于显式生命周期规则的协调；知识以主体-关系-值三元组形式存储在关系型数据库中，支持用户/代理/代理间的作用域控制；实现双视野短期/长期记忆模型，采用访问频率驱动的提升机制和基于时间的剪枝策略。
AI.result: 系统能够在保持记忆连续性的同时避免上下文窗口膨胀和跨实体信息污染。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为生产级代理系统提供了一条通往可信、可审计记忆的实用路径，相较于日志检索、摘要和键值对方法具有新颖性。

title: Provably Shorter Scratchpads in Hybrid DeltaNet-Attention Decoders
comment: Under review at a ML conference
summary: We investigate the expressive power of hybrid recurrent-attention decoders, a class of architectures used in recent open-source language models such as Qwen3-Next and its successors. These models combine Gated Attention heads with recurrent Gated DeltaNet heads. Is there a formal advantage, in terms of model expressivity or efficiency, to such a hybrid architecture? We show that there is. We define parity-conditioned retrieval task and show that under constant-precision assumption, a Qwen-style hybrid of Gated DeltaNet and Gated Attention solves this task with a constant scratchpad, or equivalently $O(1)$ chain-of-thought steps. In contrast, no similar solution exists for pure Gated DeltaNet models, while pure Gated Attention requires at least a polynomial scratchpad.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了混合循环-注意力解码器（如Qwen3-Next采用的Gated Attention+Gated DeltaNet混合架构）的表达能力。通过定义"奇偶条件检索任务"，证明了在常数精度假设下，混合架构能用常数步思维链解决该任务，而纯Gated DeltaNet无法解决，纯Gated Attention则需要至少多项式步思维链。
AI.motivation: 探究混合循环-注意力解码器（即Gated Attention与Gated DeltaNet混合架构）相比纯架构是否存在形式化的表达力或效率优势。
AI.method: 定义"奇偶条件检索任务"（parity-conditioned retrieval task），在常数精度（constant-precision）假设下，分别分析混合架构、纯Gated DeltaNet和纯Gated Attention解决该任务所需的思维链步数（scratchpad/chain-of-thought steps）。
AI.result: 1) 混合架构能以O(1)常数步思维链解决该任务；2) 纯Gated DeltaNet不存在类似解；3) 纯Gated Attention需要至少多项式规模的思维链。
AI.conclusion: 混合循环-注意力解码器在理论上具有形式化的表达力优势，在特定检索任务上能以常数步思维链完成，而纯循环或纯注意力架构均需更多资源。

title: AutoRubric-T2I: Robust Rule-Based Reward Model for Text-to-Image Alignment
summary: Aligning Text-to-Image (T2I) generation models with human preferences increasingly relies on image reward models that score or rank generated images according to prompt alignment and perceptual quality. Existing reward models are commonly trained as Bradley-Terry (BT) preference models on large-scale human preference corpora, making them costly to train, difficult to adapt, and opaque in their evaluation criteria. Meanwhile, Vision-Language Model (VLM) judges can provide more fine-grained assessments through textual rubrics, but their manually designed or heuristically generated scoring rules may fail to reliably reflect human preferences. In this paper, we propose AutoRubric-T2I, the first rubric learning framework in T2I that automatically synthesizes and selects explicit rubrics for guiding VLM judges. AutoRubric-T2I first synthesizes reasoning traces from preference pairs into candidate rubrics, then uses a VLM judge to score paired images under each rubric, producing pairwise rubric-score differences for preference learning. To remove noisy and redundant rules, we further employ a $\ell_1$-Regularized Logistic Regression Refiner, which selects the Top-$N$ most discriminative rubrics. Extensive evaluations show that AutoRubric-T2I produces high-quality, interpretable reward signals using less than 0.01% of the annotated preference data, substantially reducing the need for large-scale reward-model training. On image reward benchmarks such as MMRB2, AutoRubric-T2I outperforms strong reward model baselines. We further validate AutoRubric-T2I as an RL reward on downstream T2I tasks, including TIIF and UniGenBench++, where it improves generation quality over scalar reward models using the Flow-GRPO pipeline on diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoRubric-T2I，首个在文本到图像生成中自动合成与选择显式评分准则（rubrics）的框架，用于引导VLM裁判。该方法从偏好对中合成候选准则，通过L1正则化逻辑回归筛选最具判别力的Top-N准则，在仅需不到0.01%标注偏好数据的条件下，生成高质量、可解释的奖励信号，在MMRB2等基准上超越强基线模型，并在下游T2I任务中提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I奖励模型多采用Bradley-Terry偏好模型在大规模人类偏好语料上训练，成本高、难以适配且评估标准不透明；而VLM裁判虽能提供细粒度评估，但其人工或启发式设计的评分规则可能不可靠地反映人类偏好。因此需要一种能自动学习显式、可解释且符合人类偏好的评分准则的方法。
AI.method: 1) 从偏好对中合成候选准则（rubrics）；2) 使用VLM裁判对配对图像逐准则打分，生成每对图像的准则级分数差异；3) 采用L1正则化逻辑回归精炼器，筛选出Top-N最具判别力的准则，去除噪声与冗余规则。
AI.result: 在MMRB2等图像奖励基准上超越强奖励模型基线；在TIIF和UniGenBench++下游任务中，使用Flow-GRPO管线在扩散模型上提升生成质量；仅需不到0.01%的标注偏好数据。
AI.conclusion: AutoRubric-T2I证明了自动学习显式、可解释的评分准则能够有效替代大规模偏好模型训练，降低数据需求的同时提升奖励信号的质量与可解释性，为T2I生成的对齐与优化提供了一种高效、透明的范式。

title: In-context learning enables continental-scale subsurface temperature prediction from sparse local observations
summary: Continental-scale knowledge of subsurface temperature is limited by the cost and sparsity of borehole measurements, but such information is essential for geothermal resource assessment and for understanding heat transport in the shallow crust. The thermal field reflects the interaction between lithology, crustal structure, radiogenic heat production, and advective fluid flow, sometimes producing sharp anomalies that are smoothed by conventional interpolation or difficult to capture with physical models. Here we introduce In-Context Earth, a transformer-based model that uses sparse local borehole observations as geological context to predict continuous temperature-at-depth fields with calibrated uncertainty. In the contiguous United States, the model achieves a mean absolute error of 4.7 °C, outperforming the physics-informed Stanford Thermal Model, a model based on AlphaEarth embeddings, the multimodal Transparent Earth model, and universal kriging, while resolving sharper thermal gradients in geothermal provinces. Its uncertainty estimates are well calibrated, with a Kolmogorov-Smirnov statistic of 2.5%. Without finetuning, the model adapts to Alberta, Australia, and the United Kingdom (UK) using only 20 local observations at inference time, maintaining high accuracy in geologically distinct test regions with a mean absolute error of 2.2 °C in Alberta, 6.2 °C in Australia, and 5.4 °C in the UK. Interpretability analyses show that the model learns internal representations of subsurface properties it never observes during training, including seismic velocities, geochemistry, and crustal structure, and uses these representations in physically consistent ways. More broadly, this work shows that in-context learning can use sparse borehole observations for continental-scale subsurface characterization, without requiring dense measurements or region-specific retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出In-Context Earth，一种基于Transformer的模型，利用稀疏的局部钻孔观测作为地质上下文，预测连续的温度-深度场并带有校准的不确定性。在美国本土，模型平均绝对误差为4.7°C，优于多种基线方法，并能仅用20个局部观测样本适应不同地质区域（阿尔伯塔、澳大利亚、英国），无需微调。可解释性分析表明模型学习了未直接观测的地下属性内部表征。
AI.motivation: 大陆尺度地下温度信息受限于钻孔测量的成本与稀疏性，而温度场对地热资源评估和浅层地壳热传输理解至关重要。传统插值方法会平滑尖锐热异常，物理模型难以捕获这些特征，因此需要一种能利用稀疏观测数据、具有校准不确定性的连续温度场预测方法。
AI.method: 采用基于Transformer的上下文学习（in-context learning）架构，将稀疏的局部钻孔观测作为地质上下文输入模型，预测连续的温度-深度场，并输出校准后的不确定性估计。模型无需区域特定的重新训练，仅需推理时提供少量局部观测即可跨区域泛化。
AI.result: 在美国本土平均绝对误差4.7°C，优于物理信息的Stanford Thermal Model、基于AlphaEarth嵌入的模型、多模态Transparent Earth模型以及普通克里金法。不确定性校准良好，Kolmogorov-Smirnov统计量为2.5%。零微调跨区域泛化：阿尔伯塔MAE 2.2°C，澳大利亚6.2°C，英国5.4°C。可解释性分析显示模型学习了地震波速、地球化学和地壳结构等内部表征。
AI.conclusion: 上下文学习能够利用稀疏钻孔观测实现大陆尺度地下特征表征，无需密集测量或区域特定重新训练。模型学习到与物理一致的内部表征，为地热资源评估和浅层地壳热传输研究提供了高效、准确的工具。

title: GraphMind: From Operational Traces to Self-Evolving Workflow Automation
summary: Complex operational workflows coordinating personnel, tools, and information are central to enterprise operations, yet end-to-end automation remains challenging due to extensive requirements for human inputs and the inability to adapt over time. We present GraphMind, an end-to-end system that constructs, executes, and evolves action-centric workflow graphs without human effort. The system operates in three phases. First, a scalable offline pipeline extracts structured workflow graphs from large volumes of human resolution traces, capturing problems, actions, and their causal relationships. Second, an online multi-agent traversal engine navigates the graph to dynamically construct and execute workflows, combining graph-guided retrieval with LLM-driven reasoning at each step. Third, Adaptive Traversal Reinforcement (ATR) reinforces successful traversal paths and decays stale elements. This closed-loop mechanism enables the graph to self-optimize and adapt to shifting operational conditions. GraphMind has been deployed across four production cloud database services for incident investigation. Evaluated on production data, the system substantially outperforms a Trace-RAG baseline in mitigation reach, groundedness, and diagnostic throughput, scoring 4.95/5 in blind expert review. The ATR layer provides further gains across all metrics, demonstrating that workflow graphs can learn and improve from execution-derived feedback.

AI.tldr: GraphMind是一个端到端系统，能够自动构建、执行和演化以行动为中心的工作流图，无需人工干预。系统通过离线流水线提取结构化工作流图、在线多智能体遍历引擎动态执行工作流，以及自适应遍历强化（ATR）机制实现自我优化。在四个生产云数据库服务的故障调查场景中部署，系统显著优于Trace-RAG基线，盲审评分4.95/5。
AI.motivation: 复杂运营工作流协调人员、工具和信息，但端到端自动化因依赖大量人工输入且无法适应变化而面临挑战。
AI.method: 系统包含三阶段：(1) 离线流水线从大量人工解决痕迹中提取结构化工作流图，捕获问题、动作及其因果关系；(2) 在线多智能体遍历引擎结合图谱引导检索与LLM推理，动态构建和执行工作流；(3) 自适应遍历强化（ATR）增强成功路径、衰减过时元素，形成闭环自我优化。
AI.result: 在四个生产云数据库服务的故障调查中部署，在缓解覆盖度、基础性和诊断吞吐量上显著优于Trace-RAG基线，盲审评分4.95/5。ATR层在所有指标上带来进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 工作流图能够从执行反馈中学习和改进，实现自优化并适应不断变化的运营条件。

title: GraViti: Graph-Level Variational Autoencoders with Relaxed Permutation Invariance
summary: We introduce GraViti, a transformer-based graph-level variational autoencoder that maps entire graphs to compact latent vectors. This design produces a true graph-level latent space that supports smooth interpolation, property-guided search, and other downstream tasks beyond the constraints of node-level embeddings. On molecular benchmarks, GraViti learns to decode valid samples that follow the chemical constraints present in the training data, showing that the model recovers domain rules directly from graph-level representations. We also show that, in domains where a reliable canonical node ordering exists such as molecules or bayesian networks, enforcing permutation invariance can prove detrimental for consistent reconstruction. GraViti achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction accuracy on large datasets, and provides solid generative performance. Its single-step decoding offers a lightweight alternative to more complex generation pipelines while maintaining practical sample quality.

AI.tldr: GraViti是一种基于Transformer的图级变分自编码器，将整个图映射为紧凑的潜在向量，在分子基准上实现了最先进的重建精度和良好的生成性能，并揭示了在图重构中排列不变性可能有害的现象。
AI.motivation: 现有图自编码器多聚焦于节点级嵌入，缺乏真正的图级潜在空间，难以支持图级平滑插值、属性引导搜索等下游任务。同时，需要探索图级VAE能否从全局表示中恢复领域规则。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构的图级变分自编码器，将整个图编码为紧凑的潜在向量，并通过单步解码生成图结构。在具有规范节点排序的领域（如分子、贝叶斯网络）中，选择不强制执行排列不变性以保证重建一致性。
AI.result: 在分子基准上达到了最先进的重建准确率，能够解码出遵循训练数据中化学约束的有效样本，展示了模型从图级表示中恢复领域规则的能力。生成性能良好，单步解码提供轻量级替代方案。
AI.conclusion: GraViti成功构建了真正的图级潜在空间，验证了图级VAE能够学习领域规则，并指出在具有可靠规范节点排序的领域中，排列不变性可能不利于一致性的图重建。

title: Prediction of Challenging Behaviors Associated with Profound Autism in a Classroom Setting Using Wearable Sensors
summary: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is characterized by challenges with social interaction and communication and by restricted or repetitive patterns of thought and behavior, with significant variability in presentation. Approximately a quarter of children with ASD are classified as having profound autism, who often exhibit challenging behaviors, such as self-injurious behavior, aggression, elopement, or pica, that pose serious safety risks and disrupt learning in educational settings. Prior work has applied wearable sensors and machine learning to detect challenging behaviors, but has been largely confined to controlled laboratory environments. This work demonstrates that predicting challenging behavior episodes is feasible in a real-world special education classroom. We collected approximately 110.7 hours of labeled multimodal wearable data comprising accelerometry, electrodermal activity (EDA), and skin temperature from 9 children and young adults aged 10 to 21 years across standard classroom sessions. We fine-tuned state-of-the-art foundation models for multimodal wearable time-series analysis and show that challenging behavior episodes can be predicted up to 10 minutes in advance with an AUC-ROC of 0.78. These results establish a concrete foundation for developing proactive in-class intervention systems that enable teachers to minimize the safety risks of challenging behaviors in special education classrooms

AI.tldr: 本研究在真实特殊教育课堂中，利用多模态可穿戴传感器数据（加速度计、EDA、皮肤温度）和微调基础模型，证明可提前最多10分钟预测挑战性行为发作（AUC-ROC达0.78），为开发主动式课堂干预系统奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）中约四分之一的儿童患有重度自闭症，常表现出自伤、攻击、逃跑等挑战性行为，在特殊教育课堂中构成严重安全风险并干扰学习。此前研究多局限于受控实验室环境，缺乏真实课堂场景下的预测能力，因此亟需在真实教育环境中验证挑战性行为预测的可行性。
AI.method: 收集9名10-21岁ASD学生在标准课堂环节中约110.7小时的多模态可穿戴数据（加速度计、EDA、皮肤温度），微调面向多模态可穿戴时间序列分析的最先进基础模型，进行挑战性行为发作的预测。
AI.result: 挑战性行为发作可提前最多10分钟被预测，AUC-ROC达到0.78。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果建立了在真实特殊教育课堂中开发主动式干预系统的具体基础，使教师能够提前应对挑战性行为，降低安全风险。

title: Identify Then Project: Contrastive Learning of Latent Dynamics from Partial Observations with Port-Hamiltonian Structure
summary: Identifying latent state representations and dynamics is essential when direct modeling in observation space is infeasible, particularly under partial and high-dimensional observations. In such settings, representation learning and physics-aware modeling are inherently coupled. We study this problem for latent port-Hamiltonian systems, a structured class encompassing both conservative and dissipative dynamics. We propose a two-stage identify-then-project framework. First, a contrastive teacher learns continuous-time latent dynamics from partial observations. Then, a student projects the identified teacher representation and dynamics onto a port-Hamiltonian submanifold via a learned affine chart, yielding a physically consistent realization. As a conceptual counterfactual, we also consider a single-stage variant that jointly learns latent identification and port-Hamiltonian structure, but find it to be less reliable, motivating the proposed two-stage teacher-student framework. We show theoretically that affine projection is the natural bridge between the affine gauge of contrastive latent identification and the port-Hamiltonian systems. Empirically, we demonstrate that the proposed two-stage approach preserves the teacher's dynamics while enforcing physical structure, and performs more reliably than the single-stage alternative, particularly in dissipative regimes and high-dimensional visual settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段"识别-投影"框架，用于从部分高维观测中学习隐式端口-哈密顿系统，首先通过对比学习识别潜空间动力学，再通过仿射投影将其约束到端口-哈密顿子流形上，从而在保持动力学精度的同时施加物理一致性。
AI.motivation: 在部分观测和高维观测场景下，直接对观测空间建模不可行，且表示学习与物理感知建模高度耦合。需要一种方法同时学习潜变量表示及其动力学，并确保其符合物理结构（如端口-哈密顿系统），以实现可解释且可靠的建模。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：(1) 对比教师模型从局部观测中学习连续时间潜动力学；(2) 学生模型通过学习的仿射卡将教师表示和动力学投影到端口-哈密顿子流形上，获得物理一致的实现。同时对比了单阶段联合学习变体。
AI.result: 理论证明仿射投影是对比潜识别仿射规范与端口-哈密顿系统之间的自然桥梁。实验表明两阶段方法能在保持教师动力学精度的同时施加物理结构，比单阶段方法更可靠，尤其在耗散场景和高维视觉设定中。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段识别-投影框架有效地解决了潜空间物理一致建模中的表示-动力学耦合问题，仿射投影是连接对比识别与端口-哈密顿结构的关键桥梁，单阶段方法不如两阶段方法可靠。

title: Episodic-Semantic Memory Architecture for Long-Horizon Scientific Agents
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve into persistent scientific collaborators, context window saturation has emerged as a critical bottleneck. Scientific workflows involving iterative data analysis and hypothesis refinement rapidly saturate even extended contexts with dense technical content, while monolithic approaches suffer from quadratic cost scaling and cognitive degradation. We evaluate a Dual Process Memory Architecture that decouples immediate episodic needs (constant 10-message window) from long-term consolidated knowledge (growing at approximately 3 tokens/message). Unlike prior social agent memory systems, our domain-specific consolidation addresses contradictory parameter evolution, multi-hop reasoning across experimental phases, and precise technical fact retention. Through large-scale evaluation spanning 15,000 messages with cross-model validation across six LLMs from three families (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google), totaling 1,440 queries, we establish three key findings. First, while full-context models fail at 10,000 messages due to context overflow, our system maintains 70-85% accuracy with 1-2 second latency using 62% fewer tokens (45,434 vs 120,000+ limit). Second, cross-model validation reveals architecture-level trade-offs independent of specific LLMs: Dual Process excels at numeric/temporal queries (65-90% accuracy) while RAG excels at historical retrieval (60-85%), suggesting complementary deployment strategies. Third, we identify a "Sim-to-Real" gap where synthetic tests maintain constant memory but realistic workflows exhibit linear growth (about 3 tokens/message), with consolidation quality emerging as the primary scalability bottleneck. The architecture successfully manages profiles with 14,000+ scientific facts (125k tokens), demonstrating that domain-specific memory consolidation enables sustained operation beyond full-context limits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双过程记忆架构（Dual Process Memory Architecture），将即时情景需求（恒定10条消息窗口）与长期整合知识（约3 tokens/消息增长）解耦，解决了LLM在科学协作中上下文窗口饱和的问题。在15,000条消息、跨6个LLM（OpenAI、Anthropic、Google）的1,440次查询评估中，该方法在10,000条消息时保持70-85%准确率、1-2秒延迟，使用62%更少token（45,434 vs 12万+限制），并发现双过程架构在数值/时间查询（65-90%准确率）与RAG在历史检索（60-85%准确率）上存在互补策略，同时识别了"仿真到现实"差距（合成测试记忆恒定，真实工作流线性增长约3 tokens/消息），成功管理了含14,000+科学事实（125k tokens）的配置文件。
AI.motivation: LLM作为持久科学协作者时，上下文窗口饱和成为关键瓶颈。科学工作流中迭代数据分析和假设优化会快速用技术内容填满扩展上下文，而单块方法面临二次成本增长和认知退化问题。
AI.method: 提出双过程记忆架构，将即时情景需求（恒定10条消息窗口）与长期整合知识（约3 tokens/消息增长）解耦。采用领域特异性整合，处理矛盾参数演化、跨实验阶段多跳推理和精确技术事实保留。通过大规模评估（15,000条消息、6个LLM、1,440次查询）进行跨模型验证。
AI.result: 全上下文模型在10,000条消息时因上下文溢出失败，该系统保持70-85%准确率、1-2秒延迟，使用62%更少token（45,434 vs 12万+限制）。跨模型验证显示双过程架构在数值/时间查询（65-90%准确率）优于RAG，而RAG在历史检索（60-85%准确率）更优。识别了"仿真到现实"差距：合成测试记忆恒定，真实工作流线性增长约3 tokens/消息。成功管理14,000+科学事实（125k tokens）。
AI.conclusion: 领域特异性记忆整合使系统能够在全上下文限制之外持续运行，双过程架构与RAG存在互补部署策略，整合质量是主要的可扩展性瓶颈。

title: Scalable Knowledge Editing for Mixture-of-Experts LLMs via Tensor-Structured Updates
summary: Knowledge editing (KE) provides a lightweight alternative to repeated fine-tuning of LLMs. However, most existing KE methods target dense feed-forward layers, while modern LLMs increasingly adopt Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures for their superior memory footprint and inference efficiency. This mismatch leaves a growing class of production models without principled editing tools. We propose a MEMIT-like framework for knowledge editing in MoE-based LLMs. Our method exploits the tensor structure of MoE layers to formulate the editing objective faithfully at the per expert level, and applies the Woodbury matrix identity to avoid materializing or inverting the full stacked matrix of expert weights. The resulting update reduces to inversions of fixed low-rank matrices and requires no additional backward passes. Empirically, our approach matches the editing quality of strong baselines on the main KE metrics while accelerating the editing procedure by up to 6x, owing to the batched MEMIT-style formulation and the low-dimensional inversions enabled by the Woodbury identity. These results show that closed-form, parameter-modifying KE can be extended efficiently beyond dense layers, opening a path toward scalable knowledge editing in modern sparse LLM architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于MoE架构大语言模型的MEMIT风格知识编辑框架，利用Woodbury矩阵恒等式在专家级别进行更新，无需全矩阵求逆或反向传播，编辑速度提升最高6倍，效果与强基线持平。
AI.motivation: 现有知识编辑方法主要针对稠密前馈层，而现代LLM越来越多采用MoE架构，缺乏针对性的编辑工具。
AI.method: 提出MEMIT-like框架，利用MoE层的张量结构在专家级别构建编辑目标，应用Woodbury矩阵恒等式避免全矩阵求逆，更新只需低秩矩阵的固定逆运算，无需额外反向传播。
AI.result: 在主流知识编辑指标上与强基线持平，编辑速度提升最高6倍。
AI.conclusion: 闭式参数修改型知识编辑可以高效地从稠密层扩展到稀疏MoE架构，为现代稀疏LLM的可扩展知识编辑开辟了新路径。

title: WebGameBench: Requirement-to-Application Evaluation for Coding Agents via Browser-Native Games
summary: Coding agents are increasingly used as application builders, yet many evaluations still focus on source code, repository-level tests, or intermediate traces rather than the delivered application. We introduce WebGameBench, a requirement-to-application benchmark that evaluates whether coding agents can turn a frozen Structured WebGame Specification into a browser-accessible game. Browser-native games provide a compact but behavior-dense testbed: even simple games require coordinated input handling, spatial mapping, rule execution, state transitions, terminal conditions, restart behavior, and visible feedback. In WebGameBench, each generated artifact is built, served, and exposed as a browser-accessible application under a unified deployment protocol. A runtime evaluator then interacts with the delivered game in a real browser and assigns a three-way label: EXCELLENT, USABLE, or UNUSABLE. On a human-reviewed subset, the runtime label is broadly aligned with human gameplay review under the Usable-rate criterion. Across 111 tasks, 12 coding agents, and 14 evaluation configurations, WebGameBench separates current systems: the best configuration reaches a 76.9% usable rate but only a 20.2% excellent rate. This gap shows that crossing the minimum playable-delivery threshold is still far from complete requirement satisfaction. To our knowledge, WebGameBench is the first requirement-to-application benchmark for browser-native game delivery that validates delivered-application runtime labels against independent human gameplay review under the Usable-rate criterion.

AI.tldr: WebGameBench是一个评估编码智能体从需求到交付完整浏览器游戏能力的基准。通过对111个任务、12个编码智能体和14种评估配置的测试发现，最佳配置的可用率仅76.9%，优秀率仅20.2%，表明跨越最小可玩交付门槛远未达到完全满足需求。
AI.motivation: 现有编码智能体评估多关注源代码、仓库级测试或中间轨迹，而非实际交付的应用。作者希望建立一个从需求到完整应用的基准，以更真实地评估编码智能体的实际交付能力。
AI.method: 提出WebGameBench基准，使用结构化Web游戏规范（Structured WebGame Specification）作为输入，要求编码智能体生成浏览器可访问的游戏。生成产物经统一部署协议构建、服务并暴露为浏览器应用，运行时评估器在真实浏览器中与游戏交互，并给出三类标签：EXCELLENT、USABLE、UNUSABLE。
AI.result: 在111个任务、12个编码智能体和14种评估配置上，最佳配置的可用率为76.9%，优秀率仅为20.2%。在人工审核子集上，运行时标签与人类游戏评测在可用率标准下大致对齐。
AI.conclusion: WebGameBench是首个针对浏览器原生游戏交付的需求到应用基准，验证了交付应用运行时标签与独立人类游戏评测在可用率标准下的一致性。当前最佳系统距离完全满足需求仍有很大差距。

title: UB-SMoE: Universally Balanced Sparse Mixture-of-Experts for Resource-adaptive Federated Fine-tuning of Foundation Models
summary: Heterogeneous LoRA-rank methods address system heterogeneity in federated fine-tuning of foundation models by assigning client-specific ranks based on computational capabilities. However, these methods achieve only marginal computational savings, as dense feed-forward computations dominate. Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) provides a promising alternative through conditional computation, yet we identify that its naive application to heterogeneous federated settings introduces two critical discordances: (i) expert utilization imbalance and (ii) non-differentiability of Top-K routing. Our convergence analysis demonstrates that these discordances lead to degraded convergence, particularly for resource-constrained clients. To address these challenges, we propose Universally Balanced Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (UB-SMoE), which introduces Dynamic Modulated Routing (DMR) to rebalance expert utilization, and Universal Pseudo-Gradient (PG) to reconstruct learning signals for non-activated experts. These mechanisms form a self-reinforcing cycle that maintains expert viability across heterogeneous clients. Experiments on benchmarks show that UB-SMoE achieves up to $45.0\%$ computational reduction on low-resource clients while improving their performance by $8.7 \times$ compared to existing heterogeneous LoRA-rank methods.

AI.tldr: 针对异构联邦微调中密集前馈计算占主导导致计算节省有限的问题，提出UB-SMoE方法，通过动态调制路由和通用伪梯度解决专家利用不平衡和Top-K不可微问题，在低资源客户端上实现45%计算缩减和8.7倍性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有异构LoRA-rank方法在联邦微调中计算节省有限，因为密集前馈计算占主导；稀疏MoE虽有条件计算优势，但直接应用于异构联邦场景会导致专家利用不平衡和Top-K路由不可微两种关键失调，尤其损害资源受限客户端的收敛性能。
AI.method: 提出UB-SMoE，包含两个核心机制：(1) 动态调制路由(DMR)用于重新平衡专家利用；(2) 通用伪梯度(PG)用于为未激活专家重构学习信号，两者形成自我强化的循环以维持异构客户端间的专家可行性。
AI.result: 在基准测试上，UB-SMoE在低资源客户端上实现了高达45.0%的计算缩减，同时性能相比现有异构LoRA-rank方法提升了8.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决稀疏MoE在异构联邦学习中的两种关键失调，UB-SMoE有效实现了异构客户端间的计算节省与性能提升，验证了自我强化循环机制的有效性。

title: Causal Intervention-Based Memory Selection for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Long-horizon LLM agents rely on persistent memory to support interactions across sessions, yet existing memory systems often retrieve context using semantic similarity or broad history inclusion, treating retrieved memories as uniformly useful. This assumption is fragile because memories may be topically related while remaining irrelevant, stale, or misleading. We propose Causal Memory Intervention (CMI), a causal memory-selection technique that estimates how candidate memories affect the model's answer under controlled interventions, selecting memories that improve task performance while suppressing unstable, irrelevant, or harmful ones. To evaluate this setting, we introduce Causal-LoCoMo, a causally annotated benchmark derived from long conversational data, where each example contains a user request, a structured memory bank, useful memories, irrelevant distractors, and synthetic harmful memories. We compare CMI against vector, graph, reflection, summary, full-history, and no-memory baselines. Results show that CMI achieves a stronger balance between answer quality and robustness to misleading memory, suggesting that reliable long-term memory requires selecting context based on causal usefulness rather than relevance alone. The full framework, benchmark construction code, and experimental pipeline are available at https://github.com/Saksham4796/causal-memory-intervention.

AI.tldr: 提出因果记忆干预（CMI）方法，通过因果效应评估选择对任务有帮助的记忆，而非仅基于语义相关性；并构建因果标注基准Causal-LoCoMo，实验表明CMI在答案质量和对抗误导记忆的鲁棒性上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体记忆系统通常基于语义相似度或历史广度检索上下文，将检索到的记忆视为同等有用。但这种方法存在脆弱性：记忆可能主题相关却无关、过时或具有误导性，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 提出CMI（因果记忆干预），通过受控干预估计候选记忆对模型答案的因果效应，选择能提升任务性能的记忆，同时抑制不稳定、无关或有害记忆。并构建因果标注基准Causal-LoCoMo，包含用户请求、结构化记忆库、有用记忆、无关干扰项及合成有害记忆。
AI.result: CMI在答案质量和对抗误导记忆的鲁棒性上取得了更好的平衡，优于向量检索、图结构、反思、摘要、全历史及无记忆等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的长期记忆需要基于因果有用性而非仅相关性来选择上下文，因果干预是提升LLM智能体长期记忆效果的有效手段。

title: EfficientTDMPC: Improved MPC Objectives for Sample-Efficient Continuous Control
summary: We introduce EfficientTDMPC, a sample-efficient model-based reinforcement learning method for continuous control built on the TD-MPC family of algorithms. Central to this family is a planner that aims to find an action sequence that maximizes the estimated return. The return is estimated using a learned model and value networks, each of which can introduce error. EfficientTDMPC proposes to reduce this error in two ways. First, it introduces an ensemble of dynamics models and averages the return estimates across those models and across different rollout depths. Second, it adds the option to apply an uncertainty penalty to the planner objective, yielding a planner that avoids actions with uncertain return estimates. It then adds practical improvements which increase buffer data freshness and reduce compute. Lastly, we find that our contributions enable EfficientTDMPC to benefit more from a higher update-to-data (UTD) ratio, further improving sample efficiency. To the best of our knowledge, in the low data regime of each benchmark, EfficientTDMPC achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) in terms of sample efficiency on HumanoidBench-Hard and DMC hard, while matching SOTA on DMC easy.

AI.tldr: EfficientTDMPC是一种基于TD-MPC家族的高样本效率模型强化学习方法，通过集成动态模型、不确定性惩罚及实践改进，在低数据场景下达到或超越SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: TD-MPC家族中的规划器依赖学习模型和价值网络估计回报，两者均会引入误差。现有方法在低数据场景下样本效率不足，需要减少这些误差以提升样本效率。
AI.method: 1) 集成多个动态模型并跨不同展开深度平均回报估计；2) 在规划器目标中添加不确定性惩罚，避免选择估计不确定的动作；3) 提升缓冲区数据新鲜度并减少计算开销；4) 采用更高的更新-数据比率。
AI.result: 在HumanoidBench-Hard和DMC hard低数据场景下达到SOTA样本效率，在DMC easy上匹配SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 集成建模、不确定性惩罚和实际改进有效降低了模型和价值网络误差，更高UTD比率进一步提升了样本效率，验证了所提方法的有效性。

title: SAPO: Step-Aligned Policy Optimization for Reasoning-Based Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative recommendation treats next-item prediction as autoregressive item-identifier generation. Specifically, items are encoded as semantic identifiers (SIDs), which are short coarse-to-fine token sequences whose early tokens capture broad semantics and later tokens refine them. Recent work augments this paradigm with reasoning traces and optimizes them via reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards, typically outcome-reward algorithm with exact-match feedback on the generated SID. However, in large-catalog recommendation, exact-match feedback on the generated SID only reports whether the final item is correct; when a generated SID mismatches, outcome-reward cannot identify which SID-token prediction caused the mismatch and may penalize matched SID-token positions together with the mismatched position. We identify that the natural unit of credit assignment in this setting is a single reasoning step (one thinking block paired with one SID token). We instantiate this idea in SAPO (Step-Aligned Policy Optimization): rather than broadcasting one advantage to the whole response, SAPO computes a separate group-relative advantage for each reasoning step and applies it only to the corresponding thinking block and SID token. Across three real-world recommendation datasets, SAPO stabilizes reinforcement-learning training and consistently improves over existing generative recommendation baselines, with the largest gains where sparse exact-match feedback makes reasoning-step credit assignment important. Our results suggest that reinforcement-learning objectives for structured generation should mirror the decoder's own decomposition of the output.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAPO（Step-Aligned Policy Optimization）方法，将强化学习中的信用分配从整个响应级别细化为单个推理步骤级别，通过为每个推理步骤（思考块+SID令牌）计算独立的组相对优势，解决了生成式推荐中精确匹配反馈稀疏时无法定位令牌级预测错误的问题，在三个真实推荐数据集上稳定了训练并提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 在生成式推荐中，基于结果奖励的强化学习方法对生成的语义标识（SID）使用精确匹配反馈，当生成的SID不匹配时，无法定位是哪个SID令牌预测导致了错误，可能导致对匹配的令牌位置也进行惩罚，信用分配不精确。
AI.method: 提出SAPO（Step-Aligned Policy Optimization）：将信用分配的自然单位定义为单个推理步骤（一个思考块+一个SID令牌），为每个推理步骤计算独立的组相对优势（group-relative advantage），仅应用于对应的思考块和SID令牌，而非将单一优势广播到整个响应。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界推荐数据集上，SAPO稳定了强化学习训练，持续优于现有生成式推荐基线方法，在稀疏精确匹配反馈使推理步骤信用分配重要的场景下提升最大。
AI.conclusion: 结构化生成的强化学习目标应反映解码器自身对输出的分解方式，即信用分配应与生成过程的自然单元对齐。

title: Multimodal Cultural Heritage Knowledge Graph Extension with Language and Vision Models
summary: The preservation and interpretation of cultural heritage increasingly rely on digital technologies, among which Knowledge Graphs (KGs) stand out for their ability to structure vast amounts of data. However, the construction and expansion of these KGs often face challenges due to the diverse and complex nature of cultural heritage information. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for extending KG resources in the domain of cultural heritage, which we applied to French data. First, we introduce a new knowledge graph in the domain of French cultural heritage, WJoconde, which is distinguished by its multimodality as it integrates both textual and image information of the entities. We further introduce three variants of WJoconde to facilitate downstream research, such as Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC). We also built a comprehensive benchmark for KGC methods on our dataset. Second, we propose a new framework for extending cultural heritage KGs using multi-modal approaches leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), which includes automated data extraction from unstructured resources combined with a special validation pipeline for grounding the output of both models, to further extend WJoconde. Our results show that by integrating the rich text and image information in cultural heritage data, we can efficiently enhance KGs with high reliability. We open-source all code and benchmark datasets with text and images, as well as the original data with an interactive access point

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向法国文化遗产领域的多模态知识图谱扩展方法，构建了包含文本和图像信息的新知识图谱WJoconde及其三个变体，并设计了一套利用大语言模型和视觉语言模型自动从非结构化数据中提取信息并验证的框架，实验证明该方法能高效、可靠地扩展文化遗产知识图谱。
AI.motivation: 文化遗产信息的多样性和复杂性使得知识图谱的构建和扩展面临挑战，现有方法难以有效整合多模态数据并保证扩展结果的可靠性。
AI.method: 首先构建了多模态知识图谱WJoconde（集成文本和图像信息）及其三个变体；其次提出了一个基于LLM和VLM的多模态扩展框架，包含自动数据提取和专门的验证管道；最后构建了面向KGC方法的综合基准。
AI.result: 通过整合文化遗产数据中的丰富文本和图像信息，能够高效、高可靠性地增强知识图谱。
AI.conclusion: 多模态方法结合LLM和VLM能有效扩展文化遗产知识图谱，且所有代码、基准数据集和原始数据均已开源。

title: Convex Dataset Valuation for Post-Training
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICML '26. 30 pages, 8 figures
summary: Improving LLM performance on downstream tasks sometimes requires leveraging auxiliary datasets during post-training. In practice, however, developers face constraints on compute, labeling, and licensing costs that preclude using all available data, necessitating principled dataset-level selection. These constraints are increasingly shaped by dataset marketplaces, where data acquisition is governed by budgets and negotiation. We study dataset valuation as a subset selection problem during LLM post-training. Our goal is to identify and weight auxiliary datasets so as to maximize target task performance given constrained budgets. We first show that commonly used gradient alignment scores provide a reasonable yet incomplete valuation signal, as they ignore redundancy among datasets. To address this, we propose a scalable convex dataset-level valuation method based on kernel mean matching (KMM) in gradient space, which jointly accounts for alignment with the target task and redundancy across auxiliary datasets. Through extensive experiments across diverse post-training settings and tasks, we show that our approach consistently outperforms existing valuation baselines, achieving stronger performance with low computational overhead. Our results position dataset valuation as a practical decision tool for post-training data selection in market-constrained large language model settings. The code is available at https://github.com/uiuctml/convex_data_valuation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大语言模型后训练阶段的辅助数据集子集选择问题，提出一种基于梯度空间核均值匹配的可扩展凸数据集估值方法，同时考虑数据集与目标任务的对齐性及数据集间的冗余性，在计算开销低的条件下优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 后训练阶段利用辅助数据集提升LLM下游任务性能时，开发者面临计算、标注和许可成本约束，无法使用全部可用数据，需要有原则的数据集级选择方法。现有梯度对齐评分仅考虑单一数据集与目标的匹配，忽略了数据集间的冗余，导致估值不完整。
AI.method: 提出基于梯度空间核均值匹配（Kernel Mean Matching, KMM）的可扩展凸数据集估值方法，联合建模目标任务的梯度对齐和辅助数据集间的冗余性，将数据集选择形式化为受预算约束的凸优化问题。
AI.result: 在多种后训练设置和任务上的广泛实验表明，该方法在目标任务性能上持续优于现有估值基线，且计算开销低。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法可作为市场约束下大语言模型后训练数据选择的实用决策工具，将数据集估值定位为后训练数据选择的关键环节。

title: EGI: A Multimodal Emotional AI Framework for Enhancing Scrum Master Real-time Self-Awareness
summary: While increasing research focuses on the emotional well-being of agile team members, a significant gap remains in emotion monitoring studies for Scrum Masters and meeting organizers, whose impact on team dynamics is crucial. This paper proposes a novel application integrating four carefully selected and recommended AI models to monitor the unconsciously expressed emotions of these key roles. This is achieved through: real- time transcription using a speech-to-text model; thresholding for intonation analysis to detect emotional cues in prosody; applying emotion-based vocabulary matching to identify sentiment in spoken content; and providing context-aware suggestions containing emotion keywords using an open-source, multi-module AI API. The system achieved an ASR word error rate WER of 10% in simulated meeting environments. Our evaluation shows that real- time feedback significantly improves emotion awareness during simulated agile meetings, providing Scrum Masters and meeting organizers with real-time and practical suggestions to help them quickly identify and minimize the expression of negative emotions, fostering more positive and effective team interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个集成四种AI模型的应用，通过实时语音转录、语调分析、情感词汇匹配和上下文感知建议，帮助Scrum Master和会议组织者监控无意识表达的情绪，在模拟会议中ASR词错误率10%，实验表明实时反馈能显著提升情绪意识，减少负面情绪表达。
AI.motivation: 现有研究关注敏捷团队成员情绪健康，但缺乏针对Scrum Master和会议组织者（其对团队动态影响至关重要）的情绪监控研究。
AI.method: 集成四种AI模型：1) 语音转文本模型的实时转录；2) 语调分析的阈值检测；3) 基于情感词汇的匹配识别；4) 使用开源多模块AI API提供包含情感关键词的上下文感知建议。
AI.result: 在模拟会议环境中ASR词错误率(WER)为10%；实时反馈显著提升了模拟敏捷会议中的情绪意识。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能为Scrum Master和会议组织者提供实时实用建议，帮助其快速识别并减少负面情绪表达，促进更积极有效的团队互动。

title: EXG: Self-Evolving Agents with Experience Graphs
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in complex reasoning and problem solving through multi-step interactions, yet most deployed agents remain behaviorally static, with knowledge acquired during execution rarely translating into systematic improvement over time. In response, a growing line of work on self-evolving agents explores how agents can improve through experience during deployment, but most existing approaches either rely on ad hoc reflection limited to single-task correction or adopt unstructured memory that accumulates fragmented experience with delayed usability. To address this limitation, we introduce EXG, an experience graph framework for self-evolving agents that explicitly organizes accumulated successes and failures into a structured, relational representation. EXG is the first experience graph designed for self-evolving agents, supporting both online, real-time graph growth during execution for immediate cross-task experience reuse, and offline reuse of a consolidated experience graph as an external memory module. This design also enables EXG to serve as a plug-and-play component for existing self-evolving agents, organizing prior experience into a unified experience graph and improving both solution quality and resource efficiency as deployment progresses. Extensive experiments across code generation and reasoning benchmarks show that EXG attains more favorable performance-efficiency trade-offs than reflection- and memory-based baselines in both online and offline evaluations. Our results suggest that structuring experience as a graph provides a principled foundation for scalable and transferable self-evolving agent behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EXG，一种基于经验图的框架，用于自进化智能体。它通过结构化图表示来组织智能体的成功与失败经验，支持在线实时增长和离线复用，作为即插即用模块可提升现有智能体的性能和资源效率。实验表明，在代码生成和推理任务上，EXG优于基于反思和记忆的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在部署后行为静态，无法从执行经验中系统性改进。现有自进化方法要么依赖临时反思（局限于单任务修正），要么采用非结构化记忆（碎片化经验且可用性延迟），缺乏结构化的经验组织方式。
AI.method: 提出EXG经验图框架，将累积的成功和失败经验显式组织为结构化、关系化的图表示。支持在线实时图增长（执行中即时跨任务经验复用）和离线复用（作为外部记忆模块）。可作为即插即用组件集成到现有自进化智能体中。
AI.result: 在代码生成和推理基准上，EXG在在线和离线评估中均实现了比基于反思和记忆的基线方法更优的性能-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 将经验结构化为图形式为可扩展、可迁移的自进化智能体行为提供了原则性基础。

title: EmoMind: Decoding Affective Captions from Human Brain fMRI
summary: Decoding visual experience from brain activity has advanced substantially, but cur- rent brain-to-text systems largely recover semantic content while discarding affect. Additionally, language models can generate emotional text when prompted with categorical labels, but such labels collapse rich inter-subject variability into coarse discrete bins. We present EmoMind, the first end-to-end pipeline for decoding affective captions directly from fMRI signals. EmoMind first retrieves a semanti- cally grounded neutral scene description from brain-decoded visual features, then rewrites it using a continuous 34-dimensional emotion vector decoded from the same fMRI recording. To control the balance between content preservation and affective expression, we train the rewriter with classifier-free guidance against an identity-preserving null branch, enabling smooth interpolation between semantic fidelity and affective expressivity. We evaluate affective caption generation with a three-axis validation framework spanning subject-specificity, structural geometry, and causal control. We further augment this framework with a synthetic-brain substitution test that probes robustness to the measurement apparatus, and we benchmark each axis against GPT-4 prompted with brain-decoded top-5 emotion labels as a strong discrete baseline. Across two independent emotion fMRI datasets, EmoMind significantly outperforms label-prompted GPT-4 on all three axes, with the largest gains on metrics that require person-specific affective structure rather than population-level emotion aggregation. These results establish continuous brain-decoded affect as a viable control signal for individualized affective cap- tion generation and open new directions for studying individual affective brain organisation.

AI.tldr: EmoMind是首个直接从fMRI信号解码情感字幕的端到端管道，利用连续34维情感向量重写场景描述，在三个评估轴上显著优于GPT-4基线。
AI.motivation: 现有脑到文本系统仅恢复语义内容而丢弃情感信息，且语言模型使用离散情感标签无法捕捉个体间丰富的情感变异性。
AI.method: 先从fMRI解码的视觉特征检索语义中立的场景描述，再用同一fMRI记录的34维连续情感向量重写描述；采用无分类器引导训练重写器，通过身份保持的空分支实现语义忠实度与情感表达性的平滑插值。
AI.result: 在两个独立情感fMRI数据集上，EmoMind在主体特异性、结构几何和因果控制三个评估轴上均显著优于使用脑解码top-5情感标签提示的GPT-4，尤其在需要个体特异性情感结构的指标上优势最大。
AI.conclusion: 连续脑解码情感可作为个性化情感字幕生成的有效控制信号，为研究个体情感脑组织开辟了新方向。

title: Divergence-Suppressing Couplings for Rectified Flow
summary: The promise of Rectified Flow rests on producing self-generated couplings whose trajectories are straight, or nearly so. In practice, trajectories generated by the base flow model can bend and intertwine, and the resulting coupling inherits this distortion. In this paper, we identify that such trajectory entanglement is often associated with regions of nonzero divergence in the learned velocity field, where local expansion or contraction distorts trajectories and steers particles away from their ideal endpoints. We then propose divergence-suppressing couplings for Rectified Flow, an offline correction that attenuate the divergent component of the learned velocity during coupling generation. The correction is paid only once per coupling pair and amortized over training, so deployment runs plain Euler at identical wall-clock cost to standard Rectified Flow. Empirically, this offline modification yields consistent improvements on 2D synthetic benchmarks and on image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Rectified Flow的离线校正方法，通过抑制耦合生成过程中学习到的速度场的散度分量，减少轨迹纠缠，从而在2D合成基准和图像生成任务上获得一致的性能提升。
AI.motivation: Rectified Flow依赖于生成近乎直线轨迹的自生耦合，但基础流模型生成的轨迹可能弯曲缠绕，导致耦合继承这种扭曲。本文识别出这种轨迹纠缠通常与学习到的速度场中非零散度区域相关，局部膨胀或收缩会扭曲轨迹并使粒子偏离理想终点。
AI.method: 提出 divergence-suppressing couplings（散度抑制耦合），一种在耦合生成过程中衰减学习速度场发散分量的离线校正方法。该校正仅在每对耦合上执行一次，成本摊销到训练过程中，因此部署时使用标准欧拉方法，计算开销与标准Rectified Flow相同。
AI.result: 在2D合成基准和图像生成任务上，该离线修改方法取得了一致的性能改进。
AI.conclusion: 通过抑制速度场散度分量来减少轨迹纠缠是一种有效的离线校正策略，能在不增加推理计算成本的前提下提升Rectified Flow的性能。

title: Harnessing LLM Agents with Skill Programs
summary: Equipping LLM agents with reusable skills derived from past experience has become a popular and successful approach for tackling complex and long-horizon tasks. However, such lessons are often encoded as textual guidance that remains largely advisory, lacking explicit mechanisms for when and how to intervene in the agent loop. To bridge the gap, we introduce HASP(Harnessing LLM Agents with Skill Programs), a new framework that upgrades skills into executable Program Functions (PFs). Rather than offering passive advice, PFs act as executable guardrails that activate on failure-prone states and modify the next action or inject corrective context. HASP is highly modular: it can be applied at inference time for direct agent-loop intervention, during post-training to provide structured supervision, or for self-improvement by evolving validated, teacher-reviewed PFs. Empirically, HASP drives substantial gains compared to both training-free and training-based methods on web-search, math reasoning, and coding tasks. For example, on web-search reasoning, inference-time PFs alone improve the average performance by 25% compared to (multi-loop) ReAct Agent, while post-training and controlled evolution achieve a 30.4% gain over Search-R1. To provide deeper insights into HASP, our mechanism analysis reveals how PFs trigger and intervene, how skills are internalized, and the requirement for stable skill library evolution.

AI.tldr: 提出HASP框架，将LLM智能体的技能升级为可执行的程序函数（PF），作为主动式护栏在失败易发状态触发干预，在网页搜索、数学推理和编程任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将经验编码为文本性指导，缺乏明确的何时及如何介入智能体循环的执行机制，导致指导多为建议性而非约束性。
AI.method: 将技能形式化为可执行的程序函数（PF），可在推理时直接干预智能体循环、在训练后提供结构化监督，或通过自我改进演化已验证的PF。
AI.result: 网页搜索推理任务上，推理时PF相比ReAct Agent提升25%平均性能；后训练与受控演化相比Search-R1提升30.4%。
AI.conclusion: HASP通过可执行PF实现主动式技能干预，并揭示了PF触发机制、技能内化过程及稳定技能库演化的必要条件。

title: Learning Unbiased Permutations via Flow Matching
summary: Learning permutations is fundamental to sorting, ranking, and matching, but existing differentiable methods based on entropy-regularized Sinkhorn produce a single softened solution and collapse under ambiguity. We present PermFlow, a conditional flow matching framework that operates directly on the affine subspace of matrices with unit row and column sums. A closed-form tangent-space projector preserves these constraints exactly along every trajectory, by construction rather than through iterative correction, and a nearest-target coupling routes distinct noisy initializations toward distinct valid permutations. The result is a model that captures multimodal permutation distributions rather than collapsing them to a single mode. On a visual sorting task with blended-digit ambiguity and a symmetric linear assignment problem, PermFlow achieves high accuracy on unambiguous inputs and recovers both valid permutations under ambiguity, where Sinkhorn-based baselines structurally fail.

AI.tldr: PermFlow 是一种条件流匹配框架，通过闭式切空间投影器保持置换矩阵约束，并利用最近目标耦合捕捉多模态置换分布，在模糊排序和线性分配任务中优于 Sinkhorn 基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于熵正则化 Sinkhorn 的可微置换学习方法在模糊场景下只会产生单一软化解并坍缩，无法捕捉多模态置换分布。
AI.method: 提出 PermFlow 框架：(1) 直接在行列和为单位矩阵的仿射子空间上操作；(2) 使用闭式切空间投影器确保约束沿轨迹精确保持，无需迭代校正；(3) 设计最近目标耦合机制将不同噪声初始化映射到不同有效置换。
AI.result: 在模糊数字排序和对称线性分配任务上，PermFlow 对明确输入实现高精度，并在模糊情况下恢复出两个有效置换，而 Sinkhorn 基线方法结构性失败。
AI.conclusion: PermFlow 有效解决了可微置换学习中的多模态问题，能够捕捉完整的置换分布而非坍缩到单一模式。

title: Agents for Experiments, Experiments for Agents: A Design Grammar for AI-Enabled Experimental Science
summary: AI systems are becoming active participants in organizational and knowledge work. They increasingly interact with humans, coordinate workflows, and operate in multi-agent arrangements. Understanding their effects therefore requires more than measuring output accuracy; it requires evidence about mechanisms, delegation, feedback, and control. Experiments remain central to this task, but they also face a recursive challenge: we need experiments for agents to study these arrangements, and we may need agents for experiments to help search the expanding space of possible designs. Yet experimental conditions for human-AI and agentic workflows are still largely specified in prose, making them difficult to compare, reuse, or audit. We frame this as a problem of workflow representation, traceability, and governance in AI-enabled knowledge production. We introduce SEED (Structural Encoding for Experimental Discovery), a framework that represents experimental conditions as typed actor-flow graphs. SEED supports three design functions: describing conditions as interaction structures, evaluating structural novelty relative to encoded prior designs, and generating candidate designs under feasibility and governance constraints. We report a lightweight empirical feasibility test that compares graph-blind and SEEDguided generation in a medical-triage design task. In this diagnostic contrast, SEED-guided candidate designs show clearer actor-flow changes, assumptions, and governance checks, supporting the feasibility of the grammar as a design aid. The commentary closes by identifying governance tensions around novelty, replication, validity, diversity of inquiry, and accountability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEED框架，将人类-AI与智能体工作流的实验条件表示为类型化演员-流程图，以解决工作流表示、可追溯性和治理问题，并通过医疗分诊设计任务验证了其可行性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统参与组织和知识工作，理解其影响需要超越输出准确性的证据，涉及机制、委托、反馈和控制。当前实验条件多以散文形式描述，难以比较、重用或审计，亟需一种结构化的表示方法。
AI.method: 提出SEED（Structural Encoding for Experimental Discovery）框架，将实验条件编码为类型化演员-流程图（typed actor-flow graphs），支持三种设计功能：描述交互结构、评估结构新颖性、在可行性和治理约束下生成候选设计。通过医疗分诊任务对比图盲生成和SEED引导生成进行实证测试。
AI.result: 在医疗分诊设计任务中，SEED引导的候选设计比图盲生成显示出更清晰的演员-流程变化、假设和治理检查，支持了该语法作为设计辅助工具的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SEED框架有助于解决AI知识生产中的工作流表示、可追溯性和治理问题，但需进一步关注新颖性、复制性、有效性、多样性及问责性等治理张力。

title: Distinguishable Deletion: Unifying Knowledge Erasure and Refusal for Large Language Model Unlearning
summary: Mitigating sensitive and harmful outputs is fundamental to ensuring safe deployment of LLMs. Existing approaches typically follow two paradigms: Knowledge Deletion (KD), which erases undesirable information during training, and Distinguishable Refusal (DR), which steers models away from using sensitive knowledge during inference. Despite rapid progress, KD-based unlearning struggles with biased deletion due to suppressing specific token sequences as a substitute for complete knowledge removal, whereas DR-based unlearning risks the re-emergence of harmful knowledge because the underlying knowledge remains intact. To address these issues, we propose Distinguishable Deletion ($\mathrm{D^2}$), a paradigm that restricts the response distribution in the latent representation rather than specific tokens to erase undesirable knowledge, while distinguishing it from retained knowledge, enabling a refusal mechanism to handle unlearned inputs safely and coherently. To implement $\mathrm{D^2}$, we introduce an energy index that quantifies the presence of knowledge and the separation between unlearned and retained content. Mathematical and empirical analyses show that energy is both accurate and efficient, enabling Energy-based Unlearning Alignment (EUA) to enforce energy-boundary unlearning during training and apply an energy-based refusal mechanism at inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EUA significantly outperforms previous methods, indicating the superiority of $\mathrm{D^2}$. Our code is available at https://github.com/Puning97/EUA-for-LLM-Unlearning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Distinguishable Deletion (D²)范式，通过基于能量的方法在潜在表示层面区分并删除有害知识，具体实现为Energy-based Unlearning Alignment (EUA)，在训练时施加能量边界约束，在推理时采用能量驱动的拒绝机制，实验证明该方法显著优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全对齐方法存在两类问题：知识删除（KD）因仅抑制特定token序列而非完整知识导致有偏删除；可区分拒绝（DR）因底层知识完整保留存在有害知识重现风险。亟需一种既能彻底消除有害知识又能安全处理未学习输入的新范式。
AI.method: 提出D²范式，在潜在表示层通过能量指标量化知识存在性及已学习与未学习内容的分离度。实现为EUA方法：训练阶段施加能量边界约束进行对齐，推理阶段应用基于能量的拒绝机制处理未学习输入。
AI.result: 数学分析与实验验证表明能量指标兼具准确性和高效性，EUA在多项实验中显著优于此前的方法。
AI.conclusion: D²范式通过区分性删除策略克服了KD和DR的固有缺陷，为LLM安全对齐提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Surface-Form Neural Sparse Retrieval: Robust Fuzzy Matching for Industrial Music Search
summary: Music search at the scale of Amazon Music presents a unique challenge: queries frequently deviate from indexed metadata due to misspellings, transpositions, and phonetic variations, yet the retrieval system must operate under strict millisecond-level latency constraints. Our existing learning-to-retrieve system, the High Confidence Index (HCI), learns query-entity associations from customer behavior, relying on continual ``exploration'' to choose candidates. Traditional n-gram matching enables this exploration but suffers from poor semantic robustness and high noise, limiting the system's ability to learn from long-tail queries. In this work, we present a \textbf{robust neural sparse retrieval system} designed to maximize exploration efficiency. We adapt a state-of-the-art \textbf{inference-free} sparse retrieval architecture to the music domain, combining it with an effective \textbf{domain-specific granular subword tokenization strategy}. Our approach utilizes short-length token constraints (max 3 chars) to enforce the learning of surface-form robustness over lexical memorization. By pre-computing the neural embeddings and term expansions during the offline indexing phase, online processing is reduced to minimal tokenization and IDF weighting, achieving effectively zero latency overhead for query encoding. Evaluations on a 6M-document production corpus show an aggregate \textbf{91.4\%} recall@10 (vs. \textbf{57.7\%} for trigrams) at comparable throughput. Simulation of the HCI feedback loop demonstrates improved exploration efficiency, with \textbf{+0.8\%} higher stabilized recall than production trigrams. Ablation studies indicate that our sparse training methodology drives the performance gains, while domain-specific pretraining provides a cost-effective alternative to large-scale general-purpose pretraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向Amazon Music大规模音乐搜索的鲁棒神经稀疏检索系统，通过改进的推理无关稀疏检索架构和领域特化子词分词策略，在毫秒级延迟约束下实现了91.4%的recall@10，相比传统trigram方法（57.7%）显著提升，并有效增强了长尾查询的探索效率。
AI.motivation: Amazon Music规模的音乐搜索面临查询与索引元数据之间的拼写错误、换位和语音变体等偏差，同时需满足毫秒级延迟约束。现有基于trigram匹配的探索机制语义鲁棒性差、噪声高，限制了系统从长尾查询中学习的能力，亟需一种兼顾探索效率与延迟约束的新型检索方案。
AI.method: 提出鲁棒神经稀疏检索系统，核心包括：(1) 适配推理无关稀疏检索架构到音乐领域；(2) 设计领域特化的细粒度子词分词策略，采用最大3字符的短标记约束，强制学习表面对齐鲁棒性而非词汇记忆；(3) 离线阶段预计算神经嵌入和词项扩展，在线阶段仅需最小化分词和IDF加权，实现零额外查询编码延迟。
AI.result: 在600万文档的生产语料上，系统实现91.4%的recall@10（对比trigram的57.7%），吞吐量相当；HCI反馈环模拟显示探索效率提升，稳定召回率比生产trigram高+0.8%；消融实验表明稀疏训练方法是性能提升的主要驱动力，领域特化预训练可作为大规模通用预训练的高性价比替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的鲁棒神经稀疏检索系统在保持低延迟的同时显著提升了检索召回率和探索效率，验证了短标记约束和领域特化分词策略在音乐搜索领域的有效性，为大规模生产环境下的神经检索提供了实用方案。

title: Lever: Speculative LLM Inference on Smartphones
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly needed for interactive mobile applications, but high-quality models exceed the limited DRAM available on smartphones. Flash storage can hold larger models, yet flash-backed inference is slow because autoregressive decoding repeatedly invokes the target model and incurs costly I/O. We observe that speculative decoding is a natural fit for this setting: a small draft model can remain in DRAM, while a larger flash-resident target model verifies multiple candidate tokens per invocation. However, existing methods assume server-class accelerators and fail to account for prolonged I/O latency, limited computation parallelism, and irregular speculation execution.
  We present Lever, an end-to-end system for efficient flash-backed LLM inference on smartphones. Lever jointly optimizes the three stages of speculative decoding under mobile constraints. For drafting, it builds token trees using an I/O- and compute-aware gain-cost objective. For verification, it prunes low-value branches through early-exit prediction to reduce target-model computation. For execution, it maps speculation efficiently across mobile CPU-NPU hardware to improve utilization. Comprehensive evaluations show that Lever reduces inference latency by an average of 2.93x over baseline flash-offloaded inference and 1.50x over conventional speculative decoding, narrowing the latency gap between flash-backed and memory-resident LLM inference.

AI.tldr: Lever是一个专为智能手机设计的端到端系统，通过优化推测解码的草稿生成、验证和执行三个阶段，将大模型从闪存加载推理的延迟降低了2.93倍，相比传统推测解码降低1.50倍，有效缩小了闪存推理与内存驻留推理之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 智能手机DRAM容量有限，无法容纳高质量大语言模型。虽然闪存可以存储更大模型，但闪存-backed推理因自回归解码频繁调用目标模型导致高昂I/O延迟而速度缓慢。现有推测解码方法针对服务器级加速器设计，未能考虑移动端特有的问题：长I/O延迟、有限的计算并行度以及不规则的推测执行。
AI.method: Lever联合优化推测解码的三个阶段：1) 草稿阶段：构建令牌树，使用I/O和计算感知的增益-成本目标函数；2) 验证阶段：通过早退预测剪枝低价值分支，减少目标模型计算量；3) 执行阶段：在移动CPU-NPU异构硬件上高效映射推测执行，提高硬件利用率。
AI.result: 相比基线闪存卸载推理，Lever将推理延迟平均降低2.93倍；相比传统推测解码，延迟降低1.50倍，显著缩小了闪存-backed与内存驻留LLM推理之间的延迟差距。
AI.conclusion: Lever通过针对移动端约束联合优化推测解码各阶段，有效解决了闪存-backed LLM推理在智能手机上的效率问题，为在资源受限设备上部署大规模语言模型提供了实用方案。

title: Entropy-Gradient Inversion: Moving Toward Internal Mechanism of Large Reasoning Models
summary: The advancement of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) has catalyzed a paradigm shift from reactive ``fast thinking'' text generation to systematic, step-by-step ``slow thinking'' reasoning, unlocking state-of-the-art performance in complex mathematical and logical tasks. However, the field faces \textit{the fundamental gap between token-level behavioral analysis and internal reasoning mechanisms, and the instability of reinforcement learning (RL) for reasoning optimization relying on costly external verifiers}. We identify and formally define \textbf{Entropy-Gradient Inversion}, a robust negative correlation between token entropy and logit gradients that acts as a definitive geometric fingerprint for LRM reasoning capability. Building on this, we propose \textbf{Correlation-Regularized Group Policy Optimization (CorR-PO)}, which embeds this inversion signature into RL reward regularization. Extensive experiments on various reasoning benchmarks across multiple model scales show CorR-PO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, confirming that stronger inversion directly correlates with superior reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大型推理模型（LRM）中token熵与logit梯度之间存在稳健的负相关关系（熵-梯度反转），并将其作为推理能力的几何指纹，据此提出相关性正则化组策略优化（CorR-PO），通过将反转特征嵌入RL奖励正则化来提升推理性能，实验证明该方法在多个基准和模型规模上优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 当前LRM面临两大挑战：一是token级行为分析与内部推理机制之间存在根本性鸿沟；二是依赖昂贵外部验证器的RL推理优化存在不稳定性。本文旨在弥合这一鸿沟并提升RL优化稳定性。
AI.method: 首先形式化定义熵-梯度反转（Entropy-Gradient Inversion），即token熵与logit梯度间的稳健负相关关系；进而提出相关性正则化组策略优化（CorR-PO），将该反转特征嵌入RL奖励正则化项中，引导模型学习更优的推理策略。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准和不同模型规模上的实验结果表明，CorR-PO一致性地优于当前最先进的基线方法，且更强的反转特征直接关联更优的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: 熵-梯度反转可作为LRM推理能力的有效几何指纹，将其纳入RL奖励正则化能够显著提升推理性能，为理解与优化LRM提供了新的理论视角与实用方法。

title: The Unlearnability Phenomenon in RLVR for Language Models
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR) has proven effective in improving Large Language Model's (LLM) reasoning ability. However, the learning dynamics of RLVR remain underexplored. In this paper, we reveal a counterintuitive phenomenon: among hard examples that the model initially struggles with, a substantial subset remains unlearnable even when correct rollouts are present. To understand the phenomenon, we first demonstrate that existing optimization and sampling techniques fail to resolve unlearnability. With cross-example gradient analysis, we show that unlearnable examples have fundamental representation issue, characterized by low gradient similarity with the rest of the examples and ungeneralizable reasoning patterns. We further show that representation flaws are difficult to mitigate in RL, as data augmentation does not improve gradient similarity. Our study provides the first systematic characterization of unlearnable data in RLVR training and reveals fundamental limitations in current RL approaches for reasoning tasks. Code and data are available at \url{https://github.com/yulinchen99/unlearnability-rlvr}.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了RLVR训练中一个反直觉现象：模型最初难以处理的困难样本中，有相当一部分即使出现正确采样结果也无法被学习，其根本原因是这些样本存在表征缺陷（与其它样本的梯度相似度低、推理模式不可泛化），且RL中的数据增强无法改善这一问题。
AI.motivation: RLVR虽已被证明能提升LLM推理能力，但其学习动力学尚未被充分探索，尤其是困难样本的学习行为。
AI.method: 通过跨样本梯度分析，对比可学习与不可学习样本的梯度相似性；验证现有优化和采样技术无法解决该问题；测试数据增强对梯度相似性的影响。
AI.result: 发现存在一类"不可学习"的困难样本，其特征是与其他样本的梯度相似度低且推理模式不可泛化；现有RL优化、采样和数据增强均无法有效缓解该表征缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统刻画了RLVR训练中的不可学习数据现象，揭示了当前RL方法在推理任务中的根本性局限。

title: STRIDE: A Self-Reflective Agent Framework for Reliable Automatic Equation Discovery
summary: LLM-based equation discovery offers a promising route to recovering symbolic laws from data, but many systems still rely on generation-centered loops that propose candidates, fit parameters, score results, and reuse selected examples. Such loops can misjudge useful skeletons under unreliable fitting, discard near-correct equations that require repair, and accumulate redundant memories that provide limited guidance. We propose STRIDE, a self-reflective agent framework that improves reliability by coordinating data-aware generation, mixed-fitting evaluation, critic--executor repair, and diversity-preserving semantic memory. By turning fitted scores and candidate behavior into shared feedback, STRIDE enables equations to be proposed, assessed, refined, and reused within a closed-loop discovery process. Experiments on representative symbolic-regression benchmarks and LSR-Synth suites show that STRIDE improves accuracy, OOD robustness, and structural recovery across multiple LLM backbones, with ablations and analyses confirming the contribution of its core components.

AI.tldr: STRIDE是一个基于LLM的自反馈代理框架，通过协调数据感知生成、混合拟合评估、批评-执行者修复和多样性保留语义记忆四个核心组件，在符号回归任务中提升了方程发现的准确性、泛化鲁棒性和结构恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的方程发现方法依赖于生成中心循环（提出候选、拟合参数、评分结果、重用示例），存在三个主要缺陷：在不可靠拟合下误判有用骨架、丢弃需要修复的近似正确方程、积累提供有限指导的冗余记忆。
AI.method: STRIDE框架包含四个核心组件：1) 数据感知生成（data-aware generation）；2) 混合拟合评估（mixed-fitting evaluation）；3) 批评-执行者修复（critic-executor repair）；4) 多样性保留语义记忆（diversity-preserving semantic memory）。通过将拟合得分和候选行为转化为共享反馈，实现闭环发现流程。
AI.result: 在代表性符号回归基准和LSR-Synth套件上的实验表明，STRIDE在多个LLM骨干网络上均提升了准确性、分布外鲁棒性和结构恢复能力。消融实验和分析验证了各核心组件的贡献。
AI.conclusion: STRIDE通过自反馈代理框架有效改进了LLM驱动的符号方程发现，解决了现有方法在拟合可靠性、方程修复和记忆指导方面的核心痛点。

title: TIER: Trajectory-Invariant Execution Rewards for Multi-Step Tool Composition
comment: Preprint. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026. 28 pages, 7 figures, 8 tables. Code and datasets available at https://github.com/anaykulkarni/TIER
summary: Tool use enables large language models to solve complex tasks through sequences of API calls, yet existing reinforcement learning approaches fail to scale to multi-step composition settings. Outcome-based rewards provide only sparse feedback, while trajectory-supervised rewards depend on annotated reference solutions, penalizing valid alternatives and limiting scalability. We propose TIER: Trajectory-Invariant Execution Rewards, a reward framework that derives supervision directly from function schemas and runtime execution, rather than from reference trajectories. The reward decomposes into format validity, schema adherence, execution success, and answer correctness, providing dense, interpretable sequence-level feedback derived from fine-grained verification of individual steps of tool use. This design allows any valid execution path to receive credit, naturally supporting multiple solution strategies and adapting to evolving tool interfaces. On DepthBench, a compositional benchmark stratified by depth (1 to 6 steps), TIER achieves >90% accuracy across steps, where trajectory-supervised rewards collapse beyond step-4. We further demonstrate consistent gains on benchmarks like BFCL v3 and NestFUL. Ablation studies confirm that all reward components are necessary, highlighting the importance of multi-level supervision for compositional reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出TIER框架，通过函数模式和运行时执行提供密集奖励信号，无需参考轨迹即可在组合工具使用任务中实现高准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在组合工具使用场景下难以扩展，基于结果的奖励稀疏，而基于轨迹的奖励依赖标注参考解且惩罚有效替代路径，限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: TIER将奖励分解为格式有效性、模式遵循、执行成功和答案正确性四个维度，从函数模式和运行时执行中直接导出密集的序列级监督信号，支持任意有效执行路径获得奖励。
AI.result: 在DepthBench（1-6步组合基准）上，TIER在各步骤均达到>90%准确率，而轨迹监督方法在步骤4后崩溃；在BFCL v3和NestFUL上也有持续提升。
AI.conclusion: TIER通过多层级监督有效支持组合推理，所有奖励组件均不可或缺，验证了无需参考轨迹的奖励设计在组合工具使用中的有效性。

title: Accelerating AI-Powered Research: The PuppyChatter Framework for Usable and Flexible Tooling
summary: This research addresses the challenges inherent in developing Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications, particularly those leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs). While AI vendors provide Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) and Software Development Kits (SDKs) to facilitate developer interaction, the former often requires intricate manual request construction, and the latter can lead to significant vendor lock-in. Furthermore, existing model abstraction frameworks, though mitigating vendor dependency, introduce an additional layer of complexity and potential security concerns. To reconcile these conflicting factors, the study introduces PuppyChatter, a novel software framework designed to preserve the intuitive simplicity of vendor-specific SDKs while simultaneously adhering to the vendor-neutrality principles characteristic of model abstraction, thereby offering a more streamlined and flexible development paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PuppyChatter框架，旨在平衡AI开发中SDK的易用性与模型抽象框架的供应商中立性，减少供应商锁定和开发复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI开发方式存在两难困境：vendor SDK使用简单但导致供应商锁定，模型抽象框架虽能解耦但增加复杂性和安全风险，需要一种兼顾两者的新方案。
AI.method: 提出PuppyChatter框架，在保持vendor SDK的直观简单性的同时，融入模型抽象框架的供应商中立原则，实现更简化的灵活开发范式。
AI.result: PuppyChatter提供了一种更简化的灵活开发范式，降低了供应商锁定风险，同时避免了额外的复杂性层和安全问题。
AI.conclusion: PuppyChatter成功调和了易用性与供应商中立性之间的矛盾，为LLM驱动的AI应用开发提供了一种更优的软件框架方案。

title: PULSE: Generative Phase Evolution for Non-Stationary Time Series Forecasting
summary: Time series forecasting under non-stationarity faces a fundamental tension between capturing stable representations and adapting to distribution shifts. Existing methods implicitly rely on static historical assumptions, leading to a critical failure mode we term Phase Amnesia, where models become blind to the evolving global context. To resolve this, we formalize non-stationary dynamics through three physical hypotheses: wold decomposition, dynamical phase evolution, and heteroscedastic manifold generation. These principles inspire PULSE, a physics-informed, plug-and-play framework adopting a Disentangle--Evolve--Simulate design philosophy. Specifically, PULSE utilizes phase-anchored disentanglement to resolve optimization interference caused by dominant trends, employs a Phase Router to actively generate future trajectories, and introduces Statistic-Aware Mixup (SAM) to ensure robustness against out-of-distribution volatility. Empirically, PULSE enables a simple MLP backbone to achieve state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance across 12 real-world benchmarks. This validates that a correct physics-informed inductive bias is far more critical than raw architectural complexity for non-stationary forecasting. The code is available at: https://github.com/Gemost/PULSE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出物理信息驱动的即插即用框架PULSE，通过相位锚定解缠、阶段路由器与统计感知混合三大模块，解决非平稳时间序列预测中的相位失忆问题，在12个真实基准上实现SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有非平稳时间序列预测方法隐含静态历史假设，导致对演化中的全局上下文产生盲区（称为Phase Amnesia），亟需一种能主动适应分布偏移且保持稳定表征的预测框架。
AI.method: 基于Wold分解、动力学相位演化与异方差流形生成三个物理假设，设计Disentangle-Evolve-Simulate三阶段框架：(1)相位锚定解缠分离主导趋势与相位成分；(2)Phase Router主动生成未来相位轨迹；(3)Statistic-Aware Mixup (SAM)增强对分布外波动的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在12个真实世界基准数据集上，使用简单的MLP骨干网络即可达到SOTA或极具竞争力的预测性能，验证了正确的物理先验比复杂架构更为关键。
AI.conclusion: 物理启发的归纳偏置对于非平稳时间序列预测至关重要，PULSE通过解耦-演化-模拟的设计范式有效克服了相位失忆问题，代码已开源。

title: Going Headless? On the Boundaries of Vertical AI Firms
