We address this by formulating BFM task-inference as a robust minimax optimization problem, enabling adaptation to worst-case dynamics perturbations without modifying pretraining. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first BFM-based framework that achieves robustness to dynamics shifts while relying solely on offline data from a single nominal environment. Our approach significantly outperforms standard BFM and robust offline IL baselines under dynamics shifts. These results demonstrate that robust policy can be achieved entirely at task-inference time, improving the practicality of BFMs in dynamic settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒行为基础模型（Robust BFM），通过在任务推理阶段引入极小极大优化，使预训练的行为基础模型能够适应环境动力学的扰动（如摩擦、驱动、传感器噪声变化），无需重新预训练，仅依赖单一标称环境下的离线数据即可实现鲁棒策略。
AI.motivation: 现有行为基础模型（BFM）假设固定的环境动力学，无法应对现实世界中摩擦、驱动或传感器噪声等动力学变化，鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 将BFM的任务推理形式化为鲁棒极小极大优化问题，使模型能够适应最坏情况下的动力学扰动，且不修改预训练过程，仅使用单一标称环境的离线数据。
AI.result: 在动力学扰动下，该方法显著优于标准BFM和鲁棒离线模仿学习基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒策略可以完全在任务推理阶段实现，无需重新预训练，提升了BFM在动态环境中的实用性。

title: TaskGround: Structured Executable Task Inference for Full-Scene Household Reasoning
summary: In real home deployments, household agents must often operate from a complete household scene and a situated household request, rather than from a clean task specification. Such requests require agents to identify task-relevant entities, recover intended task conditions, and resolve ordering constraints from the surrounding scene context. We formalize this capability as full-scene household reasoning: given a complete household scene and a situated household request, an agent must infer executable task structure before producing a grounded skill-level action sequence. This setting is challenging because complete household scenes contain substantial task-irrelevant information, making direct complete-scene prompting inefficient and error-prone. In practical deployment, this challenge is further amplified by privacy and local compute constraints, which favor compact open-weight models with limited long-context reasoning ability. We propose TaskGround, a training-free and model-agnostic Ground-Infer-Execute framework that grounds complete scenes into compact task-relevant scene slices, infers executable task structure, and compiles it into grounded skill-level action sequences. To evaluate this setting, we introduce FullHome, a human-validated evaluation suite of 400 household tasks spanning diverse home-scale environments and both goal-oriented and process-constrained requirements. On FullHome, TaskGround improves task success rates by large margins across both proprietary and open-weight models. Notably, it makes Qwen3.5-9B competitive with GPT-5 under direct complete-scene prompting while reducing total input-token cost by up to 18x. Our results identify executable task-structure inference as a central bottleneck in full-scene household reasoning and show that structured grounding can make compact local models substantially more effective for practical household deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TaskGround框架，用于解决家庭场景中机器人在完整场景和情境化请求下进行任务推理的问题。该框架通过"基础-推理-执行"三阶段流程，将完整场景压缩为任务相关的场景切片，推断可执行任务结构，并生成接地技能级动作序列。同时构建了FullHome评估基准（400个家庭任务），实验表明TaskGround显著提升了任务成功率，使Qwen3.5-9B在压缩18倍输入token成本下达到与GPT-5直接提示相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 在实际家庭部署中，智能体需要从完整的家庭场景和情境化请求中理解任务，而非从干净的任务规范出发。完整家庭场景包含大量任务无关信息，直接对整个场景进行提示效率低下且易出错，同时隐私和本地计算约束要求使用轻量级开放模型，而这些模型的长上下文推理能力有限。
AI.method: 提出TaskGround框架，采用"基础-推理-执行"（Ground-Infer-Execute）三阶段方法：首先将完整场景接地为紧凑的任务相关场景切片，然后推断可执行任务结构，最后编译为接地技能级动作序列。该框架无需训练且模型无关。
AI.result: 在FullHome基准上，TaskGround使各类专有模型和开放权重模型的任务成功率大幅提升。Qwen3.5-9B在TaskGround下与GPT-5直接进行完整场景提示的效果相当，同时总输入token成本降低达18倍。
AI.conclusion: 可执行任务结构推断是全场景家庭推理的核心瓶颈，结构化的场景接地可以使紧凑的本地模型在实际家庭部署中显著更有效。

title: Why Do Reasoning Models Lose Coverage? The Role of Data and Forks in the Road
summary: Recent progress in large language models has led to the emergence of reasoning models, which have shown strong performance on complex tasks through specialized fine-tuning procedures. While these methods reliably improve pass@1 accuracy, prior works have observed that they show a coverage shrinkage behavior, where pass@k degrades relative to the base model. In this paper, we investigate the reasoning shrinkage arise under SFT-based post-training. We hypothesize that this behavior is driven by properties of the fine-tuning data, specifically related to decision points or "forks in the road" scenarios where model faces indecipherable patterns with multiple valid reasoning paths. To test this hypothesis, we design controlled case studies that simulate such decision-point settings, spanning indecipherable nodes in graph branching, and reasoning modes. By tracking post-training dynamics in these settings, we find that the shrinkage phenomenon is tightly correlated with the prevalence of decision-point scenarios in the training data. We also demonstrate that this shrinkage behavior can be partially mitigated through targeted data synthesis design of decision-points, and a more systematic diversity-encouraging decoding mechanism. Our findings identify data-centric factors as a key driver of shrinkage in reasoning models and highlight diversity-aware designs as an effective lever for controlling it.

AI.tldr: 本文发现基于SFT的后训练会导致推理模型出现"覆盖收缩"现象（pass@k下降），其根源在于训练数据中"决策分叉点"场景的分布，并通过数据合成和多样性解码机制可部分缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 揭示推理模型在SFT后训练中出现pass@k退化的根本原因，特别是"覆盖收缩"行为的驱动因素。
AI.method: 提出"决策分叉点"假设，设计受控实验模拟图分支中的不可判读节点和推理模式，追踪后训练动态，并探索针对性数据合成与多样性解码机制进行缓解。
AI.result: 覆盖收缩现象与训练数据中决策点场景的普遍性高度相关；通过数据合成和多样性解码机制可部分缓解该问题。
AI.conclusion: 数据中心的因素（尤其是决策分叉点分布）是推理模型覆盖收缩的关键驱动因素，多样性感知设计是有效控制手段。

title: POST: Prior-Observation Adversarial Learning of Spatio-Temporal Associations for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection
summary: Existing Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection (MTSAD) frameworks increasingly rely on integrating Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) with sequence models to capture complex spatio-temporal dependencies. However, less attention is paid to the spatial over-generalization problem, where unconstrained structural modeling indiscriminately reconstructs anomalies, inevitably degrading detection recall. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel framework that unifies spatio-temporal modeling through a joint prior-observation adversarial learning paradigm. In the spatial dimension, the model alternately learns adjacency matrices as structural prior and models the association discrepancy between prior and data-driven observation in a minimax manner during training. Such adversarial optimization not only improves the model sensitivity for time-wise detection, but also enables the model to localize anomalies to specific channels. To systematically evaluate this anomaly localization capability, we further construct a synthetic benchmark equipped with precise channel-wise annotations. Extensive experiments across public datasets and our dedicated benchmark demonstrate that the proposed framework establishes a new state-of-the-art in both time-wise detection and spatial localization tasks. Our code, pre-trained models, and benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/anocodetest1/POST.

AI.tldr: 本文提出POST框架，通过先验-观测联合对抗学习范式解决多变量时序异常检测中的空间过泛化问题，在时间检测和通道定位任务上均达到SOTA，并构建了带通道级标注的合成基准。
AI.motivation: 现有MTSAD方法虽引入GNN捕获时空依赖，但忽视了空间过泛化问题——无约束的结构建模会不加区分地重构异常，导致检测召回率下降。
AI.method: 提出联合先验-观测对抗学习范式：在空间维度交替学习邻接矩阵作为结构先验，并以极大极小博弈方式建模先验与数据驱动观测之间的关联差异；同时构建了带精确通道级标注的合成基准用于评估异常定位能力。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和自建基准上，POST在时间维度检测和空间维度定位任务上均达到最新SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 对抗优化不仅提升了时间检测的灵敏度，还使模型能够将异常定位到具体通道，为MTSAD中的异常定位提供了新的范式。

title: Privacy Policy Enforcement Guardrails for Data-Sensitive Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary:
Standard PII filters often miss contextual data leakage in RAG systems, such as non-regulated attribute clusters that collectively identify individuals. We introduce a Privacy Policy Enforcement (PPE) framework using dual one-class density estimators with fused text embeddings and a calibrated abstain region for out-of-distribution inputs. Using an axis-stratified, multi-LLM synthetic data pipeline across medicine, finance, and law, we found that traditional Gaussian Mixture baselines fail on borderline-safe stress tests by focusing on linguistic register rather than content.
  Our proposed T3+OCSVM detector, trained on safe and borderline-safe data, achieves a borderline AUROC of 0.93+ while reducing false positives by 44-55 percentage points and maintaining millisecond latency. Compared to supervised MLP classifiers or 14B-parameter LLM judges, our framework offers superior operational suitability, as the former suffers from high abstention rates and the latter from latency and calibration issues. This methodology provides a robust stress-testing standard for any synthetic-data-trained classifier.

AI.tldr: 针对RAG系统中非监管属性聚类导致的上下文数据泄露问题，提出基于双单类密度估计器与融合文本嵌入的隐私策略执行（PPE）框架，配合校准拒绝区域处理分布外输入。通过轴分层、多LLM合成数据管道在医疗、金融、法律领域的测试表明，传统高斯混合基线在边界安全压力测试中因关注语言风格而非内容而失败。提出的T3+OCSVM检测器在边界安全数据上AUROC达0.93+，误报率降低44-55个百分点，维持毫秒级延迟，优于监督MLP分类器或140亿参数LLM评判器。
AI.motivation: 标准PII过滤器难以捕捉RAG系统中非监管属性聚类导致的上下文数据泄露。传统方法（如高斯混合模型）在边界安全场景下失败，因为它们关注语言风格而非实际内容。
AI.method: 提出PPE框架，采用双单类密度估计器（T3+OCSVM），使用融合文本嵌入，并设置校准拒绝区域处理OOD输入。通过轴分层、多LLM合成数据管道生成医疗、金融、法律领域数据。
AI.result: 在边界安全数据上AUROC达0.93+，误报率降低44-55个百分点，维持毫秒级延迟。相比监督MLP分类器和140亿参数LLM评判器，具有更优的操作适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为任何基于合成数据训练的分类器提供了稳健的压力测试标准，在实际部署中平衡了准确率、误报率和延迟等操作因素。

title: Generative AI and the Productivity Divide: Human-AI Complementarities in Education
summary: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) is transforming how firms create, process, and apply knowledge, yet little is known about the heterogeneity of its productivity effects across users. We report results from a randomized controlled experiment in which participants-analogs of early-career knowledge workers-were assigned to self-study a technical domain using either traditional resources or large-language-model (LLM) assistance. On average, GenAI access significantly increased task performance, but the distribution of gains was highly uneven. Improvements were not predicted by GPA or prior knowledge, but by \textit{AI Interaction Competence (AIC)} -- the ability to elicit, filter, and verify model outputs. High-AIC participants realized outsized gains; low-AIC participants saw limited or even negative marginal returns. A scaffolding intervention (conceptual maps) reduced outcome variance, indicating that standardized workflows can mitigate inequality in AI-mediated performance. We interpret these findings through the lens of human-AI complementarities: GenAI raises mean productivity while introducing a new axis of capability inequality. Managerially, firms should pair GenAI access with short AIC micro-training and simple standard operating procedures to capture value consistently and avoid uneven adoption outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过随机对照实验发现，生成式AI（大语言模型）显著提升知识工作者的平均任务绩效，但收益分布极不均衡——AI交互能力（AIC）而非传统能力指标（如GPA）解释了绩效差异，高AIC者获益巨大，低AIC者收益有限甚至为负；概念图脚手架干预可缩小差距，提示标准化流程能缓解AI带来的能力不平等。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI正在深刻改变企业知识创造与应用方式，但学界对其生产力效应的异质性（即不同用户之间的收益差异）知之甚少，尤其缺乏因果证据。现有研究多聚焦平均处理效应，忽略了人-AI互补性中个体能力差异的关键作用。
AI.method: 开展随机对照实验，以早期职业生涯知识工作者为受试者，令其自学技术领域知识，实验组使用大语言模型辅助，对照组使用传统资源。测量任务绩效、先验知识（GPA）、AI交互能力（AIC）等变量，并引入概念图作为脚手架干预。
AI.result: GenAI访问显著提升平均任务绩效，但增益分布高度不均匀。绩效提升不能被GPA或先验知识预测，而由AI交互能力（AIC）——即获取、筛选和验证模型输出的能力——显著预测。高AIC参与者获得超额收益，低AIC参与者收益有限甚至边际回报为负。概念图脚手架干预降低了结果方差。
AI.conclusion: GenAI提高了平均生产力，但同时引入了一个新的能力不平等维度。管理者应将GenAI访问与简短的AIC微培训和标准操作程序相结合，以持续获取价值并避免不均衡的采用结果。

title: D$^2$Evo: Dual Difficulty-Aware Self-Evolution for Data-Efficient Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. First two authors contributed equally
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has demonstrated potential for enhancing reasoning in large language models (LLMs). However, effective RL training, which requires medium-difficulty training samples, faces two fundamental challenges: Effective Data Scarcity and Dynamic Difficulty Shifts, where medium-difficulty samples are scarce and become trivial as models improve. Existing methods mitigate this scarcity to some extent by generating training samples. However, these approaches suffer from anchor-free generation, ignoring co-evolution, and difficulty mismatch. To address these issues, we propose D$^2$Evo, a Dual Difficulty-aware self-Evolution RL framework. In each iteration, our method mines medium-difficulty anchors based on the current Solver's capability, trains the Questioner to generate diverse questions at appropriate difficulty levels, and jointly optimizes both components to enable progressive reasoning gains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that D$^2$Evo outperforms existing methods on mathematical reasoning benchmarks with fewer than 2K real mathematical samples, and exhibits strong generalization on general reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出D²Evo框架，通过双难度感知自进化强化学习，解决LLM推理增强中训练样本稀缺和难度动态变化问题，在数学推理基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: RL增强LLM推理需要中等难度训练样本，但存在有效数据稀缺和动态难度变化两大挑战，现有方法存在无锚点生成、忽略共同进化、难度不匹配等问题。
AI.method: 提出D²Evo框架，每次迭代中基于当前求解器能力挖掘中等难度锚点，训练提问器生成适当难度的多样化问题，并联合优化两个组件实现渐进式推理提升。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准上以少于2K真实样本超越现有方法，在通用推理基准上展现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: D²Evo有效解决了RL训练中样本稀缺和难度失衡问题，通过双难度感知自进化机制实现了数据高效的推理能力提升。

title: Evidence-Grounded Frontier Mapping and Agentic Hypothesis Generation in Nanomedicine
summary: Nanomedicine research spans delivery chemistry, immunology, imaging, biomaterials, and disease-specific translational science, yet its conceptual design space remains fragmented across a large and heterogeneous literature. To date, artificial intelligence in nanomedicine has focused primarily on property prediction and formulation optimization, with much less attention to evidence-grounded discovery support at the level of research direction selection. We introduce pArticleMap, a literature-mapping and research-hypothesis-generation system that combines article embeddings, similarity-graph analysis, sparse frontier extraction, structured evidence-pack retrieval, and an audited large-language-model (LLM) workflow for grounded ideation. Rather than forecasting future concept co-occurrence, pArticleMap targets low-density article-level bridge regions and cluster interfaces, then generates and scores citation-grounded hypotheses with large language models in an agentic setup. We evaluate the system with a retrospective realization benchmark (generate later literature under a historical cutoff) and a blinded human reader assessment layer across cue-conditioned nanomedicine tasks. Across 4 selected retrospective bundles, pArticleMap generated ideas and selected task-retained hypotheses (winner ideas) under the benchmark protocol. For task-level retained hypotheses, a pooled gold recovery rate of 10.8% was obtained, with a recall@10 of 15.9% and a future-neighborhood rate of 61.0%, indicating that the system often reached the correct forward-looking neighborhood (paper ideas) even without exact paper-level recovery. Human-agent agreement is modest overall, indicating that internal scoring is useful as a support signal but does not replace expert judgment. These results position pArticleMap as a conservative, evidence-grounded research assistant for nanomedicine.

AI.tldr: 本文提出pArticleMap，一种结合文章嵌入、相似性图分析、稀疏前沿提取、结构化证据包检索和可审计大语言模型的文献映射与假设生成系统，用于纳米医学领域的研究方向选择支持。系统在回顾性基准测试中实现了10.8%的金标准恢复率、15.9%的recall@10和61.0%的未来邻域率，定位为保守、基于证据的研究助手。
AI.motivation: 纳米医学研究概念设计空间碎片化严重，现有AI方法主要集中在性质预测和配方优化，缺乏证据支持的研究方向选择辅助工具。
AI.method: pArticleMap系统包含五大模块：文章嵌入、相似性图分析、稀疏前沿提取、结构化证据包检索和基于大语言模型的接地推理工作流。系统通过定位低密度文章桥接区域和聚类界面，利用大语言模型在代理设置中生成并评分基于引文的假设。
AI.result: 在4个回顾性测试中，系统生成了想法并筛选出任务保留假设。任务级保留假设的合并金标准恢复率为10.8%，recall@10为15.9%，未来邻域率为61.0%。人机一致性总体适中。
AI.conclusion: pArticleMap定位为保守、基于证据的纳米医学研究助手；内部评分可作为辅助信号，但无法替代专家判断。

title: Privacy-Preserving Generation Fraud Detection for Distributed Photovoltaic Systems: A Solar Irradiance-Fused Federated Learning Framework
summary: The wide adoption of residential photovoltaic (PV) systems introduces new challenges for generation fraud detection (FD). Unlike traditional electricity theft detection, which focuses on electricity consumption-side behavior, PV generation fraud detection (PVG-FD) is complicated by the inherent intermittency and uncertainty of PV generation. The distributed nature of PV systems poses further challenges for centralized PVG-FD approaches due to scalability and privacy concerns. This paper develops a privacy-preserving distributed PVG-FD framework based on federated learning (FL). In this framework, a utility company manages multiple household communities, where each of which is equipped with a local detector. The framework integrates a novel detection model architecture with privacy-preserving global collaboration. Each community's local model fuses PV generation and weather data via a co-attention mechanism to detect discrepancies critical for PVG-FD. The FL framework enables cross-community collaboration by aggregating model parameters and prototypes, leveraging global knowledge sharing with local refinement while preserving privacy. It also uses prototype alignment to address class imbalance by enhancing fraud sample representation. Extensive experiments on a real-world residential PV dataset validate the effectiveness of the developed method and demonstrate that it outperforms state-of-the-art FL methods across various scenarios. The results also show its scalability across varying community sizes and strong robustness to class imbalance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于联邦学习的隐私保护分布式光伏发电欺诈检测框架，通过共注意力机制融合发电与气象数据，并利用原型对齐解决类别不平衡问题，在真实数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 住宅光伏系统普及带来了发电侧欺诈检测的新挑战：光伏发电的间歇性和不确定性使检测复杂化，分布式特性导致集中式方法存在可扩展性和隐私问题。
AI.method: 基于联邦学习的分布式PVG-FD框架：每个社区配备本地检测器，采用共注意力机制融合光伏发电与气象数据；通过聚合模型参数和原型实现跨社区协作，利用原型对齐增强欺诈样本表示以解决类别不平衡。
AI.result: 在真实住宅光伏数据集上的实验验证了有效性，优于现有最先进的联邦学习方法，具有良好的可扩展性和对类别不平衡的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了分布式光伏发电欺诈检测中的隐私、可扩展性和类别不平衡等关键问题，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Whispers in the Noise: Surrogate-Guided Concept Awakening via a Multi-Agent Framework
summary: Diffusion models (DMs) are widely used for text-to-image generation, but their strong generative capabilities also raise concerns about unsafe or undesirable content. Concept erasure aims to mitigate these risks by removing specific concepts from pretrained models. However, recent studies show that such methods often suppress rather than fully eliminate target concepts, leaving models vulnerable to awakening attacks. Existing approaches primarily rely on white-box access through optimization or inversion, while concept awakening under black-box constraints remains underexplored. In this work, we revisit the denoising process from a trajectory perspective and show that concept erasure mainly disrupts early-stage text-semantic alignment but does not fully prevent semantic information from propagating along the denoising dynamics. As generation proceeds, the model increasingly depends on the evolving noisy state rather than textual conditions, which creates an opportunity to bypass erased mappings. Motivated by this observation, we propose ConceptAgent, a training-free, black-box, multi-agent framework that awakens erased concepts by initializing the denoising trajectory from surrogate-guided noisy states. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ConceptAgent enables accurate and controllable awakening of erased concepts under black-box settings without access to model parameters, gradients, or internal representations. These results highlight fundamental limitations of current concept erasure methods and provide new insights into the dynamic nature of semantic control in DMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConceptAgent框架，通过从替代引导的噪声状态初始化去噪轨迹，在黑盒设置下成功唤醒扩散模型中被擦除的概念，揭示了现有概念擦除方法的根本局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有概念擦除方法无法完全消除目标概念，模型仍易受唤醒攻击；而黑盒约束下的概念唤醒问题尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: ConceptAgent是一种无需训练、黑盒、多智能体框架，通过从替代引导的噪声状态初始化去噪轨迹来唤醒被擦除的概念。
AI.result: ConceptAgent能在黑盒设置下（无需访问模型参数、梯度或内部表征）实现准确且可控的擦除概念唤醒。
AI.conclusion: 现有概念擦除方法存在根本性缺陷，扩散模型中的语义控制具有动态特性，早期文本-语义对齐的破坏不足以阻止语义信息沿去噪动力学的传播。

title: 1GC-7RC: One Graphic Card -- Seven Research Challenges! How Good Are AI Agents at Doing Your Job?
summary: Autonomous AI coding agents are becoming a core tool for ML practitioners in industry and research alike. Despite this growing adoption, no standardized benchmark exists to evaluate their ability to design, implement, and train models from scratch across diverse domains. We introduce **1GC-7RC** (*Single Graphic Card: Seven Research Challenges*), a benchmark comprising seven ML tasks spanning language modeling, image classification, semantic segmentation, graph learning, tabular prediction, time-series forecasting, and text classification. Each task provides a locked data-preparation and evaluation script together with a baseline training script; the agent may only modify the training code, has no access to pretrained weights (with one controlled exception for semantic segmentation), no internet access, and must complete each task within a task-specific wall-clock budget (40-120 minutes) on a single GPU. We evaluate seven coding agents: five proprietary (Claude Code with Sonnet 4.6, Opus 4.6, and Opus 4.7; Codex CLI with GPT 5.5; and OpenCode with Qwen 3.6+) and two open-source (OpenCode with Kimi K2.5, Kimi K2.6). Across 5 runs per agent-task pair, we report substantial performance differences that reveal varying levels of implicit ML knowledge, planning ability, and time-budget management. The benchmark, harness, and all evaluation artifacts are publicly available on GitHub at https://github.com/Strolchii/1GC-7RC-Benchmark to facilitate reproducible comparison of future agents. Because our benchmark design is modular, the benchmark can be extended to new tasks and domains, adapted to different GPU budgets, and used to study multi-agent settings, making it a flexible platform for future research on autonomous research agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了1GC-7RC基准测试，用于评估AI编码智能体在单GPU上从零设计、实现和训练ML模型的能力，涵盖7个ML任务，并评估了7种编码智能体，发现它们在ML知识、规划能力和时间预算管理方面存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管自主AI编码智能体在ML领域中日益普及，但缺乏标准化基准来评估其跨领域从零设计、实现和训练模型的能力。
AI.method: 设计了1GC-7RC基准，包含7个ML任务（语言建模、图像分类、语义分割、图学习、表格预测、时间序列预测和文本分类），每个任务提供锁定的数据准备和评估脚本及基线训练脚本，智能体只能修改训练代码，无预训练权重（语义分割除外）、无互联网访问，需在单GPU上按任务特定时间预算（40-120分钟）完成。评估了5个专有和2个开源编码智能体，每个智能体-任务对运行5次。
AI.result: 不同编码智能体在性能上存在显著差异，反映了它们在隐式ML知识、规划能力和时间预算管理方面的不同水平。
AI.conclusion: 1GC-7RC是一个模块化、可扩展的基准平台，支持新任务、不同GPU预算和多智能体设置研究，为未来自主研究智能体的可重复比较提供了基础。

title: TRACE: Trajectory Correction from Cross-layer Evidence for Hallucination Reduction
summary: Hallucination correction is not a one-direction problem. We show that intermediate layers are neither uniformly more truthful than final layers nor uniformly less trustworthy. Yet hallucination reduction is usually instantiated through one fixed intervention form: contrast one layer against another, steer along a truthfulness direction, or defer to external evidence. This framing is structurally incomplete. Cross-layer factual evidence does not evolve uniformly: in some failures truthful support is present internally and later suppressed, whereas in others candidate competition remains genuinely multi-directional across depth, so no single signed scalar family is generally sufficient. We introduce Trajectory Correction from Cross-layer Evidence for Hallucination Reduction (TRACE), a deterministic, training-free algorithm which corrects hallucinations at inference time by deriving both the corrective layer and the appropriate correction operator from each input's cross-layer candidate trajectory inside the LLM's own forward pass. Under one frozen hyperparameter setting, TRACE selects among scalar reversal, earlier-state recovery, and candidate-space correction using only model-internal evidence. Evaluated as a single universal algorithm across 15 models, 8 model families, and 3 factuality benchmarks, TRACE improves every evaluation cell, yielding mean gains of +12.26 MC1 points and +8.65 MC2-style points with no regressions, with gains reaching +47.20 MC1 and +43.38 MC2-style points. The method uses no labels, retrieval, pretraining, finetuning, or per-model calibration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRACE，一种无需训练、无需标签的推理时幻觉修正算法。它通过分析LLM各层的候选轨迹，自适应地为每个输入选择最佳修正层级和修正算子（标量反转、早期状态恢复、候选空间修正），在15个模型、8个模型家族、3个事实性基准上均取得提升，平均MC1提升12.26点，MC2提升8.65点，无任何回归案例。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉修正方法存在结构性缺陷：要么固定使用单一修正形式（层间对比、沿真实性方向引导、或依赖外部证据），忽略了跨层事实证据并非单向演化的事实——有些失败案例中正确信息在中间层存在但后被抑制，有些则是候选竞争在各层间多向存在，因此单一符号标量族方法不足以应对所有情况。
AI.method: TRACE是一种确定性、无需训练的推理时修正算法。它利用LLM前向传播过程中的跨层候选轨迹，为每个输入自适应地推导出（1）最佳的修正层位置，以及（2）合适的修正算子（从标量反转、早期状态恢复、候选空间修正三种中选择）。整个过程仅依赖模型内部证据，在单一冻结超参数设置下运行。
AI.result: 在15个模型、8个模型家族、3个事实性基准上测试，TRACE在每个评估单元上均取得提升，平均MC1增益+12.26点，MC2增益+8.65点，无任何回归案例。最佳案例中MC1提升达+47.20点，MC2提升达+43.38点。
AI.conclusion: 跨层事实证据演化具有异质性，因此需要根据每个输入的具体情况自适应选择修正策略。TRACE证明了仅利用模型内部信息、无需任何外部资源或训练即可实现通用且有效的幻觉修正，在广泛模型上展现了鲁棒性和普适性。

title: Learning Multi-Timescale Abstractions for Hierarchical Combinatorial Planning
summary: The combination of exponentially large action spaces, stochastic dynamics, and long-horizon decision-making under limited resources makes Sequential Stochastic Combinatorial Optimization (SSCO) particularly challenging for reinforcement learning. Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (HRL) offers a natural decomposition, but it places the high-level policy in a Semi-Markov Decision Process (SMDP) where actions have variable durations, making it difficult to learn a world model that is suitable for planning. We introduce a model-based hierarchical framework for sequential stochastic combinatorial decision-making that directly addresses this issue. Our method combines a latent-space tree-search planner with an SMDP-aware world model for variable-duration decisions. A multi-timescale objective structures the latent dynamics so that transition magnitudes reflect the effective temporal scales of abstract actions, enabling efficient lookahead under adaptive temporal abstraction. We further learn a subgoal-conditioned budget policy jointly with the world model to support context-aware resource allocation. Across challenging SSCO benchmarks, our method outperforms strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 针对具有指数级大动作空间、随机动力学和长 horizon 的序贯随机组合优化问题，本文提出了一种基于模型的层次化强化学习框架。该方法结合潜在空间树搜索规划器与感知SMDP的世界模型，通过多时间尺度目标函数构建潜在动力学以反映抽象动作的有效时间尺度，并联合学习子目标条件预算策略，在多个SSCO基准上超越强基线方法。
AI.motivation: 指数级大的动作空间、随机动力学和资源受限下的长 horizon 决策使得序贯随机组合优化对强化学习极具挑战性。层次化强化学习虽能提供自然分解，但高层策略处于SMDP中（动作持续时间可变），导致难以学习适合规划的世界模型。
AI.method: 提出基于模型的层次化框架：(1) 潜在空间树搜索规划器；(2) SMDP感知的世界模型处理可变持续时间决策；(3) 多时间尺度目标函数结构化潜在动力学，使转移幅度反映抽象动作的有效时间尺度；(4) 联合学习子目标条件预算策略支持上下文感知的资源分配。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的SSCO基准测试中，该方法优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于模型的层次化框架有效解决了序贯随机组合优化中动作空间大、随机性强、长 horizon 以及资源受限等挑战，通过引入SMDP感知的世界模型和多时间尺度目标函数，实现了高效的潜在空间前瞻规划和自适应资源分配。

title: Visualizing the Invisible: Generative Visual Grounding Empowers Universal EEG Understanding in MLLMs
summary: Leveraging the universal representations of pre-trained LLMs and MLLMs offers a promising path toward brain foundation models. However, visually-evoked EEG datasets remain scarce, leading existing methods to align neural signals mainly with abstract text, a lossy translation that may discard fine-grained perceptual information encoded in brain activity. We propose Generative Visual Grounding (GVG), a framework that visualizes the invisible by using an EEG-to-image generative model as a visual translator. Instead of forcing EEG into text alone, GVG hallucinates instance-specific proxy images for non-visual EEG, providing structured visual contexts that allow MLLMs to exploit their visual priors for clinical-state interpretation. We validate this idea on two MLLM backbones, GVG-X-Omni and GVG-Janus. Image-only alignment is already competitive: the lightweight GVG-X-Omni matches 1.7B-parameter text-aligned baselines while tuning only 170M parameters on a frozen 7B backbone. We further extend GVG-Janus with trimodal Image+Text alignment, where text supplies categorical semantic anchors and visual proxies enrich neural representations with perceptual details. Experiments show consistent gains in EEG understanding and visual generation, suggesting visual proxy grounding as an effective complement to textual alignment.

AI.tldr: 提出生成式视觉锚定（GVG）框架，利用EEG-to-image生成模型将非视觉EEG信号转换为代理图像，让多模态大语言模型利用视觉先验进行临床状态解读。仅用图像对齐的轻量模型即可媲美1.7B文本对齐基线，三模态图像+文本对齐进一步提升EEG理解和视觉生成性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉诱发EEG数据集稀缺，现有方法主要将神经信号与抽象文本对齐，这种有损翻译会丢弃脑活动中编码的细粒度感知信息。
AI.method: 提出GVG框架，包含：(1) EEG-to-image生成模型作为视觉翻译器，为非视觉EEG生成实例级代理图像；(2) 将代理图像作为结构化视觉上下文输入MLLM；(3) 扩展为三模态图像+文本对齐，文本提供类别语义锚点，视觉代理丰富感知细节。
AI.result: 轻量级GVG-X-Omni在冻结7B骨干网络上仅调优170M参数，即匹配1.7B参数文本对齐基线；三模态GVG-Janus在EEG理解和视觉生成上均取得一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 视觉代理锚定可作为文本对齐的有效补充，图像对齐本身就具有竞争力，无需依赖大规模文本标注即可实现强大的EEG理解性能。

title: S-Bus: Automatic Read-Set Reconstruction for Multi-Agent LLM State Coordination
comment: 24 pages, 23 tables. Code, formal proofs, and experimental harness available at: https://github.com/sajjadanwar0/sbus
summary:
Concurrent LLM agents sharing mutable natural-language state produce Structural Race Conditions (SRCs): write-write and cross-shard stale-read conflicts that silently corrupt agent output. Existing multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen) provide no write-ownership semantics over shared state.
  We present S-Bus, an HTTP middleware whose central mechanism is a server-side DeliveryLog: a per-agent log of HTTP GET operations that automatically reconstructs each agent's read set at commit time without agent SDK changes under HTTP/1.1. The consistency property the DeliveryLog provides -- Observable-Read Isolation (ORI), a partial causal consistency over the HTTP-observable projection of the read set -- prevents structural race conditions when agents collaborate via shared shards.
  Three contributions: (C1) The DeliveryLog mechanism for automatic HTTP-traffic-based read-set reconstruction, with three-tier mechanised evidence: ReadSetSoundness and ORICommitSafety machine-checked in TLAPS (modulo one retained typing axiom); exhaustive TLC at N=3 (20,763,484 distinct states, zero violations); Dafny discharges 9 inductive soundness lemmas. (C2) Empirical structural-conflict prevention parity against PostgreSQL 17 SERIALIZABLE and Redis 7 WATCH/MULTI on shared-shard contention sweeps with 427,308 active HTTP-409 conflicts: zero Type-I corruptions across all three backends. (C3) ORI's operating envelope is topology-conditional: semantically neutral in dedicated-shard workloads; harmful in single-shard collaborative writing because preservation propagates concurrent contradictions.
  Source code: https://github.com/sajjadanwar0/sbus

AI.tldr: S-Bus是一个HTTP中间件，通过服务端DeliveryLog机制自动重建每个agent的读集，提供可观察读隔离（ORI）一致性，防止并发LLM agent间因共享可变自然语言状态导致的结构性竞态条件（写写冲突和跨分片脏读），无需修改agent SDK即可实现。在427,308次HTTP-409冲突测试中实现了零Type-I数据损坏，并通过TLAPS、TLC和Dafny三层形式化验证。
AI.motivation: 现有并发LLM agent框架（如LangGraph、CrewAI、AutoGen）在共享可变自然语言状态时缺乏写所有权语义，导致结构性竞态条件（SRCs）——写写冲突和跨分片脏读会静默破坏agent输出，且现有系统无法检测或防止这类问题。
AI.method: 提出S-Bus中间件，核心机制是服务端DeliveryLog——每个agent独立的HTTP GET操作日志，在提交时自动重构agent的读集，无需修改agent SDK。通过DeliveryLog实现可观察读隔离（ORI），这是一种针对HTTP可观察读集投影的部分因果一致性，防止共享分片协作时的结构性竞态条件。
AI.result: 三层验证证据：TLAPS机器检查了ReadSetSoundness和ORICommitSafety（保留一个类型公理）；TLC在N=3时穷举检查20,763,484个不同状态，零违规；Dafny验证了9个归纳正确性引理。与PostgreSQL 17 SERIALIZABLE和Redis 7 WATCH/MULTI进行427,308次共享分片冲突测试对比，三个后端均实现零Type-I损坏。
AI.conclusion: S-Bus的ORI一致性在专用分片工作负载下语义中立，但在单分片协作写入场景中因保留并发矛盾而可能产生有害影响，因此其操作包络是拓扑条件依赖的。

title: Scalable Environments Drive Generalizable Agents
summary: Generalizable agents should adapt to diverse tasks and unseen environments beyond their training distribution. This position paper argues that such generalization requires environment scaling: expanding the distribution of executable rule-sets that agents interact with, rather than only increasing trajectories or tasks within fixed benchmarks. Current scaling practices largely focus on collecting more experience or broader task sets under fixed interaction rules, leaving agents brittle when underlying interfaces, dynamics, observations, or feedback signals change. The core challenge is therefore a world-level distribution shift: agents need systematic exposure to environments with meaningfully different executable rule-sets. To clarify this challenge, we propose a unified taxonomy that separates trajectory scaling, task scaling, and environment scaling by their primary deliverables and by what changes in the executable rule-set. Building on this taxonomy, we synthesize construction paradigms for scalable environments, contrasting programmatic generators that prioritize controllability and verifiability with generative world models that offer broader coverage and open-endedness. We further outline how environment scaling can be coupled with stateful learning mechanisms, emphasizing learned update rules for cross-environment adaptation. We conclude by discussing alternative perspectives and argue that scalable environments provide the essential substrate for measurable and controllable progress toward robust general agents.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了实现智能体通用化需要环境扩展（environment scaling），即扩展智能体可交互的执行规则集分布，而非仅在固定基准中增加轨迹或任务。提出了区分轨迹扩展、任务扩展和环境扩展的统一分类法，并探讨了可扩展环境的构建范式及其与有状态学习机制的结合。
AI.motivation: 当前智能体在面对训练分布外的环境变化（如接口、动态特性、观测或反馈信号的改变）时表现脆弱，现有扩展实践主要集中于在固定交互规则下收集更多经验或任务集，未能解决世界级别的分布偏移问题。
AI.method: 提出了统一分类法区分轨迹扩展、任务扩展和环境扩展；综合了可扩展环境的两种构建范式：注重可控性和可验证性的编程式生成器，以及提供更广覆盖和开放性的生成式世界模型；并探讨了环境扩展与有状态学习机制（特别是学习更新规则）的结合。
AI.result: 明确了环境扩展的核心挑战是世界级别的分布偏移，即需要让智能体系统性地暴露在具有不同可执行规则集的环境中。
AI.conclusion: 可扩展环境为朝着鲁棒通用智能体的可测量、可控进展提供了必要的基底。

title: Scale Determines Whether Language Models Organize Representation Geometry for Prediction
summary: In language models, what a representation encodes is determined by the geometry of its representation space: distances, not activations, carry meaning. Existing tools characterize the shape of this geometry but do not ask what that shape is organized for. We introduce Subspace PGA, a metric that tests whether a layer's distance structure aligns with the readout subspace of the unembedding matrix $W_U$ more than with random subspaces of equal size. Across seven Pythia models (70M--6.9B) and three cross-family models, intermediate geometry is significantly organized for prediction (peak $z = 9$--$24$), but the degree is scale-dependent: small models ($d \leq 1024$) progressively lose it at late layers during training -- even as loss keeps improving -- while large models ($d \geq 2048$) preserve it throughout. We trace this to a capacity trade-off: a few dominant directions migrate away from $W_U$'s readout, masking rather than destroying the predictive structure beneath, and removing them restores alignment. Neither spectral metrics nor loss curves capture this distinction. Scale thus determines not only how well a model predicts, but how its representation geometry is organized to do so.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Subspace PGA度量，发现语言模型中间层几何结构显著组织用于预测，但小模型在训练后期会逐渐丧失这种组织性，而大模型则能保持，这源于少数主导方向偏离读出子空间的容量权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有工具仅描述表示空间的几何形状，但未探究这些形状为何种目的而组织，即几何结构是否服务于语言模型的预测任务。
AI.method: 提出Subspace PGA（子空间主梯度对齐）度量，测试层的距离结构是否与解嵌入矩阵W_U的读出子空间对齐程度高于随机子空间。
AI.result: 在7个Pythia模型（70M-6.9B）和3个跨族模型上，中间层几何显著组织用于预测（峰值z=9-24），但存在尺度依赖性：小模型（d≤1024）在训练后期逐渐丧失对齐，大模型（d≥2048）则保持。谱指标和损失曲线均无法捕捉此差异。
AI.conclusion: 模型规模不仅决定预测能力，还决定表示几何如何组织以服务于预测；小模型的预测结构未被破坏而是被少量主导方向遮蔽，移除后对齐可恢复。

title: Pairwise Preference Reward and Group-Based Diversity Enhancement for Superior Open-Ended Generation
summary: Current reinforcement learning(RL) methods are broadly applicable and powerful in verifiable settings where scalar rewards can be provided. However, in open-ended generation tasks, verifying the correctness of responses remains challenging, and training reward models incurs substantial computational and annotation costs. Moreover, reinforcement learning (RLVR) often leads to diversity collapse and produces stereotypical or rigid outputs, outcomes that are particularly undesirable in open-domain scenarios. We propose Pairwise Preference Reward and Group-based Diversity Enhancement (PPR-GDE), a RL method that is more suitable for open-ended generation. PPR-GDE does not require scalar rewards and incorporates group-level diversity into the reward signal, it preserves the comparative structure of subjective evaluation through a pairwise preference reward, mitigates judge position bias via repeated comparisons with swapped response order, and introduces a group-based diversity reward that explicitly encourages semantic dispersion within a response group, all of these reward signals are integrated into a unified group-relative policy optimization objective. We instantiate PPR-GDE on role-playing task, experiments show that PPR-GDE achieves a better alignment quality as well as expressive diversity than strong RL baselines. Further analysis shows that pairwise preference is critical for preference alignment in subjective perspective, while the diversity metric plays an essential role in achieving superior expressive diversity and broader semantic coverage.

AI.tldr: 提出PPR-GDE方法，通过成对偏好奖励和群体多样性增强，解决开放域生成任务中RLVR的多样性崩溃和标量奖励依赖问题，在角色扮演任务中实现了更好的对齐质量和表达多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有RL方法在开放域生成任务中存在三个问题：(1) 响应正确性难以验证，奖励模型训练成本高；(2) RLVR常导致多样性崩溃，输出刻板僵化；(3) 标量奖励无法捕捉主观评价的比较结构。
AI.method: PPR-GDE包含三个核心组件：(1) 成对偏好奖励——保留主观评价的比较结构；(2) 重复比较与交换响应顺序——缓解裁判位置偏差；(3) 群体多样性奖励——显式鼓励响应组内的语义分散。所有奖励信号整合为统一的群体相对策略优化目标。
AI.result: 在角色扮演任务上，PPR-GDE在对齐质量和表达多样性方面均优于强RL基线。成对偏好对主观偏好对齐关键，多样性指标对实现表达多样性和更广的语义覆盖至关重要。
AI.conclusion: PPR-GDE为开放域生成任务提供了一种无需标量奖励、同时保持对齐质量和多样性的有效RL方法，成对偏好奖励和群体多样性奖励分别解决了主观对齐和多样性崩溃问题。

title: Mechanism Learning: Prototype-Anchored Mechanism Inference for Scientific Forecasting
summary: Scientific forecasting typically relies on direct state prediction, an approach that grows brittle under data scarcity, extended horizons, non-stationary dynamics, or high-dimensional complexity. While raw state trajectories are highly sensitive in these regimes, underlying local evolution rules often exhibit robust reusability. We introduce mechanism learning, a framework that forecasts future states by estimating the currently active local mechanism. Our method compresses local spatiotemporal fragments into mechanism descriptors, forming a data-driven, structured mechanism space where proximity reflects similar local evolution rules. To ground these estimates in observed data, we utilize prototype anchors, a set of representative mechanisms that sparsely cover the space of local rules. We evaluate this approach on Burgers dynamics, WeatherBench2, and Lorenz96. Empirically, the learned mechanism spaces resist collapse and maintain strong local consistency. Compared to direct prediction and other models including FNO, NODE, LSTM, and reservoir-family methods, our framework demonstrates predictive gains in fragile regimes: it significantly improves switching stability in Burgers dynamics and achieves state-of-the-art performance both under the scarce-data fixed-horizon WeatherBench2 protocol and in intermediate-complexity Lorenz96. Ablation studies and drift diagnostics confirm that these improvements are driven by finite prototype anchoring rather than sheer latent capacity. Together, these results establish mechanism learning as a principled, robust alternative to direct state prediction in forecasting complex systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出机制学习（Mechanism Learning）框架，通过估计当前活跃的局部演化规则（机制）而非直接预测状态，对未来状态进行预测。该方法将局部时空片段压缩为机制描述符，利用原型锚点（Prototype Anchors）构建数据驱动的机制空间。在Burgers动力学、WeatherBench2和Lorenz96上的实验表明，该方法在数据稀缺、长时程、非平稳等脆弱场景下显著优于直接预测及FNO、NODE、LSTM等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统科学预测依赖直接状态预测，在数据稀缺、长时程、非平稳动力学或高维复杂场景下表现脆弱。而底层局部演化规则在这些场景下通常具有良好的可复用性，因此作者希望从预测状态转向预测机制，提升预测的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出机制学习框架：(1) 将局部时空片段压缩为机制描述符，构建数据驱动的结构化机制空间；(2) 利用原型锚点（Prototype Anchors）——一组稀疏覆盖局部规则空间的代表性机制——来将估计锚定在观测数据上；(3) 预测时先估计当前活跃的局部机制，再基于该机制推演未来状态。
AI.result: 在Burgers动力学上显著提升切换稳定性；在WeatherBench2数据稀缺定长预测协议下达到最优性能；在Lorenz96中等复杂度场景中表现最佳。机制空间保持稳定且具有强局部一致性。消融实验和漂移诊断证实性能提升源于有限原型锚点机制，而非单纯的隐容量。
AI.conclusion: 机制学习为复杂系统预测提供了一种有原则、鲁棒的替代方案，特别是在传统直接状态预测难以胜任的脆弱场景中展现出显著优势。

title: Beyond the Cartesian Illusion: Testing Two-Stage Multi-Modal Theory of Mind under Perceptual Bottlenecks
summary: While Multi-Modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate impressive capabilities in general reasoning, their embodied spatial intelligence remains hampered by a "Cartesian Illusion" - a reliance on text-based probability distributions that lack grounded, 3D topological understanding. This limitation is starkly exposed in multi-agent environments, which demand more than just scene perception; they require second-order Theory of Mind (ToM). Specifically, an Agent A must be able to infer Agent B's belief about the environment, governed strictly by Agent B's physical orientation and sensory limitations. In this paper, we probe the limits of two-stage spatial inference in MLLMs through a novel audio-visual task: requiring Agent A to predict Agent B's estimation of A's relative location. To solve this, we propose an Epistemic Sensory Bottleneck module that abandons rigid, rule-based coordinate transformations. Instead, we introduce an Anchor-Based Embodied Spatial Decomposition Chain-of-Thought (CoT). This guides the MLLM through a "geometric-to-semantic" projection, forcing it to first establish B's local coordinate system and then dynamically weight visual and auditory modalities based on whether A falls within B's visual frustum. Extensive evaluations reveal that while current MLLMs fundamentally struggle with spatial symmetry and out-of-view ambiguities (establishing a rigorous zero-shot baseline of 42% accuracy), our sensory-bounded reasoning chain robustly outperforms pure egocentric and allocentric baselines. By systematically benchmarking these perceptual bottlenecks, our work exposes the current limits of MLLM spatial reasoning and establishes a foundational paradigm for epistemic, modality-aware inference in Embodied AI.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）受困于“笛卡尔幻觉”——缺乏 grounded 的3D拓扑理解。通过设计一项双智能体音频-视觉任务（Agent A 需预测 Agent B 对 A 自身位置的估计），提出一种基于锚点的具身空间分解思维链（Anchor-Based Embodied Spatial Decomposition CoT），引导模型先建立 B 的局部坐标系，再根据 A 是否在 B 的视锥内动态加权视觉与听觉模态。实验表明当前 MLLMs 在零样本下仅 42% 准确率，而所提方法显著超越纯自我中心与纯客体中心基线。
AI.motivation: 当前 MLLMs 虽然在通用推理上表现出色，但缺乏 grounded 的 3D 拓扑理解，尤其是在多智能体环境中需要二阶心理理论（推断他人关于环境的信念）时表现不足。现有方法依赖基于文本的概率分布，无法处理空间对称性和视野外模糊性等挑战。
AI.method: 提出 Epistemic Sensory Bottleneck 模块，摒弃刚性规则坐标变换，引入 Anchor-Based Embodied Spatial Decomposition Chain-of-Thought (CoT)。该 CoT 通过“几何到语义”投影，引导 MLLM 先建立目标智能体 B 的局部坐标系，再依据 A 是否落在 B 的视觉视锥内，动态加权视觉和听觉模态信息。
AI.result: 当前 MLLMs 在零样本设定下仅达到 42% 准确率，尤其难以处理空间对称性和视野外歧义。所提出的感官受限推理链在性能上显著优于纯自我中心（egocentric）和纯客体中心（allocentric）基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统性地揭示了 MLLMs 当前空间推理能力的边界，并为具身 AI 中基于认知状态（epistemic）和模态感知的推理建立了基础范式。

title: Parallel Recursive LSTM
summary: Transformers have become the dominant architecture for sequence modeling by using self-attention to enable expressive and highly parallel processing. However, the resulting quadratic time and memory costs limit efficiency in long-context settings. Recurrent models such as LSTMs provide explicit nonlinear state updates and strong state-tracking capabilities, yet their strictly sequential computation limits parallelism. We introduce the Parallel Recursive LSTM (PR-LSTM), a hierarchical recurrent architecture that replaces left-to-right recurrence with recursive nonlinear state composition over a balanced computation tree. Tokens are first mapped independently to latent states, which are then recursively merged by a learned gated composition block. This structure uses the reduction pattern underlying parallel scans as a fixed execution schedule, rather than assuming an associative recurrence. As a result, PR-LSTM retains nonlinear gated state representations while reducing recurrent parallel depth from linear to logarithmic. Empirically, PR-LSTM achieves strong sequence-length generalization on formal-language benchmarks, solving more tasks than standard RNN, LSTM, and Transformer baselines, while avoiding the quadratic scaling of attention. These results suggest that recurrent computation can be reorganized hierarchically to expose parallelism without restricting the transition dynamics to linear or associative forms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PR-LSTM，一种通过平衡二叉树结构进行递归非线性状态合并的层次化循环架构，将循环并行深度从线性降低到对数，同时保留非线性门控状态表示，在形式语言基准上优于标准RNN、LSTM和Transformer。
AI.motivation: Transformer的自注意力机制在长序列场景下存在二次时间与内存成本；而LSTM等循环模型虽具有强状态追踪能力但严格顺序计算限制了并行性。现有方法试图用线性注意力或状态空间模型解决，但往往牺牲了非线性状态更新的表达能力。
AI.method: PR-LSTM将token独立映射到隐状态，然后通过可学习的门控合并块在平衡二叉树上递归合并状态。该结构利用并行扫描的归约模式作为固定执行调度，而非假设关联性递归，从而保留非线性门控表示的同时将并行深度从O(n)降至O(log n)。
AI.result: PR-LSTM在形式语言基准上展现了强大的序列长度泛化能力，解决了比标准RNN、LSTM和Transformer基线更多的任务，同时避免了注意力的二次缩放问题。
AI.conclusion: 循环计算可以通过层次化重组来暴露并行性，而无需将转移动态限制为线性或关联形式，这为设计兼具并行效率与非线性表达能力的新型序列模型提供了可行方向。

title: DARE-EEG: A Foundation Model for Mining Dual-Aligned Representation of EEG
comment: 22 pages, 10 pages of main text + 12 pages of appendices
summary: Foundation models pre-trained through masked reconstruction on large-scale EEG data have emerged as a promising paradigm for learning generalizable neural representations across diverse brain-computer interface applications. However, a critical yet overlooked challenge is that EEG encoders must learn representations invariant to incomplete observations-when different masked views of the same signal have minimal overlap, existing methods fail to constrain them to a consistent latent subspace, leading to degraded transferability. To address this, we propose DARE-EEG, a self-supervised foundation model that explicitly enforces the mask-invariance property through dual-aligned representation learning during pre-training. Specifically, we introduce mask alignment that constrains representations from multiple masked views of the same EEG sample via contrastive learning, complementing anchor alignment that aligns masked representations to momentum-updated complete features for semantic stability. Additionally, we propose conv-linear-probing, a parameter-efficient strategy that adapts pre-trained representations to heterogeneous electrode configurations and sampling rates through decoupled spectro-spatial projections. Extensive experiments across diverse EEG benchmarks demonstrate that DARE-EEG consistently achieves state-of-the-art in accuracy performance while maintaining relatively low parameter complexity and superior cross-dataset portability compared to existing methods. Furthermore, DARE-EEG contributes to effectively discovering and utilizing the rich potential representations in EEG.

AI.tldr: DARE-EEG提出了一种通过双重对齐表示学习来强制掩码不变性的自监督基础模型，在多个脑电基准测试中实现了最先进的准确率、低参数复杂度和优越的跨数据集可移植性。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型在预训练时使用掩码重建，但忽略了不同掩码视图间必须学习对不完整观测不变的表征——当同一信号的不同掩码视图重叠极少时，现有方法无法将其约束到一致的潜在子空间，导致迁移性能下降。
AI.method: 1. 掩码对齐：通过对比学习约束同一EEG样本多个掩码视图的表征一致性；2. 锚点对齐：将掩码表征与动量更新的完整特征对齐，保持语义稳定性；3. 卷积线性探测（conv-linear-probing）：通过解耦的谱-空间投影适配异构电极配置和采样率。
AI.result: 在多个EEG基准数据集上，DARE-EEG在准确率上达到最先进水平，同时保持较低的参数复杂度和优越的跨数据集可移植性。
AI.conclusion: DARE-EEG有效发现并利用了EEG中丰富的潜在表征，为脑电信号基础模型的自监督预训练提供了新的范式。

title: DynMuon: A Dynamic Spectral Shaping View of Muon
summary: In recent years, Muon has emerged as the dominant method for training large language models, and transformers more broadly. The essential difference, when compared to standard gradient descent methods, is to replace the usual update matrix $M=UΣV^\top$ with its polar factor $UV^\top$. In this work, we consider a class of Muon-like updates, where we replace the update $M$ with $UΣ^p V^\top$ for some parameter $p$. We call this a "spectral-shaping" operation, and develop a theory of how to pick $p$ which depends on (a) local curvature of the loss function, (b) noise stemming from stochastic gradients and label noise, and (c) training stage. Our theory and experimentation reveal a previously overlooked behavior: positive $p$ helps early by emphasizing high-curvature directions and accelerating signal contraction, while mildly negative $p$ helps later by reallocating update strength toward low-curvature directions that still contain useful training signals. Building on the insight, we propose DynMuon, an efficient dynamic spectral shaping method that schedules $p$ from positive to mildly negative over training. Extensive experiments across model sizes, architectures, and training settings show that DynMuon consistently achieves lower validation loss than Muon, while requiring 10.6-26.5% fewer steps to reach the same target loss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynMuon，一种动态谱塑形方法，通过将Muon更新矩阵M=UΣV^T替换为UΣ^p V^T，并依据局部曲率、噪声和训练阶段动态调整p值（从正到微负），实现比Muon更低的验证损失，节省10.6-26.5%的训练步数。
AI.motivation: Muon已成为训练大语言模型的主流方法，但其使用的极因子UV^T可能并非最优。本文旨在探索通过对更新矩阵进行谱塑形（即调整奇异值指数p）来进一步提升训练效率，并揭示p的正负值在不同训练阶段的不同作用。
AI.method: 将Muon更新M=UΣV^T替换为UΣ^p V^T（谱塑形），并基于损失函数的局部曲率、随机梯度噪声和标签噪声、以及训练阶段来理论推导p的最优选择。据此提出DynMuon，在训练过程中动态调度p从正值逐渐过渡到微负值。
AI.result: 在多种模型规模、架构和训练设置下，DynMuon相较于Muon持续获得更低的验证损失，并节省10.6-26.5%的训练步数以达到相同的目标损失。
AI.conclusion: 正p通过强调高曲率方向加速早期信号收缩，微负p通过将更新强度重新分配到仍包含有用训练信号的低曲率方向来帮助后期训练。动态调度p从正到微负是提升Muon训练效率的有效策略。

title: SD-Search: On-Policy Hindsight Self-Distillation for Search-Augmented Reasoning
summary: Search-augmented reasoning agents interleave internal reasoning with calls to an external retriever, and their performance relies on the quality of each issued query. However, under outcome-reward reinforcement learning, every search decision in a rollout shares the same trajectory-level reward, leaving individual queries without step-specific credit. Recent process-supervision approaches address this gap by drawing step-level signals from outside the policy, relying either on a much larger teacher model, or on sub-question annotations produced by a stronger external system. In contrast, we propose SD-Search, which derives step-level supervision from the policy itself through on-policy hindsight self-distillation, requiring neither an external teacher nor additional annotations. In SD-Search, a single model plays two roles that differ only in conditioning: a student that sees only the context available at inference time, and a teacher that additionally conditions on a compact hindsight block summarizing the search queries and final outcomes of a group of rollouts sampled from the same question. Since the teacher knows how each rollout unfolded and which ones succeeded, its query distribution implicitly marks which decisions were worth making, and the student is trained to recover this behavior by minimizing the token-level Jensen--Shannon divergence to the teacher at search-query positions. This layers a dense, step-level signal on top of GRPO's coarse trajectory reward. Crucially, this signal is produced by the policy itself within the standard RL training loop, without external model inference, auxiliary annotation pipeline, or additional training stage.

AI.tldr: SD-Search通过策略自身的在线事后自蒸馏（on-policy hindsight self-distillation）为搜索增强推理Agent的每一步查询提供步骤级监督信号，无需外部教师模型或人工标注，在GRPO粗粒度轨迹奖励之上叠加了密集的步骤级学习信号。
AI.motivation: 在基于结果奖励（outcome-reward）的强化学习中，搜索增强推理Agent的多次搜索决策共享同一轨迹级别的奖励，无法为单个查询提供步骤特定的信用分配（credit assignment），而现有的过程监督方法依赖于更大的外部教师模型或更强的外部系统生成子问题标注，成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出SD-Search方法，单一模型扮演两个角色：学生（student）仅看到推理时的上下文，教师（teacher）额外条件化于一个紧凑的事后信息块（hindsight block），该信息块汇总来自同一问题的多轮rollout的搜索查询和最终结果。由于教师知道各rollout的演变过程和成功与否，其查询分布隐含了哪些决策值得采取。学生通过最小化搜索查询位置上的token级Jensen-Shannon散度来模仿教师行为，从而在GRPO的轨迹奖励之上叠加步骤级信号。
AI.result: 该方法产生的步骤级信号由策略自身在标准RL训练循环内生成，无需外部模型推理、辅助标注流程或额外的训练阶段，实现了完全自给自足的过程监督。
AI.conclusion: SD-Search通过在线事后自蒸馏，在不依赖外部资源的情况下，为搜索增强推理Agent提供了有效的步骤级信用分配，提升了搜索决策质量。

title: Causely: A Causal Intelligence Layer for Enterprise AI A Benchmark Study on SRE and Reliability Workflows
summary: AI agents deployed into SRE workflows currently derive their understanding of environment state from raw observability telemetry at query time, paying a semantic-interpretation tax in tokens, latency, and inferential reliability. We propose Causely, a causal intelligence layer that maintains a structured representation of environment topology, attribute dependencies, and causal relationships that are anchroed to a ontological representation of the managed environment. Causely transforms raw telemetry into a live, queryable model providing the semantic and causal foundation AI agents require to diagnose, evaluate impact, and act safely in production. We evaluate this value proposition through a benchmark study conducted in a controlled setting with injected faults in a 24-microservice OpenTelemetry demo application. Our experiments compare four agent configurations (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, HolmesGPT with Sonnet and Gemini backends). Experiments are run with and without access to Causely under two scenarios: an active incident and a healthy baseline. On the active-fault scenario, causal grounding reduces mean time-to-diagnosis by 63\%, mean token consumption by 60\%, and mean tool-call count by 78\%, compressing the investigation footprint by 4.8$\times$ and lowering direct API cost per run by 57\%; root-cause-diagnosis accuracy rises from 75\% to 100\%.

AI.tldr: 提出Causely——一种因果智能层，将原始可观测性遥测数据转换为结构化的因果模型，为AI运维智能体提供语义和因果基础。在24微服务应用中验证，因果基础将平均诊断时间减少63%，token消耗减少60%，工具调用减少78%，根因诊断准确率从75%提升至100%。
AI.motivation: 当前部署到SRE工作流中的AI智能体在查询时直接从原始可观测性遥测数据中理解环境状态，在token消耗、延迟和推理可靠性方面付出了语义解释代价（semantic-interpretation tax），缺乏结构化的因果关系表示来支持高效的故障诊断与影响评估。
AI.method: 构建因果智能层Causely，维护环境拓扑、属性依赖和因果关系的结构化表示，锚定于被管环境的本体表示，将原始遥测数据转换为实时可查询的因果模型，为AI智能体提供语义和因果基础。
AI.result: 在24微服务OpenTelemetry演示应用的有故障注入场景中，相比无Causely基线：诊断时间减少63%，token消耗减少60%，工具调用次数减少78%，调查足迹压缩4.8倍，每次运行API成本降低57%，根因诊断准确率从75%提升至100%。
AI.conclusion: 因果基础（causal grounding）能显著提升AI运维智能体的诊断效率、资源效率和准确性，是AI智能体在生产环境中安全行动的关键支撑。

title: An Analytical Multiple Criteria Framework for Temporal and Dynamic Business-to-Business Customer Segmentation in Manufacturing
summary: In sales and marketing, customer segmentation is an important tool for formulating strategies for customer treatment and supply chain management. Most segmentation implementations rely on limited criteria, such as recency, frequency, and monetary (RFM) modeling, which often fail to capture complex business interactions. In this work, we design and evaluate a dynamic multi-criteria decision-making (MCDM) method in a business-to-business (B2B) manufacturing context by 1) extending RFM to dimensions of stability and growth, 2) integrating an adaptive and analytical hierarchical process to match business objectives, and 3) evaluating multivariate time-series clustering models. We then measure customer stability, tracking between-segment transitions, and volatility over time, and apply a graph-based consensus model to further strengthen the analysis. We test the efficacy of the proposed method using a real-world manufacturing company dataset to segment more than 3,000 B2B customers, showing strong robustness to temporal shifts. The implementation enables domain experts with preferential analytics to devise their strategies, providing effective decision support for B2B customer segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对B2B制造企业，提出了一种将RFM模型扩展至稳定性和增长维度、集成自适应层次分析法、并评估多变量时间序列聚类模型的动态多准则决策方法，通过对3000+真实客户数据的测试验证了其鲁棒性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统RFM客户细分模型标准有限，难以捕捉复杂的业务交互关系，无法满足B2B制造企业对客户细分的多维动态需求。
AI.method: 1) 将RFM扩展至稳定性和增长维度；2) 集成自适应层次分析法以匹配业务目标；3) 评估多变量时间序列聚类模型；4) 测量客户稳定性、段间迁移和波动性；5) 应用基于图的共识模型增强分析。
AI.result: 基于真实制造企业3000+ B2B客户数据验证，该方法对时间迁移具有较强的鲁棒性，为领域专家提供了有效的决策支持。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的动态MCDM方法能够有效支持B2B客户细分决策，为领域专家提供偏好分析工具以制定相应策略。

title: QSTRBench: a New Benchmark to Evaluate the Ability of Language Models to Reason with Qualitative Spatial and Temporal Calculi
summary: We introduce an extensive qualitative spatial and temporal reasoning (QSTR) benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs). We pose questions concerning compositional reasoning (using composition tables, CT), converse relations, and conceptual neighbourhoods (CN) for QSTR calculi, Point Algebra (PA), Allen's Interval Algebra, Interval and Duration (INDU), Region Connection Calculus (RCC-5, RCC-8, and RCC-22), the nine intersection model, cardinal direction calculus, and STAR. The RCC-22 CN is published here for the first time. An extended benchmark systematically varies question presentation including prefix/infix, words/symbols/nonce terms and schematic descriptions for selected calculi. We report results for contemporary frontier models. All models tested perform better than guessing but none can consistently answer all questions correctly. Performance varies sharply by calculus, with PA being the most straightforward, and RCC-22 the most difficult. We release the benchmark, and our results under an open licence to facilitate further assessment of qualitative spatio/temporal reasoning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个大规模定性时空推理基准，用于评估大语言模型在多种演算（如Point Algebra、Allen's Interval Algebra、RCC系列等）上的组合推理、逆关系及概念邻域能力。实验表明，前沿模型表现均优于随机猜测，但无人能完全正确回答所有问题，其中PA最简单，RCC-22最难。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在定性时空推理方面的系统评估不足，缺乏涵盖多种演算和推理类型的标准化基准。
AI.method: 构建包含组合表推理、逆关系、概念邻域等任务的QSTR基准，涉及PA、Allen's Interval Algebra、INDU、RCC-5/8/22、九交模型、基数方向演算和STAR等演算，并首次发布RCC-22的概念邻域。基准系统变化问题呈现方式（前缀/中缀、词符/非词项、示意图），并在前沿模型上测试。
AI.result: 所有模型表现优于随机猜测，但无模型能完全答对所有问题；不同演算间性能差异显著，PA最简单，RCC-22最难。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在QSTR任务上存在明显局限性，基准和结果已开源以促进进一步研究。

title: When Fireflies Cluster; Enhancing Automatic Clustering via Centroid-Guided Firefly Optimization
summary: This work presents a novel variant of the Firefly Algorithm (FA) for data clustering, addressing limitations of traditional methods like K-Means that struggle with non-uniform cluster shapes, densities, and the need for pre-defining the number of clusters. The proposed algorithm introduces a centroid movement strategy and a multi-objective fitness function that balances compactness, separation, and a novel TSP-based navigation penalty. It automatically estimates the optimal number of clusters and dynamically adjusts cluster boundaries. Application to robotic sensor networks highlights its practical value, with experiments showing improved clustering quality and reduced intra-cluster path distances compared to K-Means. These results confirm the algorithm's robustness in complex spatial clustering tasks, with potential for future extensions to higher-dimensional and adaptive scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的萤火虫算法用于数据聚类，通过质心移动策略、多目标适应度函数和TSP导航惩罚项，自动估计最优聚类数并动态调整边界，在机器人传感器网络应用中表现出优于K-Means的聚类质量和更短的簇内路径距离。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法（如K-Means）在处理非均匀簇形状、密度变化时表现不佳，且需要预先指定聚类数目，限制了其在复杂空间聚类任务中的适用性。
AI.method: 提出一种新型萤火虫算法变体，包括：(1) 质心移动策略以优化簇中心位置；(2) 多目标适应度函数，综合评估簇的紧致性、分离性以及基于旅行商问题（TSP）的导航惩罚项；(3) 自动估计最优聚类数并动态调整聚类边界。
AI.result: 在机器人传感器网络应用中，实验结果表明该算法相比K-Means显著提升了聚类质量，并减小了簇内路径距离，验证了其在复杂空间聚类任务中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的萤火虫算法变体在复杂空间聚类任务中表现出色，具有鲁棒性，未来可扩展至高维和自适应场景。

title: When Bits Break Recourse: Counterfactual-Faithful Quantization
summary: Quantization can preserve predictive accuracy under low-bit deployment while silently breaking algorithmic recourse: an actionable change that flips a decision before quantization may fail after quantization, or become substantially more costly. We formalize counterfactual sensitivity under quantization through validity, cost, and direction stability, and introduce two metrics: Validity Drop (VD) and Counterfactual Recourse Gap (CRG) that reveal recourse failures invisible to accuracy. We propose Counterfactual-Faithful Quantization (CFQ), which trains quantizer parameters and mixed-precision bit allocation to preserve counterfactual behavior by enforcing the target outcome at teacher recourse points under a global bit budget. A margin-based analysis gives a sufficient condition for recourse transfer under bounded quantization perturbations. Experiments on Adult, German Credit, and COMPAS show that accuracy-matched baselines can significantly degrade recourse stability, while CFQ maintains accuracy and substantially improves VD and CRG across bit budgets.

AI.tldr: 量化在保持预测精度的同时可能破坏算法的可解释性反事实解释。本文形式化了量化下的反事实敏感性，提出两个新指标VD和CRG来揭示准确率无法发现的追索失败，并提出反事实忠实量化方法CFQ，通过训练量化参数和混合精度分配来保持反事实行为。
AI.motivation: 低比特量化在保持模型精度的同时会破坏算法追索（即改变决策所需的最小行动变化），导致量化前后反事实解释的失效或成本大幅增加，而传统准确率指标无法捕捉这一问题。
AI.method: 1）形式化量化下反事实的三个稳定性维度：有效性、成本和方向；2）提出指标Validity Drop (VD)和Counterfactual Recourse Gap (CRG)；3）提出Counterfactual-Faithful Quantization (CFQ)，通过训练量化参数和混合精度比特分配，在全局比特预算下强制保留教师模型反事实点处的目标输出；4）基于边界分析给出量化扰动下有界条件下追索迁移的充分条件。
AI.result: 在Adult、German Credit和COMPAS数据集上，精度匹配的基线方法会显著降低追索稳定性，而CFQ在保持精度的同时，在不同比特预算下显著改善了VD和CRG指标。
AI.conclusion: 模型量化需要在保持精度的同时关注反事实解释的稳定性，CFQ方法能够有效弥合这一差距，实现精度与追索保真度的兼得。

title: OCCAM: Open-set Causal Concept explAnation and Ontology induction for black-box vision Models
summary: Interpreting the decisions of deep image classifiers remains challenging, particularly in black-box settings where model internals are inaccessible. We introduce OCCAM, a framework for open-set causal concept explanation and ontology induction in vision models. OCCAM discovers visual concepts in an open-set manner, localizes them via text-guided segmentation, and performs object-level interventions by removing concepts to measure changes in class confidence, estimating each concept's causal contribution. Beyond local explanations, OCCAM aggregates interventional evidence across a dataset to induce a structured concept ontology that captures how classifiers globally organize visual concepts. Reasoning over this ontology reveals consistent dependencies between concepts, exposes latent causal relations, and uncovers systematic model biases. Experiments on Broden and ImageNet-S across multiple classifiers show that OCCAM improves explanation quality in open-set black-box settings while providing richer global insight than per-image attribution methods.

AI.tldr: OCCAM是一个面向深度图像分类器的开放集因果概念解释与本体归纳框架，能够在黑盒场景下发现视觉概念、进行文本引导分割、通过对象级干预估计因果贡献，并聚合跨数据集的干预证据构建结构化概念本体，揭示概念依赖关系、潜在因果关系和系统性模型偏见。
AI.motivation: 深度图像分类器的决策解释仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在无法访问模型内部结构的黑盒设置下，现有方法难以同时满足开放集概念发现与全局因果解释的需求。
AI.method: OCCAM框架包含三个核心步骤：1）开放集方式发现视觉概念；2）通过文本引导分割定位概念；3）通过移除概念进行对象级干预，测量类别置信度变化以估计因果贡献。此外，跨数据集聚合干预证据以归纳结构化概念本体。
AI.result: 在Broden和ImageNet-S数据集上，针对多个分类器的实验表明，OCCAM在黑盒开放集设置下提升了解释质量，并提供了比逐图像归因方法更丰富的全局洞察。
AI.conclusion: OCCAM通过开放集因果概念发现与本体归纳，有效提升了黑盒图像分类器的可解释性，既能提供局部因果解释，又能揭示模型的全局组织结构和系统性偏差。

title: TriAxialKV: Toward Extreme Low-Precision KV-Cache Quantization for Agentic Inference Tasks
summary: Agentic workloads have emerged as a major workload for LLM inference. They differ significantly from chat-only workloads, requiring long-context processing, the ability to handle multimodal inputs, and structured multi-turn interactions with tool calling capabilities. As a result, their context exhibits structure that can carry different importance along three key axes: temporal recency to the current turn, modality such as text or image tokens, and semantic role such as user queries, tool calls, observations, or reasoning. These axes capture distinct token behaviors and lead to different sensitivities to KV-cache compression. However, existing KV-cache quantization methods are typically homogeneous or exploit only heterogeneity on a single dimension, such as temporal proximity or modality, overlooking the interactions among them. To this end, we introduce TriAxialKV, a novel mixed-precision KV-cache quantization scheme that assigns each token a triaxial tag, calibrates per-tag sensitivity, and allocates INT2/INT4 bitwidths under a fixed memory budget. We implement TriAxialKV as an end-to-end serving system, comprising calibration, mixed-precision quantization and memory management, and custom fused Triton decode kernels. When using Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking as a computer-use agent operating the OSWorld, TriAxialKV matches the accuracy of SGLang with BF16 KV cache while supporting 4.5$\times$ KV cache size and achieving 30% higher end-to-end throughput, when running on real GPU systems.

AI.tldr: TriAxialKV是一种针对智能体工作负载的三轴混合精度KV缓存量化方案，通过在时间邻近性、模态和语义角色三个维度上分配INT2/INT4位宽，在OSWorld上使用Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking时，达到BF16精度同时减少4.5倍KV缓存大小并提升30%端到端吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存量化方法通常是同质的，或仅利用单一维度（如时间邻近性或模态）的异质性，忽视了多个维度之间的交互作用，无法有效应对智能体工作负载中具有复杂结构上下文的场景。
AI.method: 提出TriAxialKV混合精度KV缓存量化方案：为每个token分配三轴标签（时间邻近性、模态、语义角色），校准每类标签的敏感性，在固定内存预算下分配INT2/INT4位宽，并实现包含校准、混合精度量化与内存管理以及自定义融合Triton解码内核的端到端服务系统。
AI.result: 在OSWorld上使用Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking作为计算机使用智能体时，TriAxialKV在匹配SGLang+BF16 KV缓存精度的同时，支持4.5倍KV缓存压缩，并在真实GPU系统上实现30%更高的端到端吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: 三轴维度上的异构量化策略能有效捕捉智能体工作负载中token行为差异，在显著压缩KV缓存的同时保持模型精度和提升服务吞吐量。

title: A Practical Noise2Noise Denoising Pipeline for High-Throughput Raman Spectroscopy
summary: A lightweight and reproducible denoising pipeline for high-throughput Raman spectroscopy is presented. The approach relies on a one-dimensional convolutional autoencoder trained using a Noise2Noise strategy, requiring neither external spectral libraries nor high signal-to-noise reference spectra for training. From a reduced training subset composed of repeated short-exposure acquisitions, the model learns to reconstruct Raman spectra while efficiently suppressing stochastic noise. The method is evaluated on a heterogeneous mineral sample, using both quantitative spectral fidelity metrics (RMSE, SNR, SSIM) and task-oriented criteria based on unsupervised K-means classification. Results demonstrate that integration times as short as 5 ms per spectrum, which are typically insufficient for reliable interpretation, yield denoised spectra with high fidelity to the reference data while preserving chemically coherent maps. This work provides a practical trade-off between spectral quality and acquisition speed, enabling fast, adaptable Raman workflows compatible with routine laboratory use. It also offers a transferable framework for other one-dimensional spectroscopic modalities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级、可复现的拉曼光谱去噪流程，采用一维卷积自编码器结合Noise2Noise训练策略，无需外部光谱库或高信噪比参考谱，仅用短曝光重复采集的子集即可高效去除随机噪声。在异质矿物样本上验证，5 ms积分时间的光谱经去噪后 fidelity 接近参考数据，化学图保持连贯，实现了光谱质量与采集速度的平衡，适用于常规实验室及一维光谱模态迁移。
AI.motivation: 高吞吐拉曼光谱中，短积分时间获取的光谱噪声水平高，传统去噪方法依赖外部光谱库或高信噪比参考谱，限制了采集速度和实验室普及。因此需要一种无需外部参考、仅利用重复短曝光数据即可训练的轻量级去噪方案，兼顾光谱质量与采集效率。
AI.method: 构建一维卷积自编码器，采用Noise2Noise训练策略：训练数据仅需重复短曝光采集的子集（无需配对干净参考谱），模型学习从含噪光谱重建无噪光谱，利用多次短曝光中噪声独立同分布的特性实现随机噪声抑制。
AI.result: 在异质矿物样本上，5 ms积分时间的原始光谱经去噪后，定量指标（RMSE、SNR、SSIM）接近参考数据，K-means无监督分类生成的化学图保持空间连贯性，证明去噪后光谱可用于可靠解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了光谱质量与采集速度之间的实用权衡，支持快速、自适应的拉曼工作流，适用于常规实验室环境，且框架可迁移至其他一维光谱模态。

title: OpenJarvis: Personal AI, On Personal Devices
summary: Personal AI stacks, like OpenClaw and Hermes Agent, are becoming central to daily work, yet they route nearly every query (often over sensitive local data) to cloud-hosted frontier models. Replacing frontier models with local models inside existing stacks does not work: swapping Claude Opus 4.6 for Qwen3.5-9B drops accuracy by 25-39 pp across personal AI tasks like PinchBench and GAIA. Existing stacks bundle agentic prompts, tool descriptions, memory configuration, and runtime settings around a specific cloud model. Only the prompts can be tuned, and state-of-the-art prompt optimizers close just 5 pp of the local-cloud gap on their own. This motivates a decomposed personal AI stack: one that exposes individual primitives which can be optimized individually or jointly to close the local-cloud gap. We present OpenJarvis, an architecture that represents a personal AI system as a typed spec over five primitives: Intelligence, Engine, Agents, Tools & Memory, and Learning. Each primitive is an independently editable field, making the stack end-to-end optimizable and measurable against accuracy, cost, and latency. Towards closing the local-cloud gap without surrendering local-model properties, OpenJarvis introduces LLM-guided spec search, a local-cloud collaboration in which frontier cloud models propose edits across the spec at search time, only non-regressing edits are accepted, and the resulting spec runs entirely on-device at inference time. With LLM-guided spec search, on-device specs match or exceed cloud accuracy on 4 of 8 benchmarks and land within 3.2 pp of the best cloud baseline on average. They also reduce marginal API cost by ~800x and end-to-end latency by 4x.

AI.tldr: OpenJarvis 提出了一种分解式个人AI堆栈架构，将系统分解为五个可独立优化的原语（智能、引擎、代理、工具与记忆、学习），并通过LLM引导的规范搜索实现本地-云端协作，使设备端模型在8个基准中的4个达到或超过云端精度，平均仅相差3.2个百分点，同时降低API成本约800倍、端到端延迟4倍。
AI.motivation: 现有个人AI堆栈将所有查询路由到云端前沿模型，存在隐私风险；简单替换为本地模型会导致精度大幅下降（25-39个百分点）；现有优化手段（仅调优提示词）仅能缩小5个百分点的差距，无法有效弥合本地与云端模型之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出OpenJarvis架构，将个人AI系统表示为包含五个原语（智能、引擎、代理、工具与记忆、学习）的类型化规范；引入LLM引导的规范搜索，让云端前沿模型在搜索时提出跨原语的编辑，仅接受非退化编辑，最终规范完全在设备端运行。
AI.result: 在8个基准测试中，设备端规范在4个上达到或超过云端精度，平均仅落后云端基线3.2个百分点；边际API成本降低约800倍，端到端延迟降低4倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解式架构和LLM引导的规范搜索，可以在不牺牲本地模型隐私和成本优势的前提下，大幅缩小与云端前沿模型的精度差距，实现高效的本地-云端协作。

title: AMR-SD: Asymmetric Meta-Reflective Self-Distillation for Token-Level Credit Assignment
summary: The alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) for complex reasoning heavily relies on Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). However, standard algorithms like GRPO apply sequence-level rewards uniformly to all tokens, creating a severe credit-assignment bottleneck. While on-policy self-distillation attempts to resolve this by conditioning a self-teacher on privileged contexts, direct exposure to raw oracle solutions often induces over-conditioned teacher distributions, implicit answer leakage, and late-stage training collapse. To overcome these limitations, we propose Asymmetric Meta-Reflective Self-Distillation (AMR-SD). Instead of conditioning directly on raw reference traces, AMR-SD inserts a reflection bottleneck: it compresses diagnostic signals -- from verifier outcomes, peer rollouts, or reference feedback -- into concise, self-generated Socratic hints and critiques. Furthermore, we introduce Causal Information Gain (CIG) with an asymmetric, ReLU-gated threshold to translate these reflections into sparse, highly precise token-level advantage modulations. Combined with temporal annealing, this mechanism preserves the base environmental reward while filtering out distributional noise. Experiments across scientific, mathematical, and tool-use benchmarks demonstrate that AMR-SD significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving robust long-horizon stability and successfully preventing late-stage collapse.

AI.tldr: 针对RLVR中序列级奖励带来的信用分配瓶颈，提出非对称元反思自蒸馏（AMR-SD）方法，通过反思瓶颈压缩诊断信号为苏格拉底式提示，并结合因果信息增益（CIG）实现细粒度token级优势调节，有效防止训练后期崩溃。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR算法（如GRPO）对所有token施加统一的序列级奖励，造成严重的信用分配瓶颈；而on-policy自蒸馏方法直接暴露于原始oracle解，导致过度条件化的教师分布、隐性答案泄露及训练后期崩溃。
AI.method: 提出AMR-SD框架：（1）反思瓶颈——将验证器结果、同伴rollout或参考反馈中的诊断信号压缩为自生成的苏格拉底式提示与批评；（2）非对称因果信息增益（CIG）——结合ReLU门控阈值，将反思信号转化为稀疏、高精度的token级优势调制；（3）时间退火机制——保留基础环境奖励的同时过滤分布噪声。
AI.result: 在科学、数学及工具使用多个基准上，AMR-SD显著优于现有基线，实现稳健的长程稳定性，并成功防止了训练后期崩溃。
AI.conclusion: AMR-SD通过引入反思瓶颈和非对称CIG优势调制，有效解决了序列级奖励的信用分配问题和自蒸馏中的过条件化崩溃，为LLM复杂推理对齐提供了更稳定的训练范式。

title: VISAFF: Speaker-Centered Visual Affective Feature Learning for Emotion Recognition in Conversation
summary: Emotion Recognition in Conversation (ERC) is essential for effective human-machine interaction, aiming to identify speakers' emotional states in multi-turn dialogues. Early text-based methods struggle with complex scenarios like sarcasm because they inherently neglect vital non-verbal information. While recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) address this by analyzing video directly, they are not inherently tailored for ERC and often focus on emotionally irrelevant background regions or passive listeners rather than the active speaker. Furthermore, fine-tuning these large models incurs prohibitive computational costs. Additionally, isolated visual signals are frequently ambiguous or technically compromised without the context of linguistic content and vocal prosody. To address these challenges, we propose VISAFF, a speaker-centered VISual AFFective feature learning framework for ERC. VISAFF consists of two stages: Speaker-Centered Affective Grounding and Reliability-Guided Affective Complementation. VISAFF utilizes a tuning-free approach to unlock the reasoning capabilities of frozen VLMs, efficiently steering them to focus on the active speaker's emotional visual cues without heavy training overheads. In the second stage, we introduce a reliability-guided affective complementation mechanism that dynamically leverages textual and acoustic modalities to compensate for visual uncertainty. Experiments on two real-world datasets demonstrate that VISAFF achieves highly competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods in a tuning-free setting, significantly enhancing computational efficiency by eliminating the need for expensive fine-tuning of large VLMs. The source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/speaker-2365/.

AI.tldr: VISAFF提出了一种免微调的两阶段框架，通过说话者中心的情感定位和可靠性引导的多模态互补机制，在无需微调大模型的前提下提升对话情感识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ERC方法面临三重挑战：纯文本方法忽略非语言信息；视觉语言模型缺乏针对性设计且易关注无关区域；视觉信号在缺少语言和韵律上下文时存在歧义和不确定性。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1) 说话者中心情感定位——免调优地利用冻结VLM推理能力聚焦主动说话者的情感视觉线索；2) 可靠性引导的情感互补——动态结合文本和声学模态补偿视觉不确定性。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上，VISAFF在免调优设定下达到与现有最先进方法竞争的性能，同时因避免大模型微调而显著提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: VISAFF验证了通过免调优方式和多模态可靠性互补机制可以有效解决ERC中的视觉歧义问题，平衡了性能与计算开销。

title: OPTNet: Ordering Point Transformer Network for Post-disaster 3D Semantic Segmentation
comment: Accepted for International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2026
summary: Post-disaster damage assessment requires rapid and accurate semantic segmentation of 3D point clouds to identify critical infrastructure such as damaged buildings and roads. Early Point Transformers (e.g., PTv1, PTv2) relied on computationally expensive neighbor searching (k-NN) and Farthest Point Sampling (FPS). To improve efficiency, recent architectures like Point Transformer V3 (PTv3) adopted static serialization methods, such as Hilbert curves or Z-order, to organize unstructured points for window-based attention. However, these fixed orderings are not optimal for capturing the complex geometry of disaster scenes. In this paper, we propose OPTNet (Ordering Point Transformer Network), which introduces a learnable Point Sorter module. OPTNet utilizes a self-supervised ordering loss to dynamically predict an optimal permutation that maximizes the locality of the attention mechanism. We evaluate our method on the 3DAeroRelief dataset, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: OPTNet提出可学习的点排序模块（Point Sorter），通过自监督排序损失动态预测最优排列，解决了传统静态序列化方法在灾后场景3D点云分割中无法捕捉复杂几何结构的问题，在3DAeroRelief数据集上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有Point Transformer系列（PTv1/PTv2）依赖计算昂贵的k-NN和FPS；PTv3虽采用希尔伯特曲线等静态序列化方法提升效率，但固定排序无法最优适配灾后场景复杂的几何结构，限制了注意力机制对局部特征的捕获能力。
AI.method: 提出OPTNet，核心是**可学习的Point Sorter模块**，通过**自监督排序损失**动态预测最优排列，最大化注意力机制的局部性，从而替代静态序列化方法。
AI.result: 在3DAeroRelief数据集上，显著优于当前最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 可学习的动态点排序能够有效提升灾后3D点云语义分割的性能，为高效且精准的灾损评估提供了新思路。

title: Query-Conditioned Knowledge Alignment for Reliable Cross-System Medical Reasoning
summary:
Cross-domain knowledge alignment is essential for integrating heterogeneous medical systems, yet existing approaches typically treat entity alignment as a static matching problem, ignoring query context and cross-system asymmetry. This limitation is particularly critical in integrative medical settings, where correspondence between concepts is inherently context-dependent, non-bijective, and direction-sensitive.
  In this paper, we propose Query-Conditioned Entity Alignment (QCEA), which reformulates entity alignment as a query-conditioned correspondence problem. Instead of learning a fixed mapping between entity representations, QCEA treats the textual description of a source entity as a query and ranks candidate entities in the target graph, enabling context-dependent alignment. The framework integrates semantic encoding, graph-based representation learning, and a direction-aware transformation module to capture asymmetric and many-to-many correspondence across heterogeneous knowledge systems.
  We evaluate QCEA on TCM--WM knowledge graphs derived from SymMap, covering both symptom alignment and herb--molecule alignment tasks. Experimental results show consistent improvements over representative baselines, particularly on rank-sensitive metrics such as Hit@K and MRR. Furthermore, downstream retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) experiments demonstrate that improved alignment leads to better evidence retrieval, stronger grounding, and higher answer accuracy. These findings highlight that alignment is not merely a data integration step, but a key factor that shapes knowledge accessibility and reliability in cross-system medical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出查询条件实体对齐（QCEA）框架，将实体对齐重新定义为查询条件对应问题，通过语义编码、图表示学习和方向感知变换模块，实现上下文依赖、非一对一的跨系统知识对齐。在中医-西医知识图谱上的实验表明，QCEA在Hit@K和MRR等指标上优于基线方法，且下游RAG实验证明对齐质量的提升能改善证据检索和答案准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有实体对齐方法通常将其视为静态匹配问题，忽略了查询上下文和跨系统不对称性，这在整合医学场景中尤为关键，因为概念对应关系本质上是上下文依赖、非双射且方向敏感的。
AI.method: QCEA框架包含三个核心组件：语义编码模块（将源实体文本描述作为查询）、图表示学习模块（捕获目标图结构信息）、方向感知变换模块（处理非对称和多对多对应关系）。将源实体描述作为查询，对目标图中的候选实体进行排序。
AI.result: 在SymMap构建的中医-西医知识图谱上，QCEA在症状对齐和草药-分子对齐任务中，Hit@K和MRR等排序指标上一致优于基线方法。下游RAG实验表明，改进的对齐带来了更好的证据检索、更强的知识锚定和更高的答案准确性。
AI.conclusion: 实体对齐不仅是数据集成步骤，更是影响跨系统医学推理中知识可访问性和可靠性的关键因素。

title: Anytime and Difficulty-Adaptive PAC-Bayes for Constrained Density-Ratio Network with Continual Learning Guarantees
summary: A unified framework for learning under covariate shift is presented, in which a constrained density-ratio network approximates the Radon-Nikodym derivative $r^\star = dP/dQ$ from source $Q$ to target $P$, supports an importance-weighted empirical risk, and feeds an anytime PAC-Bayes generalization certificate. A change-of-measure identity decomposes the gap between target risk and importance-weighted source risk into a ratio-bias term, controlled by the $L^2(Q)$ closeness of the learned ratio to $r^\star$, and a generalization-gap term, controlled by the variability of the weighted loss. Three structural identities of a Radon-Nikodym derivative, normalization, moment matching, and a second-moment penalty controlling the effective sample size, are imposed as hard integral constraints through an augmented-Lagrangian scheme. PAC-Bayes is then instantiated on the weighted risk in a fixed-time regime that yields Bernoulli-KL bounds, a KL-regularized objective whose minimizer is the network-weighted Gibbs posterior, and a stability statement on $L^2(Q)$ perturbations of the learned ratio, and in an anytime regime that builds a time-uniform certificate by geometric peeling across epochs. A pre-registered two-campaign protocol combining a patch test against analytic ground truth with a real-data deployment under intrinsic distribution shift validates the framework. The network produces a calibrated covariate ratio on real data, reduces the target $0/1$ loss relative to unweighted empirical risk minimization and to classical direct ratio-estimation baselines, and attains the anytime certificate as the construction promises. A single pre-registered failure of the fixed-time coverage claim is recorded, with per-split coverage aligning one-to-one with the magnitude of the label shift, confirming that the covariate-only assumption is operationally tight rather than a defect of the certificate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，通过约束密度比网络学习Radon-Nikodym导数来处理协变量偏移，结合重要性加权经验风险和随时PAC-Bayes泛化证书，并在合成数据与真实数据上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 在协变量偏移下，标准经验风险最小化失效，需要一种能够同时保证估计精度和提供可信泛化保证的方法。现有方法要么缺乏严格的泛化边界，要么无法有效处理高维数据中的密度比估计问题。
AI.method: 通过约束密度比网络近似dP/dQ，施加归一化、矩匹配和有效样本量二阶矩惩罚三种硬积分约束（增广拉格朗日方法）；采用PAC-Bayes框架对重要性加权风险进行固定时间和随时两种证书构建，其中固定时间使用Bernoulli-KL界，随时通过几何剥离构建时间一致证书。
AI.result: 在真实数据上校准了协变量比，降低了目标0/1损失（优于未加权ERM和经典直接比估计基线），实现了所承诺的随时证书。一次预注册的固定时间覆盖失败与标签偏移幅度一一对应，证实协变量假设的操作紧致性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效统一了协变量偏移下的密度比估计、重要性加权学习和PAC-Bayes泛化保证，实验表明协变量偏移假设的偏离会直接影响证书的覆盖性能，而非证书本身存在缺陷。

title: When Outcome Looks Right But Discipline Fails: Trace-Based Evaluation Under Hidden Competitor State
summary:
Outcome-only evaluation can certify economically unsafe agents: a policy can hit a business KPI while violating deployable behavioral discipline. In hotel pricing with hidden competitor state, a learner can achieve plausible revenue per available room while failing to preserve the rate discipline of a rule-based revenue-management competitor.
  We introduce discipline stability, a trace-based evaluation paradigm: define the benchmark behavior, restrict observations to the deployment regime, induce trace diagnostics from failure, separate mechanisms with ablations, and test transfer and deployment.
